<title>MyCharacter v_067</title> <!-- FIX v18.29 --> <!-- FIX v18.10 --> <!-- FIX v18.1 --> <!-- FIX v18.5 --> <!-- FIX v18.6 --> <!-- FIX v18.5 --> <!-- FIX v18.4 --> <!-- FIX v18.3 --> <!-- FIX v18.2 --> <!-- FIX v18.1 --> <!-- FIX v18.0 --> <!-- FIX v17.2 --> <!-- FIX v17.1 --> <!-- FIX v17.0 --> <!-- FIX v16.9 --> <!-- FIX v16.7 --> <!-- FIX v16.6 --> <!-- FIX v16.3 --> <!-- FIX v16.2 --> <!-- FIX v16.1 --> <!-- FIX v16.0 --> <!-- FIX v15.9 --> <!-- FIX v15.8 --> <!-- FIX v15.6 --> <!-- FIX v15.1 --> <!-- FIX v14.9 -->
<style>
html, body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 0; /* FIX v8.2 */
  background: #111822;
  color: #dfe8f5;
  font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
  overflow: hidden; /* FIX v8.2: one scroll area only, inside #panel */
}
* { box-sizing: border-box; }
#app {
  position: fixed; /* FIX v8.2 */
  inset: 0; /* FIX v8.2 */
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%; /* FIX v8.2 */
  min-height: 0; /* FIX v8.2 */
  overflow: hidden; /* FIX v8.2 */
}
#topbar {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  padding: 8px 10px 0 10px;
  background: #111822;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #233247;
}
#tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.tabBtn {
  border: 1px solid #35506f;
  background: #1b2a3b;
  color: #dfe8f5;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 12px;
  min-width: 88px;
}
.tabBtn.active {
  background: #0f3460;
  color: #88d8ff;
  border-color: #4da8ff;
}
.tabBtn.attention { /* FIX v18.8 */
  border-color: #e2b53d;
  color: #f8f1c8;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(226,181,61,0.35) inset, 0 0 12px rgba(226,181,61,0.18);
}
#body {
  flex: 1 1 auto; /* FIX v8.2 */
  display: flex;
  min-height: 0; /* FIX v8.2 */
  height: auto; /* FIX v8.2 */
  overflow: hidden; /* FIX v8.2 */
}
#panel {
  flex: 1 1 auto; /* FIX v8.2 */
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%; /* FIX v8.2 */
  max-height: 100%; /* FIX v8.2 */
  min-height: 0; /* FIX v8.2 */
  overflow-y: scroll; /* FIX v8.2: force reliable panel scrolling */
  overflow-x: hidden; /* FIX v8.2 */
  overscroll-behavior: contain; /* FIX v8.2 */
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; /* FIX v8.2 */
  padding: 10px 10px 120px 10px; /* FIX v8.2: room above host Close button */
}
.panelPage { display: none; }
.panelPage.active { display: block; min-height: auto; } /* FIX v8.2 */
.section {
  background: #152334;
  border: 1px solid #233247;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.section h3 {
  margin: 0 0 8px 0;
  color: #88d8ff;
  font-size: 14px;
}
.row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.row > label {
  min-width: 110px;
  color: #afc1d8;
  font-size: 12px;
}
input[type="text"], input[type="number"], select {
  background: #0e151e;
  color: #f0f6ff;
  border: 1px solid #32485f;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 6px 8px;
  min-width: 90px;
}
input[type="range"] {
  min-width: 180px;
}
button {
  background: #12365f;
  color: #dff4ff;
  border: 1px solid #4da8ff;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 12px;
}
button:hover {
  background: #194c83;
}
button.secondary {
  background: #263848;
  border-color: #506c8b;
}
button.warn {
  background: #662f2f;
  border-color: #cf7070;
}
.small {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #9db1c7;
}
#status {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  min-height: 58px;
  max-height: 120px;
  overflow: auto;
  background: #0a1118;
  border: 1px solid #243647;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 8px;
  font-family: Consolas, Monaco, monospace;
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #c7d5e2;
}
#boneList {
  border: 1px solid #243647;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #0b1218;
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow: auto;
}
.boneItem {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 6px 8px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #1c2a39;
  cursor: pointer;
  gap: 8px;
}
.boneItem:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.boneItem.active { background: #15324e; }
.kbd {
  display: inline-block;
  min-width: 16px;
  padding: 1px 4px;
  border: 1px solid #506c8b;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #1a2530;
  font-family: Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: 10px;
  color: #dfe8f5;
}
.notice {
  background: #0d1b28;
  border: 1px solid #1f3953;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #bfd1e4;
}
.linkish {
  color: #88d8ff;
}

.softSection {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(32,48,68,0.92) 0%, rgba(18,28,42,0.96) 100%);
  border: 1px solid #344a66;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 14px;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06), 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
}
.softSection h3 {
  margin: 0 0 10px 0;
  color: #dfe8f5;
  font-size: 14px;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.softActionRow { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.softFieldRow { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: end; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.softFieldBlock { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; min-width: 110px; }
.softFieldLabel { color: #c9d6e6; font-size: 12px; }
.softInput { background: #08111b; color: #f0f6ff; border: 1px solid #47627e; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px; min-width: 84px; min-height: 40px; font-size: 14px; }
.softBtn {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(76,93,115,0.34) 0%, rgba(32,44,60,0.78) 100%);
  color: #eef5ff;
  border: 1px solid #5a7090;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  min-height: 40px;
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
}
.softBtn:hover { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(90,109,133,0.46) 0%, rgba(40,56,76,0.9) 100%); }
.softBtn.active, .softBtnAccent { border-color: #e2b53d; color: #f8f1c8; }
.softBtnSecondary { border-color: #5a7090; }
.softBtnWarn { border-color: #b25767; color: #ffd7df; }
.softReadout { margin-bottom: 12px; padding: 12px; border: 1px solid #31465f; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(9,16,24,0.36); color: #d8e3f1; font-size: 12px; }
.softList { border: 1px solid #31465f; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(9,16,24,0.55); max-height: 160px; overflow: auto; padding: 6px; }
 .frameSlotGrid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(86px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; margin-top: 10px; } /* FIX v13.6 */
.frameSlotCard { border: 1px solid #344a66; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(8,17,27,0.62); padding: 8px; cursor: pointer; } /* FIX v13.6 */
.frameSlotCard.active { border-color: #e2b53d; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(226,181,61,0.25) inset; } /* FIX v13.6 */
.frameSlotCard.keyed { border-color: #1EE29A; } /* FIX v13.6 */
.frameSlotTitle { font-size: 11px; color: #dfe8f5; margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 6px; } /* FIX v13.6 */
.frameSlotThumb { height: 62px; border: 1px dashed #4f6682; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; margin-bottom: 8px; color:#91a3b7; font-size:11px; text-align:center; } /* FIX v18.29: panel thumbnails show white backing while bone images keep transparency */
.frameSlotThumb img { max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; display:block; } /* FIX v13.6 */
.frameSlotButton { width: 100%; padding: 7px 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 11px; } /* FIX v13.6 */

.expressionSubTabs { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-bottom:10px; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSubTab { border:1px solid #506c8b; background:#1b2a3b; color:#dfe8f5; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:10px; cursor:pointer; font-size:12px; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSubTab.active { border-color:#e2b53d; color:#f8f1c8; background:#263848; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionPanel { display:none; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionPanel.active { display:block; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotGrid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill, minmax(96px, 1fr)); gap:10px; margin-top:10px; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotCard { border:1px solid #344a66; border-radius:12px; background:rgba(8,17,27,0.62); padding:9px; cursor:pointer; min-height:78px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center; gap:6px; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotCard.active { border-color:#e2b53d; box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(226,181,61,0.25) inset; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotCard.keyed { border-color:#1EE29A; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotTitle { font-size:12px; color:#dfe8f5; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotHint { font-size:10px; color:#91a3b7; text-align:center; } /* FIX v18.0 */
.expressionSlotThumb { height:70px; border:1px dashed #4f6682; border-radius:8px; background:#ffffff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; margin:4px 0 6px 0; } /* FIX v18.6 */
.expressionSlotThumb img { max-width:100%; max-height:100%; display:block; object-fit:contain; } /* FIX v18.6 */
.expressionScriptBox { min-height:160px; width:100%; background:#0a1118; color:#dfe8f5; border:1px solid #243647; border-radius:8px; padding:8px; font-family:Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size:11px; white-space:pre; overflow:auto; } /* FIX v18.0 */


/* MyCharacter v_032 compact tab layout */
#topbar{
  display:block !important;
  padding:8px 10px 0 10px !important;
  background:#111822 !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #233247 !important;
}
#tabs{
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  gap:5px !important;
  margin-bottom:6px !important;
  width:100% !important;
}
#tabs .tabBtn{
  display:flex !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  justify-content:center !important;
  min-width:0 !important;
  width:100% !important;
  height:30px !important;
  padding:5px 6px !important;
  border-radius:7px 7px 0 0 !important;
  background:#1b2a3b !important;
  border:1px solid #35506f !important;
  color:#dfe8f5 !important;
  font-size:12px !important;
  letter-spacing:0 !important;
  white-space:nowrap !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
  text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
}
#tabs .tabBtn.active{
  background:#0f3460 !important;
  border-color:#4da8ff !important;
  color:#88d8ff !important;
}
#panel{
  padding:8px 10px 150px 10px !important;
  background:#07111c !important;
}
#panel > .panelPage[data-page="character"].active ~ .section{
  display:none !important;
}
#panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{
  display:block !important;
  height:calc(100vh - 104px) !important; /* FIX v_031 */
  min-height:260px !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  overflow:hidden !important; /* FIX v_025: parts cannot appear above the Add Part Save Load bar */
}
#myCharacterPanel{
  width:100% !important;
  max-width:none !important;
  height:100% !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  min-height:0 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  margin:0 !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
  border:1px solid #233247 !important;
  border-radius:8px !important;
  padding:10px !important;
  box-shadow:none !important;
  display:flex !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  flex-direction:column !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  overflow:hidden !important; /* FIX v_025 */
}
#myCharacterPanel h3{display:none !important;}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTopActions{
  flex:0 0 auto !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  gap:6px !important;
  margin:0 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  position:relative !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  z-index:5 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  background:#102033 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  padding:0 0 8px 0 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  border-bottom:1px solid #233247 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcCards{
  flex:1 1 auto !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  min-height:0 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
  gap:10px !important;
  position:relative !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  z-index:1 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  padding:10px 0 10px 0 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  overflow-y:auto !important; /* FIX v_025: part cards scroll under the fixed toolbar area */
  overflow-x:hidden !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  overscroll-behavior:contain !important; /* FIX v_025 */
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcPartCard{
  position:relative !important;
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr) !important;
  gap:6px !important;
  align-items:stretch !important;
  background:#202020 !important;
  border:1px solid #0d3972 !important;
  border-radius:12px !important;
  padding:10px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcPartCard.active{
  border-color:#4da8ff !important;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(77,168,255,0.25) inset !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTitleRow{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:22px auto minmax(82px,1fr) 28px !important;
  gap:6px !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  margin-bottom:2px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcPinBtn,
#myCharacterPanel .mcDeleteTop{
  appearance:none !important;
  -webkit-appearance:none !important;
  width:28px !important;
  height:28px !important;
  min-width:28px !important;
  min-height:28px !important;
  padding:0 !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  border-radius:6px !important;
  background:transparent !important;
  border:0 !important;
  line-height:1 !important;
  box-shadow:none !important;
  outline:0 !important;
  cursor:pointer !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcPinBtn{
  color:#ff525d !important;
  font-size:0 !important; /* FIX v_055: use supplied pin svg instead of text diamond */
  transform:none !important; /* FIX v_055 */
  display:flex !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  justify-content:center !important;
}

  color:#ffe06a !important;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,224,106,0.5)) !important;
}

  text-align:center !important;

#myCharacterPanel .mcDeleteTop{
  font-size:26px !important;
  color:#dbeaff !important;
  font-weight:200 !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcLabel{
  display:block !important;

}

}

#myCharacterPanel .mcBigBtn{

  background:#1b2a3b !important;
  border:1px solid #506c8b !important;
  color:#dff4ff !important;
  font-size:13px !important;

  text-align:center !important;
  box-shadow:none !important;
  padding:4px 6px !important;

}
#myCharacterPanel .mcBtn:hover,
#myCharacterPanel .mcBigBtn:hover{background:#263848 !important;}

#myCharacterPanel .mcBigBtn.active{

#myCharacterPanel .mcBigBtn.warn{
  background:#4c2930 !important;
  border-color:#9c5863 !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowBox{
  grid-row:span 3 !important;
  min-height:116px !important;
  border:1px solid #506c8b !important;
  border-radius:8px !important;
  background:#202020 !important;
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  justify-content:center !important;
  gap:4px !important;
  cursor:pointer !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowHalf{
  width:58px !important;
  height:44px !important;
  position:relative !important;
  cursor:pointer !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowHalf:hover{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.4)) !important;}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowHalf:before{
  content:"" !important;
  position:absolute !important;
  left:9px !important;
  border-left:20px solid transparent !important;
  border-right:20px solid transparent !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowUp:before{top:2px !important;border-bottom:20px solid #fff !important;}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowDown:before{bottom:2px !important;border-top:20px solid #fff !important;}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowHalf:after{
  content:"" !important;
  position:absolute !important;
  left:25px !important;
  width:8px !important;
  height:22px !important;
  background:#fff !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowUp:after{top:22px !important;}
#myCharacterPanel .mcArrowDown:after{bottom:22px !important;}

#myCharacterPanel .mcPinInfo{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 72px !important;
  gap:6px !important;
  align-items:center !important;
  min-height:24px !important;
  color:#b9cce3 !important;
  font-size:11px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcPinInfo .mcPinText{
  overflow:hidden !important;
  white-space:nowrap !important;
  text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcPinInfo .mcUnpinBtn{
  height:24px !important;
  min-height:24px !important;
  padding:2px 6px !important;
  font-size:11px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcLoadedTag{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
  min-height:18px !important;
  color:#9db1c7 !important;
  font-size:11px !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
  white-space:nowrap !important;
  text-overflow:ellipsis !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTransformRow{
  grid-column:1 / -1 !important;
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(5, minmax(0,1fr)) minmax(54px,auto) !important;
  gap:6px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTransformRow input{
  width:100% !important;
  min-width:0 !important;
  background:#0e151e !important;
  color:#f0f6ff !important;
  border:1px solid #32485f !important;
  border-radius:4px !important;
  padding:6px 6px !important;
  font-size:12px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTransformRow .mcApplyTransform{
  height:34px !important;
  min-height:34px !important;
  font-size:12px !important;
  padding:6px 8px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcHiddenFile{display:none !important;}
#myCharacterPanel .mcStatusLine{
  flex:0 0 auto !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  margin-top:6px !important;
  min-height:18px !important;
  color:#9db1c7 !important;
  font-size:12px !important;
  border-top:1px solid #233247 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  padding-top:6px !important; /* FIX v_025 */
  background:#102033 !important; /* FIX v_025 */
}

/* FIX v_026: MyCharacter toolbar stays fixed, cards scroll only in their clipped area */
#panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{
  position:relative !important;
  height:calc(100vh - 118px) !important;
  min-height:260px !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel{
  position:absolute !important;
  inset:0 !important;
  display:block !important;
  height:auto !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
  padding:10px !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTopActions{
  position:absolute !important;
  left:10px !important;
  right:10px !important;
  top:10px !important;
  height:50px !important;
  z-index:20 !important;
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  gap:6px !important;
  padding:0 0 8px 0 !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #233247 !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcCards{
  position:absolute !important;
  left:10px !important;
  right:10px !important;
  top:68px !important;
  bottom:34px !important;
  z-index:1 !important;
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
  gap:10px !important;
  padding:0 0 10px 0 !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  overflow-y:auto !important;
  overflow-x:hidden !important;
  overscroll-behavior:contain !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcStatusLine{
  position:absolute !important;
  left:10px !important;
  right:10px !important;
  bottom:10px !important;
  z-index:20 !important;
  height:20px !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:4px 0 0 0 !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
  border-top:1px solid #233247 !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}

@media (max-width:390px){
  #panel{padding:8px 8px 150px 8px !important;}
  #panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{height:calc(100vh - 112px) !important;} /* FIX v_026 */
  #myCharacterPanel .mcTopActions{left:8px !important;right:8px !important;top:8px !important;height:48px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcCards{left:8px !important;right:8px !important;top:64px !important;bottom:32px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcStatusLine{left:8px !important;right:8px !important;bottom:8px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel{padding:8px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcPartCard{gap:8px !important;padding:10px !important;border-radius:14px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcTitleRow{grid-template-columns:22px auto minmax(64px,1fr) 24px !important;gap:5px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcLabel{font-size:13px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcNameInput{height:34px !important;font-size:13px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcBtn,#myCharacterPanel .mcBigBtn{height:34px !important;min-height:34px !important;font-size:12px !important;padding:4px 5px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcArrowBox{min-height:112px !important;}
  #myCharacterPanel .mcTransformRow{grid-template-columns:repeat(3, minmax(0,1fr)) !important;}
}



/* FIX v_027: fixed MyCharacter chrome. Only part cards scroll. */
html, body, #app{
  height:100% !important;
  max-height:100% !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#app{
  position:fixed !important;
  inset:0 !important;
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
}
#topbar{
  flex:0 0 auto !important;
  position:relative !important;
  z-index:100 !important;
  background:#111822 !important;
}
#body{
  flex:1 1 auto !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
  height:auto !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#panel{
  position:relative !important;
  flex:1 1 auto !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
  height:100% !important;
  max-height:100% !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#panel .panelPage.active:not([data-page="character"]){
  height:100% !important;
  max-height:100% !important;
  overflow-y:auto !important;
  overflow-x:hidden !important;
  padding-bottom:150px !important;
}
#panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{
  position:absolute !important;
  left:10px !important;
  right:10px !important;
  top:10px !important;
  bottom:10px !important;
  height:auto !important;
  max-height:none !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
  padding:0 !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel{
  position:absolute !important;
  inset:0 !important;
  width:auto !important;
  height:auto !important;
  max-height:none !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
  display:flex !important;
  flex-direction:column !important;
  padding:10px !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcTopActions{
  flex:0 0 50px !important;
  position:relative !important;
  left:auto !important;
  right:auto !important;
  top:auto !important;
  height:50px !important;
  z-index:50 !important;
  display:grid !important;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr)) !important;
  gap:6px !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:0 0 8px 0 !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #233247 !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcCards{
  flex:1 1 auto !important;
  position:relative !important;
  left:auto !important;
  right:auto !important;
  top:auto !important;
  bottom:auto !important;
  min-height:0 !important;
  height:auto !important;
  z-index:1 !important;
  overflow-y:auto !important;
  overflow-x:hidden !important;
  padding:10px 0 10px 0 !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
  overscroll-behavior:contain !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcStatusLine{
  flex:0 0 20px !important;
  position:relative !important;
  left:auto !important;
  right:auto !important;
  bottom:auto !important;
  z-index:50 !important;
  height:20px !important;
  margin:0 !important;
  padding:4px 0 0 0 !important;
  background:#102033 !important;
  border-top:1px solid #233247 !important;
  overflow:hidden !important;
}
@media (max-width:390px){
  #panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{
    left:8px !important;
    right:8px !important;
    top:8px !important;
    bottom:8px !important;
  }
  #myCharacterPanel .mcTopActions{
    flex-basis:48px !important;
    height:48px !important;
  }
}


/* FIX v_031: reduce unused bottom black area while keeping room for the LukeTools Close button */
#panel{
  padding-bottom:62px !important;
}
#panel .panelPage.active:not([data-page="character"]){
  padding-bottom:72px !important;
}
#panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{
  bottom:62px !important;
}
#myCharacterPanel .mcCards{
  padding-bottom:6px !important;
}
@media (max-width:390px){
  #panel{padding-bottom:62px !important;}
  #panel .panelPage.active:not([data-page="character"]){padding-bottom:72px !important;}
  #panel .panelPage[data-page="character"].active{bottom:62px !important;}
}

</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app">
  <div id="topbar">
    <div id="tabs">
      <button class="tabBtn active" data-tab="character">Build Character</button>
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="source">Build Parts</button>
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="bones">Bones</button>
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="editbone">Edit Bn</button>
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="animate">Animate</button>
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="animatepoints">Animate C</button> <!-- FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints -->
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="expression">Expression</button> <!-- FIX v18.0 -->
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="stamp">Commit</button>
      <button class="tabBtn" data-tab="help">Help</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="body">
    <div id="panel">
      <div class="panelPage active" data-page="character">
        <div id="myCharacterPanel" class="section softSection">
          <h3>MyCharacter</h3>
          <div class="mcTopActions">
            <button id="mcAddPart" type="button" class="mcBtn" data-mc-top-action="add" onclick="try{ if(window.MyCharacterAddPart){ return window.MyCharacterAddPart(event); } }catch(e){ console.error(e); } return false;">Add Part</button>
            <button id="mcSaveCharacter" type="button" class="mcBtn" data-mc-top-action="save">Save</button>
            <button id="mcLoadCharacter" type="button" class="mcBtn" data-mc-top-action="load">Load</button>
          </div>
          <div id="mcCards" class="mcCards"></div>
          <div class="mcStatusLine" id="mcStatus">Ready</div>
          <input type="file" id="mcPartFile" class="mcHiddenFile" accept="application/json,.json,.ltbw">
          <input type="file" id="mcCharacterFile" class="mcHiddenFile" accept="application/json,.json,.mycharacter">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="source">
        <div class="section softSection"> <!-- FIX v13.6: project save/load is first visible item -->
          <h3>Project</h3>
          <div class="softActionRow">
            <button id="btnSaveRigProject" class="softBtn softBtnAccent">Save Project</button>
            <button id="btnLoadRigProject" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Load Project</button>
            <button id="btnUndoRig" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary" disabled>Undo</button> <!-- FIX v18.29 -->
            <input type="file" id="fileRigProjectLoader" accept=".json,.ltbw" style="display:none;">
            <input type="file" id="fileLipExpressionJson" accept="application/json,.json,.lipexpr" style="display:none;"> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
            <input type="file" id="fileWinkExpressionJson" accept="application/json,.json,.winkexpr" style="display:none;"> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
            <input type="file" id="fileLipExpressionImages" accept=".svg,.png,image/svg+xml,image/png" multiple style="display:none;"> <!-- FIX v18.34 -->
            <input type="file" id="fileWinkExpressionImages" accept=".svg,.png,image/svg+xml,image/png" multiple style="display:none;"> <!-- FIX v18.34 -->
          </div>
          <div id="projectSaveInfo" class="softReadout">Save or load the full Bone Warp setup, including the source SVG, bones, frame bones, and keys.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="section">
          <h3>Source</h3>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnSetArea">Set Area</button>
            <button id="btnLoadImage" class="secondary">Load SVG</button>
            <button id="btnUseSelectedCurve" class="secondary">Use Selected Wick Curves</button> <!-- FIX v17.2 -->
            <button id="btnUseSelectedCurveRemove" class="secondary">Use Selected Curves And Remove Originals</button> <!-- FIX v17.2 -->
            <button id="btnRefreshOverlay" class="secondary">Refresh Overlay</button>
            <button id="btnRemoveOverlay" class="secondary">Remove Overlay</button>
            <input type="file" id="fileImageLoader" accept=".svg,image/svg+xml" style="display:none;">
          </div>
          <div class="row"><label>Curve point density</label><input type="range" id="rngSelectedCurvePointDensity" min="0" max="100" value="100"><span id="txtSelectedCurvePointDensity" class="small">50%</span></div> <!-- FIX v14.6 -->
          <div class="row"><label>Set area</label><div id="selectedInfo" class="small">No area set</div></div>
          <div class="row"><label>Loaded SVG</label><div id="sourceInfo" class="small">No SVG loaded</div></div>
          <div class="row"><label>Overlay</label><div id="overlayInfo" class="small">Not active</div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="section">
          <h3>Overlay display</h3>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Show image</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkShowImage" checked>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Show bones</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkShowBones" checked>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Overlay opacity</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngOverlayOpacity" min="20" max="100" value="100">
            <span id="txtOverlayOpacity" class="small">100%</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="bones">
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Bone creation</h3>
          <div class="notice">The Bones tab is always in Add Bone mode. Drag empty overlay space to create the selected bone type. Click a bone to select it. Deleting a bone returns straight back to Add Bone mode. Lip_Bone and Wink_Bone are bone setup choices, but they are created as small pinned Frame Bone attachments. After creation you stay here to adjust their scale or rotation before opening Expression. Select a Lip_Bone or Wink_Bone frame bone on the overlay, then drag the corner square to scale or the round handle above it to rotate. <!-- FIX v18.10 --></div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnDeleteBone" class="warn">Delete Selected Bone</button>
            <button id="btnClearBones" class="warn">Clear All Bones</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Selected bone</label>
            <div id="selectedBoneInfo" class="small">None</div>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Bone name</label>
            <input type="text" id="inpBoneName" value="Bone 1">
            <button id="btnRenameBone" class="secondary">Rename</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row"> <!-- FIX v17.0 -->
            <label>Bone type</label>
            <select id="selBoneType">
              <option value="normal">Normal Bone</option>
              <option value="stretchy">Stretchy Bone</option>
              <option value="lip">Lip_Bone</option> <!-- FIX v18.7 -->
              <option value="wink">Wink_Bone</option> <!-- FIX v18.7 -->
            </select>
            <button id="btnApplyBoneType" class="secondary">Apply To Selected Bone</button> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Parent bone</label>
            <select id="selBoneParent"><option value="">None</option></select>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Rig mode</label>
            <select id="selRigMode">
              <option value="fk">Forward kinematics</option>
              <option value="chainIk">Chain IK</option>
              <option value="splineIk">Spline IK</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Auto connect</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkAutoConnect" checked>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Connect distance</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngConnectDistance" min="4" max="80" value="18">
            <span id="txtConnectDistance" class="small">18 px</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Uniform envelope</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBoneRadius" min="10" max="2000" value="90">
            <span id="txtBoneRadius" class="small">90</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Envelope start</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngEnvStart" min="2" max="2000" value="90">
            <span id="txtEnvStart" class="small">90</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Envelope end</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngEnvEnd" min="2" max="2000" value="90">
            <span id="txtEnvEnd" class="small">90</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row"> <!-- FIX v18.29 -->
            <label>Auto envelope</label>
            <button id="btnAutoEnvelopeSelected" class="secondary">Auto Size Selected</button>
            <button id="btnAutoEnvelopeAll" class="secondary">Auto Size All</button>
            <span class="small">Uses the source curve or opaque image bounds.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Strength</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngBoneStrength" min="1" max="300" value="100">
            <span id="txtBoneStrength" class="small">1.00</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section softSection">
          <h3>Frame bones</h3>
          <div class="notice">Frame bones follow a normal bone. Create the frame bone, enter the number of internal frames, then load SVGs into the generated slots. Use Load All SVGs to fill slots from files named 001, 002, 003 and so on.</div>
          <div class="softActionRow" style="margin-top:10px;">
            <button id="btnAddFrameBoneAttach" class="softBtn softBtnAccent">Attach Frame Bone</button>
            <button id="btnAddFrameBonePin" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Pin Frame Bone</button>
            <button id="btnDeleteFrameBone" class="softBtn softBtnWarn">Delete Frame Bone</button>
            <input type="file" id="fileFrameBoneSvgLoader" accept=".svg,.png,image/svg+xml,image/png" style="display:none;">
            <input type="file" id="fileFrameBoneSvgAllLoader" accept=".svg,.png,image/svg+xml,image/png" multiple style="display:none;">
          </div>
          <div id="selectedFrameBoneInfo" class="softReadout">None</div>
          <div class="softFieldRow">
            <div class="softFieldBlock"><label class="softFieldLabel" for="numFrameBoneFrameCount">Frame count</label><input type="number" id="numFrameBoneFrameCount" class="softInput" min="1" max="99" value="1"></div>
            <button id="btnApplyFrameBoneCount" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Apply Count</button>
            <button id="btnLoadAllFrameBoneSvgs" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Load All SVGs</button>
          </div>
          <div class="softFieldRow">
            <div class="softFieldBlock"><label class="softFieldLabel" for="numFrameBoneScale">Scale</label><input type="number" id="numFrameBoneScale" class="softInput" min="0.01" max="20" step="0.05" value="1"></div>
            <div class="softFieldBlock"><label class="softFieldLabel" for="numFrameBoneRotation">Rotate</label><input type="number" id="numFrameBoneRotation" class="softInput" min="-360" max="360" step="1" value="0"></div>
            <button id="btnApplyFrameBoneTransform" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Apply Transform</button>
          </div>
          <div id="frameBoneSlots" class="frameSlotGrid">No selected frame bone</div>
          <div style="height:10px;"></div>
          <div id="frameBoneList" class="softList">No frame bones</div>
        </div>


        <div class="section">
          <h3>Weight paint</h3>
          <div class="notice">Paint weights for the selected bone. Paint adds influence. Erase removes influence. The selected bone weight overlay can stay visible while animating.</div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnToggleWeightPaint" class="secondary">Weight Paint Off</button>
            <button id="btnClearWeightPaint" class="warn">Clear Selected Weight</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Paint action</label>
            <select id="selWeightPaintAction">
              <option value="paint">Paint</option>
              <option value="erase">Erase</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Brush size</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngWeightBrushSize" min="2" max="200" value="28">
            <span id="txtWeightBrushSize" class="small">28 px</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Brush strength</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngWeightBrushStrength" min="1" max="100" value="35">
            <span id="txtWeightBrushStrength" class="small">0.35</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Show weight</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkShowWeightOverlay">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Bone list</h3>
          <div id="boneList"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="editbone">
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Edit selected bone</h3>
          <div class="notice">Use this tab for precise rest bone editing only. Click a bone head, tail, or bone line to edit the bone. Click a purple envelope node to edit the envelope. This tab does not create animation keys.</div> <!-- FIX v16.6 -->
          <div class="row">
            <label>Selected bone</label>
            <div id="editBoneInfo" class="small">None</div>
          </div>
          <div class="row"> <!-- FIX v16.6 -->
            <button id="btnEditBoneModeBone" class="secondary">Edit Bone</button>
            <button id="btnEditBoneModeEnvelope" class="secondary">Edit Envelope</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Head X</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditHeadX" step="1" value="0">
            <label style="min-width:50px;">Head Y</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditHeadY" step="1" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Tail X</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditTailX" step="1" value="0">
            <label style="min-width:50px;">Tail Y</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditTailY" step="1" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Length</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditLength" step="1" min="1" value="1">
            <label style="min-width:50px;">Angle</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditAngle" step="1" value="0">
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Envelope start</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditEnvStart" step="1" min="2" value="90">
            <label style="min-width:50px;">Envelope end</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditEnvEnd" step="1" min="2" value="90">
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Strength</label>
            <input type="number" id="numEditStrength" step="0.05" min="0" value="1">
          </div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnEditApplyBone">Apply Bone Values</button>
            <button id="btnEditRefreshBone" class="secondary">Refresh Values</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="animate">
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Animation setup</h3>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Wick frames</label>
            <input type="number" id="inpFrameCount" min="1" max="300" value="24" readonly>
            <label style="min-width:50px;">FPS</label>
            <input type="number" id="inpFPS" min="1" max="60" value="12">
            <button id="btnApplyTimeline" class="secondary">Sync Wick Timeline</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Frame source</label>
            <div id="frameCountInfo" class="small">Uses the existing Wick timeline length. No separate warp timeline is drawn.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Wick timeline frame</label>
            <div id="wickFrameIndicator" class="notice" style="font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;min-width:140px;text-align:center;cursor:ew-resize;user-select:none;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">Frame 1</div>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Current frame</label>
            <input type="number" id="inpCurrentFrame" min="1" max="300" value="1">
            <button id="btnPrevFrame" class="secondary">Prev</button>
            <button id="btnNextFrame" class="secondary">Next</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Playback</label>
            <button id="btnPlay">Play Preview</button> <!-- FIX v18.5 -->
            <button id="btnPlaySync">Play Sync</button> <!-- FIX v18.5 -->
            <button id="btnStop" class="secondary">Stop</button>
            <button id="btnPreviewFromWick" class="secondary">Jump To Wick Frame</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Follow Wick playhead</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkFollowWick" checked>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Keyframes</h3>
          <div class="notice">In the Animate tab, dragging a bone handle on the overlay creates or updates a keyframe on the current frame. The tool interpolates between keyframes.</div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnSetKey">Set Key At Current</button>
            <button id="btnClearKey" class="warn">Clear Current Key</button>
            <button id="btnCopyPrevPose" class="secondary">Copy Previous Pose</button>
            <button id="btnResetCurrentToRest" class="secondary">Reset Current To Rest</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Current key state</label>
            <div id="keyInfo" class="small">No key on this frame</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section softSection"> <!-- FIX v13.6 -->
          <h3>Frame bone image keys</h3>
          <div class="notice">Move the Wick playhead to the frame you want, then click one of the frame bone images below. The mouth or eye name is keyed to the selected frame bone at the current Wick frame. If no key exists, the first frame is used. // FIX v18.29</div>
          <div id="animateFrameBoneInfo" class="softReadout">No selected frame bone</div>
          <div id="frameBoneAnimateSlots" class="frameSlotGrid">No selected frame bone</div>
          <div class="softActionRow" style="margin-top:10px;">
            <button id="btnClearFrameBoneKey" class="softBtn softBtnWarn">Clear Frame Bone Key</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="section">
          <h3>Proxy bone keyframe layers</h3>
          <div class="notice">Creates locked Wick timeline proxy layers for each BoneWarp bone and draws BoneWarp keyframe diamonds on the matching bone row. The proxy layers are visual timeline helpers only and do not animate the SVG by themselves.</div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnProxySetup" class="secondary">Create Proxy Bone Layers</button>
            <button id="btnProxyAddKey">Add Proxy Key</button>
            <button id="btnProxySync" class="secondary">Sync Proxy</button>
            <button id="btnProxyRemove" class="warn">Remove Proxy</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Proxy state</label>
            <div id="proxyInfo" class="small">No proxy bone layers</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="animatepoints"> <!-- FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints -->
        <div class="section softSection">
          <h3>Animate Curve</h3>
          <div class="notice">Use automatic Bezier controls to animate local curve ranges. The tool creates Bezier controls automatically when Animate Curve is open. Each control defaults to a 5 point range. Points outside the selected range stay fixed. <!-- FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve --></div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Show Animate Curve</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkAnimateBezierHandles" checked> <!-- FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve -->
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Bezier range</label>
            <input type="range" id="rngAutoBezierRange" min="3" max="15" step="2" value="5"> <!-- FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve -->
            <span id="txtAutoBezierRange" class="small">5 points</span> <!-- FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve -->
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Selected Curve Segment</label>
            <div id="animatePointInfo" class="small">No curve segment selected</div>
          </div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <button id="btnSetPointKey">Set Curve Key</button>
            <button id="btnAddBezierDetailInRange" class="secondary">Add Detail In Range</button> <!-- FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve -->
            <button id="btnClearPointKey" class="warn">Clear Curve Range Key</button>
            <button id="btnResetPointAtFrame" class="secondary">Reset Range At Frame</button>
          </div>
          <div class="section softSection" style="margin-top:12px;"> <!-- FIX v18.57_NoSmoothTab -->
            <h3>Relax Brush</h3>
            <div class="notice small">Paint over the source shape to relax only the local points inside the brush radius. This replaces the old Smooth tab workflow.</div>
            <div class="row">
              <label>Use Relax Brush</label>
              <input type="checkbox" id="chkRelaxBrushEnabled">
            </div>
            <div class="row">
              <label>Brush size</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngRelaxBrushSize" min="6" max="160" value="45">
              <span id="txtRelaxBrushSize" class="small">45 px</span>
            </div>
            <div class="row">
              <label>Relax strength</label>
              <input type="range" id="rngRelaxBrushStrength" min="1" max="100" value="35">
              <span id="txtRelaxBrushStrength" class="small">35%</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="notice small">Point keys are stored separately from bone keys. During preview and commit, keyed point positions and Bezier handles are applied first, then the existing bone warp is applied. Frame 1 keys are created automatically for points and bones.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="expression"> <!-- FIX v18.0 -->
        <div class="section softSection">
          <h3>Expression Bones</h3>
          <div class="notice">Lip Bones and Wink Bones are Frame Bone style attachments. Create them by attaching to a selected parent bone or by pinning them to a point on the arm of a selected bone. Lip Service and Eye Service show their frame images and key the selected frame bone on the real Wick timeline. <!-- FIX v18.6 --></div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:10px;">
            <label>Selected expression frame bone</label>
            <div id="expressionBoneInfo" class="small">None</div>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Target clip name</label>
            <input type="text" id="inpExpressionTargetClip" value="" placeholder="MouthShape or EyeShape">
            <button id="btnApplyExpressionTarget" class="secondary">Apply Target</button>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Expression commit</label>
            <select id="selExpressionCommitMode">
              <option value="script">Script Style</option>
              <option value="clipInClip">Clip In Clip Script Driver</option>
            </select>
            <button id="btnBuildExpressionScript" class="secondary">Build Script</button>
            <button id="btnCopyExpressionScript" class="secondary">Copy Script</button>
            <button id="btnCreateExpressionFrameClip" class="secondary">Add Frames To Clip</button> <!-- FIX v18.5 -->
            <button id="btnCommitExpressionScript">Commit Script To Selected Wick Clip</button>
          </div>
          <div class="expressionSubTabs">
            <button class="expressionSubTab active" data-expression-tab="lip">Lip Service</button>
            <button class="expressionSubTab" data-expression-tab="eye">Eye Service</button>
            <button class="expressionSubTab" data-expression-tab="script">Script</button>
          </div>
          <div class="expressionPanel active" data-expression-panel="lip">
            <div class="notice">Lip_Bone is created from the Bone type setup as a pinned Frame Bone. The slots use the Lip Service default images in order, labelled A through I, then Rest. After creating the Lip_Bone, the Bones tab stays open so you can adjust scale and rotation with the overlay handles before choosing Expression. Load Lip images here in Expression, not in the generic Frame Bone slot area. <!-- FIX v18.10 --></div>
            <div class="softActionRow" style="margin-top:10px;">
              <button id="btnAttachLipFrameBone" class="softBtn softBtnAccent">Attach Lip Bone</button> <!-- FIX v18.6 -->
              <button id="btnPinLipFrameBone" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Pin Lip Bone</button> <!-- FIX v18.6 -->
              <button id="btnLoadLipExpressionImages" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Load Lip Images</button> <!-- FIX v18.34 -->
            </div>
            <div id="lipExpressionSlots" class="expressionSlotGrid"></div>
            <div class="softActionRow" style="margin-top:10px;">
              <button id="btnLoadLipExpressionJson" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Load Lip JSON</button> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
              <button id="btnSaveLipExpressionJson" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Save Lip JSON</button> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
              <button id="btnClearLipExpressionKey" class="softBtn softBtnWarn">Clear Lip Key</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="expressionPanel" data-expression-panel="eye">
            <div class="notice">Wink_Bone is created as a pinned Frame Bone. After creating the Wink_Bone, the Bones tab stays open so you can adjust scale and rotation before choosing Expression. <!-- FIX v18.8 --></div>
            <div class="softActionRow" style="margin-top:10px;">
              <button id="btnAttachWinkFrameBone" class="softBtn softBtnAccent">Attach Wink Bone</button> <!-- FIX v18.6 -->
              <button id="btnPinWinkFrameBone" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Pin Wink Bone</button> <!-- FIX v18.6 -->
              <button id="btnLoadWinkExpressionImages" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Load Wink Images</button> <!-- FIX v18.34 -->
            </div>
            <div id="eyeExpressionSlots" class="expressionSlotGrid"></div>
            <div class="softActionRow" style="margin-top:10px;">
              <button id="btnLoadWinkExpressionJson" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Load Wink JSON</button> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
              <button id="btnSaveWinkExpressionJson" class="softBtn softBtnSecondary">Save Wink JSON</button> <!-- FIX v18.4 -->
              <button id="btnClearEyeExpressionKey" class="softBtn softBtnWarn">Clear Eye Key</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="expressionPanel" data-expression-panel="script">
            <div class="notice">This script drives the named mouth or eye clips from the real Wick timeline frame. On Commit, RotoBones builds MouthShape and EyeShape inside the committed shape clip, then adds the driver script to that committed shape clip. The expression layer is generated above the shape frames. Add Frames To Clip is only for manual testing.</div> <!-- FIX v18.5 -->
            <pre id="expressionScriptPreview" class="expressionScriptBox"></pre>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="stamp">
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Commit animation to Wick</h3>
          <div class="notice">Choose PNG, SVG mesh warp, or SVG Native Mode. SVG Native Mode warps parsed SVG points directly and keeps the result vector. Frame Bones are committed into their own real frame layer. Expression clips are placed above the shape frames and frame bone frames.</div>
          <div class="row" style="margin-top:8px;">
            <label>Clip name</label>
            <input type="text" id="inpClipName" value="BoneWarpClip">
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Export mode</label>
            <select id="selExportMode">
              <option value="png">PNG with transparency</option>
              <option value="svg">SVG mesh warp</option>
              <option value="svgNative">SVG Native point warp</option>
              <option value="nativeCurve" selected>Native Wick curves</option> <!-- FIX v16.9 -->
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="row"> <!-- FIX v18.0 -->
            <label>Expression bones</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkCommitExpressionScript" checked>
            <span class="small">Also add the Lip Bone and Wink Bone script driver where possible.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Place at source</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkPlaceAtSource" checked>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <label>Sync with parent</label>
            <input type="checkbox" id="chkSyncWithParent" checked>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <button id="btnStampClip">Commit To Wick</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- FIX v18.57_NoSmoothTab: Smooth tab removed. Relax Brush controls now live in Animate Points. -->

      <div class="panelPage" data-page="help">
        <div class="section">
          <h3>Bone Warp Stamp help</h3>
          <div class="notice">This version is built around SVG Native warping. It loads SVG artwork, lets bones deform the SVG points, supports Frame Bones for swapping attached SVG artwork, and commits the result into Wick as a clip with real internal frames that remains in the project after the Luke Tool is closed. <!-- FIX v18.5 --></div>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>1. Save and load</h3>
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li><b>Save Project</b> stores the Bone Warp setup as a project JSON file.</li>
            <li>The saved file includes the source SVG, normal bones, Frame Bones, loaded Frame Bone SVG slots, bone keys, Frame Bone keys, scale, rotation, and tool settings.</li>
            <li><b>Load Project</b> restores that setup so you can keep working later.</li>
            <li>Save and Load are at the top of the Source tab because they are project level actions.</li>
          </ol>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>2. Source SVG</h3>
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li>Click <b>Set Area</b> and drag the first placement area on the Wick stage.</li>
            <li>Click <b>Load SVG</b> and choose a normal SVG or Inkscape SVG file.</li>
            <li>Or select one or more Wick curves on the stage and click <b>Use Selected Wick Curves</b>. The selected curves are converted into one internal SVG source, using a shared placement area around all selected curves.</li> <!-- FIX v17.2 -->
            <li>Use <b>Use Selected Curves And Remove Originals</b> if you want the tool to ingest the selected Wick curves and then delete the original stage objects only after the conversion succeeds.</li> <!-- FIX v17.2 -->
            <li>Use <b>Curve point density</b> before ingesting a selected Wick curve if the artwork needs more points for smoother bone bending. This inserts extra points between the existing corner points only. Corner points are preserved exactly, so the design is not smoothed, averaged, simplified, or rearranged.</li> <!-- FIX v14.7 -->
            <li>The Set Area frame is only used for initial placement. After loading or converting a selected curve, the visible tool overlay shows the SVG, bones, envelopes, handles, and Frame Bones.</li>
            <li>The SVG keeps its aspect ratio. Mesh controls are not part of this SVG Native workflow.</li>
            <li>Wick pan and zoom are followed by the overlay, but pan and zoom are not recorded as animation.</li>
          </ol>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>3. Bones</h3>
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li>The Bones tab is automatically in Add Bone mode.</li>
            <li>Drag on empty SVG space to create a normal warp bone, or set Bone type to Stretchy Bone before dragging if you want the tail length to be keyable and to pull nearby curve points along the bone axis.</li> <!-- FIX v17.1 -->
            <li>Click an existing bone to select it.</li>
            <li><b>Delete Selected Bone</b> only deletes the currently selected bone. After deletion, no other bone is deleted unless you select another bone and click delete again.</li>
            <li>Connected child bones keep their head locked to the parent tail and evaluate their angle relative to the parent bone.</li>
            <li>Use <b>Edit Bone</b> for precise rest bone position values. In the Edit Bone tab you can also click the purple envelope nodes directly to edit rest influence envelope values. These edits do not create animation keys.</li> <!-- FIX v16.6 -->
          </ol>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>4. Frame Bones</h3>
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li>A Frame Bone follows the normal bone it is attached to.</li>
            <li><b>Attach Frame Bone</b> attaches a Frame Bone to the selected normal bone.</li>
            <li><b>Pin Frame Bone</b> lets you click a place on the SVG and place the Frame Bone there.</li>
            <li>Enter the number of Frame Bone frames. The tool creates a visual slot for each frame.</li>
            <li>Each slot has a blank preview area and a <b>Load Image</b> button for transparent SVG or PNG files.</li>
            <li><b>Load All SVGs</b> fills slots from filenames such as 001.svg, 002.svg, and 003.svg.</li>
            <li>If no Frame Bone key exists on a Wick frame, the Frame Bone displays slot 001 by default.</li>
            <li>Use the Frame Bone scale and rotate controls to orient the attached SVG artwork.</li>
          </ol>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>5. Animate</h3>
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li>Move the real Wick playhead to the frame you want to key.</li> <!-- FIX v16.6 -->
            <li>Use the <b>Animate</b> tab to set, clear, copy, and reset selected bone keys. Edit Bone is only for changing rest bone values.</li> <!-- FIX v16.5 -->
            <li>Drag a normal bone handle to create or update a key for only that bone.</li>
            <li>Normal bone key layers appear in the Wick timeline as locked proxy rows.</li>
            <li>Drag a normal bone key diamond in the Wick timeline to move that one bone key to another frame.</li>
            <li>Frame Bone key layers appear as separate locked proxy rows.</li>
            <li>To key a Frame Bone, scrub to a Wick frame and click the Frame Bone slot image you want. That slot is then shown on the Frame Bone at that Wick frame.</li>
          </ol>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>6. Animate Curve</h3> <!-- FIX v18.57_NoSmoothTab -->
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li>Use Animate Curve to adjust automatic Bezier segments on the Wick timeline.</li> <!-- FIX v16.2 -->
            <li>Smooth Bezier Node creates keyed Bezier handles on the current Wick frame.</li>
            <li>Relax Brush now lives in Animate Curve and relaxes only the painted local area.</li> <!-- FIX v18.3 -->
            <li>Point animation is applied before the bone warp.</li>
            <li>The old Smooth tab has been removed.</li> <!-- FIX v18.53_RelaxBrush_PointToggle -->
            <li>Use Animate Curve to key local Bezier curve changes on the real Wick timeline. Handles display at the current bone warped positions.</li> <!-- FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints -->
          </ol>
        </div>
        <div class="section">
          <h3>7. Commit to Wick</h3>
          <ol class="small" style="line-height:1.6; padding-left:18px;">
            <li>Go to <b>Commit</b> when the animation is ready.</li>
            <li>Choose SVG Native output for SVG based commits.</li>
            <li><b>Commit to Wick</b> creates a real Wick clip in the project.</li>
            <li>The committed clip uses expanded bounds so the warped SVG and Frame Bone SVGs are not clipped by the old Set Area.</li>
            <li>Generated SVG frames are kept as SVG assets where Wick supports SVG assets. They are not intentionally converted to PNG.</li>
            <li>Closing the Luke Tool removes the temporary tool overlay and proxy UI, but the committed Wick clip remains in the Wick project.</li>
          </ol>
          <div class="notice">Overlay controls: drag a head or tail circle to move a bone handle. Drag a bone line to move the whole bone. <span class="kbd">Shift</span> constrains movement to the dominant axis.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section" id="globalStatusSection" style="display:none;">
        <h3>Status</h3>
        <div id="status">Ready.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  var App = {
    activeTab: 'character',
    editBoneMode: 'bone',
    newBoneType: 'normal', // FIX v17.0 // FIX v16.6: Edit Bone tab has explicit non-keying edit modes.
    B: null,
    ed: null,
    project: null,
    Wick: null,
    paper: null,
    source: {
      dataUrl: '',
      embeddedDataUrl: '', // FIX v5.2
      image: null,
      width: 0,
      height: 0,
      stageBounds: null,
      stageCenter: null,
      stageRotation: 0,
      viewportRect: null,
      stagePlacementBounds: null, // FIX v8.8: stored stage area. View pan and zoom only change display, not animation data.
      selectedIdentifier: '',
      selectedUUID: '',
      fileName: '', // FIX v6.0
      captureMode: '', // FIX v5.5
      svgRaw: '', // FIX v7.1
      svgNative: null, // FIX v7.1
      sourceTimeline: null, // FIX v14.8
      sourceLayer: null, // FIX v14.8
      sourceFrame: null, // FIX v14.8
      sourceFrameNumber: 1, // FIX v14.8
      alphaMask: null,
      alphaThreshold: 254,
      opaqueBounds: null
    },
    grid: { cols: 18, rows: 18, resolution: 18 },
    flags: {
      showImage: true,
      showMesh: true,
      showBones: true,
      followWick: true
    },
    rig: {
      mode: 'fk',
      autoConnect: true,
      connectDistance: 18,
      meshOpaqueOnly: true
    },
    smooth: { // FIX v8.7
      enabled: false,
      amount: 0.35,
      curveStrength: 0.70,
      pointSpacing: 18, // FIX v18.3: smoothing adds points so long straight runs and curves have enough geometry before smoothing
      preserveEnds: true,
      keepFlatEnds: true, // FIX v16.2
      showPoints: true, // FIX v18.53_RelaxBrush_PointToggle
      relaxBrushEnabled: false, // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      relaxBrushSize: 45, // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      relaxBrushStrength: 0.35 // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    },
    selectedCurve: { // FIX v14.6
      pointDensity: 100
    },
    proxy: { // FIX v10.2
      active: false,
      wickLayer: null,
      overlayCanvas: null,
      hitDivs: [],
      blockDivs: [],
      container: null,
      scrollContainer: null,
      rafId: null,
      framePending: false,
      name: 'BoneWarp_Proxy_Keys', // FIX v12.7: internal identifier safe
      layers: [], // FIX v10.9: one real Wick proxy layer per BoneWarp bone
      hitMeta: [], // FIX v10.9
      eventTargets: [], // FIX v10.9: listeners that keep proxy overlay following mouse and scrollbar interaction
      lastScrollX: null, // FIX v10.9
      lastScrollY: null // FIX v10.9
    },
    overlay: {
      root: null,
      clipHost: null, // FIX v8.9
      canvas: null,
      svgLayer: null, // FIX v7.5
      ctx: null,
      opacity: 1,
      active: false,
      timelineRoot: null,
      timelineCanvas: null,
      timelineCtx: null,
      needsRender: false,
      canvasScaleX: 1, // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
      canvasScaleY: 1, // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
      previewBounds: null // FIX v7.0
    },
    interaction: {
      addBoneMode: false,
      dragging: false,
      dragType: '',
      boneId: null,
      startLocal: null,
      startPose: null,
      startBone: null,
      shift: false,
      hoverBoneId: null,
      hoverHandle: '',
      startDescendants: [],
      setAreaActive: false, // FIX v6.0
      setAreaRoot: null, // FIX v6.0
      setAreaBox: null, // FIX v6.0
      setAreaStart: null, // FIX v6.0
      setAreaMove: null, // FIX v6.0
      setAreaUp: null, // FIX v6.0
      setAreaKey: null, // FIX v6.0
      hoverLocal: null, // FIX v6.4
      lastPaintLocal: null, // FIX v6.4
      parentCloseHandler: null, // FIX v9.7
      unloadHandler: null, // FIX v9.7
      cleanupDone: false, // FIX v9.7
      preKeyedBoneIds: [], // FIX v11.3
      preExistingKeyFrame: false, // FIX v11.3
      pointId: null, // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
      startPoint: null // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    },
    bones: [],
    nextBoneId: 1,
    selectedBoneId: null,
    frameBones: [], // FIX v13.2
    nextFrameBoneId: 1, // FIX v13.2
    selectedFrameBoneId: null, // FIX v13.2
    committedClipIdentifiers: [], // FIX v14.0: committed Wick clips are real project content and must survive LukeTool close cleanup
    frameBoneCreateMode: 'attach', // FIX v13.2
    frameBonePinMode: false, // FIX v13.2
    frameBoneKeys: {}, // FIX v13.2 frame -> frameBoneId -> internal SVG slot
    frameCount: 24,
    frameCountSource: 'Wick timeline',
    fps: 12,
    currentFrame: 1,
    keyframes: {},
    pointKeys: {}, // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints: frame -> point id -> absolute source point position
    pointAnimation: { showPoints: false, showBezierHandles: true, selectedPointId: '', autoBezierRange: 5, selectedBezier: null, openBezier: null }, // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    expressionKeys: {}, // FIX v18.0: boneId -> frame -> expression frame key
    expressionProfiles: {}, // FIX v18.0: boneId -> target clip and selected frame settings
    expressionSubTab: 'lip', // FIX v18.0
    expressionCommitMode: 'script', // FIX v18.0
    pendingExpressionFrameKind: null, // FIX v18.6
    importedExpressionAudioName: '', // FIX v18.29
    importedExpressionAudioDataUrl: '', // FIX v18.29: stage play audio fallback
    importedExpressionAudioType: '', // FIX v18.29: stage play audio fallback
    importedExpressionAudioDuration: 0, // FIX v18.29: stage play audio fallback
    scrubAudioCtx: null, // FIX v18.32: WebAudio scrub preview like original Lip Service
    scrubAudioBuffer: null, // FIX v18.32
    scrubAudioSource: null, // FIX v18.32
    scrubAudioLastAt: 0, // FIX v18.32
    scrubAudioDecodePromise: null, // FIX v18.32
    playing: false,
    playSyncToWick: false, // FIX v18.5
    playTimer: null,
    wickFollowTimer: null,
    closeWatchTimer: null,
    undo: { stack: [], max: 12, lastSnapshotText: '', isRestoring: false }, // FIX v18.29
    lastStageViewSignature: '', // FIX v8.8

    timeline: {
      breadcrumbsH: 30,
      numberLineH: 35,
      layersW: 160,
      cellW: 38,
      cellH: 42,
      gridMargin: 1,
      scrollbarH: 18,
