      currentCellStart: 0
    },
    paint: {
      enabled: false,
      action: 'paint',
      brushSize: 28,
      brushStrength: 0.35,
      showOverlay: false
    }
  };

  function el(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }
  function q(sel, root){ return (root || document).querySelector(sel); }
  function qa(sel, root){ return Array.prototype.slice.call((root || document).querySelectorAll(sel)); }
  function clamp(v, a, b){ return Math.max(a, Math.min(b, v)); }
  function lerp(a, b, t){ return a + (b - a) * t; }
  function dist(a, b){ var dx = a.x - b.x, dy = a.y - b.y; return Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy); }
  function clone(obj){ return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)); }
  function round(n){ return Math.round(n * 1000) / 1000; }
  function nowName(){ return 'BW_' + Date.now(); }

  function stripWhiteSvgBackgroundFromDataUrl(dataUrl){ // FIX v18.29
    var value = String(dataUrl || '');
    if (value.indexOf('data:image/svg+xml') !== 0) return value;
    try {
      var comma = value.indexOf(',');
      if (comma < 0) return value;
      var header = value.slice(0, comma + 1);
      var body = value.slice(comma + 1);
      var svgText = '';
      if (/;base64/i.test(header)) svgText = atob(body);
      else svgText = decodeURIComponent(body);
      svgText = String(svgText || '');
      svgText = svgText.replace(/<rect\b[^>]*(?:x=["']0["'][^>]*y=["']0["'][^>]*|width=["']300["'][^>]*height=["'](?:170|220|300)["'][^>]*)fill=["']#(?:fff|ffffff|fefefe)["'][^>]*\/?>/gi, ''); // FIX v18.29
      svgText = svgText.replace(/<path\b[^>]*fill=["']#fefefe["'][^>]*\/?>/gi, ''); // FIX v18.29: remove Lip Service page background only, keep white mouth detail
      return 'data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(svgText);
    } catch(e) {
      return value;
    }
  }

  function expressionImageDataUrl(item){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!item) return '';
    var value = String(item.dataUrl || '');
    return stripWhiteSvgBackgroundFromDataUrl(value);
  }

  function frameBoneSlotDisplayName(fb, slot){ // FIX v18.29
    slot = Number(slot || 1);
    var data = fb && fb.frames ? fb.frames[slot] : null;
    if (data) {
      var label = String(data.label || data.expressionKey || '').trim();
      if (label) return label;
      var fileName = String(data.fileName || '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '').trim();
      if (fileName) return fileName;
    }
    return frameBoneSlotTitle(slot);
  }

  var LIP_EXPRESSION_FRAMES = [ // FIX v18.29: A to I then Rest mapped sequentially from the Lip Service defaults
    { key:"A", label:"A", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:rest" },
    { key:"B", label:"B", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:MBP" },
    { key:"C", label:"C", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:O" },
    { key:"D", label:"D", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:etc" },
    { key:"E", label:"E", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:E" },
    { key:"F", label:"F", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:AI" },
    { key:"G", label:"G", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:FV" },
    { key:"H", label:"H", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:L" },
    { key:"I", label:"I", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:U" },
    { key:"Rest", label:"Rest", dataUrl:"data:image/svg+xml;base64,", source:"Lip_Service_v125:WQ" }
  ];

  var EYE_EXPRESSION_FRAMES = [ // FIX v18.6
    { key:"Rest", label:"Rest" },
    { key:"Look Up", label:"Look Up" },
    { key:"Look Down", label:"Look Down" },
    { key:"Look Left", label:"Look Left" },
    { key:"Look Right", label:"Look Right" },
    { key:"Blink", label:"Blink" },
    { key:"Wink Left", label:"Wink Left" },
    { key:"Wink Right", label:"Wink Right" }
  ];

  function makeEyeFrameSvgDataUrl(key){ // FIX v18.6
    var label = String(key || 'Rest');
    var left = '<path d="M70 82 C88 64 112 64 130 82 C112 99 88 99 70 82 Z" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>';
    var right = '<path d="M170 82 C188 64 212 64 230 82 C212 99 188 99 170 82 Z" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>';
    var lp = '<circle cx="100" cy="82" r="8" fill="#111"/>';
    var rp = '<circle cx="200" cy="82" r="8" fill="#111"/>';
    var lx = 100, rx = 200, py = 82;
    if (label === 'Look Up') py = 74;
    if (label === 'Look Down') py = 90;
    if (label === 'Look Left') { lx = 92; rx = 192; }
    if (label === 'Look Right') { lx = 108; rx = 208; }
    lp = '<circle cx="' + lx + '" cy="' + py + '" r="8" fill="#111"/>';
    rp = '<circle cx="' + rx + '" cy="' + py + '" r="8" fill="#111"/>';
    if (label === 'Blink') { left = '<path d="M70 82 L130 82" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>'; right = '<path d="M170 82 L230 82" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>'; lp = ''; rp = ''; }
    if (label === 'Wink Left') { left = '<path d="M70 82 L130 82" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>'; lp = ''; }
    if (label === 'Wink Right') { right = '<path d="M170 82 L230 82" fill="none" stroke="#111" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>'; rp = ''; }
    var svg = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="170" viewBox="0 0 300 170"><rect width="300" height="170" fill="#fff"/><path d="M62 52 L138 48" stroke="#111" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M162 48 L238 52" stroke="#111" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>' + left + right + lp + rp + '</svg>';
    return 'data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(svg);
  }

  function hydrateDefaultExpressionImages(){ // FIX v18.6
    EYE_EXPRESSION_FRAMES.forEach(function(item){ if (!item.dataUrl) item.dataUrl = makeEyeFrameSvgDataUrl(item.key); });
  LIP_EXPRESSION_FRAMES.forEach(function(item){ item.dataUrl = expressionImageDataUrl(item); }); // FIX v18.29
  EYE_EXPRESSION_FRAMES.forEach(function(item){ item.dataUrl = expressionImageDataUrl(item); }); // FIX v18.29
  }
  hydrateDefaultExpressionImages();

  function makeValidIdentifier(value, fallback){ // FIX v12.7
    var raw = String(value == null ? '' : value).trim();
    if (!raw) raw = String(fallback || 'item');
    var cleaned = raw.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_$]/g, '_');
    if (!/^[A-Za-z_$]/.test(cleaned)) cleaned = '_' + cleaned;
    cleaned = cleaned.replace(/_+/g, '_');
    if (!cleaned || !/^[A-Za-z_$][A-Za-z0-9_$]*$/.test(cleaned)) cleaned = String(fallback || 'item').replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_$]/g, '_');
    if (!/^[A-Za-z_$]/.test(cleaned)) cleaned = '_' + cleaned;
    return cleaned;
  }

  function boneProxyIdentifierForBone(bone){ // FIX v12.7
    return makeValidIdentifier(String((bone && bone.name) || ('Bone_' + (bone && bone.id || ''))), 'Bone_' + (bone && bone.id || '')); // FIX v16.1
  }

  function frameBoneProxyIdentifierForFrameBone(frameBone){ // FIX v13.7
    return makeValidIdentifier('F_Bone_' + (frameBone && frameBone.id || ''), 'F_Bone_' + (frameBone && frameBone.id || '')); // FIX v16.1
  }


  function log(msg){
    var box = el('status');
    var text = (typeof msg === 'string') ? msg : JSON.stringify(msg, null, 2);
    var stamp = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
    box.textContent = '[' + stamp + '] ' + text + '\n' + box.textContent;
  }

  function setStatusOnce(msg){
    el('status').textContent = msg;
  }

  function getBridge(){
    try { if (window.LukeToolsBridge) return window.LukeToolsBridge; } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.LukeToolsBridge) return window.parent.LukeToolsBridge; } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.top && window.top.LukeToolsBridge) return window.top.LukeToolsBridge; } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function getEditor(bridge){
    try { if (bridge && typeof bridge.getEditor === 'function') return bridge.getEditor(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.wickEditor) return window.parent.wickEditor; } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.wickEditor && window.parent.wickEditor.editor) return window.parent.wickEditor.editor; } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.editor) return window.parent.editor; } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function getProject(bridge){
    try { if (bridge && typeof bridge.getProject === 'function') return bridge.getProject(); } catch(e){}
    var ed = getEditor(bridge);
    try { if (ed && ed.project) return ed.project; } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function refreshBridgeRefs(){
    App.B = getBridge();
    App.ed = getEditor(App.B);
    App.project = getProject(App.B);
    try { App.Wick = window.parent.Wick; } catch(e){ App.Wick = null; }
    try { App.paper = window.parent.paper; } catch(e){ App.paper = null; }
    return !!(App.ed && App.project && App.Wick);
  }

  function cleanWickNullReferences(){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    try {
      var project = App.project || (App.ed && App.ed.project ? App.ed.project : null);
      var timelines = [];
      function addTimeline(tl){ if (tl && timelines.indexOf(tl) < 0) timelines.push(tl); }
      addTimeline(project && project.timeline ? project.timeline : null);
      addTimeline(project && project.activeTimeline ? project.activeTimeline : null);
      addTimeline(project && project.focus && project.focus.timeline ? project.focus.timeline : null);
      addTimeline(project && project.activeClip && project.activeClip.timeline ? project.activeClip.timeline : null);
      addTimeline(proxyTimeline ? proxyTimeline() : null);
      timelines.forEach(function(tl){
        try {
          if (!tl || !tl.layers) return;
          for (var li = tl.layers.length - 1; li >= 0; li -= 1) {
            var layer = tl.layers[li];
            if (!layer) { tl.layers.splice(li, 1); continue; }
            try {
              if (layer.frames) {
                for (var fi = layer.frames.length - 1; fi >= 0; fi -= 1) {
                  var frame = layer.frames[fi];
                  if (!frame) { layer.frames.splice(fi, 1); continue; }
                  ['paths','objects','wickObjects','children','items'].forEach(function(prop){
                    try {
                      var arr = frame[prop];
                      if (!arr || typeof arr.length !== 'number' || typeof arr.splice !== 'function') return;
                      for (var oi = arr.length - 1; oi >= 0; oi -= 1) if (!arr[oi]) arr.splice(oi, 1);
                    } catch(eArr){}
                  });
                }
              }
            } catch(eFrames){}
          }
        } catch(eTl){}
      });
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function markDirty(){
    cleanWickNullReferences(); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.project) App.ed.project.unsavedChanges = true; } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.project && typeof App.ed.project.markAsModified === 'function') App.ed.project.markAsModified(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.canvas && typeof App.ed.canvas.render === 'function') App.ed.canvas.render(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.ed && typeof App.ed.projectDidChange === 'function') App.ed.projectDidChange(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.ed && typeof App.ed.syncInterfaces === 'function') App.ed.syncInterfaces(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.ed && typeof App.ed.updateUI === 'function') App.ed.updateUI(); } catch(e){}
    try { window.parent.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize')); } catch(e){}
  }

  function setActiveTab(name){
    App.activeTab = name;
    if (name === 'bones') { // FIX v13.2: Bones tab defaults to Add Bone mode
      App.interaction.addBoneMode = true;
      if (App.paint.enabled) App.paint.enabled = false;
    } else { // FIX v4.7: Add Bone mode must not carry into Animate or other tabs.
      App.interaction.addBoneMode = false; // FIX v4.7
      App.frameBonePinMode = false; // FIX v13.2
      App.interaction.dragging = false; // FIX v4.7
      App.interaction.dragType = ''; // FIX v4.7
      App.paint.enabled = false; // FIX v6.4
    }
    if (name === 'animate' || name === 'animatepoints') ensureFirstFrameKeysAlways(); // FIX v18.57_FirstFrameKeys
    qa('.tabBtn').forEach(function(btn){ btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-tab') === name); });
    updateExpressionTabHighlight(); // FIX v18.8
    qa('.panelPage').forEach(function(page){ page.classList.toggle('active', page.getAttribute('data-page') === name); });
    if (name === 'expression') { // FIX v18.6
      var efb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind('lip') || getExpressionFrameBoneForKind('eye');
      if (efb) { App.selectedFrameBoneId = efb.id; App.expressionSubTab = expressionFrameBoneKind(efb); }
      else { var eb = selectFirstExpressionBoneForExpressionTab(); if (eb) App.expressionSubTab = expressionKindForBone(eb); }
      setExpressionSubTab(App.expressionSubTab || 'lip');
    }
    updateEditBoneControls(); // FIX v6.7
    updateFrameBoneUI(); // FIX v13.2
    renderExpressionUI(); // FIX v18.0
    renderOverlay();
  }

  function isRestBoneEditContext(){ // FIX v16.6
    return App.activeTab === 'bones' || App.activeTab === 'editbone';
  }

  function normaliseBoneType(value){ // FIX v18.0
    value = String(value || '').toLowerCase();
    if (value === 'stretchy') return 'stretchy';
    if (value === 'lip') return 'lip';
    if (value === 'wink') return 'wink';
    return 'normal';
  }

  function isStretchyBone(bone){ // FIX v17.0
    return !!(bone && normaliseBoneType(bone.type) === 'stretchy');
  }

  function isLipBone(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    return !!(bone && normaliseBoneType(bone.type) === 'lip');
  }

  function isWinkBone(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    return !!(bone && normaliseBoneType(bone.type) === 'wink');
  }

  function isExpressionBone(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    return isLipBone(bone) || isWinkBone(bone);
  }

  function boneTypeLabel(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    if (isStretchyBone(bone)) return 'Stretchy Bone';
    if (isLipBone(bone)) return 'Lip Bone';
    if (isWinkBone(bone)) return 'Wink Bone';
    return 'Normal Bone';
  }

  function isAnimateKeyContext(){ // FIX v16.6
    return App.activeTab === 'animate';
  }

  function isEnvelopeDragType(type){ // FIX v16.6
    return type === 'envHeadPos' || type === 'envHeadNeg' || type === 'envTailPos' || type === 'envTailNeg';
  }

  function editBoneModeAllowsDragType(type){ // FIX v18.1
    if (App.activeTab !== 'editbone') return true;
    if (isEnvelopeDragType(type)) return true; // FIX v18.1: Edit Bone tab can edit envelope nodes directly.
    return type === 'head' || type === 'tail' || type === 'line'; // FIX v18.1
  }

  function setEditBoneMode(mode){ // FIX v16.6
    App.editBoneMode = mode === 'envelope' ? 'envelope' : 'bone';
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
  }

  function editBoneAngleDeg(bone){ // FIX v6.7
    if (!bone) return 0;
    return Math.atan2(bone.tail.y - bone.head.y, bone.tail.x - bone.head.x) * 180 / Math.PI;
  }

  function setInputValueIfPresent(id, value){ // FIX v6.7
    var node = el(id);
    if (!node) return;
    if (document.activeElement === node) return;
    node.value = String(value);
  }

  function updateEditBoneControls(){ // FIX v6.7
    var bone = getSelectedBone();
    if (el('editBoneInfo')) el('editBoneInfo').textContent = bone ? (bone.name + '  ' + boneTypeLabel(bone)) : 'None'; // FIX v17.0
    if (!bone) return;
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditHeadX', Math.round(bone.head.x));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditHeadY', Math.round(bone.head.y));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditTailX', Math.round(bone.tail.x));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditTailY', Math.round(bone.tail.y));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditLength', Math.round(Math.max(1, dist(bone.head, bone.tail))));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditAngle', Math.round(editBoneAngleDeg(bone)));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditEnvStart', Math.round(getBoneEnvStart(bone)));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditEnvEnd', Math.round(getBoneEnvEnd(bone)));
    setInputValueIfPresent('numEditStrength', round(bone.strength || 1));
  }

  function readNumberInput(id, fallback){ // FIX v6.7
    var node = el(id);
    if (!node) return fallback;
    var n = Number(node.value);
    return isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
  }

  function applyEditBoneFields(){ // FIX v6.7
    var bone = getSelectedBone();
    if (!bone) {
      log('No selected bone to edit.');
      return;
    }
    var oldParentBone = { head: clone(bone.head), tail: clone(bone.tail) };
    var startDesc = captureDescendantStateForBone(bone.id, null);
    var hx = readNumberInput('numEditHeadX', bone.head.x);
    var hy = readNumberInput('numEditHeadY', bone.head.y);
    var tx = readNumberInput('numEditTailX', bone.tail.x);
    var ty = readNumberInput('numEditTailY', bone.tail.y);
    bone.head = { x: hx, y: hy };
    bone.tail = { x: tx, y: ty };
    var requestedLength = readNumberInput('numEditLength', dist(bone.head, bone.tail));
    var requestedAngle = readNumberInput('numEditAngle', editBoneAngleDeg(bone));
    requestedLength = Math.max(1, requestedLength);
    var rad = requestedAngle * Math.PI / 180;
    bone.tail = { x: bone.head.x + Math.cos(rad) * requestedLength, y: bone.head.y + Math.sin(rad) * requestedLength };
    bone.restLength = requestedLength;
    bone.envStart = clamp(readNumberInput('numEditEnvStart', getBoneEnvStart(bone)), 2, 500);
    bone.envEnd = clamp(readNumberInput('numEditEnvEnd', getBoneEnvEnd(bone)), 2, 500);
    bone.radius = Math.max(getBoneEnvStart(bone), getBoneEnvEnd(bone));
    bone.strength = Math.max(0, readNumberInput('numEditStrength', bone.strength || 1));
    var newParentBone = { head: clone(bone.head), tail: clone(bone.tail) };
    applyDescendantTransformToRest(startDesc || [], oldParentBone, newParentBone);
    enforceAllRestChains();
    Object.keys(App.keyframes).forEach(function(fr){
      if (!App.keyframes[fr]) return;
      if (!App.keyframes[fr][bone.id]) App.keyframes[fr][bone.id] = { head: clone(bone.head), tail: clone(bone.tail), angle: Math.atan2(bone.tail.y - bone.head.y, bone.tail.x - bone.head.x), envStart: getBoneEnvStart(bone), envEnd: getBoneEnvEnd(bone) };
      App.keyframes[fr][bone.id].envStart = getBoneEnvStart(bone);
      App.keyframes[fr][bone.id].envEnd = getBoneEnvEnd(bone);
      enforceAllPoseChains(App.keyframes[fr]);
    });
    updateEditBoneControls();
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
  }


  function selectFirstExpressionBoneForExpressionTab(){ // FIX v18.2
    var current = currentExpressionBone(); // FIX v18.2
    if (current) return current; // FIX v18.2
    var chosen = null; // FIX v18.2
    (App.bones || []).some(function(b){ // FIX v18.2
      if (isLipBone(b)) { chosen = b; return true; } // FIX v18.2
      return false; // FIX v18.2
    }); // FIX v18.2
    if (!chosen) { // FIX v18.2
      (App.bones || []).some(function(b){ // FIX v18.2
        if (isExpressionBone(b)) { chosen = b; return true; } // FIX v18.2
        return false; // FIX v18.2
      }); // FIX v18.2
    } // FIX v18.2
    if (chosen) { // FIX v18.2
      App.selectedBoneId = Number(chosen.id); // FIX v18.2
      ensureExpressionProfileForBone(chosen); // FIX v18.2
      App.expressionSubTab = expressionKindForBone(chosen) || 'lip'; // FIX v18.2
      return chosen; // FIX v18.2
    } // FIX v18.2
    App.expressionSubTab = 'lip'; // FIX v18.2
    return null; // FIX v18.2
  } // FIX v18.2

  function expressionKindForBone(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    if (isWinkBone(bone)) return 'eye';
    if (isLipBone(bone)) return 'lip';
    return '';
  }


  function expressionKindLabel(kind){ // FIX v18.6
    return kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink' : 'Lip';
  }

  function isExpressionBoneTypeValue(value){ // FIX v18.7
    var v = normaliseBoneType(value);
    return v === 'lip' || v === 'wink';
  }

  function expressionKindFromBoneTypeValue(value){ // FIX v18.7
    return normaliseBoneType(value) === 'wink' ? 'eye' : 'lip';
  }

  function expressionFrameBoneKind(fb){ // FIX v18.6
    if (!fb) return '';
    var k = String(fb.expressionKind || fb.kind || '').toLowerCase();
    if (k === 'wink') k = 'eye';
    if (k === 'lip' || k === 'eye') return k;
    return '';
  }

  function isExpressionFrameBone(fb){ // FIX v18.6
    return !!expressionFrameBoneKind(fb);
  }

  function expressionFramesForFrameBoneKind(kind){ // FIX v18.6
    return expressionFramesForKind(kind);
  }

  function prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!fb) return null;
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    fb.expressionKind = kind;
    if (fb.expressionDefaultScaleApplied !== true) { fb.scale = kind === 'eye' ? 0.28 : 0.22; fb.expressionDefaultScaleApplied = true; } // FIX v18.8: pinned expression frame bones start small and remain adjustable in Bones tab
    if (fb.expressionDefaultRotationApplied !== true) { fb.rotationDeg = kind === 'lip' ? 90 : (Number(fb.rotationDeg || 0) || 0); fb.expressionDefaultRotationApplied = true; } // FIX v18.34: Lip_Bone starts at 90 degrees, then remains user adjustable
    fb.name = fb.name && fb.name.indexOf('Frame Bone') < 0 ? fb.name : (expressionKindLabel(kind) + ' Bone ' + fb.id);
    var frameList = expressionFramesForFrameBoneKind(kind);
    fb.frameCount = frameList.length;
    fb.frames = fb.frames || {};

    // FIX v18.29: remove old generated expression slots so the panel cannot keep accumulating the wrong mouth images.
    Object.keys(fb.frames).forEach(function(slotKey){
      var slotNumber = Number(slotKey);
      var existing = fb.frames[slotKey];
      if (slotNumber > frameList.length || (existing && existing.expressionDefault === true && existing.expressionKind && existing.expressionKind !== kind)) {
        delete fb.frames[slotKey];
      }
    });

    frameList.forEach(function(item, idx){
      var slot = idx + 1;
      var existingSlot = fb.frames[slot];
      if (!existingSlot || existingSlot.expressionDefault === true) {
        fb.frames[slot] = {
          fileName: item.label + '.svg',
          label: item.label,
          expressionKey: item.key,
          expressionKind: kind,
          expressionDefault: true,
          dataUrl: stripWhiteSvgBackgroundFromDataUrl(item.dataUrl || makeEyeFrameSvgDataUrl(item.key)), // FIX v18.29
          width: kind === 'eye' ? 300 : 300,
          height: kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300
        };
      }
      ensureFrameBoneImageCache(fb.frames[slot]);
    });
    ensureProxyLayerForCreatedFrameBone(fb);
    App.selectedFrameBoneId = fb.id;
    return fb;
  }

  function getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind){ // FIX v18.6
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var selected = getSelectedFrameBone();
    if (selected && expressionFrameBoneKind(selected) === kind) return selected;
    for (var i = 0; i < (App.frameBones || []).length; i += 1) {
      if (expressionFrameBoneKind(App.frameBones[i]) === kind) return App.frameBones[i];
    }
    return null;
  }

  function selectExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind){ // FIX v18.6
    var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind);
    if (fb) App.selectedFrameBoneId = fb.id;
    return fb;
  }

  function createExpressionFrameBoneFromBoneType(kind, point){ // FIX v18.7
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var parent = getSelectedBone();
    if (!parent || isExpressionBone(parent)) {
      App.pendingExpressionFrameKind = kind;
      App.frameBonePinMode = true;
      App.interaction.addBoneMode = false;
      App.activeTab = 'bones';
      log('Select a normal parent bone first, then click on the bone arm to pin the ' + expressionKindLabel(kind) + '_Bone frame bone.');
      updateUI();
      renderOverlay();
      updateExpressionTabHighlight(); // FIX v18.8
      return null;
    }
    var place = point ? clone(point) : clone(parent.tail);
    var fb = addFrameBoneAtPoint(place, parent.id);
    prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind);
    App.pendingExpressionFrameKind = null;
    App.frameBonePinMode = false;
    App.expressionSubTab = kind;
    App.activeTab = 'bones'; // FIX v18.8: stay in Bones so the user can adjust the pinned frame bone first
    qa('.tabBtn').forEach(function(btn){ btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-tab') === App.activeTab); }); // FIX v18.8
    qa('.panelPage').forEach(function(page){ page.classList.toggle('active', page.getAttribute('data-page') === App.activeTab); }); // FIX v18.8
    updateFrameBoneUI();
    renderExpressionUI();
    renderOverlay();
    updateExpressionTabHighlight(); // FIX v18.8
    App.newBoneType = 'normal'; // FIX v18.29: one shot Lip_Bone and Wink_Bone creation stops repeated mouth image/frame bone creation
    if (el('selBoneType')) el('selBoneType').value = 'normal'; // FIX v18.29
    App.interaction.addBoneMode = false; // FIX v18.29
    log('Added ' + expressionKindLabel(kind) + '_Bone as a small pinned Frame Bone attached to ' + parent.name + '. Adjust Scale and Rotate in Frame bones, then open Expression when ready.');
    return fb;
  }

  function beginPinExpressionFrameBone(kind){ // FIX v18.6
    var parent = getSelectedBone();
    if (!parent) { log('Select a parent bone first, then pin the ' + expressionKindLabel(kind) + ' Bone to the arm of that bone.'); return; }
    App.pendingExpressionFrameKind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    App.frameBonePinMode = true;
    App.interaction.addBoneMode = false;
    App.activeTab = 'expression';
    App.expressionSubTab = App.pendingExpressionFrameKind;
    updateUI();
    renderExpressionUI();
    renderOverlay();
    log('Pin ' + expressionKindLabel(App.pendingExpressionFrameKind) + ' Bone mode: click on the parent bone arm or nearby artwork to place it.');
  }

  function attachExpressionFrameBone(kind){ // FIX v18.6
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var parent = getSelectedBone();
    if (!parent) { log('Select the parent bone first, then attach the ' + expressionKindLabel(kind) + ' Bone.'); return; }
    if (isExpressionBone(parent)) { log('Select a normal parent bone, not a Lip or Wink bone type. Lip and Wink are frame bone attachments.'); return; }
    var point = clone(parent.tail);
    var fb = addFrameBoneAtPoint(point, parent.id);
    prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind);
    App.expressionSubTab = kind;
    setActiveTab('expression');
    updateFrameBoneUI();
    renderExpressionUI();
    renderOverlay();
    log('Attached ' + fb.name + ' to ' + parent.name + '.');
  }

  function expressionSlotNumberForKey(kind, key){ // FIX v18.6
    var list = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i += 1) {
      if (String(list[i].key) === String(key)) return i + 1;
    }
    return 1;
  }

  function expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(fb, slot){ // FIX v18.6
    var kind = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb);
    var list = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    var item = list[Math.max(0, Number(slot || 1) - 1)] || list[0];
    return item ? item.key : 'Rest';
  }


  function expressionFramesForKind(kind){ // FIX v18.0
    return kind === 'eye' ? EYE_EXPRESSION_FRAMES : LIP_EXPRESSION_FRAMES;
  }

  function defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind){ // FIX v18.0
    return kind === 'eye' ? 'Rest' : 'A'; // FIX v18.10
  }

  function selectBoneById(boneId, autoOpenExpression){ // FIX v18.0
    App.selectedBoneId = boneId == null ? null : Number(boneId);
    var bone = getSelectedBone();
    if (bone && isExpressionBone(bone)) {
      ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone);
      App.expressionSubTab = expressionKindForBone(bone);
      if (autoOpenExpression === true) setActiveTab('expression'); else updateExpressionTabHighlight(); // FIX v18.8
    }
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
  }

  function ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    if (!bone) return null;
    if (!App.expressionProfiles) App.expressionProfiles = {};
    var id = String(bone.id);
    var kind = expressionKindForBone(bone);
    if (!kind) return null;
    if (!App.expressionProfiles[id]) {
      App.expressionProfiles[id] = {
        boneId: bone.id,
        kind: kind,
        targetClipName: kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape',
        defaultFrame: defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind)
      };
    }
    App.expressionProfiles[id].kind = kind;
    if (!App.expressionProfiles[id].defaultFrame) App.expressionProfiles[id].defaultFrame = defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind);
    if (!App.expressionProfiles[id].targetClipName) App.expressionProfiles[id].targetClipName = kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
    if (!App.expressionKeys) App.expressionKeys = {};
    if (!App.expressionKeys[id]) App.expressionKeys[id] = {};
    return App.expressionProfiles[id];
  }

  function ensureExpressionProfileForFrameBone(fb){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!fb) return null;
    if (!App.expressionProfiles) App.expressionProfiles = {};
    var id = 'frameBone_' + String(fb.id);
    var kind = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb) || 'lip';
    if (!App.expressionProfiles[id]) {
      App.expressionProfiles[id] = {
        kind: kind,
        targetClipName: kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape',
        defaultFrame: defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind)
      };
    }
    App.expressionProfiles[id].kind = kind;
    if (!App.expressionProfiles[id].targetClipName) App.expressionProfiles[id].targetClipName = kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
    if (!App.expressionProfiles[id].defaultFrame) App.expressionProfiles[id].defaultFrame = defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind);
    return App.expressionProfiles[id];
  }

  function setExpressionSubTab(kind){ // FIX v18.0
    App.expressionSubTab = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'script') ? kind : 'lip';
    qa('.expressionSubTab').forEach(function(btn){ btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-expression-tab') === App.expressionSubTab); });
    qa('.expressionPanel').forEach(function(panel){ panel.classList.toggle('active', panel.getAttribute('data-expression-panel') === App.expressionSubTab); });
    renderExpressionUI();
  }

  function updateExpressionTabHighlight(){ // FIX v18.8
    var btn = q('.tabBtn[data-tab="expression"]');
    if (!btn) return;
    var fb = getSelectedFrameBone ? getSelectedFrameBone() : null;
    var shouldHighlight = !!(App.pendingExpressionFrameKind || (fb && isExpressionFrameBone(fb)));
    btn.classList.toggle('attention', shouldHighlight && App.activeTab !== 'expression');
    if (fb && isExpressionFrameBone(fb)) {
      var kind = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb);
      if (kind) App.expressionSubTab = kind;
    }
  }

  function currentExpressionBone(){ // FIX v18.0
    var bone = getSelectedBone();
    return isExpressionBone(bone) ? bone : null;
  }

  function expressionKeyAtFrame(bone, frame){ // FIX v18.0
    if (!bone) return '';
    var profile = ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone);
    var store = App.expressionKeys && App.expressionKeys[String(bone.id)] ? App.expressionKeys[String(bone.id)] : {};
    var key = store[String(frame)] || '';
    return key || (profile ? profile.defaultFrame : '');
  }

  function setExpressionKey(kind, key){ // FIX v18.0
    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    if (!bone) { log('Select a Lip Bone or Wink Bone first.'); return; }
    var actualKind = expressionKindForBone(bone);
    if (kind && kind !== actualKind) { log('Selected bone is not the right expression type.'); return; }
    ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone);
    var id = String(bone.id);
    if (!App.expressionKeys[id]) App.expressionKeys[id] = {};
    App.expressionKeys[id][String(App.currentFrame)] = key;
    ensureProxyLayerForCreatedBone(bone);
    scheduleProxyFrame();
    updateUI();
    log('Set ' + bone.name + ' expression key at frame ' + App.currentFrame + ' to ' + key + '.');
  }

  function clearExpressionKey(kind){ // FIX v18.0
    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    if (!bone) { log('Select a Lip Bone or Wink Bone first.'); return; }
    var actualKind = expressionKindForBone(bone);
    if (kind && kind !== actualKind) { log('Selected bone is not the right expression type.'); return; }
    var id = String(bone.id);
    if (App.expressionKeys && App.expressionKeys[id]) delete App.expressionKeys[id][String(App.currentFrame)];
    scheduleProxyFrame();
    updateUI();
    log('Cleared expression key at frame ' + App.currentFrame + ' for ' + bone.name + '.');
  }

  function applyExpressionTargetClip(){ // FIX v18.34
    var fb = getSelectedFrameBone ? getSelectedFrameBone() : null;
    if (fb && isExpressionFrameBone(fb)) {
      var nodeFb = el('inpExpressionTargetClip');
      var nameFb = nodeFb ? String(nodeFb.value || '').trim() : '';
      if (!nameFb) nameFb = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb) === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
      fb.targetClipName = nameFb;
      var profileFb = ensureExpressionProfileForFrameBone(fb);
      if (profileFb) profileFb.targetClipName = nameFb;
      renderExpressionUI();
      log('Expression target clip set to ' + nameFb + '.');
      return;
    }
    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    if (!bone) { log('Select a Lip Bone or Wink Bone first.'); return; }
    var profile = ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone);
    var node = el('inpExpressionTargetClip');
    var name = node ? String(node.value || '').trim() : '';
    if (!name) name = expressionKindForBone(bone) === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
    profile.targetClipName = name;
    renderExpressionUI();
    log('Expression target clip set to ' + name + '.');
  } // FIX v18.34

  function normaliseExpressionFrameList(list, fallback){ // FIX v18.34
    var base = Array.isArray(fallback) ? fallback : [];
    if (!Array.isArray(list) || !list.length) return base.slice(0);
    var out = [];
    list.forEach(function(item, idx){
      if (item == null) return;
      if (typeof item === 'string') {
        var key = item.trim();
        if (key) out.push({ key:key, label:key });
        return;
      }
      if (typeof item === 'object') {
        var keyObj = String(item.key || item.mouth || item.label || item.name || item.frameName || '').trim();
        var labelObj = String(item.label || item.name || keyObj || ('Frame ' + (idx + 1))).trim();
        var dataUrlObj = item.dataUrl || item.image || item.src || '';
        if (keyObj) out.push({ key:keyObj, label:labelObj, dataUrl:dataUrlObj, source:item.source || '' });
      }
    });
    return out.length ? out : base.slice(0);
  }

  function shouldUseExpressionFrameListFromJson(kind, data){ // FIX v18.34
    if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') return false;
    if (Array.isArray(data.expressionFrames) || Array.isArray(data.order)) return true;
    // Lip Service project JSON contains frameMap and blocks. Those are timing data, not a new mouth slot list.
    return false;
  }

  function saveExpressionServiceJson(kind){ // FIX v18.4
    kind = kind === 'eye' ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var data = buildExpressionServiceJson(kind);
    var prefix = kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink_Service' : 'Lip_Service';
    downloadTextFile(prefix + '_Expression_v18_17.json', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), 'application/json');
    log('Saved ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink' : 'Lip') + ' expression JSON.');
  }

  function promptLoadExpressionServiceJson(kind){ // FIX v18.4
    var inputId = kind === 'eye' ? 'fileWinkExpressionJson' : 'fileLipExpressionJson';
    var inp = el(inputId);
    if (!inp) return;
    try { inp.value = ''; } catch(e){}
    inp.click();
  }

  function expressionKeyToFrameBoneSlot(kind, key){ // FIX v18.29
    kind = kind === 'eye' ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var list = expressionFramesForKind(kind) || [];
    var raw = key;
    if (raw && typeof raw === 'object') raw = raw.mouth || raw.expressionKey || raw.key || raw.label || raw.name || raw.frame || raw.slot || '';
    var s = String(raw == null ? '' : raw).trim();
    s = s.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '').trim();
    if (!s) return 1;
    var numeric = Number(s);
    if (!isNaN(numeric) && isFinite(numeric)) return clamp(Math.round(numeric), 1, Math.max(1, list.length || 1));
    var lower = s.toLowerCase();
    if (kind === 'lip') {
      var lipAlias = { rest:'A', mbp:'B', o:'C', etc:'D', e:'E', ai:'F', fv:'G', l:'H', u:'I', wq:'Rest' }; // FIX v18.32: match Lip Service MOUTH_LABELS exactly
      if (lipAlias[lower]) s = lipAlias[lower];
    }
    for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i += 1) {
      if (String(list[i].key || '').toLowerCase() === String(s).toLowerCase()) return i + 1;
      if (String(list[i].label || '').toLowerCase() === String(s).toLowerCase()) return i + 1;
    }
    return 1;
  }

  function expressionKeyValueFromJsonValue(value){ // FIX v18.29
    if (value && typeof value === 'object') return value.mouth || value.expressionKey || value.key || value.label || value.name || value.frame || value.slot || '';
    return value;
  }

  function collectExpressionKeyMapFromServiceJson(kind, data){ // FIX v18.29
    kind = kind === 'eye' ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var out = {};
    function put(frame, value){
      var f = Number(frame);
      if (isNaN(f) || !isFinite(f)) return;
      f = Math.round(f);
      if (f < 1) f = 1;
      if (App.frameCount) f = clamp(f, 1, Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1)));
      var val = expressionKeyValueFromJsonValue(value);
      if (val == null || String(val).trim() === '') return;
      out[String(f)] = val;
    }

    if (data && data.keys && typeof data.keys === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data.keys)) {
      var keyFrames = Object.keys(data.keys).map(function(k){ return Number(k); }).filter(function(n){ return !isNaN(n); });
      var keyOffset = keyFrames.length && Math.min.apply(null, keyFrames) === 0 ? 1 : 0;
      Object.keys(data.keys).forEach(function(frame){ put(Number(frame) + keyOffset, data.keys[frame]); });
    }

    var frameMap = Array.isArray(data && data.frameMap) ? data.frameMap : (Array.isArray(data && data.framesMap) ? data.framesMap : null);
    if (frameMap && frameMap.length) {
      var previous = null;
      for (var i = 0; i < frameMap.length; i += 1) {
        var val = expressionKeyValueFromJsonValue(frameMap[i]);
        if (i === 0 || String(val) !== String(previous)) put(i + 1, val);
        previous = val;
      }
    }

    var blocks = Array.isArray(data && data.blocks) ? data.blocks : (Array.isArray(data && data.mouthBlocks) ? data.mouthBlocks : null);
    if (blocks && blocks.length) {
      var starts = blocks.map(function(b){ return Number(b && (b.startFrame != null ? b.startFrame : (b.start != null ? b.start : b.frame))); }).filter(function(n){ return !isNaN(n); });
      var blockOffset = starts.length && Math.min.apply(null, starts) === 0 ? 1 : 0;
      blocks.forEach(function(block){
        if (!block) return;
        var start = block.startFrame != null ? block.startFrame : (block.start != null ? block.start : block.frame);
        var value = block.mouth || block.expressionKey || block.key || block.label || block.name || block.frameName || block.slot;
        put(Number(start) + blockOffset, value);
      });
    }
    if (Object.keys(out).length === 0 && data && data.payload && typeof data.payload === 'object') { // FIX v18.29
      var nested = collectExpressionKeyMapFromServiceJson(kind, data.payload);
      Object.keys(nested).forEach(function(k){ out[k] = nested[k]; });
    }
    return out;
  }

  function estimateExpressionJsonFrameCount(data){ // FIX v18.29
    var maxFrame = 1;
    try {
      if (data && data.totalFrames != null && !isNaN(Number(data.totalFrames))) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, Math.round(Number(data.totalFrames)));
      if (data && data.frameMap && Array.isArray(data.frameMap)) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, data.frameMap.length);
      if (data && data.framesMap && Array.isArray(data.framesMap)) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, data.framesMap.length);
      var fps = Number((data && data.fps) || App.fps || 24);
      if (data && data.audioDuration != null && !isNaN(Number(data.audioDuration)) && fps > 0) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, Math.round(Number(data.audioDuration) * fps));
      if (data && data.audio && data.audio.duration != null && !isNaN(Number(data.audio.duration)) && fps > 0) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, Math.round(Number(data.audio.duration) * fps));
      var blocks = Array.isArray(data && data.blocks) ? data.blocks : (Array.isArray(data && data.mouthBlocks) ? data.mouthBlocks : null);
      if (blocks && blocks.length) {
        blocks.forEach(function(block){
          if (!block) return;
          var end = block.endFrame != null ? block.endFrame : (block.end != null ? block.end : null);
          var start = block.startFrame != null ? block.startFrame : (block.start != null ? block.start : block.frame);
          if (end != null && !isNaN(Number(end))) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, Math.round(Number(end)) + 1);
          else if (start != null && !isNaN(Number(start))) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, Math.round(Number(start)) + 1);
        });
      }
      var keys = data && data.keys && typeof data.keys === 'object' && !Array.isArray(data.keys) ? data.keys : null;
      if (keys) Object.keys(keys).forEach(function(k){ if (!isNaN(Number(k))) maxFrame = Math.max(maxFrame, Math.round(Number(k)) + 1); });
    } catch(e){}
    return Math.max(1, maxFrame);
  }

  function syncFrameCountFromExpressionJson(data){ // FIX v18.29
    var wanted = estimateExpressionJsonFrameCount(data);
    if (wanted > Number(App.frameCount || 1)) App.frameCount = wanted;
    if (el('inpFrameCount')) el('inpFrameCount').value = String(Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || wanted || 1)));
    return Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || wanted || 1));
  }

  function ensureFrameCountCoversImportedAudio(){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    var fps = Math.max(1, Number(App.fps || 24) || 24);
    var duration = Number(App.importedExpressionAudioDuration || 0) || 0;
    if (duration <= 0) return Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1) || 1);
    var wanted = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(duration * fps));
    if (wanted > Number(App.frameCount || 1)) {
      App.frameCount = wanted;
      try { if (el('inpFrameCount')) el('inpFrameCount').value = String(wanted); } catch(eInput){}
      log('Commit frame count extended to audio length: ' + wanted + ' frames.');
    }
    return Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || wanted || 1));
  }

  function clearFrameBoneKeysForFrameBone(fb){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!fb || !App.frameBoneKeys) return;
    var id = Number(fb.id);
    Object.keys(App.frameBoneKeys).forEach(function(frame){
      if (App.frameBoneKeys[frame] && App.frameBoneKeys[frame][id] !== undefined) delete App.frameBoneKeys[frame][id];
      if (App.frameBoneKeys[frame] && App.frameBoneKeys[frame][String(id)] !== undefined) delete App.frameBoneKeys[frame][String(id)];
      if (App.frameBoneKeys[frame] && Object.keys(App.frameBoneKeys[frame]).length === 0) delete App.frameBoneKeys[frame];
    });
  }

  function applyExpressionKeyMapToFrameBone(kind, fb, keyMap){ // FIX v18.34
    if (!fb || !keyMap) return 0;
    prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind);
    if (!App.frameBoneKeys) App.frameBoneKeys = {};
    fb.expressionLoadedKeyMap = safeJsonClone(keyMap); // FIX v18.34: keep the original Lip Service JSON timing map for script building
    fb.expressionLoadedSlotMap = {}; // FIX v18.34
    var count = 0;
    Object.keys(keyMap).forEach(function(frame){
      var f = Number(frame);
      if (isNaN(f) || !isFinite(f)) return;
      f = clamp(Math.round(f), 1, Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || f || 1)));
      var slot = expressionKeyToFrameBoneSlot(kind, keyMap[frame]);
      if (!App.frameBoneKeys[String(f)]) App.frameBoneKeys[String(f)] = {};
      App.frameBoneKeys[String(f)][fb.id] = slot;
      fb.expressionLoadedSlotMap[String(f)] = slot; // FIX v18.34
      count += 1;
    });
    if (count) {
      App.selectedFrameBoneId = fb.id;
      ensureProxyLayerForCreatedFrameBone(fb);
      syncProxyLayersToBones(true); // FIX v18.34: show loaded mouth keys straight away
      scheduleProxyFrame();
    }
    return count;
  }

  function base64ToArrayBufferForExpressionAudio(base64){ // FIX v18.29
    var binary = atob(String(base64 || ''));
    var bytes = new Uint8Array(binary.length);
    for (var i = 0; i < binary.length; i += 1) bytes[i] = binary.charCodeAt(i);
    return bytes.buffer;
  }

  function expressionAudioFileFromJson(data){ // FIX v18.29
    try {
      var audio = data && data.audio ? data.audio : null;
      if (!audio || !audio.dataBase64) return null;
      var name = String(audio.name || 'LipService_Audio').trim() || 'LipService_Audio';
      if (!/\.[a-z0-9]{2,5}$/i.test(name)) {
        var type = String(audio.type || '').toLowerCase();
        if (type.indexOf('mpeg') !== -1 || type.indexOf('mp3') !== -1) name += '.mp3';
        else if (type.indexOf('wav') !== -1) name += '.wav';
        else if (type.indexOf('ogg') !== -1) name += '.ogg';
        else name += '.audio';
      }
      var ab = base64ToArrayBufferForExpressionAudio(audio.dataBase64);
      return new File([ab], name, { type: audio.type || 'audio/*' });
    } catch(e) {
      log('Audio file could not be read from JSON: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
      return null;
    }
  }


  function expressionAudioInfoFromJson(data){ // FIX v18.29
    try {
      var audio = data && data.audio ? data.audio : null;
      if (!audio || !audio.dataBase64) return null;
      var type = String(audio.type || 'audio/mpeg').trim() || 'audio/mpeg';
      var name = String(audio.name || 'LipService_Audio').trim() || 'LipService_Audio';
      if (!/\.[a-z0-9]{2,5}$/i.test(name)) {
        var typeLower = type.toLowerCase();
        if (typeLower.indexOf('mpeg') !== -1 || typeLower.indexOf('mp3') !== -1) name += '.mp3';
        else if (typeLower.indexOf('wav') !== -1) name += '.wav';
        else if (typeLower.indexOf('ogg') !== -1) name += '.ogg';
        else name += '.audio';
      }
      var dataUrl = String(audio.dataUrl || audio.url || '').trim();
      if (!dataUrl) dataUrl = 'data:' + type + ';base64,' + String(audio.dataBase64 || '');
      var duration = 0;
      if (audio.duration != null && !isNaN(Number(audio.duration))) duration = Number(audio.duration);
      else if (data.audioDuration != null && !isNaN(Number(data.audioDuration))) duration = Number(data.audioDuration);
      return { name: name, type: type, dataUrl: dataUrl, duration: duration };
    } catch(e) {
      return null;
    }
  }

  function stopScrubExpressionAudioPreview(){ // FIX v18.32
    try {
      if (App.scrubAudioSource) {
        try { App.scrubAudioSource.onended = null; } catch(e0){}
        try { App.scrubAudioSource.stop(0); } catch(e1){}
      }
    } catch(e){}
    App.scrubAudioSource = null;
    try {
      if (App._scrubPreviewTimer) clearTimeout(App._scrubPreviewTimer);
      App._scrubPreviewTimer = null;
      if (App._scrubPreviewAudio) App._scrubPreviewAudio.pause();
    } catch(e2){}
  }

  function ensureScrubAudioContext(){ // FIX v18.32
    if (App.scrubAudioCtx) return App.scrubAudioCtx;
    var Ctx = window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext;
    if (!Ctx) return null;
    App.scrubAudioCtx = new Ctx();
    return App.scrubAudioCtx;
  }

  function dataUrlToArrayBuffer(dataUrl){ // FIX v18.32
    var src = String(dataUrl || '');
    if (!src) return null;
    var comma = src.indexOf(',');
    var payload = comma >= 0 ? src.slice(comma + 1) : src;
    var isBase64 = comma >= 0 && /;base64/i.test(src.slice(0, comma));
    if (isBase64 || comma < 0) return base64ToArrayBufferForExpressionAudio(payload);
    var decoded = decodeURIComponent(payload);
    var arr = new Uint8Array(decoded.length);
    for (var i = 0; i < decoded.length; i += 1) arr[i] = decoded.charCodeAt(i) & 255;
    return arr.buffer;
  }

  async function prepareScrubExpressionAudio(dataUrl){ // FIX v18.32
    try {
      var src = String(dataUrl || App.importedExpressionAudioDataUrl || '');
      if (!src) return false;
      if (App.scrubAudioBuffer && App._scrubAudioBufferSrc === src) return true;
      if (App.scrubAudioDecodePromise && App._scrubAudioDecodeSrc === src) return App.scrubAudioDecodePromise;
      var ctx = ensureScrubAudioContext();
      if (!ctx) return false;
      App._scrubAudioDecodeSrc = src;
      App.scrubAudioDecodePromise = (async function(){
        var ab = dataUrlToArrayBuffer(src);
        if (!ab) return false;
        var decoded = await ctx.decodeAudioData(ab.slice(0));
        App.scrubAudioBuffer = decoded;
        App._scrubAudioBufferSrc = src;
        App.scrubAudioDecodePromise = null;
        return true;
      })();
      return await App.scrubAudioDecodePromise;
    } catch(e) {
      App.scrubAudioDecodePromise = null;
      log('Scrub audio decode failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
      return false;
    }
  }

  async function scrubExpressionAudioAtFrame(frame){ // FIX v18.32
    var src = String(App.importedExpressionAudioDataUrl || '');
    if (!src) return;
    var fps = Math.max(1, Number(App.fps || 12) || 12);
    var targetTime = Math.max(0, ((Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || 1) || 1)) - 1) / fps));

    var ok = await prepareScrubExpressionAudio(src);
    if (ok && App.scrubAudioBuffer) {
      var ctx = ensureScrubAudioContext();
      if (ctx && ctx.state === 'suspended') {
        try { await ctx.resume(); } catch(eResume){}
      }
      var now = (typeof performance !== 'undefined' && performance.now) ? performance.now() : Date.now();
      if (now - (App.scrubAudioLastAt || 0) < 18) return;
      App.scrubAudioLastAt = now;
      stopScrubExpressionAudioPreview();
      try {
        var offset = clamp(targetTime, 0, Math.max(0, App.scrubAudioBuffer.duration - 0.001));
        var source = ctx.createBufferSource();
        source.buffer = App.scrubAudioBuffer;
        var gain = ctx.createGain();
        var ct = ctx.currentTime;
        gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, ct);
        gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(1.0, ct + 0.010);
        gain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, ct + 0.160);
        source.connect(gain);
        gain.connect(ctx.destination);
        App.scrubAudioSource = source;
        source.start(0, offset);
        source.stop(ct + 0.175);
        source.onended = function(){ if (App.scrubAudioSource === source) App.scrubAudioSource = null; };
        return;
      } catch(eWebAudio){}
    }

    try { // fallback only if WebAudio decode cannot run
      if (!App._scrubPreviewAudio || App._scrubPreviewAudio.src !== src) {
        App._scrubPreviewAudio = new Audio(src);
        App._scrubPreviewAudio.preload = 'auto';
      }
      if (App._scrubPreviewTimer) clearTimeout(App._scrubPreviewTimer);
      App._scrubPreviewAudio.pause();
      App._scrubPreviewAudio.currentTime = targetTime;
      var pr = App._scrubPreviewAudio.play();
      if (pr && typeof pr.catch === 'function') pr.catch(function(){});
      App._scrubPreviewTimer = setTimeout(function(){
        try { if (App._scrubPreviewAudio && !App._scrubPreviewAudio.paused) App._scrubPreviewAudio.pause(); } catch(eStop){}
      }, 175);
    } catch(eFallback){}
  }

  function registerExpressionAudioForStagePlayback(info){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!info || !info.dataUrl) return false;
    var targets = [];
    try { targets.push(window); } catch(eWin){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) targets.push(window.parent); } catch(eParent){}
    var registered = false;
    targets.forEach(function(targetWin){
      try {
        if (!targetWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry) targetWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry = {};
        targetWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry[info.name] = {
          name: info.name,
          src: info.dataUrl,
          type: info.type || '',
          duration: Number(info.duration || 0) || 0,
          audio: null,
          lastFrame: 0,
          lastTickTime: 0,
          stopTimer: null
        };
        targetWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioTick = function(name, frame, fps){
          try {
            var registry = targetWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry || {};
            var item = registry[name];
            if (!item || !item.src) return;
            var now = Date.now();
            var f = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || 1) || 1));
            var rate = Math.max(1, Number(fps || 12) || 12);
            if (!item.audio) {
              item.audio = new targetWin.Audio(item.src);
              item.audio.preload = 'auto';
            }
            var audio = item.audio;
            var targetTime = Math.max(0, (f - 1) / rate);
            if (f <= 1 && item.lastFrame > 2) {
              try { audio.currentTime = 0; } catch(eReset){}
            } else if (Math.abs((audio.currentTime || 0) - targetTime) > 0.35) {
              try { audio.currentTime = targetTime; } catch(eSeek){}
            }
            var isAdvancing = item.lastFrame === 0 || f !== item.lastFrame || (now - item.lastTickTime) < 500;
            item.lastFrame = f;
            item.lastTickTime = now;
            if (isAdvancing && audio.paused) {
              var playResult = audio.play();
              if (playResult && typeof playResult.catch === 'function') playResult.catch(function(){});
            }
            if (item.stopTimer) targetWin.clearTimeout(item.stopTimer);
            item.stopTimer = targetWin.setTimeout(function(){
              try { if (item.audio && !item.audio.paused) item.audio.pause(); } catch(ePause){}
            }, 420);
          } catch(eTick){}
        };
        registered = true;
      } catch(eTarget){}
    });
    return registered;
  }

  function scrubRegisteredExpressionAudioToFrame(frame){ // FIX v18.32
    scrubExpressionAudioAtFrame(frame); // FIX v18.32: use WebAudio scrub preview like original Lip Service
  }

  function findOrCreateAudioLayer(timeline){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!timeline || !App.Wick || !App.Wick.Layer) return null;
    try {
      var layers = timeline.layers || [];
      for (var i = 0; i < layers.length; i += 1) {
        var nm = String(layers[i].name || '').toLowerCase();
        if (nm === 'lip service audio' || nm === 'rotobones audio' || nm.indexOf('lip service audio') !== -1) return layers[i]; // FIX v18.29: use a dedicated audio layer only
      }
      var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
      try { layer.name = 'Lip Service Audio'; } catch(eName){}
      if (typeof timeline.addLayer === 'function') timeline.addLayer(layer);
      else if (timeline.layers && typeof timeline.layers.push === 'function') timeline.layers.push(layer);
      try { moveLayerToTopOfTimeline(timeline, layer); } catch(eMoveAudio){} // FIX v18.29: keep the audio layer separate and visible
      return layer;
    } catch(e) { return null; }
  }

  async function importExpressionAudioToWick(data){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!data || !data.audio || !data.audio.dataBase64) return false;
    refreshBridgeRefs();
    var audioInfo = expressionAudioInfoFromJson(data); // FIX v18.29
    if (audioInfo) { // FIX v18.29
      App.importedExpressionAudioName = audioInfo.name; // FIX v18.29
      App.importedExpressionAudioDataUrl = audioInfo.dataUrl; // FIX v18.29
      App.importedExpressionAudioType = audioInfo.type || ''; // FIX v18.29
      App.importedExpressionAudioDuration = Number(audioInfo.duration || 0) || 0; // FIX v18.29
      registerExpressionAudioForStagePlayback(audioInfo); // FIX v18.29
      try { await prepareScrubExpressionAudio(audioInfo.dataUrl); } catch(ePrepAudio){} // FIX v18.32: original Lip Service scrub needs decoded audio ready
    }
    var file = expressionAudioFileFromJson(data);
    if (!file) return false;
    try {
      await forceCommitFilesIntoAssets([file], [file.name]);
    } catch(eImport) {
      log('Audio asset import warning: ' + (eImport && eImport.message ? eImport.message : eImport));
    }
    var asset = null;
    try {
      var assets = getProjectAssetsArray();
      for (var i = 0; i < assets.length; i += 1) {
        var nm = assets[i].name || assets[i].filename || assets[i].identifier;
        if (nm === file.name) { asset = assets[i]; break; }
      }
    } catch(eFind){}
    try {
      var tl = getFocusedOrProjectTimeline();
      var layer = findOrCreateAudioLayer(tl);
      if (layer && App.Wick && App.Wick.Frame) {
        var frame = null;
        if (layer.frames && layer.frames.length) frame = layer.frames[0];
        if (!frame) {
          frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start: 1, end: Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1) || 1) });
          try { frame.identifier = 'lip_service_audio'; frame.name = 'Lip Service Audio'; } catch(eFrameName){}
          layer.addFrame(frame);
        }
        try { frame.sound = asset || file; } catch(eSound){}
        try { frame.soundAsset = asset || file; } catch(eSoundAsset){}
        try { frame.audio = asset || file; } catch(eAudio){}
        try { frame.audioAsset = asset || file; } catch(eAudioAsset){}
        try { frame._ltbwAudioFileName = file.name; } catch(eMeta){}
      }
      App.importedExpressionAudioName = file.name;
      markDirty();
      log('Imported Lip Service audio from JSON into Wick: ' + file.name);
      return true;
    } catch(eAdd) {
      log('Audio imported as an asset, but could not attach to the Wick timeline automatically: ' + (eAdd && eAdd.message ? eAdd.message : eAdd));
      return !!asset;
    }
  }

  async function applyExpressionServiceJson(kind, data){ // FIX v18.29
    kind = kind === 'eye' ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') throw new Error('Invalid expression JSON.');
    if (kind === 'lip') await importExpressionAudioToWick(data); // FIX v18.29
    syncFrameCountFromExpressionJson(data); // FIX v18.29: Lip Service JSON keyframes must not be clamped to the old short timeline.
    var fallback = kind === 'eye' ? EYE_EXPRESSION_FRAMES : LIP_EXPRESSION_FRAMES;
    if (shouldUseExpressionFrameListFromJson(kind, data)) { // FIX v18.34: do not replace Lip Bone slots from Lip Service project timing JSON
      var frames = normaliseExpressionFrameList(data.expressionFrames || data.order, fallback);
      if (kind === 'eye') EYE_EXPRESSION_FRAMES = frames;
      else LIP_EXPRESSION_FRAMES = frames;
    }

    var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind);
    if (fb) {
      prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind);
      var profileFb = ensureExpressionProfileForFrameBone(fb);
      if (data.targetClipName) profileFb.targetClipName = String(data.targetClipName || '').trim() || profileFb.targetClipName;
      if (data.defaultFrame) profileFb.defaultFrame = String(data.defaultFrame || '').trim() || defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind);
    }

    var keyMap = collectExpressionKeyMapFromServiceJson(kind, data);
    var appliedCount = 0;
    if (fb) {
      clearFrameBoneKeysForFrameBone(fb); // FIX v18.29: loading JSON replaces the old Lip_Bone keys instead of leaving only the previous Rest key.
      appliedCount = applyExpressionKeyMapToFrameBone(kind, fb, keyMap);
    } else {
      log('No ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink_Bone' : 'Lip_Bone') + ' exists yet, so JSON timing could not be applied to a frame bone. Create the expression bone first, then load the JSON.'); // FIX v18.34
    }

    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    if (!fb && bone && expressionKindForBone(bone) === kind) {
      var profile = ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone);
      if (data.targetClipName) profile.targetClipName = String(data.targetClipName || '').trim() || profile.targetClipName;
      if (data.defaultFrame) profile.defaultFrame = String(data.defaultFrame || '').trim() || defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind);
      if (Object.keys(keyMap).length) {
        if (!App.expressionKeys) App.expressionKeys = {};
        App.expressionKeys[String(bone.id)] = safeJsonClone(keyMap);
        appliedCount = Object.keys(keyMap).length;
      }
    }

    App.expressionSubTab = kind;
    renderExpressionUI();
    updateFrameBoneUI();
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
    syncProxyLayersToBones(true); // FIX v18.29
    scheduleProxyFrame();
    log('Loaded ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink' : 'Lip') + ' expression JSON. ' + appliedCount + ' keyframe' + (appliedCount === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' applied automatically.');
  }

  async function onExpressionServiceJsonFileChosen(kind, file){ // FIX v18.4
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      var raw = await readFileAsText(file);
      var data = JSON.parse(raw);
      await applyExpressionServiceJson(kind, data);
    } catch(e) {
      log('Expression JSON load failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
    }
  }

  function expressionSlotFromFileName(kind, fileName, fallback){ // FIX v18.34
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var base = String(fileName || '').replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '').trim().toLowerCase();
    var frames = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    for (var i = 0; i < frames.length; i += 1) {
      var k = String(frames[i].key || '').toLowerCase();
      var l = String(frames[i].label || '').toLowerCase();
      if (base === k || base === l) return i + 1;
    }
    return clamp(slotNumberFromFileName(fileName, fallback || 1), 1, Math.max(1, frames.length));
  }

  function loadExpressionImageIntoSlot(fb, kind, slot, file){ // FIX v18.34
    if (!fb || !file) return Promise.resolve();
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var frames = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    slot = clamp(Number(slot || 1), 1, Math.max(1, frames.length));
    var item = frames[slot - 1] || { key:String(slot), label:String(slot) };
    return loadImageFromFile(file).then(function(loaded){
      var dataUrl = String(loaded && loaded.dataUrl ? loaded.dataUrl : '');
      var isSvg = /\.svg$/i.test(file.name || '') || String(file.type || '').indexOf('svg') !== -1 || dataUrl.indexOf('data:image/svg+xml') === 0;
      fb.frames = fb.frames || {};
      fb.frames[slot] = {
        fileName: file.name || (String(item.label || item.key) + (isSvg ? '.svg' : '.png')),
        label: item.label,
        expressionKey: item.key,
        expressionKind: kind,
        expressionDefault: false,
        dataUrl: dataUrl,
        width: loaded.image ? (loaded.image.naturalWidth || loaded.image.width || (kind === 'eye' ? 300 : 300)) : (kind === 'eye' ? 300 : 300),
        height: loaded.image ? (loaded.image.naturalHeight || loaded.image.height || (kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300)) : (kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300)
      };
      ensureFrameBoneImageCache(fb.frames[slot]);
    });
  }

  function promptExpressionFrameImages(kind){ // FIX v18.34
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind);
    if (!fb) { log('Create or select a ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink_Bone' : 'Lip_Bone') + ' first.'); return; }
    App.selectedFrameBoneId = fb.id;
    var inp = el(kind === 'eye' ? 'fileWinkExpressionImages' : 'fileLipExpressionImages');
    if (!inp) return;
    try { inp.value = ''; } catch(e){}
    inp.click();
  }

  function onExpressionFrameImagesChosen(kind, files){ // FIX v18.34
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind);
    if (!fb || !files || !files.length) return;
    prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind);
    var list = Array.prototype.slice.call(files).filter(function(f){ return f && (/\.svg$/i.test(f.name || '') || /\.png$/i.test(f.name || '') || String(f.type || '').indexOf('image/') === 0); });
    list.sort(function(a,b){
      var as = expressionSlotFromFileName(kind, a.name, 9999);
      var bs = expressionSlotFromFileName(kind, b.name, 9999);
      return as === bs ? String(a.name || '').localeCompare(String(b.name || '')) : as - bs;
    });
    var tasks = [];
    list.forEach(function(file, idx){
      var slot = expressionSlotFromFileName(kind, file.name, idx + 1);
      tasks.push(loadExpressionImageIntoSlot(fb, kind, slot, file));
    });
    Promise.all(tasks).then(function(){
      App.selectedFrameBoneId = fb.id;
      updateFrameBoneUI();
      renderExpressionUI();
      renderOverlay();
      log('Loaded ' + tasks.length + ' ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'wink' : 'lip') + ' image' + (tasks.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' into ' + fb.name + '.');
    }).catch(function(e){ log('Expression image load failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); });
  }

  function renderExpressionSlots(kind, hostId){ // FIX v18.6
    var host = el(hostId);
    if (!host) return;
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind); // FIX v18.6
    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    var frames = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    host.innerHTML = '';
    var canKeyOldExpressionBone = !!(!fb && bone && expressionKindForBone(bone) === kind); // FIX v18.6
    if (!fb && !canKeyOldExpressionBone) {
      var notice = document.createElement('div');
      notice.className = 'notice';
      notice.textContent = 'Create or select a ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink Bone' : 'Lip Bone') + ' frame bone attachment first. The default images are shown below.';
      host.appendChild(notice);
    }
    if (fb && (!fb.frames || Number(fb.frameCount || 0) !== frames.length || expressionFrameBoneKind(fb) !== kind)) prepareExpressionFrameBone(fb, kind); // FIX v18.29
    var currentKey = fb ? expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(fb, frameBoneSlotForTimelineFrame(fb, App.currentFrame)) : (canKeyOldExpressionBone ? expressionKeyAtFrame(bone, App.currentFrame) : defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind));
    frames.forEach(function(item, idx){
      var slot = idx + 1;
      var data = fb && fb.frames ? fb.frames[slot] : null;
      var keyed = fb ? (App.frameBoneKeys && App.frameBoneKeys[String(App.currentFrame)] && Number(App.frameBoneKeys[String(App.currentFrame)][fb.id]) === slot) : (canKeyOldExpressionBone && App.expressionKeys && App.expressionKeys[String(bone.id)] && App.expressionKeys[String(bone.id)][String(App.currentFrame)] === item.key); // FIX v18.6
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'expressionSlotCard' + (String(currentKey) === String(item.key) ? ' active' : '') + (keyed ? ' keyed' : '');
      var title = document.createElement('div');
      title.className = 'expressionSlotTitle';
      title.textContent = item.label;
      var thumb = document.createElement('div');
      thumb.className = 'expressionSlotThumb';
      var imgUrl = data && data.dataUrl ? data.dataUrl : (item.dataUrl || makeEyeFrameSvgDataUrl(item.key)); // FIX v18.29: panel thumbnail sits on white backing; stored bone image remains transparent
      if (imgUrl) {
        var img = document.createElement('img');
        img.src = imgUrl;
        thumb.appendChild(img);
      }
      var hint = document.createElement('div');
      hint.className = 'expressionSlotHint';
      hint.textContent = fb ? (frameBoneSlotDisplayName(fb, slot) + '  frame ' + App.currentFrame) : ('Frame ' + App.currentFrame); // FIX v18.29
      card.appendChild(title);
      card.appendChild(thumb);
      card.appendChild(hint);
      card.addEventListener('click', function(){
        if (fb) { App.selectedFrameBoneId = fb.id; setSelectedFrameBoneKeyToSlot(slot); }
        else if (canKeyOldExpressionBone) setExpressionKey(kind, item.key);
        else log('Create or select a ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'Wink Bone' : 'Lip Bone') + ' frame bone attachment before keying.');
      });
      host.appendChild(card);
    });
  }

  function renderExpressionUI(){ // FIX v18.0
    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    var activeFrameBone = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(App.expressionSubTab || 'lip'); // FIX v18.6
    var profile = bone ? ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone) : null;
    if (el('expressionBoneInfo')) el('expressionBoneInfo').textContent = activeFrameBone ? (activeFrameBone.name + '  ' + expressionKindLabel(expressionFrameBoneKind(activeFrameBone)) + ' Frame Bone  frame ' + App.currentFrame + ' = ' + expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(activeFrameBone, frameBoneSlotForTimelineFrame(activeFrameBone, App.currentFrame))) : (bone ? (bone.name + '  ' + boneTypeLabel(bone) + '  frame ' + App.currentFrame + ' = ' + expressionKeyAtFrame(bone, App.currentFrame)) : 'None');
    if (el('inpExpressionTargetClip')) {
      if (activeFrameBone && document.activeElement !== el('inpExpressionTargetClip')) el('inpExpressionTargetClip').value = expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(activeFrameBone); // FIX v18.34
      else if (bone && profile && document.activeElement !== el('inpExpressionTargetClip')) el('inpExpressionTargetClip').value = profile.targetClipName || '';
      else if (!bone && !activeFrameBone && document.activeElement !== el('inpExpressionTargetClip')) el('inpExpressionTargetClip').value = '';
    }
    if (el('selExpressionCommitMode')) el('selExpressionCommitMode').value = App.expressionCommitMode || 'script';
    qa('.expressionSubTab').forEach(function(btn){ btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-expression-tab') === App.expressionSubTab); });
    qa('.expressionPanel').forEach(function(panel){ panel.classList.toggle('active', panel.getAttribute('data-expression-panel') === App.expressionSubTab); });
    renderExpressionSlots('lip', 'lipExpressionSlots');
    renderExpressionSlots('eye', 'eyeExpressionSlots');
    if (el('expressionScriptPreview')) { // FIX v18.10
      el('expressionScriptPreview').textContent = App.expressionSubTab === 'script' ? buildExpressionDriverScript() : 'Open Script or click Build Script to generate the driver.'; // FIX v18.10
    } // FIX v18.10
  }

  function expressionFramesUsedForBone(bone){ // FIX v18.0
    var profile = ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone);
    var out = {};
    for (var f = 1; f <= App.frameCount; f++) out[String(f)] = expressionKeyAtFrame(bone, f) || profile.defaultFrame;
    return out;
  }

  function makeProjectClipPath(name, owner){ // FIX v18.0
    var id = makeValidIdentifier(name || '', 'ExpressionClip');
    owner = owner === 'this' ? 'this' : 'project';
    return owner + '.' + id;
  }

  function expressionClipPathForKind(kind, owner){ // FIX v18.10
    var name = kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
    var selected = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(kind);
    if (selected && selected.targetClipName) name = selected.targetClipName;
    return makeProjectClipPath(name, owner);
  }

  function expressionCompactKeysForFrameBone(fb){ // FIX v18.34
    var out = [];
    if (!fb) return out;
    Object.keys(App.frameBoneKeys || {}).map(Number).filter(function(fr){
      return !isNaN(fr) && App.frameBoneKeys[fr] && (App.frameBoneKeys[fr][fb.id] !== undefined || App.frameBoneKeys[fr][String(fb.id)] !== undefined);
    }).sort(function(a,b){ return a - b; }).forEach(function(fr){
      var row = App.frameBoneKeys[fr] || App.frameBoneKeys[String(fr)] || {};
      var slot = Number(row[fb.id] !== undefined ? row[fb.id] : row[String(fb.id)]);
      out.push([fr, expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(fb, slot || 1)]);
    });
    if (!out.length && fb.expressionLoadedSlotMap) {
      Object.keys(fb.expressionLoadedSlotMap).map(Number).filter(function(fr){ return !isNaN(fr); }).sort(function(a,b){ return a-b; }).forEach(function(fr){
        out.push([fr, expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(fb, Number(fb.expressionLoadedSlotMap[String(fr)]) || 1)]);
      });
    }
    return out;
  }


  function expressionSlotMapForKind(kind){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: named goto fallback must use the real slot number, not indexOf the timing map
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var frames = expressionFramesForKind(kind) || [];
    var out = {};
    for (var i = 0; i < frames.length; i += 1) {
      var key = String(frames[i] && frames[i].key ? frames[i].key : '');
      var label = String(frames[i] && frames[i].label ? frames[i].label : key);
      if (key) out[key] = i + 1;
      if (label) out[label] = i + 1;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function expressionGotoLinesForClipPath(clipPath, labelExpression, kind){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: include numbered fallback for named frames
    var slotMap = expressionSlotMapForKind(kind);
    return [
      '  (function(){',
      '    var _rbClip = ' + clipPath + ';',
      '    if (!_rbClip) return;',
      '    var _rbLabel = ' + labelExpression + ';',
      '    var _rbSlotMap = ' + JSON.stringify(slotMap) + ';',
      '    var _rbSlot = _rbSlotMap[_rbLabel] || 1;',
      '    try { _rbClip.gotoAndStop(_rbLabel); } catch(eName){}',
      '    try { _rbClip.gotoAndStop(_rbSlot); } catch(eSlot){}',
      '    try { if (_rbClip.timeline) _rbClip.timeline.playheadPosition = _rbSlot; } catch(eTl){}',
      '  })();'
    ];
  }

  function expressionFrameFitForCommit(kind, key, clipW, clipH){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: use normalized expression art sizing
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var w = Math.max(1, Number(clipW || 300) || 300);
    var h = Math.max(1, Number(clipH || (kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300)) || (kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300));
    var scale = 1;
    return { x:0, y:0, width:round(w * scale), height:round(h * scale) };
  }

  function buildExpressionFrameBoneInternalUpdateScript(kind, fb){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: direct committed clip timeline only, real newline output
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var total = Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1) || 1);
    var def = defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind);
    var map = [];
    for (var f = 1; f <= total; f += 1) {
      var slot = frameBoneSlotForTimelineFrame(fb, f);
      var key = expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(fb, slot) || def;
      map.push(key);
    }
    var slotMap = expressionSlotMapForKind(kind);
    var parentClipName = 'BoneWarpClip';
    try { parentClipName = String((el('inpClipName') && el('inpClipName').value) || 'BoneWarpClip').trim() || 'BoneWarpClip'; } catch(eClipName){}
    var parentClipId = makeValidIdentifier(parentClipName, 'BoneWarpClip');
    var clipPath = 'project.' + parentClipId;
    return [
      kind === 'eye' ? '// RotoBones EyeShape self driver' : '// RotoBones MouthShape self driver',
      'var _rbExpressionMap = ' + JSON.stringify(map) + ';',
      'var _rbExpressionSlotMap = ' + JSON.stringify(slotMap) + ';',
      "onEvent('update', function(){",
      '  var _f = 1;',
      '  try { _f = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(' + clipPath + '.timeline.playheadPosition) || 1)); } catch(eFrame){}',
      '  var _label = _rbExpressionMap[Math.max(0, _f - 1)] || ' + JSON.stringify(def) + ';',
      '  var _slot = _rbExpressionSlotMap[_label] || 1;',
      '  try { this.gotoAndStop(_label); } catch(eName){}',
      '  try { this.gotoAndStop(_slot); } catch(eSlot){}',
      '  try { this.timeline.playheadPosition = _slot; } catch(eTl){}',
      '});'
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function applyExpressionClipInternalFrame(clip, kind, key){ // FIX v18.32: frame animation fallback, so committed frames show the right mouth even without script playback
    if (!clip) return;
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    key = String(key || defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind));
    var slot = expressionSlotNumberForKey(kind, key);
    try { if (typeof clip.gotoAndStop === 'function') clip.gotoAndStop(key); } catch(eGotoName){}
    try { if (typeof clip.gotoAndStop === 'function') clip.gotoAndStop(slot); } catch(eGotoSlot){}
    try { if (clip.timeline) clip.timeline.playheadPosition = slot; } catch(eTl){}
    try { clip.currentFrameNumber = slot; } catch(eCur){}
    try { clip._currentFrameNumber = slot; } catch(eCur2){}
    try { clip._ltbwExpressionFrameName = key; } catch(eName){}
  }

  function buildExpressionDriverScript(forcedOwner, exportBounds){ // FIX v18.29
    var lines = [];

    lines.push('  function _rbNum(v){ v = Number(v); return isFinite(v) ? v : null; }'); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
