    lines.push('  function _rbSelfOrParentFrame(self){ var v = null; try { if (self && self.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(self.timeline); } catch(eSelf){} try { if (v == null && self && self.parentClip && self.parentClip.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(self.parentClip.timeline); } catch(eParentClip){} try { if (v == null && self && self.parent && self.parent.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(self.parent.timeline); } catch(eParent){} try { if (v == null && self && self.parentObject && self.parentObject.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(self.parentObject.timeline); } catch(eParentObject){} try { if (v == null && self && self.parentFrame && self.parentFrame.parentClip && self.parentFrame.parentClip.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(self.parentFrame.parentClip.timeline); } catch(eParentFrame){} try { if (v == null && self && typeof self.getParentClip === "function") { var p = self.getParentClip(); if (p && p.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(p.timeline); } } catch(eGetParent){} try { if (v == null && self && typeof self.getParent === "function") { var p2 = self.getParent(); if (p2 && p2.timeline) v = _rbTimelineFrame(p2.timeline); } } catch(eGetParent2){} return v; }'); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    lines.push('  var _rbFrame = 1;'); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    lines.push('  try { var _rbF = _rbSelfOrParentFrame(this); try { if (_rbF == null && project && project.timeline) _rbF = _rbTimelineFrame(project.timeline); } catch(eT){} try { if (_rbF == null && project && project.activeTimeline) _rbF = _rbTimelineFrame(project.activeTimeline); } catch(eA){} try { if (_rbF == null && project && project.currentFrameNumber != null) _rbF = _rbNum(project.currentFrameNumber); } catch(eP){} _rbFrame = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(_rbF) || 1)); } catch(eFrame){ _rbFrame = 1; }'); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    if (App.importedExpressionAudioName && App.importedExpressionAudioDataUrl) { // FIX v18.29
      var audioName = JSON.stringify(App.importedExpressionAudioName); // FIX v18.29
      var audioData = JSON.stringify(App.importedExpressionAudioDataUrl); // FIX v18.29
      var audioType = JSON.stringify(App.importedExpressionAudioType || 'audio/mpeg'); // FIX v18.29
      var audioDuration = JSON.stringify(Number(App.importedExpressionAudioDuration || 0) || 0); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('  try {'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('    var _rbAudioWin = (typeof window !== "undefined") ? window : null;'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('    if (_rbAudioWin) {'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('      if (!_rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry) _rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry = {};'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('      if (!_rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry[' + audioName + ']) _rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry[' + audioName + '] = { name:' + audioName + ', src:' + audioData + ', type:' + audioType + ', duration:' + audioDuration + ', audio:null, lastFrame:0, lastTickTime:0, stopTimer:null };'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('      if (!_rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioTick) _rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioTick = function(name, frame, fps){ try { var registry = _rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioRegistry || {}; var item = registry[name]; if (!item || !item.src) return; var now = Date.now(); var f = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || 1) || 1)); var rate = Math.max(1, Number(fps || 12) || 12); if (!item.audio) { item.audio = new Audio(item.src); item.audio.preload = "auto"; } var audio = item.audio; var targetTime = Math.max(0, (f - 1) / rate); if (f <= 1 && item.lastFrame > 2) { try { audio.currentTime = 0; } catch(eReset){} } else if (Math.abs((audio.currentTime || 0) - targetTime) > 0.35) { try { audio.currentTime = targetTime; } catch(eSeek){} } var isAdvancing = item.lastFrame === 0 || f !== item.lastFrame || (now - item.lastTickTime) < 500; item.lastFrame = f; item.lastTickTime = now; if (isAdvancing && audio.paused) { var pr = audio.play(); if (pr && typeof pr.catch === "function") pr.catch(function(){}); } if (item.stopTimer) clearTimeout(item.stopTimer); item.stopTimer = setTimeout(function(){ try { if (item.audio && !item.audio.paused) item.audio.pause(); } catch(ePause){} }, 420); } catch(eTick){} };'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('      _rbAudioWin.__RotoBonesStageAudioTick(' + audioName + ', _rbFrame, ' + JSON.stringify(Number(App.fps || 12) || 12) + ');'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('    }'); // FIX v18.29
      lines.push('  } catch(eAudioStage){}'); // FIX v18.29
    }
    lines.push('  function _rbHold(keys, def){ var out = def; for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++){ if (_rbFrame >= keys[i][0]) out = keys[i][1]; else break; } return out; }');
    lines.push('  function _rbHoldPose(keys){ var out = keys.length ? [keys[0][1], keys[0][2], keys[0][3], keys[0][4]] : [0,0,1,0]; for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++){ if (_rbFrame >= keys[i][0]) out = [keys[i][1], keys[i][2], keys[i][3], keys[i][4]]; else break; } return out; }');
    var count = 0;
    (App.frameBones || []).forEach(function(fb){
      var kind = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb);
      if (!kind) return;
      var def = defaultExpressionFrameForKind(kind);
      var keys = expressionCompactKeysForFrameBone(fb);
      var clipPath = expressionClipPathForKind(kind, owner);
      var placement = expressionPlacementTimelineForFrameBone(fb, exportBounds || {});
      var holdExpression = '_rbHold(' + JSON.stringify(keys) + ', ' + JSON.stringify(def) + ')'; // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      expressionGotoLinesForClipPath(clipPath, holdExpression, kind).forEach(function(line){ lines.push(line); }); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      expressionApplyPlacementLines(clipPath, placement).forEach(function(line){ lines.push(line); });
      count++;
    });
    if (!count) lines.push('  // No Lip_Bone or Wink_Bone frame bones have been created yet.');
    lines.push('});');

  }

  function copyExpressionScript(){ // FIX v18.0
    var text = buildExpressionDriverScript();
    try { navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); log('Expression script copied.'); }
    catch(e) { log('Could not copy automatically. Use the Script panel text.'); }
    renderExpressionUI();
  }

  function setDefaultScriptOnSelectedWickClip(scriptText){ // FIX v18.0
    refreshBridgeRefs();
    var bridge = App.B;
    try {
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.setDefaultScriptOnSelection === 'function') {
        bridge.setDefaultScriptOnSelection(scriptText);
        return true;
      }
    } catch(e1){}
    try {
      var sel = null;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.getSelectedObjects === 'function') sel = bridge.getSelectedObjects();
      if (!sel && App.ed && App.ed.selection && App.ed.selection.objects) sel = App.ed.selection.objects;
      var obj = sel && sel.length ? sel[0] : null;
      if (!obj && App.project && App.project.selection && App.project.selection.objects && App.project.selection.objects.length) obj = App.project.selection.objects[0];
      if (!obj) return false;
      if (typeof obj.addScript === 'function') obj.addScript('default', scriptText);
      else {
        if (!obj.scripts) obj.scripts = {};
        obj.scripts['default'] = scriptText;
      }
      markDirty();
      return true;
    } catch(e2){}
    return false;
  }

  function expressionFrameSafeName(value){ // FIX v18.5
    return String(value == null ? '' : value).replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_]+/g, '_').replace(/^_+|_+$/g, '') || 'Frame';
  }

  function expressionFrameSvgMarkup(kind, item, index){ // FIX v18.5
    var label = String((item && item.label) || (item && item.key) || ('Frame ' + index));
    var key = String((item && item.key) || label);
    var title = escapeXmlAttr(label);
    var line = '#101010';
    var fill = kind === 'eye' ? '#101010' : '#c73a36';
    var body = [];
    body.push('');
    if (kind === 'eye') {
      body.push('<path d="M70 82 C92 68 118 68 140 82" fill="none" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>');
      body.push('<path d="M160 82 C182 68 208 68 230 82" fill="none" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>');
      var leftClosed = key === 'Blink' || key === 'Wink Left';
      var rightClosed = key === 'Blink' || key === 'Wink Right';
      var dx = 0, dy = 0;
      if (key === 'Look Up') dy = -8;
      if (key === 'Look Down') dy = 8;
      if (key === 'Look Left') dx = -10;
      if (key === 'Look Right') dx = 10;
      if (leftClosed) body.push('<path d="M72 116 C92 110 118 110 138 116" fill="none" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>');
      else { body.push('<ellipse cx="105" cy="115" rx="36" ry="20" fill="none" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="5"/>'); body.push('<circle cx="' + (105 + dx) + '" cy="' + (115 + dy) + '" r="8" fill="' + line + '"/>'); }
      if (rightClosed) body.push('<path d="M162 116 C182 110 208 110 228 116" fill="none" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>');
      else { body.push('<ellipse cx="195" cy="115" rx="36" ry="20" fill="none" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="5"/>'); body.push('<circle cx="' + (195 + dx) + '" cy="' + (115 + dy) + '" r="8" fill="' + line + '"/>'); }
    } else {
      var d = 'M78 112 C112 132 188 132 222 112';
      if (key === 'B') d = 'M74 112 C112 126 188 126 226 112 C190 120 110 120 74 112'; // FIX v18.9
      if (key === 'O') d = 'M112 96 C142 70 188 74 204 106 C222 146 174 168 134 150 C104 136 90 116 112 96';
      if (key === 'etc') d = 'M76 102 C112 78 184 78 224 104 C196 160 116 160 76 102';
      if (key === 'E') d = 'M74 112 C112 92 188 92 226 112 C190 126 112 126 74 112';
      if (key === 'AI') d = 'M80 88 C118 64 190 66 224 90 C216 158 112 166 80 88';
      if (key === 'FV') d = 'M82 94 C120 72 188 72 222 96 C204 130 118 134 82 94';
      if (key === 'L') d = 'M120 86 C150 64 186 86 180 120 C174 150 126 150 120 86';
      if (key === 'U') d = 'M126 94 C150 76 180 94 176 122 C170 144 130 144 126 94';
      if (key === 'D') d = 'M78 112 C112 132 188 132 222 112'; // FIX v18.9
      var needsFill = key !== 'B'; // FIX v18.9
      body.push('<path d="' + d + '" fill="' + (needsFill ? fill : 'none') + '" stroke="' + line + '" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>');
      if (key === 'AI' || key === 'etc') body.push('<path d="M112 128 C138 146 176 146 204 126" fill="none" stroke="#7f1f1d" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>');
    }
    return '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="300" height="220" viewBox="0 0 300 220">' + body.join('') + '</svg>';
  }



  function getFocusedOrProjectTimeline(){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: missing helper used by Lip Service audio import
    try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.getSelectedTimeline === 'function') { var btl = App.B.getSelectedTimeline(); if (btl) return btl; } } catch(e0){}
    try { if (App.project && App.project.focus && App.project.focus.timeline) return App.project.focus.timeline; } catch(e1){}
    try { if (App.project && App.project.activeTimeline) return App.project.activeTimeline; } catch(e2){}
    try { if (App.project && App.project.timeline) return App.project.timeline; } catch(e3){}
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.project && App.ed.project.focus && App.ed.project.focus.timeline) return App.ed.project.focus.timeline; } catch(e4){}
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.project && App.ed.project.activeTimeline) return App.ed.project.activeTimeline; } catch(e5){}
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.project && App.ed.project.timeline) return App.ed.project.timeline; } catch(e6){}
    return getSelectedTimeline ? getSelectedTimeline() : null;
  }

  function expressionDataUrlForFrame(kind, item, index, slotData){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: native expression helper must be in global tool scope
    var dataUrl = slotData && slotData.dataUrl ? slotData.dataUrl : (item && item.dataUrl ? item.dataUrl : '');
    if (!dataUrl) dataUrl = 'data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(expressionFrameSvgMarkup(kind, item, index));
    dataUrl = stripWhiteSvgBackgroundFromDataUrl(dataUrl);
    return String(dataUrl || '');
  }

  function expressionDataUrlToText(dataUrl){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    var value = String(dataUrl || '');
    if (value.indexOf('data:image/svg+xml') !== 0) return '';
    try {
      var comma = value.indexOf(',');
      if (comma < 0) return '';
      var header = value.slice(0, comma + 1);
      var body = value.slice(comma + 1);
      if (/;base64/i.test(header)) return String(atob(body) || '');
      return String(decodeURIComponent(body) || '');
    } catch(e) { return ''; }
  }

  function expressionNativeRecordsFromDataUrl(dataUrl, targetW, targetH){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    var svgText = expressionDataUrlToText(dataUrl);
    if (!svgText) return [];
    var native = parseNativeSvg(svgText, targetW || 300, targetH || 300);
    var records = [];
    (native && native.shapes || []).forEach(function(shape){
      var style = clone(shape && shape.style || {});
      if (shape && shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths.length) {
        shape.cmdSubpaths.forEach(function(sp){
          var cmds = smoothNativeCommandsForOutput(clone(sp && sp.commands || []));
          var d = pathCommandsToD(cmds);
          if (d && String(d).trim()) records.push({ d:String(d).trim(), style:clone(style), paperJson:paperJsonFromNativeCommands(cmds, style) });
        });
      } else if (shape && shape.subpaths && shape.subpaths.length) {
        shape.subpaths.forEach(function(sp){
          var pts = (sp && sp.points || []).map(function(p){ return { x:Number(p && p.x || 0) || 0, y:Number(p && p.y || 0) || 0 }; });
          var d = pointsToSubpath(pts, !!(sp && sp.closed));
          if (d && String(d).trim()) records.push({ d:String(d).trim(), style:clone(style), paperJson:paperJsonFromPointList(pts, !!(sp && sp.closed), style) });
        });
      }
    });
    return records;
  }

  function addNativeExpressionArtworkToFrame(frame, dataUrl, targetW, targetH, frameIndex){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    var records = expressionNativeRecordsFromDataUrl(dataUrl, targetW, targetH);
    var added = 0;
    for (var ri = 0; ri < records.length; ri += 1) {
      try {
        var path = createNativeWickPathFromRecord(records[ri], frameIndex, ri + 1);
        addToFrame(frame, path);
        added += 1;
      } catch(e) {
        log('Native expression curve add failed on frame ' + frameIndex + ': ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
      }
    }
    return added;
  }

  function expressionFrameFile(kind, item, index, clipName, slotData){ // FIX v18.29
    var key = String((item && item.key) || (slotData && (slotData.expressionKey || slotData.label)) || ('Frame_' + index));
    var baseName = expressionFrameSafeName(clipName || (kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape')) + '_' + expressionFrameSafeName(key);
    var dataUrl = slotData && slotData.dataUrl ? slotData.dataUrl : (item && item.dataUrl ? item.dataUrl : '');
    dataUrl = stripWhiteSvgBackgroundFromDataUrl(dataUrl);
    if (dataUrl) {
      var ext = dataUrl.indexOf('data:image/png') === 0 ? '.png' : '.svg';
      return dataURLToFile(dataUrl, baseName + ext);
    }
    return new File([expressionFrameSvgMarkup(kind, item, index)], baseName + '.svg', { type:'image/svg+xml' });
  }

  function nameExpressionFrame(frame, item, index){ // FIX v18.5
    var key = String((item && item.key) || ('Frame ' + index));
    var label = String((item && item.label) || key);
    try { frame.name = key; } catch(e){}
    try { frame.identifier = expressionFrameSafeName(key); } catch(e2){}
    try { frame.label = label; } catch(e3){}
    try { frame._name = key; } catch(e4){}
    try { frame._ltbwExpressionFrameName = key; } catch(e5){}
  }

  async function createExpressionFrameClip(){ // FIX v18.5
    if (!refreshBridgeRefs()) { log('Bridge/editor not available.'); return; }
    var activeFb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(App.expressionSubTab || 'lip'); // FIX v18.29
    var bone = currentExpressionBone();
    if (!bone && !activeFb) {
      autoSelectExpressionBoneForExpressionTab();
      bone = currentExpressionBone();
      activeFb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind(App.expressionSubTab || 'lip');
    }
    if (!bone && !activeFb) { log('Create a Lip Bone or Wink Bone first.'); return; }
    var kind = activeFb ? expressionFrameBoneKind(activeFb) : expressionKindForBone(bone);
    var profile = bone ? ensureExpressionProfileForBone(bone) : null;
    var targetName = ((activeFb && activeFb.targetClipName) || (profile && profile.targetClipName) || (kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape')).trim();
    if (!targetName) targetName = kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
    var frames = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    if (!frames || !frames.length) { log('No expression frames are available.'); return; }
    var files = [];
    var names = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < frames.length; i += 1) {
      var slotData = activeFb && activeFb.frames ? activeFb.frames[i + 1] : null; // FIX v18.29
      var f = expressionFrameFile(kind, frames[i], i + 1, targetName, slotData); // FIX v18.29
      files.push(f);
      names.push(f.name);
    }
    try {
      await forceCommitFilesIntoAssets(files, names);
      var found = await waitForAssets(names, 15000);
      var clipIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(targetName, kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape');
      var clip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: clipIdentifier });
      try { clip.name = targetName; } catch(e0){}
      try { clip.width = 300; clip.height = 220; } catch(e1){}
      var safeN = 20;
      try { while (clip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) clip.timeline.removeLayer(clip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(e2){}
      var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
      try { layer.name = kind === 'eye' ? 'Eye frames' : 'Mouth frames'; } catch(e3){}
      clip.timeline.addLayer(layer);
      for (var fi = 1; fi <= frames.length; fi += 1) {
        var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:fi, end:fi });
        nameExpressionFrame(frame, frames[fi - 1], fi);
        layer.addFrame(frame);
        try {
          var asset = found[names[fi - 1]];
          var path = await createImagePathFromAssetAny(asset);
          markCommittedObjectAsSvg(path, asset, files[fi - 1], names[fi - 1], fi);
          try { path.x = 0; path.y = 0; path.width = 300; path.height = 220; } catch(e4){}
          addToFrame(frame, path);
        } catch(addErr) {
          log('Frame ' + fi + ' image could not be added, but the named frame was created: ' + (addErr && addErr.message ? addErr.message : addErr));
        }
      }
      try { clip.animationType = 'single'; } catch(e5){}
      try { clip.timeline.playheadPosition = 1; } catch(e6){}
      addClipToWickProject(clip);
      try { if (!App.committedClipIdentifiers) App.committedClipIdentifiers = []; App.committedClipIdentifiers.push(clip.identifier || clip.name || targetName); } catch(e7){}
      markDirty();
      log('Created ' + targetName + ' with ' + frames.length + ' named ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'eye' : 'mouth') + ' frames. Use the expression driver script to switch those frames.');
    } catch(err) {
      log('Add Frames To Clip failed: ' + (err && err.message ? err.message : err));
    }
  }

    else log('Could not find a selected Wick clip. Copy the script and paste it into the clip default script.');
    renderExpressionUI();
  }

    updateEditBoneControls(); // FIX v6.7

  function getSelectedTimeline(){
    try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.getSelectedTimeline === 'function') return App.B.getSelectedTimeline(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.project && App.project.activeTimeline) return App.project.activeTimeline; } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.project && App.project.timeline) return App.project.timeline; } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function getFrameEnd(frame){
    if (!frame) return 0;
    var start = 1;
    var end = 0;
    try { start = Number(frame.start || frame.startFrame || frame.startFrameNumber || 1); } catch(e){}
    try { end = Number(frame.end || frame.endFrame || frame.endFrameNumber || 0); } catch(e){}
    if (!end) {
      try {
        if (typeof frame.length === 'number') end = start + frame.length - 1;
      } catch(e){}
    }
    if (!end) {
      try {
        if (typeof frame.getEnd === 'function') end = Number(frame.getEnd());
      } catch(e){}
    }
    return Math.max(0, Math.round(end || start || 1));
  }

  function getWickTimelineFrameCount(){
    refreshBridgeRefs();
    var tl = getSelectedTimeline();
    var maxEnd = 1;
    try {
      if (tl && tl.layers && tl.layers.length) {
        tl.layers.forEach(function(layer){
          try {
            if (layer && layer.frames && layer.frames.length) {
              layer.frames.forEach(function(frame){
                maxEnd = Math.max(maxEnd, getFrameEnd(frame));
              });
            }
          } catch(e){}
        });
      }
    } catch(e){}
    try { maxEnd = Math.max(maxEnd, Math.round(Number(tl.playheadPosition || 1))); } catch(e){}
    try { maxEnd = Math.max(maxEnd, Math.round(Number(App.project.currentFrameNumber || 1))); } catch(e){}
    return clamp(maxEnd || 1, 1, 300);
  }

  function syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline(){
    var count = getWickTimelineFrameCount();
    App.frameCount = count;
    App.currentFrame = clamp(App.currentFrame, 1, App.frameCount);
    return count;
  }

  function getSelectedObject(){
    var arr = getSelectedObjects(); // FIX v17.2
    return arr && arr[0] ? arr[0] : null; // FIX v17.2
  }

  function getSelectedObjects(){ // FIX v17.2
    var out = [];
    function add(value){
      if (!value) return;
      if (out.indexOf(value) >= 0) return;
      out.push(value);
    }
    try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.getSelectedObjects === 'function') { var bArr = App.B.getSelectedObjects(); if (bArr && bArr.length) Array.prototype.slice.call(bArr).forEach(add); } } catch(e){}
    try {
      var sources = [];
      try { sources.push((App.project && App.project.selection) || null); } catch(e0){}
      try { sources.push((App.ed && App.ed.selection) || null); } catch(e1){}
      sources.forEach(function(sel){
        if (!sel) return;
        try { if (typeof sel.getSelectedObjects === 'function') { var arr = sel.getSelectedObjects(); if (arr && arr.length) Array.prototype.slice.call(arr).forEach(add); } } catch(e2){}
        try { if (Array.isArray(sel.selectedObjects)) sel.selectedObjects.forEach(add); } catch(e3){}
        try { if (Array.isArray(sel.objects)) sel.objects.forEach(add); } catch(e4){}
        try { if (Array.isArray(sel.items)) sel.items.forEach(add); } catch(e5){}
      });
    } catch(e){}
    if (!out.length) {
      try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.getSelectedObject === 'function') add(App.B.getSelectedObject()); } catch(e){}
    }
    return out;
  }

  function getSelectionInfo(){
    try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.captureSelectionNow === 'function') App.B.captureSelectionNow(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.getSelectionInfo === 'function') return App.B.getSelectionInfo(); } catch(e){}
    try {
      var obj = getSelectedObject();
      if (!obj) return { ok:false };
      return { ok:true, identifier: obj.identifier || obj.name || '', uuid: obj.uuid || '' };
    } catch(e){}
    return { ok:false };
  }

  function findLargestParentCanvas(){
    try {
      var list = Array.prototype.slice.call(window.parent.document.querySelectorAll('canvas'));
      var best = null;
      var bestArea = 0;
      list.forEach(function(c){
        try { if (c.closest && c.closest('[data-luketools-bonewarp-overlay],[data-luketools-bonewarp-kind]')) return; } catch(skipErr){} // FIX v8.8
        var r = c.getBoundingClientRect();
        var area = r.width * r.height;
        if (area > bestArea && r.width > 100 && r.height > 100) {
          best = c;
          bestArea = area;
        }
      });
      return best;
    } catch(e) { return null; }
  }

  function getStageSize(){
    var p = App.project || {};
    return {
      width: p.width || p.projectWidth || 720,
      height: p.height || p.projectHeight || 480
    };
  }

  function getFittedStageRect(){
    var canvas = findLargestParentCanvas();
    if (!canvas) return null;
    var rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    var size = getStageSize();
    var sw = size.width, sh = size.height;
    var stageAR = sw / sh;
    var canvasAR = rect.width / rect.height;
    var fw, fh, fl, ft;
    if (canvasAR > stageAR) {
      fh = rect.height;
      fw = fh * stageAR;
      fl = rect.left + (rect.width - fw) * 0.5;
      ft = rect.top;
    } else {
      fw = rect.width;
      fh = fw / stageAR;
      fl = rect.left;
      ft = rect.top + (rect.height - fh) * 0.5;
    }
    return {
      left: fl,
      top: ft,
      width: fw,
      height: fh,
      stageW: sw,
      stageH: sh,
      canvas: canvas,
      canvasRect: rect
    };
  }


  function getWickPaperView(){ // FIX v8.8
    try { if (App.project && App.project.view && App.project.view.paper && App.project.view.paper.view) return App.project.view.paper.view; } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.ed && App.ed.project && App.ed.project.view && App.ed.project.view.paper && App.ed.project.view.paper.view) return App.ed.project.view.paper.view; } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.paper && window.parent.paper.view) return window.parent.paper.view; } catch(e){}
    try { if (App.paper && App.paper.view) return App.paper.view; } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function getWickViewCanvasRect(){ // FIX v8.8
    var view = getWickPaperView();
    try { if (view && view.element && view.element.getBoundingClientRect) return view.element.getBoundingClientRect(); } catch(e){}
    try { if (view && view._element && view._element.getBoundingClientRect) return view._element.getBoundingClientRect(); } catch(e){}
    var canvas = findLargestParentCanvas();
    return canvas ? canvas.getBoundingClientRect() : null;
  }

  function pointToPaperPoint(x, y){ // FIX v8.8
    try { if (App.paper && App.paper.Point) return new App.paper.Point(x, y); } catch(e){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.paper && window.parent.paper.Point) return new window.parent.paper.Point(x, y); } catch(e){}
    return { x: x, y: y };
  }

  function getStageViewSignature(){ // FIX v8.8
    var view = getWickPaperView();
    var rect = getWickViewCanvasRect();
    var parts = [];
    try { parts.push('pz:' + (App.project && App.project.zoom)); } catch(e){}
    try { parts.push('pp:' + JSON.stringify(App.project && App.project.pan)); } catch(e){}
    try { parts.push('vz:' + (view && view.zoom)); } catch(e){}
    try { parts.push('vc:' + (view && view.center ? [round(view.center.x), round(view.center.y)].join(',') : '')); } catch(e){}
    try { parts.push('vr:' + (rect ? [round(rect.left), round(rect.top), round(rect.width), round(rect.height)].join(',') : '')); } catch(e){}
    return parts.join('|');
  }

  function stageToVp(x, y, fit){
    fit = fit || getFittedStageRect();
    if (!fit) return { x:0, y:0 };
    var view = getWickPaperView(); // FIX v8.8
    var rect = getWickViewCanvasRect(); // FIX v8.8
    if (view && rect && typeof view.projectToView === 'function') { // FIX v8.8
      try {
        var vp = view.projectToView(pointToPaperPoint(x, y));
        return { x: rect.left + vp.x, y: rect.top + vp.y };
      } catch(e){}
    }
    return {
      x: fit.left + (x / fit.stageW) * fit.width,
      y: fit.top + (y / fit.stageH) * fit.height
    };
  }

  function vpToStage(x, y, fit){
    fit = fit || getFittedStageRect();
    if (!fit) return { x:0, y:0 };
    var view = getWickPaperView(); // FIX v8.8
    var rect = getWickViewCanvasRect(); // FIX v8.8
    if (view && rect && typeof view.viewToProject === 'function') { // FIX v8.8
      try {
        var pp = view.viewToProject(pointToPaperPoint(x - rect.left, y - rect.top));
        return { x: pp.x, y: pp.y };
      } catch(e){}
    }
    return {
      x: (x - fit.left) / fit.width * fit.stageW,
      y: (y - fit.top) / fit.height * fit.stageH
    };
  }

  function getObjectStageBounds(obj){
    if (!obj) return null;
    try {
      if (obj.bounds) {
        if (typeof obj.bounds.x === 'number' && typeof obj.bounds.y === 'number' && typeof obj.bounds.width === 'number' && typeof obj.bounds.height === 'number') {
          return { x: obj.bounds.x, y: obj.bounds.y, w: obj.bounds.width, h: obj.bounds.height, cx: obj.bounds.x + obj.bounds.width/2, cy: obj.bounds.y + obj.bounds.height/2 };
        }
        if (typeof obj.bounds.left === 'number' && typeof obj.bounds.top === 'number' && typeof obj.bounds.width === 'number' && typeof obj.bounds.height === 'number') {
          return { x: obj.bounds.left, y: obj.bounds.top, w: obj.bounds.width, h: obj.bounds.height, cx: obj.bounds.left + obj.bounds.width/2, cy: obj.bounds.top + obj.bounds.height/2 };
        }
      }
    } catch(e){}
    try {
      var x = Number(obj.x || 0), y = Number(obj.y || 0);
      var w = Number(obj.width || 0), h = Number(obj.height || 0);
      if (w > 0 && h > 0) {
        return { x: x - w/2, y: y - h/2, w: w, h: h, cx: x, cy: y };
      }
    } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function stageBoundsToViewportRect(bounds){
    var fit = getFittedStageRect();
    if (!fit || !bounds) return null;
    var tl = stageToVp(bounds.x, bounds.y, fit);
    var br = stageToVp(bounds.x + bounds.w, bounds.y + bounds.h, fit);
    return { x: tl.x, y: tl.y, width: br.x - tl.x, height: br.y - tl.y };
  }

  function getSetAreaStageBounds(){ // FIX v6.8
    var fit = getFittedStageRect(); // FIX v6.8
    var vp = App.source && App.source.viewportRect ? App.source.viewportRect : null; // FIX v6.8
    if (!fit || !vp) return null; // FIX v6.8
    var tl = vpToStage(vp.x, vp.y, fit); // FIX v6.8
    var br = vpToStage(vp.x + vp.width, vp.y + vp.height, fit); // FIX v6.8
    var x = tl.x; // FIX v6.8
    var y = tl.y; // FIX v6.8
    var w = br.x - tl.x; // FIX v6.8
    var h = br.y - tl.y; // FIX v6.8
    if (!(isFinite(x) && isFinite(y) && isFinite(w) && isFinite(h))) return null; // FIX v6.8
    return { x: x, y: y, w: w, h: h, cx: x + w * 0.5, cy: y + h * 0.5 }; // FIX v6.8
  }


  function removeSetAreaOverlay(){ // FIX v6.0
    try {
      var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
      if (pdoc) {
        try { if (App.interaction.setAreaMove) pdoc.removeEventListener('mousemove', App.interaction.setAreaMove, true); } catch(e){}
        try { if (App.interaction.setAreaUp) pdoc.removeEventListener('mouseup', App.interaction.setAreaUp, true); } catch(e){}
        try { if (App.interaction.setAreaKey) pdoc.removeEventListener('keydown', App.interaction.setAreaKey, true); } catch(e){}
      }
      if (App.interaction.setAreaRoot && App.interaction.setAreaRoot.parentNode) App.interaction.setAreaRoot.parentNode.removeChild(App.interaction.setAreaRoot);
    } catch(e){}
    App.interaction.setAreaActive = false;

    App.source.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(meta.height || (image ? (image.naturalHeight || image.height || 0) : 0))); // FIX v7.5

    App.source.svgNative = meta.svgNative || null; // FIX v7.1

  function commandPathToPolyline(cmds){ // FIX v7.3
    var pts = [];
    var cur = null;
    var start = null;
    (cmds || []).forEach(function(cmd){
      if (!cmd || !cmd.type) return;
      if (cmd.type === 'M') {
        cur = cloneCmdPoint(cmd.p);
        start = cloneCmdPoint(cmd.p);
        pts.push(cloneCmdPoint(cmd.p));
      } else if (cmd.type === 'L') {

  function parsePathToCommandSubpaths(d, matrix){ // FIX v7.3

    function closeCurrent(closed){
      if (cmds.length) paths.push({ commands: cmds, closed: !!closed });

      prevQ1 = null;

    function addQuad(c1, p){ cmds.push({ type: 'Q', c1: commandPoint(c1.x, c1.y, matrix), p: commandPoint(p.x, p.y, matrix) }); cur = {x:p.x,y:p.y}; prevQ1 = {x:c1.x,y:c1.y}; prevC2 = null; }

      if (!cmd) break;
      var rel = cmd === cmd.toLowerCase();
      var C = cmd.toUpperCase();
      if (C === 'M') {
        var first = true;
        while (hasNum()) {
          var x = num(), y = num();
          var p = { x: rel ? cur.x + x : x, y: rel ? cur.y + y : y };
          if (first) {
            if (cmds.length) closeCurrent(false);
            addMove(p);
            first = false;
          } else addLine(p);
        }
      } else if (C === 'L') {
        while (hasNum()) { var lx=num(), ly=num(); addLine({x:rel?cur.x+lx:lx, y:rel?cur.y+ly:ly}); }
      } else if (C === 'H') {
        while (hasNum()) { var hx=num(); addLine({x:rel?cur.x+hx:hx, y:cur.y}); }
      } else if (C === 'V') {
        while (hasNum()) { var vy=num(); addLine({x:cur.x, y:rel?cur.y+vy:vy}); }
      } else if (C === 'C') {
        while (hasNum()) {
          var x1=num(),y1=num(),x2=num(),y2=num(),x3=num(),y3=num();
          var p1={x:rel?cur.x+x1:x1,y:rel?cur.y+y1:y1};
          var p2={x:rel?cur.x+x2:x2,y:rel?cur.y+y2:y2};
          var p3={x:rel?cur.x+x3:x3,y:rel?cur.y+y3:y3};

        while (hasNum()) {
          var sx2=num(), sy2=num(), sx=num(), sy=num();
          var rc1 = prevC2 ? { x: cur.x + (cur.x - prevC2.x), y: cur.y + (cur.y - prevC2.y) } : { x: cur.x, y: cur.y };
          var rc2 = { x: rel ? cur.x + sx2 : sx2, y: rel ? cur.y + sy2 : sy2 };
          var rp = { x: rel ? cur.x + sx : sx, y: rel ? cur.y + sy : sy };
          addCubic(rc1, rc2, rp);
        }
      } else if (C === 'Q') {
        while (hasNum()) {
          var qx1=num(), qy1=num(), qx2=num(), qy2=num();
          var q1={x:rel?cur.x+qx1:qx1,y:rel?cur.y+qy1:qy1};
          var q2={x:rel?cur.x+qx2:qx2,y:rel?cur.y+qy2:qy2};

        while (hasNum()) {
          var tx=num(), ty=num();

  function rectToCommandSubpaths(x,y,w,h){ // FIX v7.3
    return [{ commands:[{type:'M',p:{x:x,y:y}},{type:'L',p:{x:x+w,y:y}},{type:'L',p:{x:x+w,y:y+h}},{type:'L',p:{x:x,y:y+h}},{type:'Z'}], closed:true }];

  function polygonPoints(str){ // FIX v7.1
    var nums = (String(str||'').match(/-?\d*\.?\d+(?:e[-+]?\d+)?/ig)||[]).map(Number), pts=[];

  function polyPointsToCommandSubpath(points, closed){ // FIX v7.3
    if (!points || !points.length) return [];
    var cmds = [{ type:'M', p:{ x:points[0].x, y:points[0].y } }];
    for (var i = 1; i < points.length; i++) cmds.push({ type:'L', p:{ x:points[i].x, y:points[i].y } });

  function parseNativeSvg(svgText, targetW, targetH){ // FIX v7.7

  function readFileAsText(file){ // FIX v7.1
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject){
      try {
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(){ resolve(String(reader.result || '')); };
        reader.onerror = function(){ reject(reader.error || new Error('Could not read text file.')); };
        reader.readAsText(file);
      } catch(e) { reject(e); }
    });
  }

  function loadImageFromFile(file){ // FIX v7.2
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject){
      try {
        var isSvg = !!(file && ((file.type || '').toLowerCase().indexOf('svg') >= 0 || /\.svg$/i.test(file.name || ''))); // FIX v7.2
        if (!isSvg) { // FIX v7.2
          reject(new Error('This tool only accepts SVG files, including normal SVG and Inkscape SVG.')); // FIX v7.2
          return; // FIX v7.2
        }
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(){
          var dataUrl = reader.result;
          loadImageFromUrl(dataUrl).then(async function(img){
            var svgRaw = '';
            var svgNative = null;
            var targetW = Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.viewportRect && App.source.viewportRect.width ? App.source.viewportRect.width : (img.naturalWidth || img.width || 100))); // FIX v7.5
            var targetH = Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.viewportRect && App.source.viewportRect.height ? App.source.viewportRect.height : (img.naturalHeight || img.height || 100))); // FIX v7.5

            }

          }).catch(function(err){ reject(err || new Error('SVG load failed')); });
        };
        reader.onerror = function(){ reject(reader.error || new Error('Could not read SVG file.')); };

      }
    });

  function selectedCurveSvgEscape(value){ // FIX v14.4
    return String(value == null ? '' : value).replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/"/g, '&quot;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');
  }

  function selectedCurveCssColor(value, fallback){ // FIX v14.4
    if (value == null || value === '') return fallback;
    try { if (typeof value === 'string') return value; } catch(e){}
    try { if (value && typeof value.toCSS === 'function') return value.toCSS(true); } catch(e){}
    try { if (value && typeof value.toCSS === 'function') return value.toCSS(); } catch(e){}
    try {
      if (value && typeof value.red === 'number' && typeof value.green === 'number' && typeof value.blue === 'number') {
        var r = Math.round(clamp(value.red, 0, 1) * 255);
        var g = Math.round(clamp(value.green, 0, 1) * 255);
        var b = Math.round(clamp(value.blue, 0, 1) * 255);
        var a = typeof value.alpha === 'number' ? clamp(value.alpha, 0, 1) : 1;
        if (a < 1) return 'rgba(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ',' + round(a) + ')';
        return 'rgb(' + r + ',' + g + ',' + b + ')';
      }
    } catch(e){}
    return fallback;
  }

  function selectedCurveNumber(value, fallback){ // FIX v14.4
    var n = Number(value);
    return isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
  }

  function selectedCurveGetBounds(value){ // FIX v14.4
    if (!value) return null;
    try {
      if (value.bounds) {
        var b = value.bounds;
        var x = selectedCurveNumber(b.x, selectedCurveNumber(b.left, NaN));
        var y = selectedCurveNumber(b.y, selectedCurveNumber(b.top, NaN));
        var w = selectedCurveNumber(b.width, selectedCurveNumber(b.w, NaN));
        var h = selectedCurveNumber(b.height, selectedCurveNumber(b.h, NaN));
        if (isFinite(x) && isFinite(y) && isFinite(w) && isFinite(h) && w > 0 && h > 0) return { x:x, y:y, w:w, h:h, cx:x + w * 0.5, cy:y + h * 0.5 };
      }
    } catch(e){}
    try {
      var ox = selectedCurveNumber(value.x, selectedCurveNumber(value.transformation && value.transformation.x, NaN));
      var oy = selectedCurveNumber(value.y, selectedCurveNumber(value.transformation && value.transformation.y, NaN));
      var ow = selectedCurveNumber(value.width, NaN);
      var oh = selectedCurveNumber(value.height, NaN);
      if (isFinite(ox) && isFinite(oy) && isFinite(ow) && isFinite(oh) && ow > 0 && oh > 0) return { x:ox - ow * 0.5, y:oy - oh * 0.5, w:ow, h:oh, cx:ox, cy:oy };
    } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function selectedCurveFindPaperItem(obj){ // FIX v14.4
    var seen = [];
    function scan(value, depth){
      if (!value || depth > 4) return null;
      if (seen.indexOf(value) >= 0) return null;
      seen.push(value);
      try { if (typeof value.exportSVG === 'function') return value; } catch(e){}
      var keys = ['view','_view','paper','_paper','path','_path','item','_item','paperItem','_paperItem','wickItem','_wickItem','projectItem','_projectItem','itemInstance','_itemInstance'];
      for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
        try { var found = scan(value[keys[i]], depth + 1); if (found) return found; } catch(e){}
      }
      return null;
    }
    return scan(obj, 0);
  }

  function selectedCurvePaperBounds(item){ // FIX v14.4
    if (!item) return null;
    try {
      var b = item.bounds;
      if (b && isFinite(b.left) && isFinite(b.top) && isFinite(b.width) && isFinite(b.height) && b.width > 0 && b.height > 0) return { x:b.left, y:b.top, w:b.width, h:b.height, cx:b.left + b.width * 0.5, cy:b.top + b.height * 0.5 };
    } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function selectedCurveExtractSvgInner(svgText){ // FIX v14.4
    var raw = String(svgText || '').trim();
    if (!raw) return '';
    if (/^<svg[\s>]/i.test(raw)) {
      try {
        var doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(raw, 'image/svg+xml');
        var svg = doc.documentElement;
        if (svg && /svg/i.test(svg.tagName)) return Array.prototype.slice.call(svg.childNodes || []).map(function(n){ return new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(n); }).join('\n');
      } catch(e){}

    }
    return raw;
  }

  function selectedCurveWrapSvgContent(innerSvg, bounds, fileName){ // FIX v14.4

    var y = selectedCurveNumber(bounds.y, 0);
    return '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="' + w + '" height="' + h + '" viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h + '">\n' + '<title>' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(fileName || 'Selected Wick Curve') + '</title>\n' + '<g transform="translate(' + round(-x) + ' ' + round(-y) + ')">\n' + String(innerSvg || '') + '\n</g>\n</svg>';
  }

  function selectedCurvePointXY(point){ // FIX v14.4
    if (!point) return { x:0, y:0 };
    return { x:selectedCurveNumber(point.x, selectedCurveNumber(point[0], 0)), y:selectedCurveNumber(point.y, selectedCurveNumber(point[1], 0)) };
  }

  function selectedCurveManualPathFromPaperItem(item, bounds){ // FIX v14.4
    if (!item || !item.segments || !item.segments.length) return '';
    bounds = bounds || selectedCurvePaperBounds(item) || { x:0, y:0, w:100, h:100 };
    var segs = Array.prototype.slice.call(item.segments || []);
    var d = [];
    function localPoint(p){ return { x:round(p.x - bounds.x), y:round(p.y - bounds.y) }; }
    var first = localPoint(selectedCurvePointXY(segs[0].point));
    d.push('M ' + first.x + ' ' + first.y);
    for (var i = 1; i < segs.length; i++) {
      var prev = segs[i - 1];
      var cur = segs[i];
      var pp = selectedCurvePointXY(prev.point);
      var cp = selectedCurvePointXY(cur.point);
      var ho = selectedCurvePointXY(prev.handleOut);
      var hi = selectedCurvePointXY(cur.handleIn);
      var hasOut = Math.abs(ho.x) > 0.0001 || Math.abs(ho.y) > 0.0001;
      var hasIn = Math.abs(hi.x) > 0.0001 || Math.abs(hi.y) > 0.0001;
      var end = localPoint(cp);
      if (hasOut || hasIn) {
        var c1 = localPoint({ x:pp.x + ho.x, y:pp.y + ho.y });
        var c2 = localPoint({ x:cp.x + hi.x, y:cp.y + hi.y });
        d.push('C ' + c1.x + ' ' + c1.y + ' ' + c2.x + ' ' + c2.y + ' ' + end.x + ' ' + end.y);
      } else d.push('L ' + end.x + ' ' + end.y);
    }

    var fill = 'none';
    var stroke = '#000000';
    var strokeWidth = 1;
    try { fill = selectedCurveCssColor(item.fillColor, 'none'); } catch(e){}
    try { stroke = selectedCurveCssColor(item.strokeColor, '#000000'); } catch(e){}
    try { strokeWidth = selectedCurveNumber(item.strokeWidth, 1); } catch(e){}
    if (!stroke || stroke === 'none') stroke = '#000000';
    return '<path d="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(d.join(' ')) + '" fill="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(fill || 'none') + '" stroke="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(stroke || '#000000') + '" stroke-width="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(strokeWidth) + '" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>';
  }

  function selectedCurveManualRectSvg(obj, bounds){ // FIX v14.4
    bounds = bounds || { x:0, y:0, w:100, h:100 };
    var fill = 'none';
    var stroke = '#000000';
    var strokeWidth = 1;
    try { fill = selectedCurveCssColor(obj.fillColor || obj.fill, 'none'); } catch(e){}
    try { stroke = selectedCurveCssColor(obj.strokeColor || obj.stroke, '#000000'); } catch(e){}
    try { strokeWidth = selectedCurveNumber(obj.strokeWidth || obj.stroke_width, 1); } catch(e){}
    return '<rect x="0" y="0" width="' + Math.max(1, round(bounds.w)) + '" height="' + Math.max(1, round(bounds.h)) + '" fill="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(fill || 'none') + '" stroke="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(stroke || '#000000') + '" stroke-width="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(strokeWidth) + '"/>';
  }

  function selectedCurveDensityToMaxStep(value){ // FIX v14.6
    var density = clamp(Number(value || 0), 0, 100);
    return Math.max(2, Math.round(42 - (density * 0.40)));
  }

  function selectedCurveStyleAttributesFromPaperItem(item){ // FIX v14.6
    var fill = 'none';
    var stroke = '#000000';
    var strokeWidth = 1;
    var opacity = 1;
    try { fill = selectedCurveCssColor(item && item.fillColor, 'none'); } catch(e){}
    try { stroke = selectedCurveCssColor(item && item.strokeColor, '#000000'); } catch(e){}
    try { strokeWidth = selectedCurveNumber(item && item.strokeWidth, 1); } catch(e){}
    try { opacity = selectedCurveNumber(item && item.opacity, 1); } catch(e){}
    if (!stroke || stroke === 'none') stroke = '#000000';
    var attrs = ' fill="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(fill || 'none') + '" stroke="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(stroke || '#000000') + '" stroke-width="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(strokeWidth) + '" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"';

  }

  function selectedCurveHasHandle(handle){ // FIX v14.7
    var h = selectedCurvePointXY(handle || { x:0, y:0 });
    return Math.abs(h.x) > 0.0001 || Math.abs(h.y) > 0.0001;
  }

  function selectedCurveBezierPoint(p0, p1, p2, p3, t){ // FIX v14.7
    var mt = 1 - t;
    var mt2 = mt * mt;
    var t2 = t * t;
    return {
      x: (mt2 * mt * p0.x) + (3 * mt2 * t * p1.x) + (3 * mt * t2 * p2.x) + (t2 * t * p3.x),
      y: (mt2 * mt * p0.y) + (3 * mt2 * t * p1.y) + (3 * mt * t2 * p2.y) + (t2 * t * p3.y)
    };
  }

  function selectedCurveSegmentLengthEstimate(p0, p1, p2, p3, isCurve){ // FIX v14.7
    if (!isCurve) return dist(p0, p3);
    var total = 0;
    var prev = p0;
    for (var i = 1; i <= 16; i++) {
      var pt = selectedCurveBezierPoint(p0, p1, p2, p3, i / 16);
      total += dist(prev, pt);
      prev = pt;
    }
    return total;
  }

  function selectedCurvePushSegmentPoints(out, prevSeg, curSeg, maxStep, includeEnd){ // FIX v14.7
    var p0 = selectedCurvePointXY(prevSeg.point);
    var p3 = selectedCurvePointXY(curSeg.point);
    var hOut = selectedCurvePointXY(prevSeg.handleOut || { x:0, y:0 });
    var hIn = selectedCurvePointXY(curSeg.handleIn || { x:0, y:0 });
    var isCurve = selectedCurveHasHandle(prevSeg.handleOut) || selectedCurveHasHandle(curSeg.handleIn);
    var p1 = isCurve ? { x:p0.x + hOut.x, y:p0.y + hOut.y } : p0;
    var p2 = isCurve ? { x:p3.x + hIn.x, y:p3.y + hIn.y } : p3;
    var segLen = selectedCurveSegmentLengthEstimate(p0, p1, p2, p3, isCurve);
    var steps = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(segLen / Math.max(2, Number(maxStep || 8))));
    var last = includeEnd ? steps : steps - 1;
    for (var i = 1; i <= last; i++) {
      var t = i / steps;
      out.push(isCurve ? selectedCurveBezierPoint(p0, p1, p2, p3, t) : { x:lerp(p0.x, p3.x, t), y:lerp(p0.y, p3.y, t) });
    }
  }

  function selectedCurveCornerSafePointsFromPaperPath(item, maxStep){ // FIX v14.7
    var segs = [];
    try { segs = Array.prototype.slice.call(item && item.segments ? item.segments : []); } catch(e) { segs = []; }
    if (!segs.length) return [];
    var pts = [];
    pts.push(selectedCurvePointXY(segs[0].point));
    for (var i = 1; i < segs.length; i++) selectedCurvePushSegmentPoints(pts, segs[i - 1], segs[i], maxStep, true);
    try {
      if (item.closed && segs.length > 1) selectedCurvePushSegmentPoints(pts, segs[segs.length - 1], segs[0], maxStep, false);
    } catch(e){}
    return pts;
  }

  function selectedCurveDensifiedPathFromPaperItem(item, bounds, maxStep){ // FIX v14.7
    if (!item) return '';
    var parts = [];
    function walk(node){
      if (!node) return;
      try {
        if (node.segments && node.segments.length) {
          var pts = selectedCurveCornerSafePointsFromPaperPath(node, maxStep); // FIX v14.7: preserve original anchors and only insert points between them
          if (pts && pts.length) {
            var d = [];
            d.push('M ' + round(pts[0].x) + ' ' + round(pts[0].y));
            for (var i = 1; i < pts.length; i++) d.push('L ' + round(pts[i].x) + ' ' + round(pts[i].y));
            try { if (node.closed) d.push('Z'); } catch(e){}
            parts.push('<path d="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(d.join(' ')) + '"' + selectedCurveStyleAttributesFromPaperItem(node) + ' data-luketools-point-density="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(App.selectedCurve.pointDensity) + '" data-luketools-corner-safe="true"/>');
          }
          return;
        }
      } catch(pathErr){}
      try {
        if (node.children && node.children.length) {
          Array.prototype.slice.call(node.children || []).forEach(function(child){ walk(child); });
        }
      } catch(childErr){}
    }
    walk(item);
    return parts.join('\n');
  }

  function selectedCurveObjectToSvg(obj){ // FIX v14.4
    if (!obj) throw new Error('No Wick object is selected. Select a Wick curve or path on the stage first.');
    var item = selectedCurveFindPaperItem(obj);
    var bounds = selectedCurvePaperBounds(item) || getObjectStageBounds(obj) || selectedCurveGetBounds(obj);
    if (!bounds || bounds.w <= 0 || bounds.h <= 0) throw new Error('The selected object does not expose usable bounds.');
    var name = String(obj.identifier || obj.name || 'Selected_Wick_Curve');
    var rawExport = '';
    var density = clamp(Number(App.selectedCurve && App.selectedCurve.pointDensity != null ? App.selectedCurve.pointDensity : 50), 0, 100); // FIX v14.6
    var inner = '';
    if (item && density > 0) inner = selectedCurveDensifiedPathFromPaperItem(item, bounds, selectedCurveDensityToMaxStep(density)); // FIX v14.6
    if (!inner && item && typeof item.exportSVG === 'function') {
      try { rawExport = String(item.exportSVG({ asString:true }) || ''); } catch(e){}
      if (!rawExport) { try { rawExport = String(item.exportSVG({ asString:true, precision:3 }) || ''); } catch(e2){} }
    }
    if (!inner) inner = rawExport ? selectedCurveExtractSvgInner(rawExport) : '';
    if (!inner && item && item.segments && item.segments.length) inner = selectedCurveManualPathFromPaperItem(item, bounds);
    if (!inner) inner = selectedCurveManualRectSvg(obj, bounds);
    return { svgRaw:selectedCurveWrapSvgContent(inner, bounds, name), bounds:bounds, fileName:makeValidIdentifier(name, 'Selected_Wick_Curve') + '.svg' };
  }

  function selectedCurveManualRectSvgAbsolute(obj, bounds){ // FIX v17.2
    bounds = bounds || { x:0, y:0, w:100, h:100 };
    var fill = 'none';
    var stroke = '#000000';
    var strokeWidth = 1;
    try { fill = selectedCurveCssColor(obj.fillColor || obj.fill, 'none'); } catch(e){}
    try { stroke = selectedCurveCssColor(obj.strokeColor || obj.stroke, '#000000'); } catch(e){}
    try { strokeWidth = selectedCurveNumber(obj.strokeWidth || obj.stroke_width, 1); } catch(e){}
    return '<rect x="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(round(bounds.x || 0)) + '" y="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(round(bounds.y || 0)) + '" width="' + Math.max(1, round(bounds.w)) + '" height="' + Math.max(1, round(bounds.h)) + '" fill="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(fill || 'none') + '" stroke="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(stroke || '#000000') + '" stroke-width="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(strokeWidth) + '"/>';
  }

  function selectedCurveObjectToSvgPart(obj, index){ // FIX v17.2
    if (!obj) throw new Error('A selected Wick object was empty.');
    var item = selectedCurveFindPaperItem(obj);
    var bounds = selectedCurvePaperBounds(item) || getObjectStageBounds(obj) || selectedCurveGetBounds(obj);
    if (!bounds || bounds.w <= 0 || bounds.h <= 0) throw new Error('A selected object does not expose usable bounds.');
    var name = String(obj.identifier || obj.name || ('Selected_Wick_Curve_' + (index + 1)));
    var density = clamp(Number(App.selectedCurve && App.selectedCurve.pointDensity != null ? App.selectedCurve.pointDensity : 50), 0, 100);
    var inner = '';
    var rawExport = '';
    if (item && density > 0) inner = selectedCurveDensifiedPathFromPaperItem(item, bounds, selectedCurveDensityToMaxStep(density)); // FIX v17.2: preserves original colours through selectedCurveStyleAttributesFromPaperItem.
    if (!inner && item && item.segments && item.segments.length) inner = selectedCurveManualPathFromPaperItem(item, { x:0, y:0, w:bounds.w, h:bounds.h, cx:0, cy:0 }); // FIX v17.2: absolute path coordinates for shared SVG bounds.
    if (!inner && item && typeof item.exportSVG === 'function') {
      try { rawExport = String(item.exportSVG({ asString:true }) || ''); } catch(e){}
      if (!rawExport) { try { rawExport = String(item.exportSVG({ asString:true, precision:3 }) || ''); } catch(e2){} }
      inner = rawExport ? selectedCurveExtractSvgInner(rawExport) : '';
    }
    if (!inner) inner = selectedCurveManualRectSvgAbsolute(obj, bounds);
    return { inner:'<g data-luketools-selected-curve-index="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(index + 1) + '" data-luketools-selected-curve-name="' + selectedCurveSvgEscape(name) + '">\n' + inner + '\n</g>', bounds:bounds, name:name };
  }

  function selectedCurveUnionBounds(parts){ // FIX v17.2
    var minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity, maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
    (parts || []).forEach(function(part){
      var b = part && part.bounds ? part.bounds : null;
      if (!b) return;
      minX = Math.min(minX, b.x);
      minY = Math.min(minY, b.y);
      maxX = Math.max(maxX, b.x + b.w);
      maxY = Math.max(maxY, b.y + b.h);
    });
    if (!isFinite(minX) || !isFinite(minY) || !isFinite(maxX) || !isFinite(maxY) || maxX <= minX || maxY <= minY) return null;
    return { x:minX, y:minY, w:maxX - minX, h:maxY - minY, cx:(minX + maxX) * 0.5, cy:(minY + maxY) * 0.5 };
  }

  function selectedCurveObjectsToSvg(objects){ // FIX v17.2
    var list = (objects || []).filter(function(obj){ return !!obj; });
    if (!list.length) throw new Error('No Wick curves are selected. Select one or more Wick curves on the stage first.');
    var parts = [];
    var errors = [];
    list.forEach(function(obj, index){
      try { parts.push(selectedCurveObjectToSvgPart(obj, index)); }
      catch(e) { errors.push(e && e.message ? e.message : String(e)); }
    });
    if (!parts.length) throw new Error('None of the selected objects could be converted to SVG.' + (errors.length ? ' ' + errors.join(' ') : ''));
    var bounds = selectedCurveUnionBounds(parts);
    if (!bounds) throw new Error('Could not calculate shared bounds for the selected Wick curves.');
    var fileName = parts.length === 1 ? makeValidIdentifier(parts[0].name, 'Selected_Wick_Curve') + '.svg' : 'Selected_Wick_Curves_' + parts.length + '.svg';
    var label = parts.length === 1 ? 'Selected Wick Curve' : ('Selected Wick Curves (' + parts.length + ')');
    return { svgRaw:selectedCurveWrapSvgContent(parts.map(function(p){ return p.inner; }).join('\n'), bounds, label), bounds:bounds, fileName:fileName, count:parts.length, errors:errors };
  }

  function removeOriginalSelectedCurveObject(obj){ // FIX v14.5
    var removed = false;
    var lastErr = null;
    refreshBridgeRefs();
    try {
      if (App.B && typeof App.B.deleteSelectedObject === 'function') {
        App.B.deleteSelectedObject();
        removed = true;
      }
    } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (App.ed && typeof App.ed.deleteSelectedObjects === 'function') {
          App.ed.deleteSelectedObjects();
          removed = true;
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (App.project && App.project.selection && typeof App.project.selection.delete === 'function') {
          App.project.selection.delete();
          removed = true;
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (obj && typeof obj.remove === 'function') {
          obj.remove();
          removed = true;
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (obj && obj.parent && typeof obj.parent.removeChild === 'function') {
          obj.parent.removeChild(obj);
          removed = true;
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (obj && obj.parent && Array.isArray(obj.parent.objects)) {
          var idx = obj.parent.objects.indexOf(obj);
          if (idx >= 0) {
            obj.parent.objects.splice(idx, 1);
            removed = true;
          }
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (obj && obj.parent && Array.isArray(obj.parent.children)) {
          var idx2 = obj.parent.children.indexOf(obj);
          if (idx2 >= 0) {
            obj.parent.children.splice(idx2, 1);
            removed = true;
          }
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) throw new Error('Converted the selected Wick curve, but could not remove the original stage object automatically.' + (lastErr && lastErr.message ? ' ' + lastErr.message : ''));
    markDirty();
    return true;
  }


  function removeOriginalSelectedCurveObjects(objects){ // FIX v17.2
    objects = (objects || []).filter(function(obj){ return !!obj; });
    if (!objects.length) return true;
    if (objects.length === 1) return removeOriginalSelectedCurveObject(objects[0]);
    var removed = false;
    var lastErr = null;
    refreshBridgeRefs();
    try {
      if (App.B && typeof App.B.deleteSelectedObjects === 'function') {
        App.B.deleteSelectedObjects();
        removed = true;
      }
    } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (App.ed && typeof App.ed.deleteSelectedObjects === 'function') {
          App.ed.deleteSelectedObjects();
          removed = true;
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      try {
        if (App.project && App.project.selection && typeof App.project.selection.delete === 'function') {
          App.project.selection.delete();
          removed = true;
        }
      } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
    }
    if (!removed) {
      var removedCount = 0;
      objects.forEach(function(obj){
        var didRemove = false;
        try { if (!didRemove && obj && typeof obj.remove === 'function') { obj.remove(); didRemove = true; } } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
        try { if (!didRemove && obj && obj.parent && typeof obj.parent.removeChild === 'function') { obj.parent.removeChild(obj); didRemove = true; } } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
        try {
          if (!didRemove && obj && obj.parent && Array.isArray(obj.parent.objects)) {
            var idx = obj.parent.objects.indexOf(obj);
            if (idx >= 0) { obj.parent.objects.splice(idx, 1); didRemove = true; }
          }
        } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
        try {
          if (!didRemove && obj && obj.parent && Array.isArray(obj.parent.children)) {
            var idx2 = obj.parent.children.indexOf(obj);
            if (idx2 >= 0) { obj.parent.children.splice(idx2, 1); didRemove = true; }
          }
        } catch(e) { lastErr = e; }
        if (didRemove) removedCount++;
      });
      removed = removedCount === objects.length;
    }
    if (!removed) throw new Error('Converted the selected Wick curves, but could not remove every original stage object automatically.' + (lastErr && lastErr.message ? ' ' + lastErr.message : ''));
    markDirty();
    return true;
  }

  async function loadSvgTextAsSource(svgRaw, fileName, mode, bounds){ // FIX v14.4
    if (!svgRaw || !/^\s*<svg[\s>]/i.test(String(svgRaw))) throw new Error('Could not build a valid SVG from the selected object.');
    if (bounds) {
      App.source.stagePlacementBounds = { x:bounds.x, y:bounds.y, w:bounds.w, h:bounds.h, cx:bounds.cx, cy:bounds.cy };
      App.source.viewportRect = stageBoundsToViewportRect(bounds) || App.source.viewportRect;
    }
    if (!App.source.viewportRect) App.source.viewportRect = { x:80, y:80, width:100, height:100 };
    var dataUrl = svgTextToDataUrl(svgRaw);
    var img = await loadImageFromUrl(dataUrl);
    var targetW = Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.viewportRect && App.source.viewportRect.width ? App.source.viewportRect.width : (bounds && bounds.w ? bounds.w : (img.naturalWidth || img.width || 100))));
    var targetH = Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.viewportRect && App.source.viewportRect.height ? App.source.viewportRect.height : (bounds && bounds.h ? bounds.h : (img.naturalHeight || img.height || 100))));
    var svgNative = null;
    try { svgNative = mcDensifyNativeSvgForDeform(parseNativeSvg(svgRaw, targetW, targetH)); } catch(svgErr) { log('Selected Wick curve SVG native parse warning: ' + (svgErr && svgErr.message ? svgErr.message : svgErr)); } // FIX v_006
    applyLoadedSourceImage(dataUrl, img, { fileName:fileName || 'Selected_Wick_Curve.svg', mode:mode || 'selected-wick-curve', label:fileName || 'Selected Wick Curve', svgRaw:svgRaw, svgNative:svgNative, width:targetW, height:targetH, uuid:'selected-wick-curve' });
    if (bounds) {
      App.source.stageBounds = { x:bounds.x, y:bounds.y, w:bounds.w, h:bounds.h, cx:bounds.cx, cy:bounds.cy };
      App.source.stageCenter = { x:bounds.cx, y:bounds.cy };
    }
    if (svgNative && svgNative.shapes && svgNative.shapes.length) {
      log('Selected Wick curve converted to SVG Native source: parsed ' + svgNative.shapes.length + ' vector shape' + (svgNative.shapes.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '.');
      if (el('selExportMode')) el('selExportMode').value = 'nativeCurve'; // FIX v16.9: native Wick curves are the default commit mode.
    } else log('Selected Wick curve converted to SVG source, but no native vector shapes were parsed.');
  }

  async function useSelectedWickCurveAsSourceInternal(removeOriginal){ // FIX v17.2
    try {
      refreshBridgeRefs();
      try { if (App.B && typeof App.B.captureSelectionNow === 'function') App.B.captureSelectionNow(); } catch(e){}
      var objects = getSelectedObjects(); // FIX v17.2
      if (!objects.length) throw new Error('No Wick curves are selected. Select one or more Wick curves on the stage first.');
      var converted = selectedCurveObjectsToSvg(objects); // FIX v17.2
      rememberSelectedCurveSourceTimeline(); // FIX v14.8
      await loadSvgTextAsSource(converted.svgRaw, converted.fileName, converted.count > 1 ? 'selected-wick-curves' : 'selected-wick-curve', converted.bounds);
      if (removeOriginal) {
        removeOriginalSelectedCurveObjects(objects); // FIX v17.2
        log((converted.count > 1 ? converted.count + ' selected Wick curves ingested and originals removed from the Wick stage.' : 'Selected Wick curve ingested and original removed from the Wick stage.')); // FIX v17.2
      } else {
        log((converted.count > 1 ? converted.count + ' selected Wick curves ingested as one source. Colours were preserved from the selected curves.' : 'Selected Wick curve ingested as source.')); // FIX v17.2
      }
      if (converted.errors && converted.errors.length) log('Some selected objects were skipped: ' + converted.errors.join(' | ')); // FIX v17.2
      removeSetAreaOverlay();
      ensureOverlay();
      hideSetAreaVisualFrame();
      fitOverlayToSource();
      renderOverlay();
      updateUI();
    } catch(err) {
      log((removeOriginal ? 'Use Selected Curves And Remove Originals failed: ' : 'Use Selected Wick Curves failed: ') + (err && err.message ? err.message : err));
    }
  }

  async function useSelectedWickCurveAsSource(){ // FIX v17.2
    return useSelectedWickCurveAsSourceInternal(false); // FIX v17.2
  }

  async function useSelectedWickCurveAsSourceAndRemoveOriginal(){ // FIX v17.2
    return useSelectedWickCurveAsSourceInternal(true); // FIX v17.2
  }

  async function onImageFileChosen(evt){ // FIX v7.1
    var file = evt && evt.target && evt.target.files && evt.target.files[0] ? evt.target.files[0] : null;
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      var loaded = await loadImageFromFile(file);
      applyLoadedSourceImage(loaded.dataUrl, loaded.image, { fileName: loaded.fileName, mode: 'local-svg', label: loaded.fileName, svgRaw: loaded.svgRaw, svgNative: loaded.svgNative, width: loaded.width, height: loaded.height }); // FIX v7.5
      if (loaded.svgNative && loaded.svgNative.shapes && loaded.svgNative.shapes.length) {
        log('SVG Native Mode ready: parsed ' + loaded.svgNative.shapes.length + ' vector shape' + (loaded.svgNative.shapes.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' with preserved curve commands.');
        if (el('selExportMode')) el('selExportMode').value = 'nativeCurve'; // FIX v16.9: native Wick curves are the default commit mode.
      }
    } catch(e) {
      log('SVG load failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
    }
  }

  function beginSetAreaMode(){ // FIX v6.0
    removeSetAreaOverlay();
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
    if (!pdoc || !pdoc.body) {
      log('Could not access the Wick editor screen to set an area.');
      return;
    }
    var root = pdoc.createElement('div');
    root.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-kind', 'set-area');
    root.style.cssText = [
      'position:fixed',
      'left:0',
      'top:0',
      'right:0',
      'bottom:0',
      'z-index:2147483645',
      'cursor:crosshair',
      'background:transparent', // FIX v6.2
      'pointer-events:auto',
      'user-select:none'
    ].join(';');
    var label = pdoc.createElement('div');
    label.textContent = 'Drag to set image area. Press Esc to cancel.';
    label.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:18px;top:18px;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(20,20,20,0.92);color:#fff;border:1px solid #52b1ff;font:12px Arial,sans-serif;pointer-events:none;';
    var box = pdoc.createElement('div');
    box.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:0;height:0;border:2px solid #52b1ff;background:transparent;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(82,177,255,0.35) inset;pointer-events:none;display:none;'; // FIX v6.2
    root.appendChild(label);
    root.appendChild(box);
    pdoc.body.appendChild(root);

    App.interaction.setAreaActive = true;
    App.interaction.setAreaRoot = root;
    App.interaction.setAreaBox = box;
    App.interaction.setAreaStart = null;

    function updateBox(clientX, clientY){
      var sx = App.interaction.setAreaStart.x;
      var sy = App.interaction.setAreaStart.y;
      var left = Math.min(sx, clientX);
      var top = Math.min(sy, clientY);
      var width = Math.abs(clientX - sx);
      var height = Math.abs(clientY - sy);
      box.style.display = 'block';
      box.style.left = Math.round(left) + 'px';
      box.style.top = Math.round(top) + 'px';
      box.style.width = Math.round(width) + 'px';
      box.style.height = Math.round(height) + 'px';
    }

    root.addEventListener('mousedown', function(ev){
      if (ev.button !== 0) return;
      ev.preventDefault();
      ev.stopPropagation();
      App.interaction.setAreaStart = { x: ev.clientX, y: ev.clientY };
      updateBox(ev.clientX, ev.clientY);
    }, true);

    App.interaction.setAreaMove = function(ev){
      if (!App.interaction.setAreaStart) return;
      ev.preventDefault();
      ev.stopPropagation();
      updateBox(ev.clientX, ev.clientY);
    };

    App.interaction.setAreaUp = function(ev){
      if (!App.interaction.setAreaStart) return;
      ev.preventDefault();
      ev.stopPropagation();
      var sx = App.interaction.setAreaStart.x;
      var sy = App.interaction.setAreaStart.y;
      var left = Math.min(sx, ev.clientX);
      var top = Math.min(sy, ev.clientY);
      var width = Math.abs(ev.clientX - sx);
      var height = Math.abs(ev.clientY - sy);
      removeSetAreaOverlay();
      if (width < 10 || height < 10) {
        log('Set area cancelled because the drag was too small.');
        updateUI();
        return;
      }
      App.source.viewportRect = { x: left, y: top, width: width, height: height };
      App.source.stagePlacementBounds = getSetAreaStageBounds(); // FIX v8.8: set area becomes stage anchored so Wick zoom and pan can move the overlay correctly without keyframing it.
      if (App.source.image) {
        ensureOverlay();
        fitOverlayToSource();
        renderOverlay();
      }
      updateUI();
      log('Set area: ' + Math.round(width) + ' x ' + Math.round(height) + ' at ' + Math.round(left) + ', ' + Math.round(top) + '.');
      promptLocalImageFile();
    };

    App.interaction.setAreaKey = function(ev){
      if (ev.key === 'Escape') {
        ev.preventDefault();
        ev.stopPropagation();
        removeSetAreaOverlay();
        log('Set area cancelled.');
      }
    };

    pdoc.addEventListener('mousemove', App.interaction.setAreaMove, true);
    pdoc.addEventListener('mouseup', App.interaction.setAreaUp, true);
    pdoc.addEventListener('keydown', App.interaction.setAreaKey, true);
    log('Set Area mode: drag a rectangle on the Wick editor screen.');
  }

  function blobToDataUrl(blob){ // FIX v5.5
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject){
      try {
        var reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = function(){ resolve(reader.result); };
        reader.onerror = function(){ reject(reader.error || new Error('FileReader failed')); };
        reader.readAsDataURL(blob);
      } catch(e) {
        reject(e);
      }
    });
  }

  async function collectImageCandidatesAsync(obj){ // FIX v5.5
    var urls = [];
    var seenUrls = {};
    var seenObjs = [];

    function addUrl(v){
      if (typeof v !== 'string' || !v) return;
      if (seenUrls[v]) return;
      if (/^data:image\//i.test(v) || /^blob:/i.test(v) || /^https?:/i.test(v) || /^file:/i.test(v)) {
        seenUrls[v] = true;
        urls.push(v);
      }
    }

    async function scan(value, depth){
      if (value == null || depth > 3) return;
      if (typeof value === 'string') {
        addUrl(value);
        return;
      }
      if (typeof Blob !== 'undefined' && (value instanceof Blob || value instanceof File)) {
        try { addUrl(await blobToDataUrl(value)); } catch(e){}
        return;
      }
      if (typeof HTMLImageElement !== 'undefined' && value instanceof HTMLImageElement) {
        try { addUrl(value.currentSrc || value.src); } catch(e){}
        return;
      }
      if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        for (var i = 0; i < value.length; i++) await scan(value[i], depth + 1);
        return;
      }
      if (typeof value !== 'object') return;
      if (seenObjs.indexOf(value) >= 0) return;
      seenObjs.push(value);

      var directKeys = [
        'src','source','imageData','dataUrl','dataURL','dataUri','dataURI','href','url','currentSrc',
        'asset','linkedAsset','clipAsset','image','img','file','blob','contents','raw','assetData'
      ];
      for (var k = 0; k < directKeys.length; k++) {
        var key = directKeys[k];
        try { if (value[key] != null) await scan(value[key], depth + 1); } catch(e){}
      }

      try {
        var keys = Object.keys(value);
        for (var j = 0; j < keys.length; j++) {
          var dynKey = keys[j];
          if (/src|url|data|image|asset|file|blob/i.test(dynKey)) {
            try { await scan(value[dynKey], depth + 1); } catch(e){}
          }
        }
      } catch(e){}
    }

    await scan(obj, 0);

    try {
      if (App.project && App.project.assets && App.project.assets.length) {
        for (var ai = 0; ai < App.project.assets.length; ai++) {
          var a = App.project.assets[ai];
          var match = false;
          try { if (obj && obj.assetUUID && a.uuid === obj.assetUUID) match = true; } catch(e){}
          try { if (obj && obj.assetId && a.uuid === obj.assetId) match = true; } catch(e){}
          try { if (obj && obj.assetIdentifier && a.identifier === obj.assetIdentifier) match = true; } catch(e){}
          try { if (obj && obj.identifier && a.identifier === obj.identifier) match = true; } catch(e){}
          try { if (obj && obj.uuid && a.uuid === obj.uuid) match = true; } catch(e){}
          if (match) await scan(a, 0);
        }
      }
    } catch(e){}

    return urls;
  }

  async function getImageSrcCandidates(obj){ // FIX v5.5
    return await collectImageCandidatesAsync(obj);
  }

  function loadImageFromUrl(url){
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject){
      var img = new Image();
      img.onload = function(){ resolve(img); };
      img.onerror = function(){ reject(new Error('SVG load failed')); };
      img.src = url;
    });
  }

  function captureSelectionFromStageCanvas(bounds, fit){
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject){
      try {
        fit = fit || getFittedStageRect();
        if (!fit || !fit.canvas || !bounds) return reject(new Error('Missing fit or bounds'));
        var vp = stageBoundsToViewportRect(bounds);
        if (!vp) return reject(new Error('Could not map bounds to viewport'));
        var c = fit.canvas;
        var cRect = fit.canvasRect;
        var sx = (vp.x - cRect.left) * (c.width / cRect.width);
        var sy = (vp.y - cRect.top) * (c.height / cRect.height);
        var sw = vp.width * (c.width / cRect.width);
        var sh = vp.height * (c.height / cRect.height);
        sx = Math.max(0, sx); sy = Math.max(0, sy);
        sw = Math.max(1, sw); sh = Math.max(1, sh);
        var out = document.createElement('canvas');
        out.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(bounds.w));
        out.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(bounds.h));
        var ctx = out.getContext('2d', { alpha: true, willReadFrequently: true }); // FIX v5.5
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,out.width,out.height);
        ctx.drawImage(c, sx, sy, sw, sh, 0, 0, out.width, out.height);
        try { // FIX v5.5: emergency background cleanup for fallback stage crops
          var id = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, out.width, out.height);
          var px = id.data;
          var samples = [
            [0,0],[out.width-1,0],[0,out.height-1],[out.width-1,out.height-1]
          ];
          var bg = [];
          for (var si = 0; si < samples.length; si++) {
            var sx0 = samples[si][0], sy0 = samples[si][1];
            var ii = (sy0 * out.width + sx0) * 4;
            bg.push([px[ii], px[ii+1], px[ii+2]]);
          }
          function nearBg(r,g,b){
            for (var bi = 0; bi < bg.length; bi++) {
              var br = bg[bi][0], bgc = bg[bi][1], bb = bg[bi][2];
              if (Math.abs(r-br) <= 12 && Math.abs(g-bgc) <= 12 && Math.abs(b-bb) <= 12) return true;
            }
            return false;
          }
          for (var p = 0; p < px.length; p += 4) {
            if (nearBg(px[p], px[p+1], px[p+2])) px[p+3] = 0;
          }
          ctx.putImageData(id, 0, 0);
        } catch(e){}
        resolve({ dataUrl: out.toDataURL('image/png'), width: out.width, height: out.height, mode: 'stage-crop' });
      } catch(e) {
        reject(e);
      }
    });
  }

  async function captureSelectedImage(){
    if (!refreshBridgeRefs()) {
      log('Bridge or editor not available.');
      return;
    }
    var obj = getSelectedObject();
    var info = getSelectionInfo();
    if (!obj) {
      log('No selected object found. Select an image on the stage first.');
      return;
    }
    var bounds = getObjectStageBounds(obj);
    if (!bounds) {
      log('Could not determine selected object bounds.');
      return;
    }
    var fit = getFittedStageRect();
    if (!fit) {
      log('Could not find stage canvas.');
      return;
    }

    App.source.selectedIdentifier = info && (info.identifier || info.name) || obj.identifier || obj.name || 'SelectedObject';
    App.source.selectedUUID = info && info.uuid || obj.uuid || '';
    App.source.stageBounds = bounds;
    App.source.stageCenter = { x: bounds.cx, y: bounds.cy };
    App.source.stageRotation = Number(obj.rotation || 0) || 0;

    var data = null;
    var candidates = await getImageSrcCandidates(obj); // FIX v5.5
    if (candidates.length) {
      for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
        try {
          var img = await loadImageFromUrl(candidates[i]);
          data = { dataUrl: candidates[i], width: img.naturalWidth || img.width, height: img.naturalHeight || img.height, mode: 'asset' };
          break;
        } catch(e){}
      }
    }
    if (!data) {
      try {
        data = await captureSelectionFromStageCanvas(bounds, fit);
        if (data) data.mode = 'stage-crop'; // FIX v5.5
        log('WARNING: Raw PNG asset data was not found. The tool fell back to a stage crop, which can destroy transparency. Re select the original PNG image on stage if this happens.'); // FIX v5.5
      } catch(err) {
        log('Failed to capture image: ' + (err && err.message ? err.message : err));
        return;
      }
    }
    if (!data || !data.dataUrl) {
      log('No image data captured.');
      return;
    }

    try {
      var image = await loadImageFromUrl(data.dataUrl);
      App.source.dataUrl = data.dataUrl;
      App.source.embeddedDataUrl = ''; // FIX v5.2
      App.source.captureMode = data.mode || ''; // FIX v5.5
      App.source.image = image;
      App.source.width = data.width || image.naturalWidth || image.width;
      App.source.height = data.height || image.naturalHeight || image.height;
      buildAlphaMask();
      App.source.viewportRect = stageBoundsToViewportRect(bounds);
      ensureOverlay();
      fitOverlayToSource();
      clearAnimationData(false);
      syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline();
      renderOverlay();
      log('Captured source image using ' + data.mode + '.'); // FIX v5.5
    } catch(e) {
      log('Captured image but failed to load preview: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
    }
    updateUI();
  }

  function clearAnimationData(clearBones){
    App.keyframes = {};
    App.currentFrame = 1;
    if (clearBones) {
      App.bones = [];
      App.nextBoneId = 1;
      App.selectedBoneId = null;
    }
    updateUI();
  }

  function getWickStageClipElement(){ // FIX v8.9
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
    if (!pdoc) return null;
    var selectors = [
      '#wick-canvas-container',
      '.wick-canvas-container',
      '#canvas-container',
      '.canvas-container',
      '#wick-canvas',
      '.wick-canvas',
      'canvas.wick-canvas',
      'canvas'
    ];
    for (var i = 0; i < selectors.length; i++) {
      try {
        var elx = pdoc.querySelector(selectors[i]);
        if (elx) {
          if (elx.tagName && elx.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'canvas' && elx.parentElement) return elx.parentElement;
          return elx;
        }
      } catch(e){}
    }
    return pdoc.body;
  }

  function getWickStageClipRect(){ // FIX v8.9
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
    var stageEl = getWickStageClipElement();
    if (!pdoc || !stageEl) return { left:0, top:0, width:window.innerWidth || 800, height:window.innerHeight || 600 };
    try {
      var r = stageEl.getBoundingClientRect();
      if (r && r.width > 10 && r.height > 10) return { left:r.left, top:r.top, width:r.width, height:r.height };
    } catch(e){}
    return { left:0, top:0, width:pdoc.documentElement.clientWidth || 800, height:pdoc.documentElement.clientHeight || 600 };
  }

  function updateOverlayClipHost(){ // FIX v8.9
    if (!App.overlay.clipHost) return null;
    var r = getWickStageClipRect();
    App.overlay.clipHost.style.left = Math.round(r.left) + 'px';
    App.overlay.clipHost.style.top = Math.round(r.top) + 'px';
    App.overlay.clipHost.style.width = Math.max(20, Math.round(r.width)) + 'px';
    App.overlay.clipHost.style.height = Math.max(20, Math.round(r.height)) + 'px';
    try { getWickNavigationViewportRect(); } catch(e){} // FIX v9.8
    return r;
  }

  function ensureOverlay(){
    if (App.overlay.root) return;
    var pdoc = window.parent.document;
    var clipHost = pdoc.createElement('div'); // FIX v8.9
    clipHost.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-overlay', App.interaction.overlayOwnerId); // FIX v8.9
    clipHost.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-kind', 'stage-clip-host'); // FIX v8.9
    clipHost.style.cssText = [ // FIX v8.9
      'position:fixed',
      'left:0px',
      'top:0px',
      'width:100px',
      'height:100px',
      'border:0',
      'background:transparent',
      'z-index:950', // FIX v10.0: BoneWarp stage layer unchanged below raised Wick controls
      'overflow:hidden',
