      var t = i / steps; // FIX v18.29
      var mt = 1 - t; // FIX v18.29
      out.push({ x:mt * mt * mt * p0.x + 3 * mt * mt * t * c1.x + 3 * mt * t * t * c2.x + t * t * t * p1.x, y:mt * mt * mt * p0.y + 3 * mt * mt * t * c1.y + 3 * mt * t * t * c2.y + t * t * t * p1.y }); // FIX v18.29
    } // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function collectSourcePointsForAutoEnvelope(){ // FIX v18.29
    var out = []; // FIX v18.29
    if (App.source && App.source.svgNative && App.source.svgNative.shapes && App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) { // FIX v18.29
      App.source.svgNative.shapes.forEach(function(shape){ // FIX v18.29
        (shape.cmdSubpaths || []).forEach(function(sp){ // FIX v18.29
          var last = null; // FIX v18.29
          (sp.commands || []).forEach(function(cmd){ // FIX v18.29
            var p = cmd && cmd.p ? sourcePointForAutoEnvelope(cmd.p.x, cmd.p.y) : null; // FIX v18.29
            var c1 = cmd && cmd.c1 ? sourcePointForAutoEnvelope(cmd.c1.x, cmd.c1.y) : null; // FIX v18.29
            var c2 = cmd && cmd.c2 ? sourcePointForAutoEnvelope(cmd.c2.x, cmd.c2.y) : null; // FIX v18.29
            if (last && p && c1 && c2) sampleCubicForAutoEnvelope(out, last, c1, c2, p, 16); // FIX v18.29
            else if (last && p && c1) sampleQuadraticForAutoEnvelope(out, last, c1, p, 12); // FIX v18.29
            else if (last && p) sampleLineForAutoEnvelope(out, last, p, 6); // FIX v18.29
            else if (p) out.push(p); // FIX v18.29
            if (p) last = p; // FIX v18.29
          }); // FIX v18.29
        }); // FIX v18.29
      }); // FIX v18.29
    } // FIX v18.29
    if (!out.length) { // FIX v18.29
      try { // FIX v18.29
        var bounds = getMeshBounds(); // FIX v18.29
        var cols = 12; // FIX v18.29
        var rows = 12; // FIX v18.29
        for (var yy = 0; yy <= rows; yy += 1) { // FIX v18.29
          for (var xx = 0; xx <= cols; xx += 1) { // FIX v18.29
            var px = bounds.x + (xx / cols) * bounds.w; // FIX v18.29
            var py = bounds.y + (yy / rows) * bounds.h; // FIX v18.29
            if (!App.rig.meshOpaqueOnly || isOpaqueAt(px, py) || xx === 0 || yy === 0 || xx === cols || yy === rows) out.push({ x:px, y:py }); // FIX v18.29
          } // FIX v18.29
        } // FIX v18.29
      } catch(eAutoPts) {} // FIX v18.29
    } // FIX v18.29
    return out; // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function autoSizeEnvelopeForBoneSet(targetBones){ // FIX v18.29
    targetBones = (targetBones || []).filter(function(b){ return !!b && !isExpressionBone(b); }); // FIX v18.29
    if (!targetBones.length) { log('Auto envelope needs a normal or stretchy bone.'); return; } // FIX v18.29
    var points = collectSourcePointsForAutoEnvelope(); // FIX v18.29
    if (!points.length) { log('Auto envelope could not find source curve or image points.'); return; } // FIX v18.29
    var margin = 12; // FIX v18.29
    var stats = {}; // FIX v18.29
    targetBones.forEach(function(b){ stats[String(b.id)] = { start:0, end:0, any:0, count:0 }; }); // FIX v18.29
    points.forEach(function(p){ // FIX v18.29
      var bestBone = null; // FIX v18.29
      var bestInfo = null; // FIX v18.29
      targetBones.forEach(function(b){ // FIX v18.29
        var info = pointToSegmentDistance(p, b.head, b.tail); // FIX v18.29
        if (!bestInfo || info.d < bestInfo.d) { bestInfo = info; bestBone = b; } // FIX v18.29
      }); // FIX v18.29
      if (!bestBone || !bestInfo) return; // FIX v18.29
      var s = stats[String(bestBone.id)]; // FIX v18.29
      var d = bestInfo.d + margin; // FIX v18.29
      s.any = Math.max(s.any, d); // FIX v18.29
      if (bestInfo.t <= 0.55) s.start = Math.max(s.start, d); // FIX v18.29
      if (bestInfo.t >= 0.45) s.end = Math.max(s.end, d); // FIX v18.29
      s.count += 1; // FIX v18.29
    }); // FIX v18.29
    var changed = 0; // FIX v18.29
    targetBones.forEach(function(b){ // FIX v18.29
      var s = stats[String(b.id)]; // FIX v18.29
      if (!s || !s.count) { // FIX v18.29
        points.forEach(function(p){ var info = pointToSegmentDistance(p, b.head, b.tail); var d = info.d + margin; s.any = Math.max(s.any, d); if (info.t <= 0.55) s.start = Math.max(s.start, d); if (info.t >= 0.45) s.end = Math.max(s.end, d); }); // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
      var newStart = Math.round(clamp(s.start || s.any || getBoneEnvStart(b), 2, 2000)); // FIX v18.29
      var newEnd = Math.round(clamp(s.end || s.any || getBoneEnvEnd(b), 2, 2000)); // FIX v18.29
      b.envStart = newStart; // FIX v18.29
      b.envEnd = newEnd; // FIX v18.29
      b.radius = Math.max(newStart, newEnd); // FIX v18.29
      changed += 1; // FIX v18.29
    }); // FIX v18.29
    updateUI(); // FIX v18.29
    renderOverlay(); // FIX v18.29
    log('Auto sized envelopes for ' + changed + ' bone' + (changed === 1 ? '' : 's') + '.'); // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function autoSizeSelectedEnvelope(){ // FIX v18.29
    var b = getSelectedBone(); // FIX v18.29
    if (!b || isExpressionBone(b)) { log('Select a normal or stretchy bone first.'); return; } // FIX v18.29
    autoSizeEnvelopeForBoneSet([b]); // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function autoSizeAllEnvelopes(){ // FIX v18.29
    var bones = (App.bones || []).filter(function(b){ return !isExpressionBone(b); }); // FIX v18.29
    autoSizeEnvelopeForBoneSet(bones); // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function normalize(v){
    var len = Math.sqrt(v.x*v.x + v.y*v.y) || 1;
    return { x: v.x/len, y: v.y/len, len: len };
  }

  function tailFromRotationOnly(startBone, target, lockedLength){ // FIX v4.7
    var length = Math.max(1, lockedLength || startBone.restLength || dist(startBone.head, startBone.tail));
    var dir = normalize({ x: target.x - startBone.head.x, y: target.y - startBone.head.y });
    return { x: startBone.head.x + dir.x * length, y: startBone.head.y + dir.y * length };
  }

  function angleOfItem(item){ // FIX v8.6
    if (!item || !item.head || !item.tail) return 0;
    if (typeof item.angle === 'number' && isFinite(item.angle)) return item.angle;
    return Math.atan2(item.tail.y - item.head.y, item.tail.x - item.head.x);
  }

  function rawAngleOfPoints(head, point){ // FIX v8.6
    return Math.atan2(point.y - head.y, point.x - head.x);
  }

  function wrappedAngleDelta(fromAngle, toAngle){ // FIX v8.6
    var d = toAngle - fromAngle;
    while (d > Math.PI) d -= Math.PI * 2;
    while (d < -Math.PI) d += Math.PI * 2;
    return d;
  }

  function tailFromAngle(head, angle, lockedLength){ // FIX v8.6
    var length = Math.max(1, lockedLength || 1);
    return { x: head.x + Math.cos(angle) * length, y: head.y + Math.sin(angle) * length };
  }

  function setPoseItemAngleAndTail(item, angle, lockedLength){ // FIX v8.6
    if (!item || !item.head) return;
    item.angle = angle;
    item.tail = tailFromAngle(item.head, angle, lockedLength || dist(item.head, item.tail));
  }

  function ensurePoseAngles(pose){ // FIX v8.6
    if (!pose) return pose;
    App.bones.forEach(function(b){
      if (!pose[b.id]) return;
      if (typeof pose[b.id].angle !== 'number' || !isFinite(pose[b.id].angle)) pose[b.id].angle = Math.atan2(pose[b.id].tail.y - pose[b.id].head.y, pose[b.id].tail.x - pose[b.id].head.x);
    });
    return pose;
  }

  function copyEnvAndAngleFallback(item, bone){ // FIX v13.0
    if (!item) return item;
    ensurePoseEnvelopeValues(item, bone);
    if (typeof item.angle !== 'number' || !isFinite(item.angle)) item.angle = Math.atan2(item.tail.y - item.head.y, item.tail.x - item.head.x);
    if (bone && bone.parentId) {
      if (typeof item.localAngle !== 'number' || !isFinite(item.localAngle)) {
        var parent = getBoneById(bone.parentId);
        if (parent) item.localAngle = item.angle - Math.atan2(parent.tail.y - parent.head.y, parent.tail.x - parent.head.x);
      }
    } else if (item.localAngle != null) {
      delete item.localAngle;
    }
    return item;
  }

  function movedFarEnough(a, b){ // FIX v4.7
    return !!(a && b && dist(a, b) >= 8);
  }

  function skinPointByPose(p, pose){
    if (!App.bones.length) return { x:p.x, y:p.y };
    var sumW = 0;
    var sumX = 0;
    var sumY = 0;
    App.bones.forEach(function(b){
      var rest = { head: b.head, tail: b.tail };
      var cur = poseHasBone(pose, b.id) ? pose[b.id] : rest;
      var distInfo = pointToSegmentDistance(p, rest.head, rest.tail);
      var envStart = getBoneEnvStart(cur);
      var envEnd = getBoneEnvEnd(cur);
      var radius = Math.max(1, lerp(envStart, envEnd, distInfo.t)); // FIX v6.3: envelope width varies from head to tail
      if (distInfo.d > radius) return;
      var w = 1 - (distInfo.d / radius);
      w = w * w * (b.strength || 1);
      w *= sampleWeightMap(b, p.x, p.y); // FIX v6.4: per bone weight painting multiplies local influence
      var restDirV = { x: rest.tail.x - rest.head.x, y: rest.tail.y - rest.head.y };
      var curDirV = { x: cur.tail.x - cur.head.x, y: cur.tail.y - cur.head.y };
      var restDir = normalize(restDirV);
      var curDir = normalize(curDirV);
      var restPerp = { x: -restDir.y, y: restDir.x };
      var curPerp = { x: -curDir.y, y: curDir.x };
      var rel = { x: p.x - rest.head.x, y: p.y - rest.head.y };
      var u = rel.x * restDir.x + rel.y * restDir.y;
      var v = rel.x * restPerp.x + rel.y * restPerp.y;
      var restLen = Math.max(0.0001, Math.sqrt(restDirV.x * restDirV.x + restDirV.y * restDirV.y)); // FIX v17.1
      var curLen = Math.max(0.0001, Math.sqrt(curDirV.x * curDirV.x + curDirV.y * curDirV.y)); // FIX v17.1
      var scaleU = isStretchyBone(b) ? (curLen / restLen) : 1; // FIX v17.1: stretchy bones pull curve points along the bone axis as the tail stretches.
      var scaleV = 1; // FIX v17.1: do not thicken or squash the curve sideways when a stretchy bone changes length.
      var tx = cur.head.x + curDir.x * u * scaleU + curPerp.x * v * scaleV; // FIX v17.1
      var ty = cur.head.y + curDir.y * u * scaleU + curPerp.y * v * scaleV; // FIX v17.1
      sumX += tx * w;
      sumY += ty * w;
      sumW += w;
    });
    if (sumW <= 0.00001) return { x:p.x, y:p.y };
    return { x: sumX / sumW, y: sumY / sumW };
  }

  function buildRestVertices(){
    var cols = App.grid.cols;
    var rows = App.grid.rows;
    var bounds = getMeshBounds(); // FIX v4.9
    var verts = [];
    for (var y = 0; y <= rows; y++) {
      for (var x = 0; x <= cols; x++) {
        verts.push({
          x: bounds.x + (x / cols) * bounds.w, // FIX v4.9: mesh is built over the opaque image bounds instead of the full image area
          y: bounds.y + (y / rows) * bounds.h // FIX v4.9
        });
      }
    }
    return verts;
  }

  function buildWarpedVertices(pose){
    var rest = buildRestVertices();
    return rest.map(function(p){ return skinPointByPose(p, pose); });
  }

  function vertexIndex(x, y){ return y * (App.grid.cols + 1) + x; }

  function expandTriangleAroundCentroid(a, b, c, amount){ // FIX v6.1
    var cx = (a.x + b.x + c.x) / 3; // FIX v6.1
    var cy = (a.y + b.y + c.y) / 3; // FIX v6.1
    function pullOut(p){ // FIX v6.1
      var dx = p.x - cx; // FIX v6.1
      var dy = p.y - cy; // FIX v6.1
      var len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) || 1; // FIX v6.1
      return { x: p.x + (dx / len) * amount, y: p.y + (dy / len) * amount }; // FIX v6.1
    }
    return [pullOut(a), pullOut(b), pullOut(c)]; // FIX v6.1
  }

  function drawImageTriangle(ctx, img, sx0, sy0, sx1, sy1, sx2, sy2, dx0, dy0, dx1, dy1, dx2, dy2){
    var denom = sx0*(sy1 - sy2) + sx1*(sy2 - sy0) + sx2*(sy0 - sy1);
    if (Math.abs(denom) < 0.00001) return;
    var a = (dx0*(sy1 - sy2) + dx1*(sy2 - sy0) + dx2*(sy0 - sy1)) / denom;
    var b = (dy0*(sy1 - sy2) + dy1*(sy2 - sy0) + dy2*(sy0 - sy1)) / denom;
    var c = (dx0*(sx2 - sx1) + dx1*(sx0 - sx2) + dx2*(sx1 - sx0)) / denom;
    var d = (dy0*(sx2 - sx1) + dy1*(sx0 - sx2) + dy2*(sx1 - sx0)) / denom;
    var e = (dx0*(sx1*sy2 - sx2*sy1) + dx1*(sx2*sy0 - sx0*sy2) + dx2*(sx0*sy1 - sx1*sy0)) / denom;
    var f = (dy0*(sx1*sy2 - sx2*sy1) + dy1*(sx2*sy0 - sx0*sy2) + dy2*(sx0*sy1 - sx1*sy0)) / denom;
    var grown = expandTriangleAroundCentroid( // FIX v6.1
      { x: dx0, y: dy0 }, // FIX v6.1
      { x: dx1, y: dy1 }, // FIX v6.1
      { x: dx2, y: dy2 }, // FIX v6.1
      1.1 // FIX v6.1: overlaps neighbouring triangles slightly so mesh seams do not stamp as transparent lines
    );
    ctx.save();
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(grown[0].x, grown[0].y); // FIX v6.1
    ctx.lineTo(grown[1].x, grown[1].y); // FIX v6.1
    ctx.lineTo(grown[2].x, grown[2].y); // FIX v6.1
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.clip();
    ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = true; // FIX v6.1
    ctx.setTransform(a, b, c, d, e, f);
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function renderWarpToContext(ctx, pose, renderOpts){
    renderOpts = renderOpts || {}; // FIX v6.9
    if (App.source.svgNative && App.source.svgNative.shapes && App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) { // FIX v7.5
      renderNativeSvgToContext(ctx, pose, renderOpts); // FIX v7.5: SVG source is drawn as vector curves, not as image mesh.
      return; // FIX v7.5
    }
    var img = App.source.image;
    if (!img) return;
    var w = Number(renderOpts.canvasWidth || App.source.width || 0); // FIX v6.9
    var h = Number(renderOpts.canvasHeight || App.source.height || 0); // FIX v6.9
    var ox = Number(renderOpts.offsetX || 0); // FIX v6.9
    var oy = Number(renderOpts.offsetY || 0); // FIX v6.9
    var rest = buildRestVertices();
    var warped = buildWarpedVertices(pose);
    ctx.save();
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

    if (App.flags.showImage) {
      for (var y = 0; y < App.grid.rows; y++) {
        for (var x = 0; x < App.grid.cols; x++) {
          var i00 = vertexIndex(x, y);
          var i10 = vertexIndex(x+1, y);
          var i01 = vertexIndex(x, y+1);
          var i11 = vertexIndex(x+1, y+1);
          var s00 = rest[i00], s10 = rest[i10], s01 = rest[i01], s11 = rest[i11];
          var d00 = warped[i00], d10 = warped[i10], d01 = warped[i01], d11 = warped[i11];
          if (triangleHasOpaqueContent(s00, s10, s11)) drawImageTriangle(ctx, img, s00.x, s00.y, s10.x, s10.y, s11.x, s11.y, d00.x + ox, d00.y + oy, d10.x + ox, d10.y + oy, d11.x + ox, d11.y + oy); // FIX v6.9
          if (triangleHasOpaqueContent(s00, s11, s01)) drawImageTriangle(ctx, img, s00.x, s00.y, s11.x, s11.y, s01.x, s01.y, d00.x + ox, d00.y + oy, d11.x + ox, d11.y + oy, d01.x + ox, d01.y + oy); // FIX v6.9
        }
      }
    }

    if (App.flags.showMesh) {
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(83, 207, 255, 0.18)'; // FIX v6.6
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      for (var yy = 0; yy <= App.grid.rows; yy++) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (var xx = 0; xx <= App.grid.cols; xx++) {
          var vi = vertexIndex(xx, yy);
          var pt = warped[vi];
          var rpt = rest[vi];
          if (xx === 0) ctx.moveTo(pt.x + ox, pt.y + oy);
          else {
            var pvi = vertexIndex(xx - 1, yy);
            if (segmentHasOpaqueContent(rest[pvi], rpt)) ctx.lineTo(pt.x + ox, pt.y + oy);
            else ctx.moveTo(pt.x + ox, pt.y + oy);
          }
        }
        ctx.stroke();
      }
      for (var xx2 = 0; xx2 <= App.grid.cols; xx2++) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (var yy2 = 0; yy2 <= App.grid.rows; yy2++) {
          var vi2 = vertexIndex(xx2, yy2);
          var pt2 = warped[vi2];
          var rpt2 = rest[vi2];
          if (yy2 === 0) ctx.moveTo(pt2.x + ox, pt2.y + oy);
          else {
            var pvi2 = vertexIndex(xx2, yy2 - 1);
            if (segmentHasOpaqueContent(rest[pvi2], rpt2)) ctx.lineTo(pt2.x + ox, pt2.y + oy);
            else ctx.moveTo(pt2.x + ox, pt2.y + oy);
          }
        }
        ctx.stroke();
      }
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawParentLinks(ctx, pose){
    ctx.save();
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 211, 90, 0.55)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
    ctx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
    App.bones.forEach(function(b){
      if (!b.parentId) return;
      var parent = getBoneById(b.parentId);
      if (!parent) return;
      var pp = poseHasBone(pose, parent.id) ? pose[parent.id] : { head: parent.head, tail: parent.tail };
      var cp = poseHasBone(pose, b.id) ? pose[b.id] : { head: b.head, tail: b.tail };
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(pp.tail.x, pp.tail.y);
      ctx.lineTo(cp.head.x, cp.head.y);
      ctx.stroke();
    });
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawEnvelopeOnContext(ctx, bone, poseBone, active, hover){
    var head = poseBone.head;
    var tail = poseBone.tail;
    var s = Math.max(2, getBoneEnvStart(poseBone));
    var e = Math.max(2, getBoneEnvEnd(poseBone));
    var dir = normalize({ x: tail.x - head.x, y: tail.y - head.y });
    var perp = { x: -dir.y, y: dir.x };

    var headPos = { x: head.x + perp.x * s, y: head.y + perp.y * s };
    var headNeg = { x: head.x - perp.x * s, y: head.y - perp.y * s };
    var tailPos = { x: tail.x + perp.x * e, y: tail.y + perp.y * e };
    var tailNeg = { x: tail.x - perp.x * e, y: tail.y - perp.y * e };

    ctx.save();

    // FIX v6.6: draw a clean influence envelope using two circular caps plus a simple connecting body.
    // This avoids the messy crossing arc artefacts from the previous variable radius capsule path.
    ctx.fillStyle = active ? 'rgba(150, 78, 255, 0.10)' : 'rgba(150, 78, 255, 0.045)';
    ctx.strokeStyle = hover ? 'rgba(255, 176, 64, 0.95)' : (active ? 'rgba(180, 110, 255, 0.95)' : 'rgba(140, 95, 255, 0.50)');
    ctx.lineWidth = active ? 2.5 : 1.5;

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(headPos.x, headPos.y);
    ctx.lineTo(tailPos.x, tailPos.y);
    ctx.lineTo(tailNeg.x, tailNeg.y);
    ctx.lineTo(headNeg.x, headNeg.y);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(head.x, head.y, s, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(tail.x, tail.y, e, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.stroke();

    var showHandles = active || hover;
    if (showHandles) {
      [
        { p: headPos, handle: 'envHeadPos' },
        { p: headNeg, handle: 'envHeadNeg' },
        { p: tailPos, handle: 'envTailPos' },
        { p: tailNeg, handle: 'envTailNeg' }
      ].forEach(function(item){
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(item.p.x, item.p.y, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2); // FIX v8.1: envelope handles reduced to about one third size
        ctx.fillStyle = (App.interaction.hoverHandle === item.handle || App.interaction.dragType === item.handle) ? '#ffff00' : '#c77cff'; // FIX v6.6
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2; // FIX v8.1
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#22113a';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1; // FIX v8.1
        ctx.stroke();
      });
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function collectCommandCurvePointsForSmooth(cmds, pose){ // FIX v18.2
    var points = []; // FIX v18.2
    (cmds || []).forEach(function(cmd){ // FIX v18.2
      if (!cmd || !cmd.type) return; // FIX v18.2
      if (cmd.p) { var p = skinPointByPose(cmd.p, pose); points.push({ x:p.x, y:p.y, kind:'anchor' }); } // FIX v18.2
      if (cmd.c1) { var c1 = skinPointByPose(cmd.c1, pose); points.push({ x:c1.x, y:c1.y, kind:'control' }); } // FIX v18.2
      if (cmd.c2) { var c2 = skinPointByPose(cmd.c2, pose); points.push({ x:c2.x, y:c2.y, kind:'control' }); } // FIX v18.2
    }); // FIX v18.2
    return points; // FIX v18.2
  } // FIX v18.2

  function collectRawCommandCurvePointsForSmooth(cmds){ // FIX v18.3
    var points = []; // FIX v18.3
    (cmds || []).forEach(function(cmd){ // FIX v18.3
      if (!cmd || !cmd.type) return; // FIX v18.3
      if (cmd.p) points.push({ x:cmd.p.x, y:cmd.p.y, kind:'anchor' }); // FIX v18.3
      if (cmd.c1) points.push({ x:cmd.c1.x, y:cmd.c1.y, kind:'control' }); // FIX v18.3
      if (cmd.c2) points.push({ x:cmd.c2.x, y:cmd.c2.y, kind:'control' }); // FIX v18.3
    }); // FIX v18.3
    return points; // FIX v18.3
  } // FIX v18.3

  function drawSmoothCurvePointsOnContext(ctx, pose){ // FIX v18.2
    if (App.activeTab !== 'smoothsvg') return; // FIX v18.2
    if (App.smooth && App.smooth.showPoints === false) return; // FIX v18.53_RelaxBrush_PointToggle
    if (!App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) return; // FIX v18.2
    ctx.save(); // FIX v18.2
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5; // FIX v18.2
    App.source.svgNative.shapes.forEach(function(shape){ // FIX v18.2
      (shape.cmdSubpaths || []).forEach(function(sp){ // FIX v18.2
        var warpedForPoints = (sp.commands || []).map(function(cmd){ var out = { type: cmd.type }; if (cmd.p) out.p = skinPointByPose(cmd.p, pose); if (cmd.c1) out.c1 = skinPointByPose(cmd.c1, pose); if (cmd.c2) out.c2 = skinPointByPose(cmd.c2, pose); return out; }); // FIX v18.3
        var points = collectRawCommandCurvePointsForSmooth(smoothNativeCommandsForOutput(warpedForPoints)); // FIX v18.3
        points.forEach(function(pt){ // FIX v18.2
          var isControl = pt.kind === 'control'; // FIX v18.2
          ctx.beginPath(); // FIX v18.2
          ctx.arc(pt.x, pt.y, isControl ? 3.2 : 4.6, 0, Math.PI * 2); // FIX v18.2
          ctx.fillStyle = isControl ? 'rgba(255,176,64,0.90)' : 'rgba(30,226,154,0.95)'; // FIX v18.2
          ctx.fill(); // FIX v18.2
          ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.85)'; // FIX v18.2
          ctx.stroke(); // FIX v18.2
        }); // FIX v18.2
      }); // FIX v18.2
    }); // FIX v18.2
    ctx.restore(); // FIX v18.2
  } // FIX v18.2

  function drawBoneOnContext(ctx, bone, poseBone, active, hover, localMode){
    var head = localMode ? bone.head : poseBone.head;
    var tail = localMode ? bone.tail : poseBone.tail;
    ctx.save();

    // FIX v6.6: stronger bone visibility.
    ctx.lineCap = 'round';
    ctx.lineJoin = 'round';
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.78)';
    ctx.lineWidth = active ? 4 : 3.5; // FIX v8.1: bone line reduced to about one third size
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(head.x, head.y);
    ctx.lineTo(tail.x, tail.y);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.strokeStyle = active ? '#ffe05c' : (hover ? '#ff9f5a' : '#38d6ff');
    ctx.lineWidth = active ? 2.5 : 2; // FIX v8.1
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(head.x, head.y);
    ctx.lineTo(tail.x, tail.y);
    ctx.stroke();

    function circle(x,y, fill, r){
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, r, 0, Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle = fill;
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';
      ctx.lineWidth = 2; // FIX v8.1
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00131f';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1; // FIX v8.1
      ctx.stroke();
    }
    circle(head.x, head.y, active ? '#ffff00' : '#31c7ff', active ? 6 : 5); // FIX v8.1: head handle reduced to about one third size
    circle(tail.x, tail.y, active ? '#ffb000' : '#00ffd0', active ? 6 : 5); // FIX v8.1: tail handle reduced to about one third size

    ctx.font = active ? 'bold 11px Arial' : 'bold 10px Arial'; // FIX v8.1
    var tx = ((head.x + tail.x) * 0.5) + 6;
    var ty = ((head.y + tail.y) * 0.5) - 6;
    ctx.lineWidth = 2; // FIX v8.1
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)';
    ctx.strokeText(bone.name, tx, ty);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
    ctx.fillText(bone.name, tx, ty);
    ctx.restore();
  }


  function getStageNavFallbackViewportRect(){ // FIX v9.6
    var hostRect = App.overlay && App.overlay.clipHost ? App.overlay.clipHost.getBoundingClientRect() : getWickStageClipRect(); // FIX v9.6
    if (!hostRect) return null; // FIX v9.6
    var w = Math.min(390, Math.max(260, hostRect.width * 0.34)); // FIX v9.6
    var h = 96; // FIX v9.6
    return { // FIX v9.6
      left: hostRect.left + hostRect.width - w - 10, // FIX v9.6
      top: hostRect.top + hostRect.height - h - 10, // FIX v9.6
      width: w, // FIX v9.6
      height: h // FIX v9.6
    }; // FIX v9.6
  }

  function getWickNavigationViewportRect(){ // FIX v9.6
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null; // FIX v9.6
    var hostRect = App.overlay && App.overlay.clipHost ? App.overlay.clipHost.getBoundingClientRect() : getWickStageClipRect(); // FIX v9.6
    if (!pdoc || !hostRect) return getStageNavFallbackViewportRect(); // FIX v9.6
    var best = null; // FIX v9.6
    var bestScore = -Infinity; // FIX v9.6
    var nodes = []; // FIX v9.6
    try { nodes = Array.prototype.slice.call(pdoc.querySelectorAll('div,button,section,nav')); } catch(e){} // FIX v9.6
    nodes.forEach(function(n){ // FIX v9.6
      try { // FIX v9.6
        if (!n || n === App.overlay.clipHost || (App.overlay.clipHost && App.overlay.clipHost.contains(n))) return; // FIX v9.6
        var r = n.getBoundingClientRect(); // FIX v9.6
        if (!r || r.width < 80 || r.height < 28 || r.width > 520 || r.height > 150) return; // FIX v9.6
        var cs = pdoc.defaultView.getComputedStyle(n); // FIX v9.6
        if (!cs || cs.display === 'none' || cs.visibility === 'hidden' || Number(cs.opacity || 1) <= 0.05) return; // FIX v9.6
        var overlapsStage = r.right > hostRect.left && r.left < hostRect.right && r.bottom > hostRect.top && r.top < hostRect.bottom; // FIX v9.6
        if (!overlapsStage) return; // FIX v9.6
        var nearBottom = Math.abs(r.bottom - hostRect.bottom); // FIX v9.6
        var nearRight = Math.abs(r.right - hostRect.right); // FIX v9.6
        var score = 0; // FIX v9.6
        if (nearBottom < 140) score += 120 - nearBottom; // FIX v9.6
        if (nearRight < 180) score += 90 - nearRight * 0.4; // FIX v9.6
        if (String(n.className || '').toLowerCase().indexOf('zoom') >= 0) score += 40; // FIX v9.6
        if (String(n.className || '').toLowerCase().indexOf('stage') >= 0) score += 20; // FIX v9.6
        if (String(n.textContent || '').trim().length < 6) score += 8; // FIX v9.6
        if (score > bestScore) { // FIX v9.6
          bestScore = score; // FIX v9.6
          best = { left:r.left, top:r.top, width:r.width, height:r.height, node:n }; // FIX v9.6
        } // FIX v9.6
      } catch(e){} // FIX v9.6
    }); // FIX v9.6
    if (!best || bestScore < 15) return getStageNavFallbackViewportRect(); // FIX v9.6
    try { raiseWickNavigationControls(best.node); } catch(e){} // FIX v9.8
    return best; // FIX v9.6
  }

  function raiseWickNavigationControls(navNode){ // FIX v9.8
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null; // FIX v9.8
    if (!pdoc) return; // FIX v9.8
    var node = navNode || null; // FIX v9.8
    if (!node) { // FIX v9.8
      try { // FIX v9.8
        var guess = getWickNavigationViewportRect(); // FIX v9.8
        node = guess && guess.node ? guess.node : null; // FIX v9.8
      } catch(e){} // FIX v9.8
    } // FIX v9.8
    if (!node || !node.style) return; // FIX v9.8
    try { node.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-raised-nav', '1'); } catch(e){} // FIX v9.8
    try { // FIX v9.8
      var currentPosition = pdoc.defaultView.getComputedStyle(node).position; // FIX v9.8
      if (!currentPosition || currentPosition === 'static') node.style.position = 'relative'; // FIX v9.8
      node.style.zIndex = '960'; // FIX v10.1: above BoneWarp stage layer at 950, below LukeTools panel
      node.style.pointerEvents = 'auto'; // FIX v9.8
      node.style.isolation = 'isolate'; // FIX v9.8
    } catch(e){} // FIX v9.8
    // FIX v10.1: Do not climb parent nodes or change the Set Area / stage layer stack.
    // Only the detected Wick navigation control itself is raised, and only to 960 so it stays below the LukeTools panel.
  }

  function getNavigationExclusionLocalRect(){ // FIX v9.6
    if (!App.overlay || !App.overlay.root || !App.overlay.canvas) return null; // FIX v9.6
    var rootRect = App.overlay.root.getBoundingClientRect(); // FIX v9.6
    var nav = getWickNavigationViewportRect(); // FIX v9.6
    if (!rootRect || !nav || rootRect.width <= 0 || rootRect.height <= 0) return null; // FIX v9.6
    var canvasW = Math.max(1, App.overlay.canvas.width || 1); // FIX v9.6
    var canvasH = Math.max(1, App.overlay.canvas.height || 1); // FIX v9.6
    var pad = 12; // FIX v9.6
    var x = ((nav.left - pad) - rootRect.left) / rootRect.width * canvasW; // FIX v9.6
    var y = ((nav.top - pad) - rootRect.top) / rootRect.height * canvasH; // FIX v9.6
    var w = (nav.width + pad * 2) / rootRect.width * canvasW; // FIX v9.6
    var h = (nav.height + pad * 2) / rootRect.height * canvasH; // FIX v9.6
    var ix = Math.max(0, Math.floor(x)); // FIX v9.6
    var iy = Math.max(0, Math.floor(y)); // FIX v9.6
    var ax = Math.min(canvasW, Math.ceil(x + w)); // FIX v9.6
    var ay = Math.min(canvasH, Math.ceil(y + h)); // FIX v9.6
    if (ax <= 0 || ay <= 0 || ix >= canvasW || iy >= canvasH || ax <= ix || ay <= iy) return null; // FIX v9.6
    return { x:ix, y:iy, width:ax - ix, height:ay - iy, canvasW:canvasW, canvasH:canvasH }; // FIX v9.6
  }

  function buildSvgPreviewClipWrapper(innerMarkup){ // FIX v9.8
    // FIX v9.8: no SVG cutout. Raise the real Wick navigation controls above BoneWarp instead.
    try { getWickNavigationViewportRect(); } catch(e){}
    return innerMarkup;
  }

  function autoBezierAngleFactor(a, b, c){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    if (!a || !b || !c) return 1;
    var v1x = Number(b.x) - Number(a.x), v1y = Number(b.y) - Number(a.y);
    var v2x = Number(c.x) - Number(b.x), v2y = Number(c.y) - Number(b.y);
    var l1 = Math.sqrt(v1x * v1x + v1y * v1y) || 0;
    var l2 = Math.sqrt(v2x * v2x + v2y * v2y) || 0;
    if (l1 <= 0.0001 || l2 <= 0.0001) return 0;
    var dot = (v1x * v2x + v1y * v2y) / (l1 * l2);
    if (dot > 1) dot = 1; if (dot < -1) dot = -1;
    var ang = Math.acos(dot) * 180 / Math.PI;
    var fac = (ang - 45) / 135;
    if (fac < 0) fac = 0;
    if (fac > 1) fac = 1;
    return fac;
  }

  function smoothSegmentCubic(prevPrev, start, end, nextNext){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    var f1 = autoBezierAngleFactor(prevPrev || start, start, end);
    var f2 = autoBezierAngleFactor(start, end, nextNext || end);
    var s1 = (1 / 6) * f1;
    var s2 = (1 / 6) * f2;
    return {
      c1: { x: round(Number(start.x) + (Number(end.x) - Number((prevPrev || start).x)) * s1), y: round(Number(start.y) + (Number(end.y) - Number((prevPrev || start).y)) * s1) },
      c2: { x: round(Number(end.x) - (Number((nextNext || end).x) - Number(start.x)) * s2), y: round(Number(end.y) - (Number((nextNext || end).y) - Number(start.y)) * s2) }
    };
  }

  function buildAnimateCurveBezierShapeMarkup(pose, ox, oy){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    if (!App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) return '';
    pose = pose || currentPointAnimationPose(App.currentFrame);
    ox = Number(ox || 0) || 0;
    oy = Number(oy || 0) || 0;
    var body = [];
    function currentDisplayPoint(base, id){
      var src = getAnimatedPointForFrame(base, id, App.currentFrame);
      var q = skinPointByPose(src, pose);
      return { x: round(q.x + ox), y: round(q.y + oy) };
    }
    function straightCubic(a, b){
      return {
        c1:{ x: round(a.x + (b.x - a.x) / 3), y: round(a.y + (b.y - a.y) / 3) },
        c2:{ x: round(a.x + (b.x - a.x) * 2 / 3), y: round(a.y + (b.y - a.y) * 2 / 3) }
      };
    }
    (App.source.svgNative.shapes || []).forEach(function(shape, si){
      (shape.cmdSubpaths || []).forEach(function(sp, spi){
        var d = '';
        var prev = null;
        (sp.commands || []).forEach(function(cmd, ci){
          if (!cmd || !cmd.p) return;
          var p = currentDisplayPoint(cmd.p, pointAnimationPointId(si, spi, ci, 'p'));
          if (!prev || cmd.type === 'M') {
            d += 'M ' + p.x + ' ' + p.y + ' ';
            prev = p;
            return;
          }
          var c1 = cmd.c1 ? currentDisplayPoint(cmd.c1, pointAnimationPointId(si, spi, ci, 'c1')) : null;
          var c2 = cmd.c2 ? currentDisplayPoint(cmd.c2, pointAnimationPointId(si, spi, ci, 'c2')) : null;
          if (!c1 || !c2) { var st = straightCubic(prev, p); c1 = c1 || st.c1; c2 = c2 || st.c2; }
          d += 'C ' + c1.x + ' ' + c1.y + ' ' + c2.x + ' ' + c2.y + ' ' + p.x + ' ' + p.y + ' ';
          prev = p;
        });
        if (sp.closed) d += 'Z';
        if (String(d || '').trim()) body.push('<path d="' + escapeXmlAttr(String(d).trim()) + '"' + styleMapToAttrs(shape.style) + ' />');
      });
    });
    return body.join('');
  }

  function clearNavigationExclusionOnCanvas(ctx){ // FIX v9.8
    // FIX v9.8: no cutout. The native Wick navigation controls are raised above BoneWarp instead.
    try { getWickNavigationViewportRect(); } catch(e){}
  }

  function buildNativeSvgPreviewMarkup(pose, ox, oy){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    if (!App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) return '';
    var body = [];
    if (App.activeTab === 'animatepoints') { // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
      body.push(buildAnimateCurveBezierShapeMarkup(pose, ox || 0, oy || 0));
      return body.join('');
    }
    var nativeOriginX = 0; // FIX v15.1: preview is drawn in overlay space, so do not use commit origin offsets here.
    var nativeOriginY = 0; // FIX v15.1: prevents ReferenceError during overlay mouse movement.
    App.source.svgNative.shapes.forEach(function(shape, shapeIndex){
      var d = '';
      if (shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths.length) {
        shape.cmdSubpaths.forEach(function(sp, subpathIndex){
          var warpedCmds = (sp.commands || []).map(function(cmd, cmdIndex){
            var out = { type: cmd.type };
            if (cmd.p) { var app = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.p, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, cmdIndex, 'p'), App.currentFrame); var pp = skinPointByPose(app, pose); out.p = { x: pp.x + ox - nativeOriginX, y: pp.y + oy - nativeOriginY }; } // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
            if (cmd.c1) { var ac1 = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.c1, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, cmdIndex, 'c1'), App.currentFrame); var pc1 = skinPointByPose(ac1, pose); out.c1 = { x: pc1.x + ox - nativeOriginX, y: pc1.y + oy - nativeOriginY }; } // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
            if (cmd.c2) { var ac2 = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.c2, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, cmdIndex, 'c2'), App.currentFrame); var pc2 = skinPointByPose(ac2, pose); out.c2 = { x: pc2.x + ox - nativeOriginX, y: pc2.y + oy - nativeOriginY }; } // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
            return out;
          });
          warpedCmds = smoothNativeCommandsForOutput(warpedCmds); // FIX v8.7
          d += pathCommandsToD(warpedCmds) + ' ';
        });
      } else if (shape.subpaths && shape.subpaths.length) {
        shape.subpaths.forEach(function(sp){
          var warped = sp.points.map(function(p, pointIndex){ var ap = getAnimatedPointForFrame(p, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, pointIndex, 's'), App.currentFrame); var q = skinPointByPose(ap, pose); return { x: q.x + ox - nativeOriginX, y: q.y + oy - nativeOriginY }; }); // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
          d += pointsToSubpath(warped, sp.closed) + ' ';
        });
      }
      if (d.trim()) body.push('<path d="' + escapeXmlAttr(d.trim()) + '"' + styleMapToAttrs(shape.style) + ' />');
    });
    body.push(buildFrameBoneSvgMarkup(App.currentFrame, pose, ox || 0, oy || 0)); // FIX v13.2
    return body.join('');
  }

  function updateNativeSvgPreviewLayer(pose, ox, oy){ // FIX v7.5
    if (!App.overlay.svgLayer) return false;
    if (!App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) {
      App.overlay.svgLayer.innerHTML = '';
      App.overlay.svgLayer.style.display = 'none';
      return false;
    }
    App.overlay.svgLayer.style.display = 'block';
    App.overlay.svgLayer.innerHTML = buildSvgPreviewClipWrapper(buildNativeSvgPreviewMarkup(pose, ox || 0, oy || 0)); // FIX v9.6
    return true;
  }

  function renderOverlay(){
    if (!App.overlay.canvas || !App.source.image) return;
    try { if (App.myCharacter && App.myCharacter.parts && App.myCharacter.parts.length) mcRefreshPinnedChildren(); } catch(eMcPinRefresh){} // FIX v_022

    var pose;
    if (isRestBoneEditContext()) { // FIX v16.6
      pose = getRestPose();
    } else {
      pose = getPoseForFrame(App.currentFrame);
    }

    App.overlay.previewBounds = getPreviewBoundsForPose(pose); // FIX v7.0
    applyOverlayViewportForBounds(App.overlay.previewBounds); // FIX v7.0

    var ctx = App.overlay.ctx;
    var w = App.overlay.canvas.width;
    var h = App.overlay.canvas.height;
    var ox = App.overlay.previewBounds ? App.overlay.previewBounds.offsetX || 0 : 0; // FIX v7.0
    var oy = App.overlay.previewBounds ? App.overlay.previewBounds.offsetY || 0 : 0; // FIX v7.0
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);
    var canvasScaleX = App.overlay.canvasScaleX || 1; // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    var canvasScaleY = App.overlay.canvasScaleY || 1; // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve

    var nativePreview = updateNativeSvgPreviewLayer(pose, ox, oy); // FIX v7.5
    if (!nativePreview) { // FIX v7.5
      renderWarpToContext(ctx, pose, { canvasWidth: w, canvasHeight: h, offsetX: ox, offsetY: oy }); // FIX v7.0
    }

    ctx.save(); // FIX v7.0
    ctx.scale(canvasScaleX, canvasScaleY); // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    ctx.translate(ox, oy); // FIX v7.0

    drawSmoothCurvePointsOnContext(ctx, pose); // FIX v18.2
    drawPointAnimationHandlesOnContext(ctx); // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints

    if (App.flags.showBones) {
      var selected = getSelectedBone();
      if (selected) drawWeightPaintOverlay(ctx, selected);
      App.bones.forEach(function(b){
        var pb = getBonePoseLike(b, pose);
        drawEnvelopeOnContext(ctx, b, pb, b.id === App.selectedBoneId, b.id === App.interaction.hoverBoneId);
      });
      drawParentLinks(ctx, pose);
      App.bones.forEach(function(b){
        var pb = getBonePoseLike(b, pose);
        drawBoneOnContext(ctx, b, pb, b.id === App.selectedBoneId, b.id === App.interaction.hoverBoneId, App.activeTab === 'bones' || App.activeTab === 'editbone'); // FIX v16.6
      });
      drawFrameBonesOnContext(ctx, pose); // FIX v13.2
    }

    if (App.paint.enabled && App.activeTab === 'bones' && App.interaction.hoverLocal) {
      ctx.save();
      ctx.strokeStyle = App.paint.action === 'erase' ? 'rgba(255,100,60,0.95)' : 'rgba(110,255,140,0.95)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(App.interaction.hoverLocal.x, App.interaction.hoverLocal.y, Math.max(1, App.paint.brushSize * 0.5), 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.restore();
    }

    if (App.activeTab === 'animatepoints' && App.smooth.relaxBrushEnabled && App.interaction.hoverLocal) { // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      ctx.save();
      ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(70,180,255,0.95)';
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(App.interaction.hoverLocal.x, App.interaction.hoverLocal.y, Math.max(1, Number(App.smooth.relaxBrushSize || 45) * 0.5), 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.stroke();
      ctx.restore();
    }

    if (App.interaction.addBoneMode && App.interaction.dragging && App.interaction.dragType === 'createBone' && App.interaction.startLocal) {
      var a = App.interaction.startLocal;
      var b = App.interaction.currentLocal || a;
      ctx.save();
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00ff95'; // FIX v6.7
      ctx.lineWidth = 7; // FIX v6.7
      ctx.lineCap = 'round'; // FIX v6.7
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(a.x, a.y); ctx.lineTo(b.x, b.y); ctx.stroke();
      ctx.strokeStyle = '#00131f'; // FIX v6.7
      ctx.lineWidth = 2; // FIX v6.7
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(a.x, a.y); ctx.lineTo(b.x, b.y); ctx.stroke();
      ctx.restore();
    }

    ctx.restore(); // FIX v7.0
    clearNavigationExclusionOnCanvas(ctx); // FIX v9.6: invisible cutout over the Wick navigation controls without drawing an ugly cover
    try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(eMcParts){ console.error('[MyCharacter] stage parts render failed', eMcParts); } // FIX v_032
    updateUI();
  }

  function hitTestBone(localPoint){
    var best = null;
    var pose = isRestBoneEditContext() ? getRestPose() : getPoseForFrame(App.currentFrame); // FIX v16.6
    App.bones.forEach(function(b){
      var pb = getBonePoseLike(b, pose);
      var head = isRestBoneEditContext() ? b.head : pb.head; // FIX v16.6
      var tail = isRestBoneEditContext() ? b.tail : pb.tail; // FIX v16.6
      var dh = dist(localPoint, head);
      var dt = dist(localPoint, tail);
      if (dh <= 10) { // FIX v8.1: smaller visible handles use smaller hit radius
        best = { boneId: b.id, type: 'head', d: dh };
        return;
      }
      if (dt <= 10) { // FIX v8.1: smaller visible handles use smaller hit radius
        best = { boneId: b.id, type: 'tail', d: dt };
        return;
      }
      var geom = getEnvelopeGeometry(pb);
      [
        { p: geom.headPos, type: 'envHeadPos' },
        { p: geom.headNeg, type: 'envHeadNeg' },
        { p: geom.tailPos, type: 'envTailPos' },
        { p: geom.tailNeg, type: 'envTailNeg' }
      ].forEach(function(item){
        var dd = dist(localPoint, item.p);
        if (dd <= 10 && (!best || dd < best.d)) best = { boneId: b.id, type: item.type, d: dd }; // FIX v8.1
      });
      var seg = pointToSegmentDistance(localPoint, head, tail);
      if (seg.d <= 6) { // FIX v8.1
        if (!best || seg.d < best.d) best = { boneId: b.id, type: 'line', d: seg.d };
      }
    });
    return best;
  }

  function resolveSharedJointHit(hit){ // FIX v5.0
    if (!hit) return hit; // FIX v5.0
    if (hit.type === 'head') { // FIX v5.0
      var childBone = getBoneById(hit.boneId); // FIX v5.0
      if (childBone && childBone.parentId) { // FIX v5.0
        var parentBone = getBoneById(childBone.parentId); // FIX v5.0
        if (parentBone) { // FIX v5.0
          return { boneId: parentBone.id, type: 'tail', d: hit.d, redirectedFromChildId: childBone.id }; // FIX v5.0
        } // FIX v5.0
      } // FIX v5.0
    } // FIX v5.0
    return hit; // FIX v5.0
  }

  function pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, pointIndex, kind){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    return String(kind || 'p') + '|' + String(shapeIndex) + '|' + String(subpathIndex) + '|' + String(pointIndex);
  }

  function basePointForPointId(pointId){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    if (!pointId || !App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes) return null;
    var parts = String(pointId).split('|');
    if (parts.length < 4) return null;
    var kind = parts[0];
    var si = Number(parts[1]);
    var spi = Number(parts[2]);
    var idx = Number(parts[3]);
    var shape = App.source.svgNative.shapes[si];
    if (!shape) return null;
    if (kind === 'p' || kind === 'c1' || kind === 'c2') {
      var sp = shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths[spi];
      var cmd = sp && sp.commands && sp.commands[idx];
      if (cmd && cmd[kind]) return cmd[kind];
    }
    if (kind === 's') {
      var sub = shape.subpaths && shape.subpaths[spi];
      if (sub && sub.points && sub.points[idx]) return sub.points[idx];
    }
    return null;
  }

  function keyFramesForPointId(pointId){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    return Object.keys(App.pointKeys || {}).map(function(v){ return Number(v); }).filter(function(fr){ return !isNaN(fr) && App.pointKeys[String(fr)] && App.pointKeys[String(fr)][pointId]; }).sort(function(a,b){ return a-b; });
  }

  function getAnimatedPointForFrame(basePoint, pointId, frame){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    if (!basePoint || !pointId) return basePoint;
    frame = clamp(Math.round(Number(frame || App.currentFrame || 1) || 1), 1, App.frameCount || 1);
    var frames = keyFramesForPointId(pointId);
    if (!frames.length) return basePoint;
    var prev = null, next = null;
    for (var i = 0; i < frames.length; i += 1) {
      if (frames[i] <= frame) prev = frames[i];
      if (frames[i] >= frame) { next = frames[i]; break; }
    }
    if (prev !== null && next !== null && prev !== next) {
      var a = App.pointKeys[String(prev)][pointId];
      var b = App.pointKeys[String(next)][pointId];
      var t = (frame - prev) / Math.max(1, next - prev);
      return { x:lerp(Number(a.x), Number(b.x), t), y:lerp(Number(a.y), Number(b.y), t) };
    }
    var keyFrame = prev !== null ? prev : next;
    var k = keyFrame != null && App.pointKeys[String(keyFrame)] ? App.pointKeys[String(keyFrame)][pointId] : null;
    return k ? { x:Number(k.x), y:Number(k.y) } : basePoint;
  }

  function setPointKeyAtCurrent(pointId, point){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    pointId = pointId || (App.pointAnimation && App.pointAnimation.selectedPointId);
    point = point || getAnimatedPointForFrame(basePointForPointId(pointId), pointId, App.currentFrame);
    if (!pointId || !point) return false;
    var fr = String(Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(App.currentFrame || 1) || 1)));
    if (!App.pointKeys) App.pointKeys = {};
    if (!App.pointKeys[fr]) App.pointKeys[fr] = {};
    App.pointKeys[fr][pointId] = { x:round(Number(point.x) || 0), y:round(Number(point.y) || 0) };
    return true;
  }

  function clearPointKeyAtCurrent(pointId){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    pointId = pointId || (App.pointAnimation && App.pointAnimation.selectedPointId);
    var fr = String(Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(App.currentFrame || 1) || 1)));
    if (!pointId || !App.pointKeys || !App.pointKeys[fr]) return false;
    if (App.pointKeys[fr][pointId]) delete App.pointKeys[fr][pointId];
    if (Object.keys(App.pointKeys[fr]).length === 0) delete App.pointKeys[fr];
    return true;
  }

  function currentPointAnimationPose(frame){ // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions
    try { return getPoseForFrame(frame || App.currentFrame || 1); } catch(ePose) {}
    try { return getRestPose(); } catch(eRest) {}
    return {};
  }

  function pointAnimationCurrentDisplayPoint(sourcePoint, pose){ // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions
    if (!sourcePoint) return sourcePoint;
    try { return skinPointByPose(sourcePoint, pose || currentPointAnimationPose(App.currentFrame)); } catch(eSkin) {}
    return sourcePoint;
  }

  function listPointAnimationRefs(frame){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions
    var refs = [];
    if (!App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes) return refs;
    frame = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || App.currentFrame || 1) || 1));
    var pose = currentPointAnimationPose(frame); // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions: handles show the current bone warped positions, not the rest/source positions.
    function addPointRef(id, base, kind, si, spi, pi){ // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions
      var sourcePoint = getAnimatedPointForFrame(base, id, frame);
      refs.push({ id:id, base:base, sourcePoint:sourcePoint, kind:kind, shapeIndex:si, subpathIndex:spi, pointIndex:pi, point:pointAnimationCurrentDisplayPoint(sourcePoint, pose) });
    }
    (App.source.svgNative.shapes || []).forEach(function(shape, si){
      (shape.cmdSubpaths || []).forEach(function(sp, spi){
        (sp.commands || []).forEach(function(cmd, ci){
          ['p','c1','c2'].forEach(function(kind){
            if (cmd && cmd[kind]) addPointRef(pointAnimationPointId(si, spi, ci, kind), cmd[kind], kind, si, spi, ci); // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions
          });
        });
      });
      if ((!shape.cmdSubpaths || !shape.cmdSubpaths.length) && shape.subpaths) {
        (shape.subpaths || []).forEach(function(sp, spi){
          (sp.points || []).forEach(function(pt, pi){ addPointRef(pointAnimationPointId(si, spi, pi, 's'), pt, 's', si, spi, pi); }); // FIX v18.55_AnimatePointsCurrentPositions
        });
      }
    });
    return refs;
  }

  function hitTestPointAnimation(local){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
    if (!local || !App.pointAnimation || App.pointAnimation.showPoints === false) return null;
    var refs = listPointAnimationRefs(App.currentFrame);
    var best = null;
    refs.forEach(function(ref){
      var d = ref.point ? dist(local, ref.point) : 999999;
      if (d <= 10 && (!best || d < best.d)) best = Object.assign({ d:d }, ref);
    });
    return best;
  }

  function pointAnimationCommandRefForPointId(pointId){ // FIX v18.57_BezierAnimatePoints
    if (!pointId || !App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes) return null;
    var parts = String(pointId).split('|');
    if (parts.length < 4) return null;
    var kind = parts[0];
    var si = Number(parts[1]);
    var spi = Number(parts[2]);
    var ci = Number(parts[3]);
    var shape = App.source.svgNative.shapes[si];
    var sp = shape && shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths[spi];
    var cmd = sp && sp.commands && sp.commands[ci];
    if (!shape || !sp || !cmd) return null;
    return { kind:kind, shapeIndex:si, subpathIndex:spi, commandIndex:ci, shape:shape, subpath:sp, commands:sp.commands, command:cmd };
  }

  function pointAnimationFindAnchorCommand(commands, startIndex, step){ // FIX v18.57_BezierAnimatePoints
    if (!commands || !commands.length) return null;
    for (var i = startIndex; i >= 0 && i < commands.length; i += step) {
      if (commands[i] && commands[i].p) return { index:i, command:commands[i] };
    }
    return null;
  }

  function pointAnimationDisplayForId(pointId, frame){ // FIX v18.57_BezierAnimatePoints
    var base = basePointForPointId(pointId);
    if (!base) return null;
    return pointAnimationCurrentDisplayPoint(getAnimatedPointForFrame(base, pointId, frame || App.currentFrame), currentPointAnimationPose(frame || App.currentFrame));
  }


  function autoBezierAnchorRefs(frame){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    var refs = [];
    if (!App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes) return refs;
    frame = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || App.currentFrame || 1) || 1));
    var pose = currentPointAnimationPose(frame);
    (App.source.svgNative.shapes || []).forEach(function(shape, si){
      (shape.cmdSubpaths || []).forEach(function(sp, spi){
        (sp.commands || []).forEach(function(cmd, ci){
          if (!cmd || !cmd.p) return;
          var id = pointAnimationPointId(si, spi, ci, 'p');
          var src = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.p, id, frame);
          refs.push({ id:id, base:cmd.p, sourcePoint:src, kind:'p', shapeIndex:si, subpathIndex:spi, commandIndex:ci, pointIndex:ci, point:pointAnimationCurrentDisplayPoint(src, pose) });
        });
      });
    });
    return refs;
  }

  function autoBezierSelectedRef(){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    var sel = App.pointAnimation && App.pointAnimation.selectedBezier;
    if (!sel || !App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes) return null;
    var shape = App.source.svgNative.shapes[sel.shapeIndex];
    var sp = shape && shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths[sel.subpathIndex];
    var cmd = sp && sp.commands && sp.commands[sel.commandIndex];
    if (!shape || !sp || !cmd || !cmd.p) return null;
    var id = pointAnimationPointId(sel.shapeIndex, sel.subpathIndex, sel.commandIndex, 'p');
    var src = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.p, id, App.currentFrame);
    var autoRefs = autoBezierControlRefs(App.currentFrame); // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    for (var ai = 0; ai < autoRefs.length; ai += 1) {
      if (autoRefs[ai].shapeIndex === sel.shapeIndex && autoRefs[ai].subpathIndex === sel.subpathIndex && autoRefs[ai].commandIndex === sel.commandIndex) return autoRefs[ai];
    }
    return { id:id, base:cmd.p, sourcePoint:src, kind:'p', shapeIndex:sel.shapeIndex, subpathIndex:sel.subpathIndex, commandIndex:sel.commandIndex, pointIndex:sel.commandIndex, shape:shape, subpath:sp, commands:sp.commands, command:cmd, point:pointAnimationCurrentDisplayPoint(src, currentPointAnimationPose(App.currentFrame)) };
  }

  function autoBezierRangeCount(){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    var n = App.pointAnimation && App.pointAnimation.autoBezierRange != null ? Number(App.pointAnimation.autoBezierRange) : 5;
    n = clamp(Math.round(n || 5), 3, 15);
    if (n % 2 === 0) n += 1;
    return clamp(n, 3, 15);
  }

  function autoBezierRangeForRef(ref){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    if (!ref || !ref.commands) return null;
    var anchorIndexes = [];
    (ref.commands || []).forEach(function(cmd, i){ if (cmd && cmd.p) anchorIndexes.push(i); });
    var centerPos = anchorIndexes.indexOf(ref.commandIndex);
    if (centerPos < 0) return null;
    var n = autoBezierRangeCount();
    var half = Math.floor(n / 2);
    var startPos = Math.max(0, centerPos - half);
    var endPos = Math.min(anchorIndexes.length - 1, centerPos + half);
    while ((endPos - startPos + 1) < n && startPos > 0) startPos -= 1;
    while ((endPos - startPos + 1) < n && endPos < anchorIndexes.length - 1) endPos += 1;
    return { anchorIndexes:anchorIndexes, startIndex:anchorIndexes[startPos], endIndex:anchorIndexes[endPos], centerIndex:ref.commandIndex, startPos:startPos, endPos:endPos, centerPos:centerPos, count:(endPos - startPos + 1) };
  }

  function autoBezierHandlePointId(ref, side){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    if (!ref) return '';
    return 'ab' + String(side || 'A') + '|' + ref.shapeIndex + '|' + ref.subpathIndex + '|' + ref.commandIndex;

  function ensureFirstFramePointKeysAlways(){ // FIX v18.57_FirstFrameKeys

  function updateAnimatePointUI(){ // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints

    }

  }

  function relaxBrushStampAt(local){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    if (!App.source || !App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) return 0;
    var radius = Math.max(1, Number(App.smooth.relaxBrushSize || 45) || 45) * 0.5;
    var strength = clamp(Number(App.smooth.relaxBrushStrength || 0.35) || 0.35, 0.01, 1);
    var total = 0;
    App.source.svgNative.shapes.forEach(function(shape){
      if (!shape) return;
      if (shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths.length) {
        shape.cmdSubpaths.forEach(function(sp){ total += relaxCommandListWithBrush(sp.commands || [], local, radius, strength); });
      }
      if (shape.subpaths && shape.subpaths.length) {
        shape.subpaths.forEach(function(sp){
          var pts = sp.points || [];
          for (var i = 1; i < pts.length - 1; i += 1) {
            var p = pts[i], prev = pts[i - 1], next = pts[i + 1];
            if (relaxBrushPointNear(p, local, radius, strength, { x:(prev.x + next.x) * 0.5, y:(prev.y + next.y) * 0.5 })) total += 1;
          }
        });
      }
    });
    return total;
  }

  function relaxBrushStroke(fromLocal, toLocal){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    fromLocal = fromLocal || toLocal;
    var d = dist(fromLocal, toLocal);
    var radius = Math.max(1, Number(App.smooth.relaxBrushSize || 45) || 45) * 0.5;
    var steps = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(d / Math.max(3, radius * 0.35)));
    var changed = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i <= steps; i += 1) {
      var t = i / Math.max(1, steps);
      changed += relaxBrushStampAt({ x:lerp(fromLocal.x, toLocal.x, t), y:lerp(fromLocal.y, toLocal.y, t) });
    }
    if (changed) { renderOverlay(); updateUI(); }
    return changed;
  }

  function onOverlayDoubleClick(e){ // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    if (!App.source || !App.source.image || App.activeTab !== 'animatepoints') return;

    var hit = hitTestAutoBezierControl(local);
    if (!hit || hit.hitType !== 'node') return;
    App.pointAnimation.selectedBezier = { shapeIndex:hit.shapeIndex, subpathIndex:hit.subpathIndex, commandIndex:hit.commandIndex };
    App.pointAnimation.selectedPointId = hit.id;
    setAutoBezierHandlesOpen(hit, true);
    updateAnimatePointUI();
    renderOverlay();
    try { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); } catch(eStop){}
  }

  function mcCompletePinToBone(source, target, bone, evt){ // FIX v_038: complete pin from a direct stage bone click or coordinate hit test.
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!source || !target || !bone) { mcLog('Click a visible bone on the part you want to pin to.'); return true; }
    var childRoot = mcRootBoneInState(source.state);
    if (!bone || !childRoot || !childRoot.head) { mcLog('Pin failed. The child part or target bone is missing.'); return true; }
    var targetStage = mcPartStagePointForBone(target, bone.id, App.currentFrame || 1, 'head');
    if (!targetStage) { mcLog('Pin failed. Target bone position is missing.'); return true; }
    var oldT = mcSafeClone(source.transform || {x:0,y:0,w:1,h:1,rotation:0});
    var childSrc = source.state && source.state.source ? source.state.source : {};
    var childSx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(oldT.w || childSrc.width || 1) / Math.max(1, Number(childSrc.width || oldT.w || 1)));
    var childSy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(oldT.h || childSrc.height || 1) / Math.max(1, Number(childSrc.height || oldT.h || 1)));
    source.parentPin = {
      targetPartId:target.id,
      boneId:bone.id,
      attachPoint:'head',
      childRootBoneId:childRoot.id,
      offset:{ x:0, y:0, rotation:Number(oldT.rotation || 0) - Number(target.transform && target.transform.rotation || 0) }
    };
    source.transform = {
      x:Number(targetStage.x || 0) - Number(childRoot.head.x || 0) * childSx,
      y:Number(targetStage.y || 0) - Number(childRoot.head.y || 0) * childSy,
      w:Math.max(1, Number(oldT.w || 1)),
      h:Math.max(1, Number(oldT.h || 1)),
      rotation:Number(oldT.rotation || 0)
    };
    mc.selectedId = source.id;
    mc.pinPickSourceId = null;
    mcSetPinCursor(false);
    mcActivatePart(source.id);
    mcRenderPanel();
    try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(eMcParts){}
    renderOverlay();
    mcLog('Pinned ' + (source.name || 'part') + ' to ' + (target.name || 'part') + ' / ' + (bone.name || ('Bone ' + bone.id)) + '.');
    try { if (evt) { evt.preventDefault(); evt.stopPropagation(); if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); } } catch(eStop){}
    return true;
  }

  function mcHandleStagePinBoneClick(local, evt){ // FIX v_038: real pin picking checks data hit shapes, then displayed screen positions, then stage fallback.
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!mc.pinPickSourceId) return false;
    var source = mcFindPart(mc.pinPickSourceId);
    if (!source) { mc.pinPickSourceId = null; mcSetPinCursor(false); mcRenderPanel(); return false; }
    syncFrameFromWick();
    var direct = null;
    try {
      var node = evt && evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('[data-mc-pin-part-id][data-mc-pin-bone-id]') : null;
      if (node) {
        var targetDirect = mcFindPart(Number(node.getAttribute('data-mc-pin-part-id') || 0));
        var boneDirect = targetDirect && targetDirect.state ? mcBoneByIdInState(targetDirect.state, Number(node.getAttribute('data-mc-pin-bone-id') || 0)) : null;
        if (targetDirect && boneDirect && Number(targetDirect.id) !== Number(source.id)) direct = { part:targetDirect, bone:boneDirect };
      }
    } catch(eDirect){}
    if (direct) return mcCompletePinToBone(source, direct.part, direct.bone, evt);
    var parentClient = evt ? mcEventClientInParent(evt) : null;
    var clientHit = parentClient ? mcHitTestAllPartBonesByClient(parentClient, source.id) : null;
    if (clientHit && clientHit.part && clientHit.bone) return mcCompletePinToBone(source, clientHit.part, clientHit.bone, evt);
    var stagePt = parentClient ? mcClientToStage(parentClient.x, parentClient.y) : local;
    var hit = mcHitTestAllPartBones(stagePt, source.id);
    if (!hit || !hit.part || !hit.bone) { mcLog('Pin failed. Click directly on a visible target bone head, tail, or yellow bone line.'); return true; }
    return mcCompletePinToBone(source, hit.part, hit.bone, evt);
  }

  function onOverlayMouseDown(e){
    if (!App.source.image) return;
    if (App.activeTab === 'bones' || App.activeTab === 'editbone' || App.activeTab === 'animate' || App.activeTab === 'animatepoints' || App.activeTab === 'expression' || App.activeTab === 'animatepoints') pushUndoSnapshot('Overlay edit'); // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    var local = clientToOverlayLocal(e.clientX, e.clientY);
    App.interaction.hoverLocal = local;
    App.interaction.shift = !!e.shiftKey;
    if (mcEnsure().pinPickSourceId) { // FIX v_022
      if (mcHandleStagePinBoneClick(local, e)) return;
    }
    if (App.activeTab === 'character' && (!mcSelectedPart() || mcSelectedPart().mode === 'assemble')) { // FIX v_028
      if (mcBeginPartDrag(mcClientToStage(e.clientX, e.clientY), e)) {
        try { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); } catch(eMcStop){}
        return;
      }
    }

      var bezHit = hitTestAutoBezierControl(local);
      if (bezHit) {
        var wasOpen = autoBezierHandlesAreOpen(bezHit);
        var selectedBefore = App.pointAnimation.selectedBezier;
        App.pointAnimation.selectedBezier = { shapeIndex:bezHit.shapeIndex, subpathIndex:bezHit.subpathIndex, commandIndex:bezHit.commandIndex };
        App.pointAnimation.selectedPointId = bezHit.id;
        App.interaction.dragging = true;
        App.interaction.dragType = 'autoBezierControl';
        App.interaction.bezierHitType = bezHit.hitType || 'node';
        App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate = { hitType:bezHit.hitType || 'node', wasSame:sameAutoBezierId(selectedBefore, bezHit), wasOpen:wasOpen, startLocal:{ x:local.x, y:local.y }, moved:false, shapeIndex:bezHit.shapeIndex, subpathIndex:bezHit.subpathIndex, commandIndex:bezHit.commandIndex };
        // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve: clicking a white node selects only. A key is written only after the user actually drags.
        updateAnimatePointUI();
        renderOverlay();
        return;
      }
    }
    if (App.activeTab === 'animatepoints' && App.smooth.relaxBrushEnabled) { // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      App.interaction.dragging = true;
      App.interaction.dragType = 'relaxBrush';
      App.interaction.lastRelaxLocal = local;
      relaxBrushStampAt(local);
      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }

      App.interaction.dragging = true;
      App.interaction.dragType = 'paintWeight';

      paintWeightStampAt(local);
      updateUI();
      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }

        App.pendingExpressionFrameKind = null;
        App.frameBonePinMode = false;
        App.newBoneType = 'normal'; // FIX v18.29: pin creation is also one shot
        if (el('selBoneType')) el('selBoneType').value = 'normal'; // FIX v18.29
        App.interaction.addBoneMode = false; // FIX v18.29
        renderExpressionUI();
      }
      App.interaction.addBoneMode = true;
      return;
    }
    var frameBoneHit = hitTestFrameBone(local); // FIX v18.10
    if (frameBoneHit && (App.activeTab === 'bones' || App.activeTab === 'expression' || App.activeTab === 'editbone')) { // FIX v18.10
      if (beginFrameBoneHandleDrag(frameBoneHit, local)) return; // FIX v18.10
    } // FIX v18.10
    var rawHit = hitTestBone(local); // FIX v5.0
    if (rawHit && App.activeTab === 'editbone') App.editBoneMode = isEnvelopeDragType(rawHit.type) ? 'envelope' : 'bone'; // FIX v18.1: selecting a node switches the edit focus automatically.
    if (rawHit && !editBoneModeAllowsDragType(rawHit.type)) rawHit = null; // FIX v18.1: Edit Bone allows envelope node edits as well as bone movement.
    var hit = rawHit; // FIX v5.0
    if (App.activeTab === 'bones' && App.interaction.addBoneMode) { // FIX v4.7
      if (rawHit) { // FIX v5.0
        App.selectedBoneId = rawHit.boneId; // FIX v5.0
        if (isExpressionBone(getSelectedBone())) { ensureExpressionProfileForBone(getSelectedBone()); App.expressionSubTab = expressionKindForBone(getSelectedBone()); } // FIX v18.0
        App.interaction.dragging = true;
        App.interaction.dragType = 'maybeCreateBoneFromExisting';
        App.interaction.boneId = rawHit.boneId; // FIX v5.0
        App.interaction.startLocal = local;
        App.interaction.currentLocal = local;

      }
      App.interaction.dragging = true;
      App.interaction.dragType = 'createBone';

      App.interaction.currentLocal = local;
      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }
    hit = resolveSharedJointHit(rawHit); // FIX v5.0: shared child heads are actually the parent tail joint
    if (hit && !isRestBoneEditContext() && !isAnimateKeyContext()) return; // FIX v16.6: clicking bones outside Bones, Edit Bone, or Animate must not create keys or edits.
    if (hit) {
      App.selectedBoneId = hit.boneId;
      if (isExpressionBone(getSelectedBone())) { ensureExpressionProfileForBone(getSelectedBone()); App.expressionSubTab = expressionKindForBone(getSelectedBone()); if (App.activeTab !== 'animate' && App.activeTab !== 'editbone') setActiveTab('expression'); } // FIX v18.0
      App.interaction.dragging = true;

        ? Object.keys(App.keyframes[App.currentFrame]).map(Number) : [];
      var makeKey = isAnimateKeyContext(); // FIX v16.6

      var fullPoseAtFrame = makeKey ? getPoseForFrame(App.currentFrame) : null; // FIX v16.6
      App.interaction.startPose = makeKey ? ensureEditablePoseAtCurrentFrame() : null; // FIX v16.6
      var bone = getSelectedBone();
      var curPose = makeKey ? ensureEditableBoneKeyAtCurrentFrame(hit.boneId, fullPoseAtFrame) : null; // FIX v16.6: only Animate creates a key.

        prevPointerAngle: rawAngleOfPoints(restEdit ? bone.head : curPose.head, local), // FIX v16.6
        cumulativeAngle: angleOfItem(restEdit ? bone : curPose), // FIX v16.6

        envEnd: getBoneEnvEnd(startPB || bone), // FIX v6.3

      };
      App.interaction.startDescendants = restEdit ? captureDescendantStateForBone(hit.boneId, null) : []; // FIX v16.6
      updateUI();
      renderOverlay();
    }
  }

  function applyShiftConstraint(start, current){
    var dx = current.x - start.x;
    var dy = current.y - start.y;
    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) return { x: current.x, y: start.y };
    return { x: start.x, y: current.y };
  }

  function updateContinuousDragAngleForBone(currentPoint, headPoint){ // FIX v8.6
    if (!App.interaction.startBone) return 0;
    var pointerAngle = rawAngleOfPoints(headPoint, currentPoint);
    var previousPointerAngle = typeof App.interaction.startBone.prevPointerAngle === 'number' ? App.interaction.startBone.prevPointerAngle : pointerAngle;
    var delta = wrappedAngleDelta(previousPointerAngle, pointerAngle);
    App.interaction.startBone.cumulativeAngle = (typeof App.interaction.startBone.cumulativeAngle === 'number' ? App.interaction.startBone.cumulativeAngle : angleOfItem(App.interaction.startBone)) + delta;
    App.interaction.startBone.prevPointerAngle = pointerAngle;
    return App.interaction.startBone.cumulativeAngle;
  }

  function onOverlayMouseMove(e){
    if (!App.overlay.canvas || !App.source.image) return;
    var local = clientToOverlayLocal(e.clientX, e.clientY);
    App.interaction.hoverLocal = local;
    App.interaction.shift = !!e.shiftKey;
    if (!App.interaction.dragging) {
      var frameHit = hitTestFrameBone(local); // FIX v18.10
      var hit = frameHit ? null : hitTestBone(local); // FIX v18.10
      App.interaction.hoverFrameBoneId = frameHit ? frameHit.frameBoneId : null; // FIX v18.10
      App.interaction.hoverBoneId = hit ? hit.boneId : null;
      App.interaction.hoverHandle = frameHit ? frameHit.type : (hit ? hit.type : ''); // FIX v18.10
      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'mcPartMove') { // FIX v_028
      mcUpdatePartDrag(mcClientToStage(e.clientX, e.clientY), !!e.shiftKey, e);
      return;
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'autoBezierControl') { // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
      var movedEnough = App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate && App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate.startLocal && dist(App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate.startLocal, local) > 3;
      if (movedEnough) App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate.moved = true;
      if (movedEnough || (App.interaction.bezierHitType !== 'node' && App.interaction.bezierHitType !== 'select')) {
        var ref = autoBezierSelectedRef();
        if (ref) applyAutoBezierRangeKey(ref, local, App.interaction.bezierHitType || 'node');

      updateAnimatePointUI();
      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'frameBoneMove' || App.interaction.dragType === 'frameBoneScale' || App.interaction.dragType === 'frameBoneRotate') { // FIX v18.10
      updateFrameBoneHandleDrag(local); // FIX v18.10
      return; // FIX v18.10
    } // FIX v18.10
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'relaxBrush') { // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
      relaxBrushStroke(App.interaction.lastRelaxLocal || local, local);
      App.interaction.lastRelaxLocal = local;
      return;
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'paintWeight') {
      paintWeightStroke(App.interaction.lastPaintLocal || local, local);
      App.interaction.lastPaintLocal = local;
      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }
    if (App.activeTab === 'bones' && App.interaction.dragType === 'maybeCreateBoneFromExisting') { // FIX v4.7

      return;
    }

      renderOverlay();
      return;
    }

    if (!bone) return;

    var dx = cur.x - start.x;
    var dy = cur.y - start.y;
    var oldParentBone = App.interaction.startBone;

    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'envHeadPos' || App.interaction.dragType === 'envHeadNeg' || App.interaction.dragType === 'envTailPos' || App.interaction.dragType === 'envTailNeg') { // FIX v6.3
      var whichEnd = (App.interaction.dragType.indexOf('Head') !== -1) ? 'head' : 'tail';
      var envWidth = envelopeWidthFromLocalPoint(App.interaction.startBone, cur, whichEnd);
      if (isRestBoneEditContext()) { // FIX v16.6

      if (isRestBoneEditContext()) { // FIX v16.6

        bone.head.y = App.interaction.startBone.head.y + dy; // FIX v4.7

      } else if (App.interaction.dragType === 'tail') {

        pb.head.y = App.interaction.startBone.head.y + dy;
        pb.tail.x = App.interaction.startBone.tail.x + dx;
        pb.tail.y = App.interaction.startBone.tail.y + dy;
        pb.angle = App.interaction.startBone.angle; // FIX v8.6
      }
      setItemTailToLockedLength(pb, bone); // FIX v12.4

    } else { return; } // FIX v16.6

  }

  function onOverlayMouseUp(e){
    if (!App.interaction.dragging) return;
    if (App.activeTab === 'bones' && App.interaction.dragType === 'createBone') {
      var a = App.interaction.startLocal;
      var b = App.interaction.currentLocal || a;
      if (movedFarEnough(a, b)) addBone(a, b); // FIX v4.7
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'maybeCreateBoneFromExisting') {
      // FIX v4.7: selecting an existing bone in add mode does not create a new bone unless the user drags away.
    }
    // FIX v12.4: after animated drag, keep only existing keys plus the one bone the user actually moved.
    if (isAnimateKeyContext() && App.keyframes[App.currentFrame]) { // FIX v16.6
      var movedBoneId = App.interaction.boneId;
      var preKeyed = App.interaction.preKeyedBoneIds || [];
      var wasPreExisting = App.interaction.preExistingKeyFrame;
      Object.keys(App.keyframes[App.currentFrame]).forEach(function(idStr){
        var id = Number(idStr);
        var wasKeyed = preKeyed.indexOf(id) !== -1;
        var wasMoved = (id === movedBoneId);
        if (!wasKeyed && !wasMoved) delete App.keyframes[App.currentFrame][id];
      });
      if (!wasPreExisting && Object.keys(App.keyframes[App.currentFrame]).length === 0) delete App.keyframes[App.currentFrame];
      mcPersistActivePartKeys(); // FIX v_067
      mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(); // FIX v_067
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'autoBezierControl' && App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate) { // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
      var c = App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate;
      if (!c.moved && c.hitType === 'node' && c.wasSame && c.wasOpen) setAutoBezierHandlesOpen(c, false);
    }
    if (App.interaction.dragType === 'mcPartMove') {
      mcCaptureActivePart();
      mcRenderPanel();
    }
    App.interaction.autoBezierClickCandidate = null; // FIX v18.69_NodeClickNoJumpShapePreserve
    App.interaction.dragging = false;
    App.interaction.dragType = '';
    App.interaction.boneId = null;
    App.interaction.frameBoneId = null; // FIX v18.10
    App.interaction.startFrameBone = null; // FIX v18.10
    App.interaction.startLocal = null;
    App.interaction.startPose = null;
    App.interaction.startBone = null;
    App.interaction.startDescendants = [];
    App.interaction.lastPaintLocal = null;
    App.interaction.preKeyedBoneIds = [];
    App.interaction.preExistingKeyFrame = false;
    renderOverlay();
    scheduleProxyFrame(); // FIX v11.3: refresh proxy after key strip
  }

  function onParentKeyDown(e){
    App.interaction.shift = !!e.shiftKey;
  }

  function onParentKeyUp(e){
    App.interaction.shift = !!e.shiftKey;
  }

  function proxyG(){ // FIX v10.2
    try { return (window.parent && window.parent.Wick && window.parent.Wick.GUIElement) ? window.parent.Wick.GUIElement : {}; } catch(e){ return {}; }
  }

  function proxyCellWidth(){ var g = proxyG(); return Number(g.GRID_DEFAULT_CELL_WIDTH || g.GRID_NORMAL_CELL_WIDTH || 38); } // FIX v10.2
  function proxyCellHeight(){ var g = proxyG(); return Number(g.GRID_DEFAULT_CELL_HEIGHT || g.GRID_NORMAL_CELL_HEIGHT || 42); } // FIX v10.2
  function proxyLayerColumnWidth(){ var g = proxyG(); return Number(g.LAYERS_CONTAINER_WIDTH || 160); } // FIX v10.2
  function proxyBreadcrumbHeight(){ var g = proxyG(); return Number(g.BREADCRUMBS_HEIGHT || 30); } // FIX v10.2
  function proxyNumberLineHeight(){ var g = proxyG(); return Number(g.NUMBER_LINE_HEIGHT || 35); } // FIX v10.2
  function proxyScrollbarSize(){ var g = proxyG(); return Number(g.SCROLLBAR_SIZE || 18); } // FIX v10.2

  function proxyMedianNumber(values){ // FIX v15.2
    values = (values || []).filter(function(v){ return isFinite(v) && v > 0; }).sort(function(a,b){ return a - b; });
    if (!values.length) return 0;
    var mid = Math.floor(values.length / 2);
    return values.length % 2 ? values[mid] : (values[mid - 1] + values[mid]) / 2;
  }

  function proxyMeasuredCellWidthFromWickCanvas(wickCanvas, LCW, BCH, NLH){ // FIX v15.2
    /* FIX v15.2: The proxy keys must use the same frame pitch Wick actually drew.
       Do not rely only on a stored constant, because tiny differences accumulate and the
       BoneWarp key rows drift away from the Wick frame grid by later frames. This reads
       the real timeline canvas and measures the spacing between vertical frame grid lines.
       If reading pixels is blocked or the scan is uncertain, it falls back to Wick's constant. */
    var fallback = Number(proxyCellWidth() || 38);
    try {
      if (!wickCanvas || !wickCanvas.getContext) return fallback;
      var ctx = wickCanvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently:true });
      if (!ctx || !ctx.getImageData) return fallback;
      var w = Math.max(1, Math.floor(wickCanvas.width || 0));
      var h = Math.max(1, Math.floor(wickCanvas.height || 0));
      if (w < 120 || h < 80) return fallback;
      var xStart = clamp(Math.floor(LCW - fallback * 2), 0, w - 2);
      var xEnd = clamp(Math.floor(w - proxyScrollbarSize() - 4), xStart + 20, w - 2);
      var yStart = clamp(Math.floor(BCH + NLH + 6), 0, h - 2);
      var yEnd = clamp(Math.floor(yStart + Math.min(160, Math.max(24, h - yStart - 8))), yStart + 1, h - 1);
      var sampleH = Math.max(1, yEnd - yStart);
      var sampleW = Math.max(1, xEnd - xStart + 1);
      var data = ctx.getImageData(xStart, yStart, sampleW, sampleH).data;
      function lumaAt(localX, localY){
        var p = (localY * sampleW + localX) * 4;
        return data[p] * 0.299 + data[p + 1] * 0.587 + data[p + 2] * 0.114;
      }
      var scores = [];
      for (var x = 1; x < sampleW - 1; x++) {
        var score = 0;
        for (var y = 0; y < sampleH; y += 4) {
          var a = lumaAt(x - 1, y);
          var b = lumaAt(x, y);
          var c = lumaAt(x + 1, y);
          score += Math.abs(b - a) + Math.abs(c - b);
        }
        scores.push({ x:xStart + x, score:score });
      }
      if (!scores.length) return fallback;
      var scoreValues = scores.map(function(s){ return s.score; }).sort(function(a,b){ return a - b; });
      var medianScore = scoreValues[Math.floor(scoreValues.length * 0.70)] || 0;
      var threshold = Math.max(18, medianScore * 2.2);
      var peaks = [];
      scores.forEach(function(s){
        if (s.score < threshold) return;
        var last = peaks.length ? peaks[peaks.length - 1] : null;
        if (!last || s.x - last.x > 8) peaks.push({ x:s.x, score:s.score });
        else if (s.score > last.score) { last.x = s.x; last.score = s.score; }
      });
      if (peaks.length < 3) return fallback;
      var spacings = [];
      for (var i = 1; i < peaks.length; i++) {
        var d = peaks[i].x - peaks[i - 1].x;
        if (d >= Math.max(18, fallback * 0.55) && d <= Math.min(90, fallback * 1.75)) spacings.push(d);
      }
      var measured = proxyMedianNumber(spacings);
      if (!measured || measured < 18 || measured > 90) return fallback;
      return measured;
    } catch(e) {
      return fallback;
    }
  }

  function proxyFrameAreaX(scrollX){ // FIX v15.4
    /* FIX v15.4: Use Wick's documented timeline reference directly.
       The frames area starts exactly after the layer label column. The previous +8 correction
       caused cumulative visible drift against Wick's own frame grid at later frames. */
    return proxyLayerColumnWidth() - Number(scrollX || 0);
  }

  function proxyTimelineCanvas(){ // FIX v10.2
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
    if (!pdoc) return null;
    var viewH = window.parent && window.parent.innerHeight ? window.parent.innerHeight : window.innerHeight;
    var best = null, bestScore = -1;
    Array.prototype.slice.call(pdoc.querySelectorAll('canvas')).forEach(function(c){
      if (!c || c.id === 'ltbw-proxy-keyframe-canvas') return;
      var r = c.getBoundingClientRect();
      var score = (r.top > viewH * 0.35 ? 4 : 0) + (r.width > 300 ? 3 : 0) + (r.height > 0 && r.height < r.width * 0.35 ? 3 : 0);
      if (score > bestScore) { bestScore = score; best = c; }
    });
    return best;
  }

  function proxyScrollContainer(){ // FIX v11.2
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
    if (!pdoc) return null;
    var viewH = window.parent && window.parent.innerHeight ? window.parent.innerHeight : window.innerHeight;
    var wickCanvas = proxyTimelineCanvas();
    var canvasRect = null;
    try { if (wickCanvas) canvasRect = wickCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(); } catch(e){}
    var best = null, bestScore = -1;
    Array.prototype.slice.call(pdoc.querySelectorAll('div')).forEach(function(d){
      try {
        var r = d.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (r.top < viewH * 0.3) return;
        if (d.scrollHeight <= d.clientHeight + 2 && d.scrollWidth <= d.clientWidth + 2) return;
        var score = 0;
        if (r.width > 700) score += 5;
        if (canvasRect && r.top <= canvasRect.bottom + 40 && r.bottom >= canvasRect.top - 40) score += 8;
        if (d.scrollTop > 0 || d.scrollLeft > 0) score += 10;
        score += Math.min(10, (d.scrollHeight - d.clientHeight) / 40);
        if (score > bestScore) { bestScore = score; best = d; }
      } catch(ignore){}
    });
    return best;
  }

  function proxyAttachFollowListeners(){ // FIX v10.9
    var pwin = window.parent || window;
    var pdoc = pwin.document || document;
    proxyRemoveFollowListeners(); // FIX v10.9
    App.proxy.eventTargets = []; // FIX v10.9
    function add(target, type, fn, opts){ // FIX v10.9
      try {
        if (!target || !target.addEventListener) return;
