      '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" width="' + w + '" height="' + h + '" viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h + '" preserveAspectRatio="none">',
      '<defs>', defs.join(''), '</defs>',
      body.join(''),
      '</svg>'
    ].join('');

    return new File([svg], fileName, { type: 'image/svg+xml' });
  }

  function nativeCurveBoundsFromRecords(records){ // FIX v15.0
    var minX = Infinity, minY = Infinity, maxX = -Infinity, maxY = -Infinity;
    function includePoint(x, y){
      x = Number(x); y = Number(y);
      if (!isFinite(x) || !isFinite(y)) return;
      if (x < minX) minX = x;
      if (y < minY) minY = y;
      if (x > maxX) maxX = x;
      if (y > maxY) maxY = y;
    }
    (records || []).forEach(function(record){
      try {
        var json = record && record.paperJson;
        var data = Array.isArray(json) ? json[1] : null;
        var segs = data && Array.isArray(data.segments) ? data.segments : [];
        segs.forEach(function(seg){
          var p = seg && seg[0] ? seg[0] : null;
          if (p && p.length >= 2) includePoint(p[0], p[1]);
        });
      } catch(e){}
    });
    if (!isFinite(minX) || !isFinite(minY) || !isFinite(maxX) || !isFinite(maxY)) return null;
    return { minX:minX, minY:minY, maxX:maxX, maxY:maxY, width:Math.max(1, maxX - minX), height:Math.max(1, maxY - minY), cx:(minX + maxX) * 0.5, cy:(minY + maxY) * 0.5 };
  }

  function getFirstBoneOriginLocalForFrame(frameNumber){ // FIX v16.8
    var frame = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frameNumber || 1)));
    var firstBone = null;
    try { firstBone = (App.bones || [])[0] || null; } catch(e) { firstBone = null; }
    if (!firstBone) return null;
    var pose = null;
    try { pose = getPoseForFrame(frame); } catch(e2) { pose = null; }
    var item = pose ? getBonePoseLike(firstBone, pose) : firstBone;
    if (!item) item = firstBone;
    var p = item.head || firstBone.head || null; // FIX v16.8: first bone sets the native clip origin by its head position.
    if (!p) return null;
    var x = Number(p.x);
    var y = Number(p.y);
    if (!isFinite(x) || !isFinite(y)) return null;
    return { x:x, y:y, boneId:firstBone.id, boneName:firstBone.name || 'Bone 1', kind:'head', frame:frame };
  }

  function getFirstBoneOriginLocal(){ // FIX v16.8
    return getFirstBoneOriginLocalForFrame(1);
  }

  function computeNativeCurveFirstBoneOriginForExportBounds(exportBounds){ // FIX v16.8
    exportBounds = exportBounds || { width: Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.width)), height: Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.height)), offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0 };

  function countNativeCurveClipPaths(clip){ // FIX v14.9

  function mcFindPartInList(parts, id){ // FIX v_045

    var srcW = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || App.source.width || t.w || 1));
    var srcH = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || App.source.height || t.h || 1));
    var sx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.w || srcW) / srcW);
    var sy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.h || srcH) / srcH);
    var x = Number(handle[0] || 0) * sx;
    var y = Number(handle[1] || 0) * sy;
    var rot = (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) * Math.PI / 180;
    if (rot) {
      var c = Math.cos(rot);
      var sn = Math.sin(rot);
      var rx = x * c - y * sn;
      var ry = x * sn + y * c;
      x = rx;
      y = ry;
    }
    return [mcRoundCoordForCommit(x), mcRoundCoordForCommit(y)];
  }

  function mcPaperJsonToPathData(paperJson){ // FIX v_046
    var data = Array.isArray(paperJson) ? paperJson[1] : null;
    var segs = data && Array.isArray(data.segments) ? data.segments : [];
    if (!segs.length) return '';
    var d = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < segs.length; i += 1) {
      var seg = segs[i] || [];
      var p = seg[0] || [0, 0];
      if (i === 0) {
        d += 'M ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(p[0]) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(p[1]);
      } else {
        var prev = segs[i - 1] || [];
        var pp = prev[0] || [0, 0];
        var hout = prev[2] || [0, 0];
        var hin = seg[1] || [0, 0];
        var c1x = Number(pp[0] || 0) + Number(hout[0] || 0);
        var c1y = Number(pp[1] || 0) + Number(hout[1] || 0);
        var c2x = Number(p[0] || 0) + Number(hin[0] || 0);
        var c2y = Number(p[1] || 0) + Number(hin[1] || 0);
        if (Math.abs(Number(hout[0] || 0)) > 0.0001 || Math.abs(Number(hout[1] || 0)) > 0.0001 || Math.abs(Number(hin[0] || 0)) > 0.0001 || Math.abs(Number(hin[1] || 0)) > 0.0001) {
          d += ' C ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(c1x) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(c1y) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(c2x) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(c2y) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(p[0]) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(p[1]);
        } else {
          d += ' L ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(p[0]) + ' ' + mcRoundCoordForCommit(p[1]);
        }
      }
    }
    if (data && data.closed) d += ' Z';
    return d;
  }

  function mcBakeRecordToCharacterClip(record, part, exportBounds, parentBounds){ // FIX v_046
    var json = record && record.paperJson ? mcSafeClone(record.paperJson) : null;
    var data = Array.isArray(json) ? json[1] : null;
    if (!data || !Array.isArray(data.segments)) return record;
    data.applyMatrix = true;
    data.segments = data.segments.map(function(seg){
      seg = seg || [];
      return [
        mcTransformCommitPoint(seg[0] || [0, 0], part, exportBounds, parentBounds),
        mcTransformCommitHandle(seg[1] || [0, 0], part),
        mcTransformCommitHandle(seg[2] || [0, 0], part)
      ];
    });
    var out = mcSafeClone(record || {});
    out.paperJson = json;
    out.d = mcPaperJsonToPathData(json);
    return out;
  }

  function mcResetPathTransformAfterBake(path){ // FIX v_046
    if (!path) return;
    try {
      if (!path.transformation) path.transformation = {};
      path.transformation.x = 0;
      path.transformation.y = 0;
      path.transformation.scaleX = 1;
      path.transformation.scaleY = 1;
      path.transformation.rotation = 0;
    } catch(e){}
  }

  async function mcCommitCharacterNativeClip(){ // FIX v_045
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mcCaptureActivePart();
    if (!refreshBridgeRefs()) { mcLog('Bridge/editor not available.'); return; }
    var loadedParts = (mc.parts || []).filter(function(p){ return p && p.state && p.visible !== false; });
    if (!loadedParts.length) { mcLog('No loaded character parts to commit.'); return; }
    syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline();
    stop();
    var savedState = null;
    var savedSelected = mc.selectedId;
    try { savedState = buildRigProjectState(); } catch(eSave){}
    var parentName = (el('inpClipName') && el('inpClipName').value ? String(el('inpClipName').value).trim() : '') || 'MyCharacter';
    if (loadedParts.length > 1 && parentName === 'BoneWarpClip') parentName = 'MyCharacter';
    var parentIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(parentName + '_' + Date.now(), 'MyCharacterClip');
    var parentClip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: parentIdentifier });
    try { parentClip.name = parentName; } catch(eName){}
    var safeN = 50;
    try { while (parentClip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) parentClip.timeline.removeLayer(parentClip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(eClear){}
    var frameTotal = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(App.frameCount || 1)));
    var parentBounds = mcPartUnionBoundsForCommitFrames(loadedParts, frameTotal);
    try { parentClip.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(parentBounds.w)); parentClip.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(parentBounds.h)); } catch(eSize){}
    try { parentClip.bounds = { x:0, y:0, width:parentClip.width || parentBounds.w, height:parentClip.height || parentBounds.h }; } catch(eBounds){}
    var partExportBounds = {};
    var madePaths = 0;
    for (var pIndex = 0; pIndex < loadedParts.length; pIndex += 1) {
      var basePart = loadedParts[pIndex];
      var partName = String(basePart.name || ('Part ' + basePart.id));
      var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
      try { layer.name = partName; } catch(eLayerName){}
      parentClip.timeline.addLayer(layer);
      try {
        mc.loading = true;
        await loadRigProjectState(mcSafeClone(basePart.state));
        mc.loading = false;
        syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline();
        ensureFirstFrameKeysAlways();
        partExportBounds[basePart.id] = computeAnimationExportBounds();
      } catch(partSetupErr) {
        mc.loading = false;
        mcLog('Commit setup skipped ' + partName + ': ' + (partSetupErr && partSetupErr.message ? partSetupErr.message : partSetupErr));
        continue;
      }
      for (var fi = 1; fi <= frameTotal; fi += 1) {
        var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start: fi, end: fi });
        try { frame.identifier = makeValidIdentifier('frame_' + fi + '_' + basePart.id, 'frame_' + fi); } catch(eFrameId){}
        layer.addFrame(frame);
        try {
          var resolvedParts = mcResolvedPartsForCommitFrame(loadedParts, fi);
          var resolvedPart = mcFindPartInList(resolvedParts, basePart.id) || basePart;
          var exportBounds = partExportBounds[basePart.id] || computeAnimationExportBounds();
          var records = nativeShapePathRecordsFromFrame(fi, exportBounds);
          for (var si = 0; si < records.length; si += 1) {
            var bakedRecord = mcBakeRecordToCharacterClip(records[si], resolvedPart, exportBounds, parentBounds); // FIX v_046
            var path = createNativeWickPathFromRecord(bakedRecord, fi, si + 1); // FIX v_046
            try { path.name = partName + '_Curve_' + fi + '_' + (si + 1); } catch(ePathName){}
            mcResetPathTransformAfterBake(path); // FIX v_046
            addToFrame(frame, path);
            madePaths += 1;
          }
        } catch(frameErr) {
          mcLog('Commit skipped ' + partName + ' frame ' + fi + ': ' + (frameErr && frameErr.message ? frameErr.message : frameErr));
        }
      }
    }
    mc.loading = false;
    if (!madePaths) {
      if (savedState) { try { await loadRigProjectState(savedState); } catch(eRestoreFail){} }
      mc.selectedId = savedSelected;
      mcLog('Character commit failed. No native curves were committed.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      parentClip.transformation.x = Number(parentBounds.x || 0);
      parentClip.transformation.y = Number(parentBounds.y || 0);
      parentClip.transformation.scaleX = 1;
      parentClip.transformation.scaleY = 1;
      parentClip.transformation.rotation = 0;
      parentClip.animationType = 'loop';
    } catch(eParentT){}
    try { addClipToWickProject(parentClip); } catch(addErr) { mcLog('Character commit failed: ' + (addErr && addErr.message ? addErr.message : addErr)); return; }
    try {
      if (!App.committedClipIdentifiers) App.committedClipIdentifiers = [];
      App.committedClipIdentifiers.push(parentClip.identifier || parentClip.name || parentName);
    } catch(eRemember){}
    if (savedState) { try { await loadRigProjectState(savedState); } catch(eRestore){} }
    mc.selectedId = savedSelected;
    try { removeOverlay(); } catch(eRO){}
    try { var host = (window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : document).getElementById('mcStagePartsHost'); if (host && host.parentNode) host.parentNode.removeChild(host); } catch(eHostRemove){}
    try { markDirty(); } catch(eDirty){}
    mcRenderPanel();
    mcLog('Committed assembled character into one native Wick clip with baked part placement, inherited pin transforms, and bone deformation.');
  }


  function buildNativeCurveClip(clipName, exportBounds){ // FIX v14.9
    if (!App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) throw new Error('Native Wick curve commit needs parsed SVG Native shapes.');
    exportBounds = computeNativeCurveFirstBoneOriginForExportBounds(exportBounds); // FIX v16.8
    var clipIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(clipName, 'BoneWarpNativeCurveClip');
    var clip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: clipIdentifier });
    try { clip.name = clipName; } catch(e){}
    try { clip.width = Math.max(1, Number(exportBounds.width || App.source.width || 1)); } catch(e2){}
    try { clip.height = Math.max(1, Number(exportBounds.height || App.source.height || 1)); } catch(e3){}
    try { clip.bounds = { x:-(Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0)), y:0, width:clip.width, height:clip.height }; } catch(e4){} // FIX v15.0
    var safeN = 10;
    while (clip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) {
      try { clip.timeline.removeLayer(clip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(e5){ break; }
    }
    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
    layer.name = 'native curves';
    clip.timeline.addLayer(layer);
    for (var fi = 1; fi <= App.frameCount; fi++) {
      var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start: fi, end: fi });
      frame.identifier = 'frame_' + fi;
      layer.addFrame(frame);
      var records = nativeShapePathRecordsFromFrame(fi, exportBounds);
      for (var si = 0; si < records.length; si++) {
        var path = createNativeWickPathFromRecord(records[si], fi, si + 1);
        addToFrame(frame, path);
      }
    }
    return clip;
  }

  function nativeSvgFileFromFrame(frameNum, fileName, exportBounds){ // FIX v7.3
    if (!App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) return svgFileFromFrame(frameNum, fileName, exportBounds);
    var pose = getPoseForFrame(frameNum);
    exportBounds = exportBounds || { width: Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.width)), height: Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.height)), offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0 };
    var w = Math.max(1, Math.round(exportBounds.width));
    var h = Math.max(1, Math.round(exportBounds.height));
    var ox = Number(exportBounds.offsetX || 0);
    var oy = Number(exportBounds.offsetY || 0);
    var body = [];
    App.source.svgNative.shapes.forEach(function(shape, shapeIndex){
      var d = '';
      if (shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths.length) {
        shape.cmdSubpaths.forEach(function(sp, subpathIndex){
          var warpedCmds = (sp.commands || []).map(function(cmd, cmdIndex){
            var out = { type: cmd.type };
            if (cmd.p) { var app = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.p, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, cmdIndex, 'p'), frameNum); var pp = skinPointByPose(app, pose); out.p = { x: pp.x + ox, y: pp.y + oy }; } // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
            if (cmd.c1) { var ac1 = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.c1, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, cmdIndex, 'c1'), frameNum); var pc1 = skinPointByPose(ac1, pose); out.c1 = { x: pc1.x + ox, y: pc1.y + oy }; } // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
            if (cmd.c2) { var ac2 = getAnimatedPointForFrame(cmd.c2, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, cmdIndex, 'c2'), frameNum); var pc2 = skinPointByPose(ac2, pose); out.c2 = { x: pc2.x + ox, y: pc2.y + oy }; } // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
            return out;
          });
          warpedCmds = smoothNativeCommandsForOutput(warpedCmds); // FIX v8.7
          d += pathCommandsToD(warpedCmds) + ' ';
        });
      } else if (shape.subpaths && shape.subpaths.length) {
        shape.subpaths.forEach(function(sp){
          var warped = sp.points.map(function(p, pointIndex){ var ap = getAnimatedPointForFrame(p, pointAnimationPointId(shapeIndex, subpathIndex, pointIndex, 's'), frameNum); var q = skinPointByPose(ap, pose); return { x: q.x + ox, y: q.y + oy }; }); // FIX v18.54_AnimatePoints
          d += pointsToSubpath(warped, sp.closed) + ' ';
        });
      }
      if (d.trim()) body.push('<path d="' + escapeXmlAttr(d.trim()) + '"' + styleMapToAttrs(shape.style) + ' />');
    });
    body.push(buildFrameBoneSvgMarkup(frameNum, pose, ox, oy)); // FIX v13.2
    var svg = ['<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>','<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="' + w + '" height="' + h + '" viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h + '">',body.join(''),'</svg>'].join('');
    return new File([svg], fileName, { type: 'image/svg+xml' });
  }

  function forceCanvasTransparency(canvas){ // FIX v5.1
    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true }); // FIX v5.1
    if (!ctx) return; // FIX v5.1
    var imgData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); // FIX v5.1
    var d = imgData.data; // FIX v5.1
    for (var i = 0; i < d.length; i += 4) { // FIX v5.1
      if (d[i + 3] <= 8) { // FIX v5.1
        d[i] = 0; // FIX v5.1
        d[i + 1] = 0; // FIX v5.1
        d[i + 2] = 0; // FIX v5.1
        d[i + 3] = 0; // FIX v5.1
      }
    }
    ctx.putImageData(imgData, 0, 0); // FIX v5.1
  }

  function healTransparentTriangleSeams(canvas){ // FIX v6.1
    var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { willReadFrequently: true }); // FIX v6.1
    if (!ctx) return; // FIX v6.1
    var w = canvas.width; // FIX v6.1
    var h = canvas.height; // FIX v6.1
    if (w < 3 || h < 3) return; // FIX v6.1
    var imgData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, w, h); // FIX v6.1
    var src = imgData.data; // FIX v6.1
    var out = new Uint8ClampedArray(src); // FIX v6.1
    for (var y = 1; y < h - 1; y++) { // FIX v6.1
      for (var x = 1; x < w - 1; x++) { // FIX v6.1
        var i = (y * w + x) * 4; // FIX v6.1
        if (src[i + 3] > 16) continue; // FIX v6.1
        var totalA = 0; // FIX v6.1
        var totalR = 0; // FIX v6.1
        var totalG = 0; // FIX v6.1
        var totalB = 0; // FIX v6.1
        var strong = 0; // FIX v6.1
        for (var oy = -1; oy <= 1; oy++) { // FIX v6.1
          for (var ox = -1; ox <= 1; ox++) { // FIX v6.1
            if (!ox && !oy) continue; // FIX v6.1
            var ni = ((y + oy) * w + (x + ox)) * 4; // FIX v6.1
            var na = src[ni + 3]; // FIX v6.1
            if (na > 48) { // FIX v6.1
              strong++; // FIX v6.1
              totalA += na; // FIX v6.1
              totalR += src[ni] * na; // FIX v6.1
              totalG += src[ni + 1] * na; // FIX v6.1
              totalB += src[ni + 2] * na; // FIX v6.1
            }
          }
        }
        if (strong >= 3 && totalA > 0) { // FIX v6.1
          out[i] = Math.round(totalR / totalA); // FIX v6.1
          out[i + 1] = Math.round(totalG / totalA); // FIX v6.1
          out[i + 2] = Math.round(totalB / totalA); // FIX v6.1
          out[i + 3] = Math.min(255, Math.round(totalA / strong)); // FIX v6.1
        }
      }
    }
    imgData.data.set(out); // FIX v6.1
    ctx.putImageData(imgData, 0, 0); // FIX v6.1
  }

  function canvasFromFrame(frameNum, exportBounds){
    var pose = getPoseForFrame(frameNum);
    exportBounds = exportBounds || { width: Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.width)), height: Math.max(1, Math.round(App.source.height)), offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0 }; // FIX v6.9
    var c = document.createElement('canvas');
    c.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(exportBounds.width)); // FIX v6.9
    c.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(exportBounds.height)); // FIX v6.9
    var ctx = c.getContext('2d', { alpha: true, willReadFrequently: true }); // FIX v5.1
    var prevImage = App.flags.showImage, prevMesh = App.flags.showMesh, prevBones = App.flags.showBones;
    App.flags.showImage = true;
    App.flags.showMesh = false;
    App.flags.showBones = false;
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, c.width, c.height); // FIX v5.1
    renderWarpToContext(ctx, pose, { canvasWidth: c.width, canvasHeight: c.height, offsetX: exportBounds.offsetX || 0, offsetY: exportBounds.offsetY || 0 }); // FIX v6.9
    healTransparentTriangleSeams(c); // FIX v6.1
    forceCanvasTransparency(c); // FIX v5.1
    App.flags.showImage = prevImage;
    App.flags.showMesh = prevMesh;
    App.flags.showBones = prevBones;
    return c;
  }

  function isSvgCommitFile(file, name){ // FIX v14.2
    var n = String(name || (file && file.name) || '');
    var t = String((file && file.type) || '');
    return /\.svg$/i.test(n) || t.indexOf('svg') !== -1;
  }

  function markCommittedObjectAsSvg(path, asset, file, name, frameIndex){ // FIX v14.2
    if (!path) return path;
    var safeName = String(name || (file && file.name) || ('svg_' + frameIndex + '.svg'));
    try { path.identifier = makeValidIdentifier('svg_' + frameIndex, 'svg_' + frameIndex); } catch(e){}
    try { path.name = safeName.replace(/\.svg$/i, ''); } catch(e){}
    try { path.filename = safeName; } catch(e){}
    try { path.mimeType = 'image/svg+xml'; } catch(e){}
    try { path.type = 'image/svg+xml'; } catch(e){}
    try { path._ltbwCommittedSvg = true; } catch(e){}
    try { path._ltbwAssetName = safeName; } catch(e){}
    try { path.asset = asset; } catch(e){}
    try { if (asset) asset.mimeType = asset.mimeType || 'image/svg+xml'; } catch(e){}
    try { if (asset) asset.type = asset.type || 'image/svg+xml'; } catch(e){}
    return path;
  }

  function expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(fb){ // FIX v18.29
    var kind = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb);
    var fallback = kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape';
    var name = String((fb && fb.targetClipName) || fallback || '').trim();
    return name || fallback;
  }

  function expressionClipPlacementForFrameBone(fb, exportBounds){ // FIX v18.32
    var pose = getPoseForFrame(1);
    var fp = frameBonePointFromPose(fb, pose || getRestPose());
    var ox = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetX || 0) || 0;
    var oy = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetY || 0) || 0;
    var nativeOriginX = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0) || 0;
    var nativeOriginY = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0) || 0;
    var angle = ((fp && fp.angle) || 0) + frameBoneRotationRad(fb);
    return {
      x: round(((fp && fp.x) || 0) + ox - nativeOriginX), // FIX v18.32: same committed clip space as Frame Bone commit
      y: round(((fp && fp.y) || 0) + oy - nativeOriginY), // FIX v18.32
      scale: round(frameBoneScale(fb)),
      rotation: round(angle * 180 / Math.PI)
    };
  }

  function expressionClipPlacementForFrameBoneAtFrame(fb, frameNum, exportBounds){ // FIX v18.32
    var pose = getPoseForFrame(frameNum || 1);
    var fp = frameBonePointFromPose(fb, pose || getRestPose());
    var ox = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetX || 0) || 0;
    var oy = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetY || 0) || 0;
    var nativeOriginX = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0) || 0;
    var nativeOriginY = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0) || 0;
    var angle = ((fp && fp.angle) || 0) + frameBoneRotationRad(fb);
    return {
      x: round(((fp && fp.x) || 0) + ox - nativeOriginX), // FIX v18.32: same committed clip space as Frame Bone commit
      y: round(((fp && fp.y) || 0) + oy - nativeOriginY), // FIX v18.32
      scale: round(frameBoneScale(fb)),
      rotation: round(angle * 180 / Math.PI)
    };
  }

  function expressionPlacementTimelineForFrameBone(fb, exportBounds){ // FIX v18.29
    var out = [];
    var last = null;
    var total = Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1) || 1);
    for (var f = 1; f <= total; f += 1) {
      var place = expressionClipPlacementForFrameBoneAtFrame(fb, f, exportBounds || {});
      var packed = [f, place.x, place.y, place.scale, place.rotation];
      if (!last || last[1] !== packed[1] || last[2] !== packed[2] || last[3] !== packed[3] || last[4] !== packed[4]) {
        out.push(packed);
        last = packed;
      }
    }
    return out;
  }

  function expressionApplyPlacementLines(clipPath, placement){ // FIX v18.29
    return [
      '  (function(){',
      '    var _rbClip = ' + clipPath + ';',
      '    if (!_rbClip) return;',
      '    var _rbPose = _rbHoldPose(' + JSON.stringify(placement || []) + ');',
      '    try { _rbClip.x = _rbPose[0]; } catch(e){}',
      '    try { _rbClip.y = _rbPose[1]; } catch(e){}',
      '    try { if (_rbClip.transformation) { _rbClip.transformation.x = _rbPose[0]; _rbClip.transformation.y = _rbPose[1]; } } catch(e){}',
      '    try { _rbClip.scaleX = _rbPose[2]; _rbClip.scaleY = _rbPose[2]; } catch(e){}',
      '    try { if (_rbClip.transformation) { _rbClip.transformation.scaleX = _rbPose[2]; _rbClip.transformation.scaleY = _rbPose[2]; } } catch(e){}',
      '    try { _rbClip.rotation = _rbPose[3]; } catch(e){}',
      '    try { if (_rbClip.transformation) _rbClip.transformation.rotation = _rbPose[3]; } catch(e){}',
      '  })();'
    ];
  }

  async function buildExpressionFrameClipObject(kind, fb){ // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    kind = (kind === 'eye' || kind === 'wink') ? 'eye' : 'lip';
    var targetName = expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(fb);
    var frames = expressionFramesForKind(kind);
    if (!frames || !frames.length) throw new Error('No ' + (kind === 'eye' ? 'eye' : 'mouth') + ' frames available');

    var files = [];
    var names = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < frames.length; i += 1) {
      var slotData = fb && fb.frames ? fb.frames[i + 1] : null;
      var file = expressionFrameFile(kind, frames[i], i + 1, targetName, slotData);
      files.push(file);
      names.push(file.name);
    }

    await forceCommitFilesIntoAssets(files, names);
    var found = await waitForAssets(names, 15000);

    var clipIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(targetName, kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape');
    var clip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: clipIdentifier });
    try { clip.name = targetName; } catch(e0){}
    try { clip.width = kind === 'eye' ? 300 : 300; clip.height = kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300; } catch(e1){}
    try { clip.bounds = { x:0, y:0, width:clip.width || 300, height:clip.height || (kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300) }; } catch(eBounds){}

    var safeN = 20;
    try { while (clip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) clip.timeline.removeLayer(clip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(e2){}
    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
    try { layer.name = kind === 'eye' ? 'Eye frames' : 'Mouth frames'; } catch(e3){}
    clip.timeline.addLayer(layer);

    for (var fi = 1; fi <= frames.length; fi += 1) {
      var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:fi, end:fi });
      nameExpressionFrame(frame, frames[fi - 1], fi);
      try { if (typeof frame.addScript === 'function') frame.addScript('default', 'stop();'); else { if (!frame.scripts) frame.scripts = {}; frame.scripts['default'] = 'stop();'; } } catch(eStop){} // FIX v18.29
      layer.addFrame(frame);
      try {
        var asset = found[names[fi - 1]];
        var path = await createImagePathFromAssetAny(asset);
        var commitFile = files[fi - 1];
        if (isSvgCommitFile(commitFile, names[fi - 1])) markCommittedObjectAsSvg(path, asset, commitFile, names[fi - 1], fi);
        else { try { path.identifier = 'expression_img_' + fi; } catch(eImgId){} }
        try { // FIX v18.40: keep expression art centred and correct the oversized G mouth import
          var fit = expressionFrameFitForCommit(kind, frames[fi - 1] && frames[fi - 1].key, clip.width || 300, clip.height || (kind === 'eye' ? 170 : 300));
          path.width = fit.width;
          path.height = fit.height;
          path.x = fit.x;
          path.y = fit.y;
          if (path.transformation) { path.transformation.x = fit.x; path.transformation.y = fit.y; }
        } catch(e4){}
        try { path.bounds = { x:path.x || 0, y:path.y || 0, width:path.width || clip.width || 300, height:path.height || clip.height || 300 }; } catch(e5){}
        addToFrame(frame, path);
      } catch(addErr) {
        log('Nested ' + targetName + ' frame ' + fi + ' could not add image, but named frame was created: ' + (addErr && addErr.message ? addErr.message : addErr));
      }
    }
    try {
      var selfDriver = buildExpressionFrameBoneInternalUpdateScript(kind, fb); // FIX v18.32
      if (typeof clip.addScript === 'function') clip.addScript('default', selfDriver);
      else { if (!clip.scripts) clip.scripts = {}; clip.scripts['default'] = selfDriver; }
    } catch(eSelfDriver){} // FIX v18.32
    try { clip.animationType = 'single'; } catch(e6){}
    try { clip.timeline.playheadPosition = 1; } catch(e7){}
    return clip;
  }

  function moveLayerToTopOfTimeline(timeline, layer){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!timeline || !layer || !timeline.layers || !timeline.layers.length) return; // FIX v18.29
    try { // FIX v18.29
      var idx = timeline.layers.indexOf(layer); // FIX v18.29
      if (idx < 0) return; // FIX v18.29
      timeline.layers.splice(idx, 1); // FIX v18.29
      timeline.layers.unshift(layer); // FIX v18.29: In this Wick build the first layer row is visually above the later rows.
      try { if (typeof timeline.moveLayer === 'function') timeline.moveLayer(layer, 0); } catch(eMove){} // FIX v18.29
      try { if (typeof timeline.moveLayerTo === 'function') timeline.moveLayerTo(layer, 0); } catch(eMoveTo){} // FIX v18.29
    } catch(e){} // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function cloneExpressionClipInstance(sourceClip, fallbackName){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!sourceClip) return null; // FIX v18.29
    try { if (typeof sourceClip.clone === 'function') return sourceClip.clone(); } catch(eClone){} // FIX v18.29
    try { if (typeof sourceClip.copy === 'function') return sourceClip.copy(); } catch(eCopy){} // FIX v18.29
    try { if (typeof sourceClip.cloneObject === 'function') return sourceClip.cloneObject(); } catch(eCloneObject){} // FIX v18.29
    try { // FIX v18.29
      if (typeof sourceClip.serialize === 'function' && App.Wick && App.Wick.Clip && typeof App.Wick.Clip.fromData === 'function') { // FIX v18.29
        return App.Wick.Clip.fromData(sourceClip.serialize()); // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
    } catch(eFromData){} // FIX v18.29
    try { // FIX v18.29
      if (typeof sourceClip.toJSON === 'function' && App.Wick && App.Wick.Clip && typeof App.Wick.Clip.fromJSON === 'function') { // FIX v18.29
        return App.Wick.Clip.fromJSON(sourceClip.toJSON()); // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
    } catch(eFromJson){} // FIX v18.29
    try { // FIX v18.29 fallback creates a real Clip instance shell so every expression frame contains a Clip object instead of a blank frame.
      var id = makeValidIdentifier(fallbackName || sourceClip.identifier || sourceClip.name || 'ExpressionClip', 'ExpressionClip'); // FIX v18.29
      var c = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier:id }); // FIX v18.29
      try { c.name = sourceClip.name || fallbackName || id; } catch(eName){} // FIX v18.29
      try { c.width = sourceClip.width || 300; c.height = sourceClip.height || 220; } catch(eSize){} // FIX v18.29
      try { c.timeline = sourceClip.timeline; } catch(eTimeline){} // FIX v18.29
      return c; // FIX v18.29
    } catch(eShell){} // FIX v18.29
    return sourceClip; // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  function applyExpressionClipPlacementToInstance(clip, placement){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!clip || !placement) return; // FIX v18.29
    try { clip.x = placement.x; clip.y = placement.y; } catch(eXY){} // FIX v18.29
    try { clip.scaleX = placement.scale; clip.scaleY = placement.scale; } catch(eScale){} // FIX v18.29
    try { clip.rotation = placement.rotation; } catch(eRot){} // FIX v18.29
    try { // FIX v18.29
      if (clip.transformation) { // FIX v18.29
        clip.transformation.x = placement.x; // FIX v18.29
        clip.transformation.y = placement.y; // FIX v18.29
        clip.transformation.scaleX = placement.scale; // FIX v18.29
        clip.transformation.scaleY = placement.scale; // FIX v18.29
        clip.transformation.rotation = placement.rotation; // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
    } catch(eTx){} // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29


  async function addFrameBoneClipsInsideCommittedClip(parentClip, exportBounds){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!parentClip || !parentClip.timeline) return []; // FIX v18.29
    var frameBones = (App.frameBones || []).filter(function(fb){ return fb && !expressionFrameBoneKind(fb); }); // FIX v18.29
    if (!frameBones.length) return []; // FIX v18.29

    var assetFiles = []; // FIX v18.29
    var assetNames = []; // FIX v18.29
    var nameMap = {}; // FIX v18.29
    frameBones.forEach(function(fb){ // FIX v18.29
      var max = Math.max(1, Number(fb.frameCount || 1) || 1); // FIX v18.29
      for (var slot = 1; slot <= max; slot += 1) { // FIX v18.29
        var data = fb.frames && fb.frames[slot] ? fb.frames[slot] : null; // FIX v18.29
        if (!data || !data.dataUrl) continue; // FIX v18.29
        var ext = /image\/png/i.test(String(data.mimeType || data.type || data.dataUrl || '')) ? '.png' : '.svg'; // FIX v18.29
        var label = frameBoneSlotDisplayName(fb, slot); // FIX v18.29
        var nm = makeValidIdentifier((fb.name || 'FrameBone') + '_' + label + '_' + slot, 'FrameBone_' + fb.id + '_' + slot) + ext; // FIX v18.29
        var key = fb.id + '|' + slot; // FIX v18.29
        if (nameMap[key]) continue; // FIX v18.29
        nameMap[key] = nm; // FIX v18.29
        assetNames.push(nm); // FIX v18.29
        assetFiles.push(dataURLToFile(data.dataUrl, nm)); // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
    }); // FIX v18.29
    if (!assetFiles.length) { log('Frame bone commit skipped: no loaded frame bone images found.'); return []; } // FIX v18.29

    await forceCommitFilesIntoAssets(assetFiles, assetNames); // FIX v18.29
    var found = await waitForAssets(assetNames, 15000); // FIX v18.29

    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer(); // FIX v18.29
    try { layer.name = 'Frame bones'; } catch(eLayerName){} // FIX v18.29
    parentClip.timeline.addLayer(layer); // FIX v18.29
    moveLayerToTopOfTimeline(parentClip.timeline, layer); // FIX v18.29

    var totalFrames = Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1) || 1); // FIX v18.29
    var nativeOriginX = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0) || 0; // FIX v18.29
    var nativeOriginY = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0) || 0; // FIX v18.29
    var ox = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetX || 0) || 0; // FIX v18.29
    var oy = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetY || 0) || 0; // FIX v18.29
    var added = []; // FIX v18.29

    for (var frameNum = 1; frameNum <= totalFrames; frameNum += 1) { // FIX v18.29
      var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:frameNum, end:frameNum }); // FIX v18.29
      try { frame.identifier = 'frame_bones_' + frameNum; frame.name = 'Frame bones ' + frameNum; } catch(eFrameName){} // FIX v18.29
      layer.addFrame(frame); // FIX v18.29
      var pose = getPoseForFrame(frameNum); // FIX v18.29
      for (var i = 0; i < frameBones.length; i += 1) { // FIX v18.29
        var fb = frameBones[i]; // FIX v18.29
        var slot = frameBoneSlotForTimelineFrame(fb, frameNum); // FIX v18.29
        var data = fb.frames && fb.frames[slot] ? fb.frames[slot] : null; // FIX v18.29
        if (!data || !data.dataUrl) continue; // FIX v18.29
        var assetName = nameMap[fb.id + '|' + slot]; // FIX v18.29
        var asset = found[assetName]; // FIX v18.29
        if (!asset) { // FIX v18.29
          asset = makeSyntheticImageAssetForCommit(assetName, data.dataUrl, dataURLToFile(data.dataUrl, assetName)); // FIX v18.29
          try { if (App.project && typeof App.project.addAsset === 'function') App.project.addAsset(asset); else if (App.project && Array.isArray(App.project.assets)) App.project.assets.push(asset); } catch(eSyntheticAsset){} // FIX v18.29
        } // FIX v18.29
        try { // FIX v18.29
          var path = await createImagePathFromAssetAny(asset); // FIX v18.29
          var fp = frameBonePointFromPose(fb, pose); // FIX v18.29
          var sc = frameBoneScale(fb); // FIX v18.29
          var rawW = Math.max(1, Number(data.width || 80) || 80); // FIX v18.29
          var rawH = Math.max(1, Number(data.height || 80) || 80); // FIX v18.29
          var w = rawW * sc; // FIX v18.29
          var h = rawH * sc; // FIX v18.29
          var cx = (fp && fp.x ? fp.x : 0) + ox - nativeOriginX; // FIX v18.29
          var cy = (fp && fp.y ? fp.y : 0) + oy - nativeOriginY; // FIX v18.29
          var rot = (((fp && fp.angle) || 0) + frameBoneRotationRad(fb)) * 180 / Math.PI; // FIX v18.29
          try { path.x = round(cx - w * 0.5); path.y = round(cy - h * 0.5); } catch(eXY){} // FIX v18.29
          try { path.width = round(w); path.height = round(h); } catch(eSize){} // FIX v18.29
          try { path.rotation = round(rot); } catch(eRot){} // FIX v18.29
          try { if (path.transformation) { path.transformation.x = round(cx); path.transformation.y = round(cy); path.transformation.scaleX = sc; path.transformation.scaleY = sc; path.transformation.rotation = round(rot); } } catch(eTx){} // FIX v18.29
          try { path.name = (fb.name || 'Frame Bone') + ' ' + frameBoneSlotDisplayName(fb, slot); } catch(eName){} // FIX v18.29
          addToFrame(frame, path); // FIX v18.29
          added.push(path); // FIX v18.29
        } catch(eAdd) { // FIX v18.29
          log('Frame bone commit could not add ' + (fb.name || 'Frame Bone') + ' on frame ' + frameNum + ': ' + (eAdd && eAdd.message ? eAdd.message : eAdd)); // FIX v18.29
        } // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
    } // FIX v18.29
    log('Generated Frame bones layer with ' + totalFrames + ' committed frame' + (totalFrames === 1 ? '' : 's') + '.'); // FIX v18.29
    return added; // FIX v18.29
  } // FIX v18.29

  async function addExpressionFrameClipsInsideCommittedClip(parentClip, exportBounds){ // FIX v18.29
    if (!(el('chkCommitExpressionScript') && el('chkCommitExpressionScript').checked)) return []; // FIX v18.29
    if (!parentClip || !parentClip.timeline) return []; // FIX v18.29

    var used = {}; // FIX v18.29
    var expressionFrameBones = []; // FIX v18.29
    (App.frameBones || []).forEach(function(fb){ // FIX v18.29
      var kind = expressionFrameBoneKind(fb); // FIX v18.29
      if (!kind) return; // FIX v18.29
      var targetName = expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(fb); // FIX v18.29
      var key = kind + '|' + targetName; // FIX v18.29
      if (used[key]) return; // FIX v18.29
      used[key] = true; // FIX v18.29
      expressionFrameBones.push(fb); // FIX v18.29
    }); // FIX v18.29
    if (!expressionFrameBones.length) return []; // FIX v18.29

    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer(); // FIX v18.29
    try { layer.name = 'Expression clips'; } catch(eLayerName){} // FIX v18.29
    parentClip.timeline.addLayer(layer); // FIX v18.29
    moveLayerToTopOfTimeline(parentClip.timeline, layer); // FIX v18.29: Expression clips layer must sit above the shape frames.

    var totalFrames = Math.max(1, Number(App.frameCount || 1) || 1); // FIX v18.29
    var builtChildClips = []; // FIX v18.29
    for (var c = 0; c < expressionFrameBones.length; c += 1) { // FIX v18.29
      var baseFb = expressionFrameBones[c]; // FIX v18.29
      var baseKind = expressionFrameBoneKind(baseFb); // FIX v18.29
      try { // FIX v18.29
        builtChildClips.push({ fb:baseFb, kind:baseKind, clip:await buildExpressionFrameClipObject(baseKind, baseFb) }); // FIX v18.29
        log('Built nested ' + expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(baseFb) + ' source clip for expression frames.'); // FIX v18.29
      } catch(eBuild) { // FIX v18.29
        log('Could not build nested ' + (baseKind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape') + ': ' + (eBuild && eBuild.message ? eBuild.message : eBuild)); // FIX v18.29
      } // FIX v18.29
    } // FIX v18.29
    if (!builtChildClips.length) return []; // FIX v18.29

    var added = []; // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:1, end:totalFrames }); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush: one long expression frame, not one cloned MouthShape per timeline frame
    try { frame.identifier = 'expression_clips'; frame.name = 'Expression clips'; } catch(eFrameName){}
    layer.addFrame(frame);
    for (var i = 0; i < builtChildClips.length; i += 1) {
      var entry = builtChildClips[i];
      var inst = cloneExpressionClipInstance(entry.clip, expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(entry.fb));
      if (!inst) continue;
      var firstSlot = frameBoneSlotForTimelineFrame(entry.fb, 1);
      var firstKey = expressionKeyForFrameBoneSlot(entry.fb, firstSlot);
      applyExpressionClipInternalFrame(inst, entry.kind, firstKey);
      var place = expressionClipPlacementForFrameBoneAtFrame(entry.fb, 1, exportBounds || {});
      applyExpressionClipPlacementToInstance(inst, place);
      try { inst.name = expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(entry.fb); } catch(eInstName){}
      try { inst.identifier = makeValidIdentifier(expressionTargetNameForFrameBone(entry.fb), entry.kind === 'eye' ? 'EyeShape' : 'MouthShape'); } catch(eInstId){}
      try { addToFrame(frame, inst); added.push(inst); } catch(eAddFrame) { log('Expression clip could not be added to the long expression frame: ' + (eAddFrame && eAddFrame.message ? eAddFrame.message : eAddFrame)); }
    }
    log('Generated Expression clips layer with one long frame of ' + totalFrames + ' frame' + (totalFrames === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' and ' + added.length + ' nested expression clip' + (added.length === 1 ? '' : 's') + '.');
    return added; // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
  } // FIX v18.29

  async function buildExpressionFrameClipsForCommit(){ // FIX v18.29
    return;
  }

  async function stampAnimationIntoClip(){
    if (App.myCharacter && App.myCharacter.parts && App.myCharacter.parts.some(function(p){ return p && p.state; })) { // FIX v_035: Commit Build Character as assembled parts, not only the currently active JSON part.
      await mcCommitCharacterNativeClip(); // FIX v_035
      return; // FIX v_035
    }
    ensureFirstFrameKeysAlways(); // FIX v18.57_FirstFrameKeys
    if (!refreshBridgeRefs()) {
      log('Bridge/editor not available.');
      return;
    }
    if (!App.source.image) {
      log('No source image captured.');
      return;
    }
    if (!App.bones.length) {
      log('No bones created.');
      return;
    }
    syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline();
    ensureFrameCountCoversImportedAudio(); // FIX v18.52_RelaxBrush
    stop();
    await buildExpressionFrameClipsForCommit(); // FIX v18.29
    var clipName = (el('inpClipName').value || '').trim() || ('BoneWarpClip_' + Date.now());
    var base = clipName.replace(/\s+/g, '_');
    var exportMode = (el('selExportMode') && el('selExportMode').value) || 'nativeCurve'; // FIX v16.9: native Wick curves are the default commit mode.
    if (exportMode === 'png' && App.source.captureMode === 'stage-crop') { // FIX v5.5
      log('WARNING: PNG export is using a stage crop source, so transparency will not be correct until the original PNG asset is captured.');
    }
    var exportBounds = computeAnimationExportBounds(); // FIX v6.9
    log('Committing ' + App.frameCount + ' warped ' + (exportMode === 'nativeCurve' ? 'native Wick curve' : (exportMode === 'svgNative' ? 'SVG native' : (exportMode === 'svg' ? 'SVG mesh' : 'PNG'))) + ' frames from the real Wick timeline...'); // FIX v14.8
    if (!Object.keys(App.keyframes || {}).length) log('Commit note: no animation keys found. The clip will commit the current rest pose on every frame. Use the Animate tab to create keys.'); // FIX v16.7
    if (exportBounds.width > App.source.width || exportBounds.height > App.source.height || exportBounds.minX < 0 || exportBounds.minY < 0) { // FIX v6.9
      log('Auto expanded the export area to avoid clipping: ' + exportBounds.width + ' x ' + exportBounds.height + ' px.'); // FIX v6.9
    }
    if (exportMode === 'nativeCurve') { // FIX v14.8
      try {
        var nativeClip = buildNativeCurveClip(clipName, exportBounds);
        var syncWithParentNative = !!(el('chkSyncWithParent') && el('chkSyncWithParent').checked);
        try { nativeClip.animationType = 'loop'; } catch(e){} // FIX v16.7: Wick rejects syncWithParent for clips, so keep commit animation valid.
        try { nativeClip.timeline.playheadPosition = 1; } catch(e2){}
        await addFrameBoneClipsInsideCommittedClip(nativeClip, exportBounds); // FIX v18.29
        await addExpressionFrameClipsInsideCommittedClip(nativeClip, exportBounds); // FIX v18.29
        addClipToWickProject(nativeClip);
        try { log('Native curve clip created with ' + countNativeCurveClipPaths(nativeClip) + ' Wick path object' + (countNativeCurveClipPaths(nativeClip) === 1 ? '' : 's') + '. Origin: ' + (exportBounds.nativeOriginMode || 'first-bone-head') + '.'); } catch(countErr){} // FIX v16.7
        try {
          if (!App.committedClipIdentifiers) App.committedClipIdentifiers = [];
          App.committedClipIdentifiers.push(nativeClip.identifier || nativeClip.name || clipName);
        } catch(e3){}
        var placeAtSourceNative = el('chkPlaceAtSource').checked;
        var stampBoundsNative = getSetAreaStageBounds() || App.source.stageBounds || null;
        if (placeAtSourceNative && stampBoundsNative) {
          try {
            var srcWNative = Math.max(1, Number(App.source.width) || 1);
            var srcHNative = Math.max(1, Number(App.source.height) || 1);
            var scaleXNative = stampBoundsNative.w / srcWNative;
            var scaleYNative = stampBoundsNative.h / srcHNative;
            var nativeOriginSourceX = Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0) - Number(exportBounds.offsetX || 0); // FIX v15.0
            var nativeOriginSourceY = Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0) - Number(exportBounds.offsetY || 0); // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.x = stampBoundsNative.x + (nativeOriginSourceX * scaleXNative); // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.y = stampBoundsNative.y + (nativeOriginSourceY * scaleYNative); // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.scaleX = scaleXNative;
            nativeClip.transformation.scaleY = scaleYNative;
            nativeClip.transformation.rotation = 0;
          } catch(e4){}
        } else if (placeAtSourceNative && App.source.stageBounds) { // FIX v15.0
          try {
            var srcWNativeB = Math.max(1, Number(App.source.width) || 1); // FIX v15.0
            var srcHNativeB = Math.max(1, Number(App.source.height) || 1); // FIX v15.0
            var nativeOriginSourceXB = Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0) - Number(exportBounds.offsetX || 0); // FIX v15.0
            var nativeOriginSourceYB = Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0) - Number(exportBounds.offsetY || 0); // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.x = App.source.stageBounds.x + (nativeOriginSourceXB / srcWNativeB) * App.source.stageBounds.w; // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.y = App.source.stageBounds.y + (nativeOriginSourceYB / srcHNativeB) * App.source.stageBounds.h; // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.scaleX = App.source.stageBounds.w / srcWNativeB; // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.scaleY = App.source.stageBounds.h / srcHNativeB; // FIX v15.0
            nativeClip.transformation.rotation = App.source.stageRotation || 0;
          } catch(e5){}
        } else if (placeAtSourceNative && App.source.stageCenter) {
          try {
            nativeClip.transformation.x = App.source.stageCenter.x;
            nativeClip.transformation.y = App.source.stageCenter.y;
            nativeClip.transformation.scaleX = 1;
            nativeClip.transformation.scaleY = 1;
            nativeClip.transformation.rotation = App.source.stageRotation || 0;
          } catch(e5b){}
        }
        try { if (el('chkCommitExpressionScript') && el('chkCommitExpressionScript').checked) { if (typeof nativeClip.addScript === 'function') nativeClip.addScript('default', buildExpressionDriverScript('this', exportBounds)); else { if (!nativeClip.scripts) nativeClip.scripts = {}; nativeClip.scripts['default'] = buildExpressionDriverScript('this', exportBounds); } } } catch(eExprNative){} // FIX v18.29
        try { removeOverlay(); } catch(e6){}
        try { removeSetAreaOverlay(); } catch(e7){}
        markDirty();
        log('Clip committed to Wick with native editable curves on each frame: ' + clipName);
      } catch(nativeErr) {
        log('Native curve commit failed: ' + (nativeErr && nativeErr.message ? nativeErr.message : nativeErr));
      }
      return;
    }

    var files = [];
    var names = [];
    for (var i = 1; i <= App.frameCount; i++) {
      if (exportMode === 'svgNative') { // FIX v7.1
        if (!App.source.svgNative || !App.source.svgNative.shapes || !App.source.svgNative.shapes.length) {
          log('SVG Native Mode has no parsed SVG shapes. Falling back to SVG mesh warp.');
          exportMode = 'svg';
        } else {
          var nativeName = base + '_' + String(i).padStart(3, '0') + '.svg';
          files.push(nativeSvgFileFromFrame(i, nativeName, exportBounds));
          names.push(nativeName);
          continue;
        }
      }
      if (exportMode === 'svg') { // FIX v5.4
        var svgName = base + '_' + String(i).padStart(3, '0') + '.svg';
        files.push(svgFileFromFrame(i, svgName, exportBounds)); // FIX v6.9
        names.push(svgName);
      } else {
        var canvas = canvasFromFrame(i, exportBounds); // FIX v6.9
        var pngName = base + '_' + String(i).padStart(3, '0') + '.png';
        files.push(dataURLToFile(canvas.toDataURL('image/png'), pngName));
        names.push(pngName);
      }
    }

    try {
      await forceCommitFilesIntoAssets(files, names); // FIX v14.1: SVG frames must become project assets, not temporary data only
      var found = await waitForAssets(names, 15000);
      log('Assets imported into Wick. Building unclipped clip...');

      var clipIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(clipName, 'BoneWarpClip'); // FIX v12.7
      var clip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: clipIdentifier }); // FIX v12.7
      try { clip.name = clipName; } catch(e){} // FIX v12.7
      clip.name = clipName;
      try { clip.width = Math.max(1, Number(exportBounds.width || App.source.width || 1)); } catch(e){} // FIX v14.1
      try { clip.height = Math.max(1, Number(exportBounds.height || App.source.height || 1)); } catch(e){} // FIX v14.1
      try { clip.bounds = { x:0, y:0, width:clip.width, height:clip.height }; } catch(e){} // FIX v14.1

      var safeN = 10;
      while (clip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) {
        try { clip.timeline.removeLayer(clip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(e){ break; }
      }
      var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
      layer.name = 'content';
      clip.timeline.addLayer(layer);

      for (var fi = 1; fi <= App.frameCount; fi++) {
        var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start: fi, end: fi });
        frame.identifier = 'frame_' + fi;
        layer.addFrame(frame);
        var asset = found[names[fi - 1]];
        var commitFile = files[fi - 1]; // FIX v14.2
        var path = await createImagePathFromAssetAny(asset);
        if (isSvgCommitFile(commitFile, names[fi - 1])) markCommittedObjectAsSvg(path, asset, commitFile, names[fi - 1], fi); // FIX v14.2
        else { try { path.identifier = 'img_' + fi; } catch(e){} }
        try { path.x = 0; path.y = 0; } catch(e){}
        try { path.width = Math.max(1, Number(exportBounds.width || App.source.width || 1)); } catch(e){} // FIX v14.1
        try { path.height = Math.max(1, Number(exportBounds.height || App.source.height || 1)); } catch(e){} // FIX v14.1
        try { path.bounds = { x:0, y:0, width:path.width || exportBounds.width, height:path.height || exportBounds.height }; } catch(e){} // FIX v14.1
        addToFrame(frame, path);
      }

      var syncWithParent = !!(el('chkSyncWithParent') && el('chkSyncWithParent').checked); // FIX v6.1
      try { clip.animationType = 'loop'; } catch(e){} // FIX v16.7: Wick rejects syncWithParent for clips, so keep commit animation valid.
      try { clip.timeline.playheadPosition = 1; } catch(e){} // FIX v6.1

      await addFrameBoneClipsInsideCommittedClip(clip, exportBounds); // FIX v18.29
      await addExpressionFrameClipsInsideCommittedClip(clip, exportBounds); // FIX v18.29
      addClipToWickProject(clip); // FIX v13.8: create a real Wick clip on the active Wick timeline/frame
      try { if (el('chkCommitExpressionScript') && el('chkCommitExpressionScript').checked) { if (typeof clip.addScript === 'function') clip.addScript('default', buildExpressionDriverScript('this', exportBounds)); else { if (!clip.scripts) clip.scripts = {}; clip.scripts['default'] = buildExpressionDriverScript('this', exportBounds); } } } catch(eExpr){} // FIX v18.29
      try { // FIX v14.0: remember committed Wick clips as project content. Close cleanup must never remove these.
        if (!App.committedClipIdentifiers) App.committedClipIdentifiers = [];
        App.committedClipIdentifiers.push(clip.identifier || clip.name || clipName);
      } catch(e){}

      var placeAtSource = el('chkPlaceAtSource').checked;
      var stampBounds = getSetAreaStageBounds() || App.source.stageBounds || null; // FIX v6.8
      if (placeAtSource && stampBounds) { // FIX v6.8
        try {
          var srcW = Math.max(1, Number(App.source.width) || 1); // FIX v6.8
          var srcH = Math.max(1, Number(App.source.height) || 1); // FIX v6.8
          var scaleX = stampBounds.w / srcW; // FIX v6.9
          var scaleY = stampBounds.h / srcH; // FIX v6.9
          var localShiftX = ((Number(exportBounds.offsetX || 0) + srcW * 0.5) - (Number(exportBounds.width || srcW) * 0.5)); // FIX v6.9
          var localShiftY = ((Number(exportBounds.offsetY || 0) + srcH * 0.5) - (Number(exportBounds.height || srcH) * 0.5)); // FIX v6.9
          clip.transformation.x = stampBounds.cx - (localShiftX * scaleX); // FIX v6.9
          clip.transformation.y = stampBounds.cy - (localShiftY * scaleY); // FIX v6.9
          clip.transformation.scaleX = scaleX; // FIX v6.9
          clip.transformation.scaleY = scaleY; // FIX v6.9
          clip.transformation.rotation = 0; // FIX v6.8: Set Area stamping should match the dragged area rectangle exactly.
        } catch(e){}
      } else if (placeAtSource && App.source.stageCenter) {
        try {
          clip.transformation.x = App.source.stageCenter.x;
          clip.transformation.y = App.source.stageCenter.y;
          clip.transformation.scaleX = 1;
          clip.transformation.scaleY = 1;
          clip.transformation.rotation = App.source.stageRotation || 0;
        } catch(e){}
      }

      try { removeOverlay(); } catch(e){} // FIX v6.8: once the bone stamp is created the Set Area overlay should vanish.
      try { removeSetAreaOverlay(); } catch(e){} // FIX v6.8
      markDirty();
      log('Clip committed to Wick with expanded bounds and SVG asset references, not PNG conversion: ' + clipName);
    } catch(err) {
      log('Commit failed: ' + (err && err.message ? err.message : err));
    }
  }

    if (el('btnPinLipFrameBone')) el('btnPinLipFrameBone').addEventListener('click', function(){ beginPinExpressionFrameBone('lip'); }); // FIX v18.6
    if (el('btnAttachWinkFrameBone')) el('btnAttachWinkFrameBone').addEventListener('click', function(){ attachExpressionFrameBone('eye'); }); // FIX v18.6
    if (el('btnPinWinkFrameBone')) el('btnPinWinkFrameBone').addEventListener('click', function(){ beginPinExpressionFrameBone('eye'); }); // FIX v18.6
    if (el('btnClearLipExpressionKey')) el('btnClearLipExpressionKey').addEventListener('click', function(){ var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind('lip'); if (fb && App.frameBoneKeys && App.frameBoneKeys[String(App.currentFrame)]) { delete App.frameBoneKeys[String(App.currentFrame)][fb.id]; updateFrameBoneUI(); renderExpressionUI(); renderOverlay(); } else clearExpressionKey('lip'); }); // FIX v18.6
    if (el('btnClearEyeExpressionKey')) el('btnClearEyeExpressionKey').addEventListener('click', function(){ var fb = getExpressionFrameBoneForKind('eye'); if (fb && App.frameBoneKeys && App.frameBoneKeys[String(App.currentFrame)]) { delete App.frameBoneKeys[String(App.currentFrame)][fb.id]; updateFrameBoneUI(); renderExpressionUI(); renderOverlay(); } else clearExpressionKey('eye'); }); // FIX v18.6
    if (el('btnLoadLipExpressionImages')) el('btnLoadLipExpressionImages').addEventListener('click', function(){ promptExpressionFrameImages('lip'); }); // FIX v18.34
    if (el('btnLoadWinkExpressionImages')) el('btnLoadWinkExpressionImages').addEventListener('click', function(){ promptExpressionFrameImages('eye'); }); // FIX v18.34

    if (el('fileWinkExpressionImages')) el('fileWinkExpressionImages').addEventListener('change', function(){ onExpressionFrameImagesChosen('eye', this.files); }); // FIX v18.34
