    if (el('btnSaveLipExpressionJson')) el('btnSaveLipExpressionJson').addEventListener('click', function(){ saveExpressionServiceJson('lip'); }); // FIX v18.4
    if (el('btnLoadWinkExpressionJson')) el('btnLoadWinkExpressionJson').addEventListener('click', function(){ promptLoadExpressionServiceJson('eye'); }); // FIX v18.4
    if (el('btnSaveWinkExpressionJson')) el('btnSaveWinkExpressionJson').addEventListener('click', function(){ saveExpressionServiceJson('eye'); }); // FIX v18.4
    if (el('fileLipExpressionJson')) el('fileLipExpressionJson').addEventListener('change', function(){ onExpressionServiceJsonFileChosen('lip', this.files && this.files[0]); }); // FIX v18.4
    if (el('fileWinkExpressionJson')) el('fileWinkExpressionJson').addEventListener('change', function(){ onExpressionServiceJsonFileChosen('eye', this.files && this.files[0]); }); // FIX v18.4
    el('btnStampClip').addEventListener('click', stampAnimationIntoClip);
  }

  function purgeStaleOwnedOverlays(){
    try {
      var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
      if (!pdoc) return;
      var stale = Array.prototype.slice.call(pdoc.querySelectorAll('[data-luketools-bonewarp-overlay]'));
      stale.forEach(function(node){
        var owner = node.getAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-overlay');
        if (owner && owner !== App.interaction.overlayOwnerId) {
          try { if (node.parentNode) node.parentNode.removeChild(node); } catch(e){}
        }
      });
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function startCloseObserver(){
    try {
      var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
      if (!pdoc || !window.MutationObserver || !window.frameElement) return;
      if (App.interaction.closeObserver) App.interaction.closeObserver.disconnect();
      App.interaction.closeObserver = new MutationObserver(function(){
        try {
          var frame = window.frameElement;
          if (!frame || !frame.isConnected) cleanupToolOverlays();
        } catch(e){ cleanupToolOverlays(); }
      });
      App.interaction.closeObserver.observe(pdoc.body || pdoc.documentElement, { childList:true, subtree:true });
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function startCloseWatcher(){ // FIX v8.4
    try { if (App.closeWatchTimer) clearInterval(App.closeWatchTimer); } catch(e){}
    App.closeWatchTimer = setInterval(function(){
      try {
        var frame = window.frameElement;
        if (!frame) return;
        // FIX v8.4: only destroy when the panel iframe is actually removed. Do not destroy just because the panel is hidden or resized.
        if (!frame.isConnected) cleanupToolOverlays();
      } catch(e){}
    }, 500);
  }

  function forceToolPanelFill(){ // FIX v7.6
    try {
      var frame = window.frameElement;
      if (!frame) return;
      frame.style.width = '100%';
      frame.style.height = '100%';
      frame.style.minHeight = '0';
      frame.style.flex = '1 1 auto';
      frame.style.display = 'block';
      frame.style.alignSelf = 'stretch';
      var parent = frame.parentElement;
      if (parent) {
        var cs = window.parent && window.parent.getComputedStyle ? window.parent.getComputedStyle(parent) : null;
        if (cs && cs.display !== 'flex') parent.style.display = 'flex';
        parent.style.flexDirection = 'column';
        parent.style.minHeight = '0';
        parent.style.height = parent.style.height || '100%';
      }
      var grand = parent && parent.parentElement ? parent.parentElement : null;
      if (grand) {
        grand.style.minHeight = '0';
      }
    } catch(e){}
  }


  /* MyCharacter v_020: Add Part creates real stacked cards. Each card owns its own RotoBones state, modes, transform and key actions. */
  function mcEnsure(){
    if (!App.myCharacter) {
      App.myCharacter = { parts: [], selectedId: null, nextId: 1, loading: false, pinPickSourceId: null, pendingLoadPartId: null };
    }
    if (!Array.isArray(App.myCharacter.parts)) App.myCharacter.parts = [];
    if (!App.myCharacter.nextId) App.myCharacter.nextId = 1;
    App.myCharacter.parts.forEach(function(p){ mcNormalizePartMode(p); });
    return App.myCharacter;
  }

  function mcNormalizePartMode(p){
    if (!p) return p;
    if (p.mode !== 'animate') p.mode = 'assemble';
    if (p.editTarget !== 'node') p.editTarget = 'bone';
    if (!p.transform) p.transform = { x:50, y:50, w:300, h:200, rotation:0 };
    if (p.visible !== false) p.visible = true;
    return p;
  }

  function mcPartTabForMode(p){
    p = mcNormalizePartMode(p || {});
    if (p.mode === 'animate' && p.editTarget === 'node') return 'animatepoints';
    if (p.mode === 'animate') return 'animate';
    return 'character';
  }

  function mcLog(msg){
    try { var n = el('mcStatus'); if (n) n.textContent = String(msg || ''); } catch(e){}
    try { log(String(msg || '')); } catch(e2){}
  }

  function mcSafeClone(obj){
    try { return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj)); } catch(e) { return obj; }
  }

  function mcNewPartUid(id){ // FIX v_024
    return 'mc_part_' + String(id || '0') + '_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000);
  }

  function mcMakeIndependentRigState(state, part){ // FIX v_024
    var out = mcSafeClone(state || {});
    if (!out || typeof out !== 'object') out = {};
    var uid = part && part.uid ? part.uid : mcNewPartUid(part && part.id);
    if (part) part.uid = uid;
    out.myCharacterPartUid = uid;
    out.myCharacterPartId = part ? Number(part.id || 0) : 0;
    if (out.source) {
      out.source = mcSafeClone(out.source);
      out.source.selectedIdentifier = String(out.source.selectedIdentifier || '') + '__' + uid;
      out.source.selectedUUID = String(out.source.selectedUUID || '') + '__' + uid;
    }
    out.bones = mcSafeClone(out.bones || []);
    out.frameBones = mcSafeClone(out.frameBones || []);
    out.keyframes = mcSafeClone(out.keyframes || {});
    out.pointKeys = mcSafeClone(out.pointKeys || {});
    out.frameBoneKeys = mcSafeClone(out.frameBoneKeys || {});
    out.expressionKeys = mcSafeClone(out.expressionKeys || {});
    out.expressionProfiles = mcSafeClone(out.expressionProfiles || {});
    return out;
  }

  function mcPinCursorDoc(){ // FIX v_022
    try { return window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : document; } catch(e) { return document; }
  }

  function mcSetPinCursor(active){ // FIX v_022
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mc.pinCursorActive = !!active;
    var docs = [];
    try { docs.push(document); } catch(e0){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.document && window.parent.document !== document) docs.push(window.parent.document); } catch(e1){}
    docs.forEach(function(doc){
      if (!doc || !doc.documentElement) return;
      try { doc.documentElement.classList.toggle('mcPinPickingActive', !!active); } catch(e2){}
      var node = doc.getElementById ? doc.getElementById('mcPinCursorIcon') : null;
      if (active) {
        if (!node) {
          node = doc.createElement('div');
          node.id = 'mcPinCursorIcon';
          node.innerHTML = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="28" height="28" fill="#ff5266" stroke="#ff5266"><polygon points="2.77 20.53 8.78 13.81 10.19 15.22 3.47 21.23 2.77 20.53"/><path d="M13.73,18.76,5.24,10.27A5.94,5.94,0,0,1,9.48,8.52,5.42,5.42,0,0,1,11,8.73L14.5,5.26a1.49,1.49,0,0,1,2-2,1.32,1.32,0,0,1,.42.29l3.53,3.53a1.32,1.32,0,0,1,.29.42,1.49,1.49,0,0,1-2,2L15.27,13a5.42,5.42,0,0,1,.21,1.55A5.94,5.94,0,0,1,13.73,18.76Z"/></svg>';
          node.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:28px;height:28px;line-height:28px;text-align:center;transform:translate(-100px,-100px);pointer-events:none;z-index:2147483647;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,0.75));'; // FIX v_055
          (doc.body || doc.documentElement).appendChild(node);
        }
        node.style.display = 'block';
      } else if (node) {
        node.style.display = 'none';
      }
    });
    try { if (App.overlay && App.overlay.canvas) App.overlay.canvas.style.cursor = active ? 'copy' : ''; } catch(e3){}
    try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(e4){} // FIX v_036: show or remove the parent stage pin picking layer immediately.
  }

  function mcInstallPinCursorFollower(){ // FIX v_022
    if (document.__mcPinCursorFollowerInstalled) return;
    document.__mcPinCursorFollowerInstalled = true;
    function follow(ev){
      var mc = mcEnsure();
      if (!mc.pinCursorActive) return;
      var doc = ev && ev.view && ev.view.document ? ev.view.document : (ev && ev.target && ev.target.ownerDocument ? ev.target.ownerDocument : document);
      var node = doc && doc.getElementById ? doc.getElementById('mcPinCursorIcon') : null;
      if (node) node.style.transform = 'translate(' + (Number(ev.clientX || 0) + 8) + 'px,' + (Number(ev.clientY || 0) + 8) + 'px)';
    }
    try { document.addEventListener('mousemove', follow, true); } catch(e0){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.document && window.parent.document !== document) window.parent.document.addEventListener('mousemove', follow, true); } catch(e1){}
  }


  function mcEventClientInParent(evt){ // FIX v_036: pin picking must use the parent Wick stage coordinate space, not the LukeTool iframe panel coordinate space.
    var x = Number(evt && evt.clientX || 0);
    var y = Number(evt && evt.clientY || 0);
    try {
      var edoc = evt && evt.target && evt.target.ownerDocument ? evt.target.ownerDocument : null;
      if (edoc && edoc === document && window.frameElement && window.frameElement.getBoundingClientRect) {
        var fr = window.frameElement.getBoundingClientRect();
        x += Number(fr.left || 0);
        y += Number(fr.top || 0);
      }
    } catch(e){}
    return { x:x, y:y };
  }

  function mcStagePointerIsInsideWickStage(evt){ // FIX v_036
    if (!evt) return false;
    try {
      var r = getWickStageClipRect();
      var pt = mcEventClientInParent(evt);
      var x = Number(pt.x || 0);
      var y = Number(pt.y || 0);
      return x >= Number(r.left || 0) && x <= Number(r.left || 0) + Number(r.width || 0) && y >= Number(r.top || 0) && y <= Number(r.top || 0) + Number(r.height || 0);
    } catch(e) { return true; }
  }

  function mcParentStagePinMouseDown(evt){ // FIX v_036
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!mc || !mc.pinPickSourceId) return;
    if (!mcStagePointerIsInsideWickStage(evt)) return;
    try { ensureOverlay(); } catch(e0){}
    try { syncFrameFromWick(); } catch(e1){}
    var handled = false;
    try { handled = mcHandleStagePinBoneClick(null, evt); } catch(e2) { mcLog('Pin failed: ' + (e2 && e2.message ? e2.message : e2)); handled = true; }
    if (handled) {
      try { evt.preventDefault(); evt.stopPropagation(); if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); } catch(e3){}
    }
  }

  function mcInstallParentStagePinPicker(){ // FIX v_034
    if (document.__mcParentStagePinPickerInstalled) return;
    document.__mcParentStagePinPickerInstalled = true;
    try {
      var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : null;
      if (pdoc && pdoc !== document) { pdoc.addEventListener('mousedown', mcParentStagePinMouseDown, true); pdoc.addEventListener('pointerdown', mcParentStagePinMouseDown, true); pdoc.addEventListener('click', mcParentStagePinMouseDown, true); }
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function mcBoneByIdInState(state, boneId){ // FIX v_022
    boneId = Number(boneId || 0);
    var bones = state && Array.isArray(state.bones) ? state.bones : [];
    for (var i = 0; i < bones.length; i += 1) if (Number(bones[i].id) === boneId) return bones[i];
    return null;
  }

  function mcRootBoneInState(state){ // FIX v_022
    var bones = state && Array.isArray(state.bones) ? state.bones : [];
    if (!bones.length) return null;
    for (var i = 0; i < bones.length; i += 1) if (!bones[i].parentId) return bones[i];
    return bones[0];
  }

  function mcBonePoseFromState(state, boneId, frame){ // FIX v_022
    var b = mcBoneByIdInState(state, boneId);
    if (!b) return null;
    frame = String(Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || App.currentFrame || 1))));
    var k = state && state.keyframes && state.keyframes[frame] && state.keyframes[frame][boneId] ? state.keyframes[frame][boneId] : null;
    if (!k) k = state && state.keyframes && state.keyframes[frame] && state.keyframes[frame][String(boneId)] ? state.keyframes[frame][String(boneId)] : null;
    return {
      head: mcSafeClone(k && k.head ? k.head : b.head),
      tail: mcSafeClone(k && k.tail ? k.tail : b.tail)
    };
  }

  function mcLocalPointToPartStage(part, pt){ // FIX v_033
    if (!part || !part.transform || !pt) return null;
    var t = part.transform || {x:0,y:0,w:1,h:1,rotation:0};
    var src = part.state && part.state.source ? part.state.source : {};
    var sw = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || t.w || 1));
    var sh = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || t.h || 1));
    var sx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.w || sw) / sw);
    var sy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.h || sh) / sh);
    var x = Number(t.x || 0) + Number(pt.x || 0) * sx;
    var y = Number(t.y || 0) + Number(pt.y || 0) * sy;
    var rot = (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) * Math.PI / 180;
    if (rot) {
      var cx = Number(t.x || 0) + Number(t.w || sw) * 0.5;
      var cy = Number(t.y || 0) + Number(t.h || sh) * 0.5;
      var dx = x - cx;
      var dy = y - cy;
      var c = Math.cos(rot);
      var sn = Math.sin(rot);
      x = cx + dx * c - dy * sn;
      y = cy + dx * sn + dy * c;
    }
    return { x:x, y:y };
  }

  function mcPartStagePointForBone(part, boneId, frame, pointName){ // FIX v_033
    if (!part || !part.state || !part.transform) return null;
    var pose = mcBonePoseFromState(part.state, boneId, frame);
    if (!pose) return null;
    var pt = (pointName === 'tail') ? pose.tail : pose.head;
    return mcLocalPointToPartStage(part, pt);
  }

  function mcDistPointToSegment(pt, a, b){ // FIX v_033
    if (!pt || !a || !b) return Infinity;
    var vx = Number(b.x || 0) - Number(a.x || 0);
    var vy = Number(b.y || 0) - Number(a.y || 0);
    var wx = Number(pt.x || 0) - Number(a.x || 0);
    var wy = Number(pt.y || 0) - Number(a.y || 0);
    var len2 = vx * vx + vy * vy;
    var t = len2 > 0 ? (wx * vx + wy * vy) / len2 : 0;
    t = clamp(t, 0, 1);
    var px = Number(a.x || 0) + vx * t;
    var py = Number(a.y || 0) + vy * t;
    var dx = Number(pt.x || 0) - px;
    var dy = Number(pt.y || 0) - py;
    return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  }

  function mcHitTestAllPartBones(stagePt, sourcePartId){ // FIX v_033
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var frame = App.currentFrame || 1;
    var best = null;
    var bestDist = Infinity;
    mc.parts.forEach(function(part){
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) return;
      if (Number(part.id) === Number(sourcePartId || 0)) return;
      var bones = Array.isArray(part.state.bones) ? part.state.bones : [];
      bones.forEach(function(bone){
        if (!bone) return;
        var h = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'head');
        var t = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'tail');
        if (!h || !t) return;
        var dHead = dist(stagePt, h);
        var dTail = dist(stagePt, t);
        var dBody = mcDistPointToSegment(stagePt, h, t);
        var d = Math.min(dHead, dTail, dBody);
        if (d < bestDist) {
          bestDist = d;
          best = { part:part, bone:bone, distance:d, hitType:dHead <= dTail && dHead <= dBody ? 'head' : (dTail <= dBody ? 'tail' : 'body') };
        }
      });
    });
    return best && bestDist <= 60 ? best : null; // FIX v_038: easier stage pin hit target
  }


  function mcHitTestAllPartBonesByClient(parentClient, sourcePartId){ // FIX v_038: pin picking uses the actual displayed screen positions, not inferred stage coordinates.
    if (!parentClient) return null;
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var frame = App.currentFrame || 1;
    var best = null;
    var bestDist = Infinity;
    var clickPt = { x:Number(parentClient.x || 0), y:Number(parentClient.y || 0) };
    mc.parts.forEach(function(part){
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) return;
      if (Number(part.id) === Number(sourcePartId || 0)) return;
      var bones = Array.isArray(part.state.bones) ? part.state.bones : [];
      bones.forEach(function(bone){
        if (!bone) return;
        var hs = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'head');
        var ts = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'tail');
        if (!hs || !ts) return;
        var hv = stageToVp(Number(hs.x || 0), Number(hs.y || 0), getFittedStageRect());
        var tv = stageToVp(Number(ts.x || 0), Number(ts.y || 0), getFittedStageRect());
        if (!hv || !tv) return;
        var dHead = dist(clickPt, hv);
        var dTail = dist(clickPt, tv);
        var dBody = mcDistPointToSegment(clickPt, hv, tv);
        var d = Math.min(dHead, dTail, dBody);
        if (d < bestDist) {
          bestDist = d;
          best = { part:part, bone:bone, distance:d, hitType:dHead <= dTail && dHead <= dBody ? 'head' : (dTail <= dBody ? 'tail' : 'body') };
        }
      });
    });
    return best && bestDist <= 28 ? best : null;
  }

  function mcUpdatePinnedChildFromParentBone(child){ // FIX v_049
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var ok = mcUpdatePinnedChildFromParentBoneForFrame(child, mc.parts || [], App.currentFrame || 1);
    if (ok && child && child.id === mc.selectedId && child.state) mcApplyTransformToApp(child.transform);
    return ok;
  }

  function mcRefreshPinnedChildren(){ // FIX v_022
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var changed = false;
    mc.parts.forEach(function(part){ if (part && part.parentPin && part.parentPin.boneId) changed = mcUpdatePinnedChildFromParentBone(part) || changed; });
    return changed;
  }


  function mcEnsureStagePartsHost(){ // FIX v_032: non-selected MyCharacter parts are separate visible stage items, not the same selected overlay.
    try { ensureOverlay(); } catch(e0){}
    var pdoc = window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : document;
    if (!App.overlay || !App.overlay.clipHost) return null;
    var host = pdoc.getElementById('mcStagePartsHost');
    if (!host) {
      host = pdoc.createElement('div');
      host.id = 'mcStagePartsHost';
      host.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-overlay', App.interaction.overlayOwnerId || 'mc');
      host.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-kind', 'mc-stage-parts');
      host.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:visible;background:transparent;';
      App.overlay.clipHost.insertBefore(host, App.overlay.clipHost.firstChild);
    }
    return host;
  }

  function mcSourceMarkupForStagePart(part){ // FIX v_032
    if (!part || !part.state || !part.state.source) return '';
    var src = part.state.source || {};
    var w = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || 300));
    var h = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || 200));
    var dataUrl = src.dataUrl || src.embeddedDataUrl || '';
    if (dataUrl) {
      return '<img src="' + htmlEscape(dataUrl) + '" style="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;display:block;object-fit:fill;pointer-events:none;" draggable="false">';
    }
    var body = '';
    try {
      var native = src.svgNative;
      if (native && native.shapes && native.shapes.length) {
        native.shapes.forEach(function(shape){
          var d = '';
          if (shape.cmdSubpaths && shape.cmdSubpaths.length) {
            shape.cmdSubpaths.forEach(function(sp){
              d += pathCommandsToD(sp.commands || []) + ' ';
            });
          } else if (shape.subpaths && shape.subpaths.length) {
            shape.subpaths.forEach(function(sp){ d += pointsToSubpath(sp.points || [], !!sp.closed) + ' '; });
          }
          if (String(d || '').trim()) body += '<path d="' + escapeXmlAttr(String(d).trim()) + '"' + styleMapToAttrs(shape.style || {}) + ' />';
        });
      }
    } catch(e){}
    if (body) return '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h + '" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;pointer-events:none;">' + body + '</svg>';
    return '';
  }

  function mcPinBoneMarkup(hostRect){ // FIX v_033
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!mc.pinPickSourceId) return '';
    var frame = App.currentFrame || 1;
    var svg = '';
    mc.parts.forEach(function(part){
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) return;
      if (Number(part.id) === Number(mc.pinPickSourceId || 0)) return;
      var bones = Array.isArray(part.state.bones) ? part.state.bones : [];
      bones.forEach(function(bone){
        var h = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'head');
        var t = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'tail');
        if (!h || !t) return;
        var hv = stageBoundsToViewportRect({x:h.x, y:h.y, w:1, h:1});
        var tv = stageBoundsToViewportRect({x:t.x, y:t.y, w:1, h:1});
        if (!hv || !tv) return;
        var x1 = Number(hv.x || 0) - Number(hostRect.left || 0);
        var y1 = Number(hv.y || 0) - Number(hostRect.top || 0);
        var x2 = Number(tv.x || 0) - Number(hostRect.left || 0);
        var y2 = Number(tv.y || 0) - Number(hostRect.top || 0);
        var labelX = (x1 + x2) * 0.5 + 6;
        var labelY = (y1 + y2) * 0.5 - 6;
        var label = (part.name || ('Part ' + part.id)) + ' / ' + (bone.name || ('Bone ' + bone.id));
        svg += '<line data-mc-pin-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" data-mc-pin-bone-id="' + Number(bone.id) + '" x1="' + x1 + '" y1="' + y1 + '" x2="' + x2 + '" y2="' + y2 + '" stroke="#ffd84a" stroke-width="16" stroke-opacity="0.01" pointer-events="stroke" />'; // FIX v_038 larger direct hit line
        svg += '<line data-mc-pin-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" data-mc-pin-bone-id="' + Number(bone.id) + '" x1="' + x1 + '" y1="' + y1 + '" x2="' + x2 + '" y2="' + y2 + '" stroke="#ffd84a" stroke-width="3" pointer-events="none" />';
        svg += '<circle data-mc-pin-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" data-mc-pin-bone-id="' + Number(bone.id) + '" cx="' + x1 + '" cy="' + y1 + '" r="18" fill="#1ee29a" fill-opacity="0.01" stroke="none" pointer-events="all" />'; // FIX v_038 larger direct hit head
        svg += '<circle data-mc-pin-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" data-mc-pin-bone-id="' + Number(bone.id) + '" cx="' + x1 + '" cy="' + y1 + '" r="6" fill="#1ee29a" stroke="#063" stroke-width="2" pointer-events="none" />';
        svg += '<circle data-mc-pin-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" data-mc-pin-bone-id="' + Number(bone.id) + '" cx="' + x2 + '" cy="' + y2 + '" r="18" fill="#ffd84a" fill-opacity="0.01" stroke="none" pointer-events="all" />'; // FIX v_038 larger direct hit tail
        svg += '<circle data-mc-pin-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" data-mc-pin-bone-id="' + Number(bone.id) + '" cx="' + x2 + '" cy="' + y2 + '" r="6" fill="#ffd84a" stroke="#604800" stroke-width="2" pointer-events="none" />';
        svg += '<text x="' + labelX + '" y="' + labelY + '" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="3" paint-order="stroke" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="12">' + htmlEscape(label) + '</text>';
      });
    });
    if (!svg) return '';
    return '<svg data-mc-pin-bones="1" style="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;pointer-events:auto;z-index:9999;cursor:copy;" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" fill="transparent" pointer-events="none" />' + svg + '</svg>';
  }

  function mcBindStagePinLayerEvents(host){ // FIX v_036: catch the click on the parent Wick stage overlay, not inside the LukeTool panel.
    if (!host) return;
    try {
      var layer = host.querySelector('[data-mc-pin-bones]');
      if (!layer) return;
      ['mousedown','pointerdown','click'].forEach(function(type){
        layer.addEventListener(type, function(evt){
          if (!mcEnsure().pinPickSourceId) return;
          mcParentStagePinMouseDown(evt);
        }, true);
      });
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function mcRenderStageParts(){ // FIX v_032: every loaded part gets its own visible stage item. Loading the same JSON twice creates two separate on-screen parts.
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var host = mcEnsureStagePartsHost();
    if (!host) return;
    try { host.style.pointerEvents = mc.pinPickSourceId ? 'auto' : 'none'; } catch(eHostPointer){} // FIX v_038
    var hostRect = updateOverlayClipHost() || { left:0, top:0 };
    var selectedId = Number(mc.selectedId || 0);
    var html = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) {
      var part = mcNormalizePartMode(mc.parts[i]);
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) continue;
      if (Number(part.id) === selectedId) continue;
      var t = part.transform || { x:50, y:50, w:300, h:200, rotation:0 };
      var rect = stageBoundsToViewportRect({ x:Number(t.x || 0), y:Number(t.y || 0), w:Math.max(1, Number(t.w || 1)), h:Math.max(1, Number(t.h || 1)) });
      if (!rect) continue;
      var markup = mcSourceMarkupForStagePart(part);
      if (!markup) continue;
      var left = Math.round(Number(rect.x || 0) - Number(hostRect.left || 0));
      var top = Math.round(Number(rect.y || 0) - Number(hostRect.top || 0));
      var width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.width || 1))));
      var height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.height || 1))));
      var rot = Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0;
      html += '<div data-mc-stage-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" style="position:absolute;left:' + left + 'px;top:' + top + 'px;width:' + width + 'px;height:' + height + 'px;z-index:' + (10 + i) + ';pointer-events:none;transform-origin:50% 50%;transform:rotate(' + rot + 'deg);overflow:visible;">' + markup + '</div>';
    }
    html += mcPinBoneMarkup(hostRect); // FIX v_033: while pinning, show every target part bone so the user can click the correct bone.
    host.innerHTML = html;
    mcBindStagePinLayerEvents(host); // FIX v_036
    try {
      if (App.overlay && App.overlay.root) {
        var selIndex = 0;
        for (var si = 0; si < mc.parts.length; si += 1) if (Number(mc.parts[si].id) === selectedId) selIndex = si;
        App.overlay.root.style.zIndex = String(100 + selIndex);
      }
    } catch(e2){}
  }

  function mcPinNameFor(part){ // FIX v_022
    if (!part || !part.parentPin) return 'Not pinned';
    var parent = mcFindPart(part.parentPin.targetPartId);
    var bone = parent && parent.state ? mcBoneByIdInState(parent.state, part.parentPin.boneId) : null;
    if (!parent) return 'Pinned parent missing';
    if (bone) return 'Pinned to ' + (parent.name || ('Part ' + parent.id)) + ' / ' + (bone.name || ('Bone ' + bone.id));
    return 'Pinned to ' + (parent.name || ('Part ' + parent.id));
  }

  function mcPinOffsetFor(child, parent){ // FIX v_020
    child = mcNormalizePartMode(child || {});
    parent = mcNormalizePartMode(parent || {});
    var ct = child.transform || {x:0,y:0,w:1,h:1,rotation:0};
    var pt = parent.transform || {x:0,y:0,w:1,h:1,rotation:0};
    return {
      x:Number(ct.x || 0) - Number(pt.x || 0),
      y:Number(ct.y || 0) - Number(pt.y || 0),
      rotation:Number(ct.rotation || 0) - Number(pt.rotation || 0)
    };
  }

  function mcApplyPinnedChildren(parentId, oldT, newT, visited){ // FIX v_020
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    parentId = Number(parentId || 0);
    if (!parentId || !oldT || !newT) return;
    visited = visited || {};
    if (visited[parentId]) return;
    visited[parentId] = true;
    var dx = Number(newT.x || 0) - Number(oldT.x || 0);
    var dy = Number(newT.y || 0) - Number(oldT.y || 0);
    var dr = Number(newT.rotation || 0) - Number(oldT.rotation || 0);
    mc.parts.forEach(function(child){
      if (!child || !child.parentPin || Number(child.parentPin.targetPartId) !== parentId) return;
      child = mcNormalizePartMode(child);
      var before = mcSafeClone(child.transform || {x:0,y:0,w:1,h:1,rotation:0});
      if (child.parentPin.boneId) { // FIX v_022
        if (!mcUpdatePinnedChildFromParentBone(child)) {
          child.transform = before;
        }
      } else {
        if (!child.parentPin.offset) child.parentPin.offset = mcPinOffsetFor(child, mcFindPart(parentId));
        child.transform = {
          x:Number(before.x || 0) + dx,
          y:Number(before.y || 0) + dy,
          w:Math.max(1, Number(before.w || 1)),
          h:Math.max(1, Number(before.h || 1)),
          rotation:Number(before.rotation || 0) + dr
        };
      }
      if (child.id === mc.selectedId && child.state) mcApplyTransformToApp(child.transform);
      mcApplyPinnedChildren(child.id, before, child.transform, visited);
    });
  }


  function mcCurrentBounds(){
    var b = App.source && App.source.stagePlacementBounds ? App.source.stagePlacementBounds : null;
    if (!b) {
      var w = Math.max(1, Number(App.source && App.source.width || 300));
      var h = Math.max(1, Number(App.source && App.source.height || 200));
      b = { x: 50, y: 50, w: w, h: h, cx: 50 + w * 0.5, cy: 50 + h * 0.5 };
      if (App.source) App.source.stagePlacementBounds = mcSafeClone(b);
    }
    b.x = Number(b.x || 0); b.y = Number(b.y || 0);
    b.w = Math.max(1, Number(b.w || 1)); b.h = Math.max(1, Number(b.h || 1));
    b.cx = b.x + b.w * 0.5; b.cy = b.y + b.h * 0.5;
    return b;
  }

  function mcReadTransform(){
    var b = mcCurrentBounds();
    return { x:b.x, y:b.y, w:b.w, h:b.h, rotation:Number(App.source && App.source.stageRotation || 0) || 0 };
  }

  function mcApplyTransformToApp(t){
    if (!App.source) return;
    t = t || {};
    var x = Number(t.x || 0), y = Number(t.y || 0);
    var w = Math.max(1, Number(t.w || 1)), h = Math.max(1, Number(t.h || 1));
    App.source.stagePlacementBounds = { x:x, y:y, w:w, h:h, cx:x + w * 0.5, cy:y + h * 0.5 };
    App.source.stageBounds = mcSafeClone(App.source.stagePlacementBounds);
    App.source.stageCenter = { x:x + w * 0.5, y:y + h * 0.5 };
    App.source.stageRotation = Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0;
  }

  function mcClientToStage(clientX, clientY){ // FIX v_028: Assemble dragging uses real Wick stage coordinates, not RotoBones local overlay coordinates.
    try {
      var pt = vpToStage(Number(clientX || 0), Number(clientY || 0), getFittedStageRect());
      if (pt && isFinite(Number(pt.x)) && isFinite(Number(pt.y))) return { x:Number(pt.x), y:Number(pt.y) };
    } catch(e){}
    var local = clientToOverlayLocal(clientX, clientY);
    var b = App.overlay && App.overlay.previewBounds ? App.overlay.previewBounds : { minX:0, minY:0 };
    var sb = App.source && App.source.stagePlacementBounds ? App.source.stagePlacementBounds : mcCurrentBounds();
    var sx = Number(sb.w || 1) / Math.max(1, Number(App.source && App.source.width || sb.w || 1));
    var sy = Number(sb.h || 1) / Math.max(1, Number(App.source && App.source.height || sb.h || 1));
    return {
      x:Number(sb.x || 0) + (Number(local.x || 0) + Number(b.minX || 0)) * sx,
      y:Number(sb.y || 0) + (Number(local.y || 0) + Number(b.minY || 0)) * sy
    };
  }

  function mcPointInsideTransform(pt, t){ // FIX v_016
    if (!pt || !t) return false;
    var x = Number(t.x || 0);
    var y = Number(t.y || 0);
    var w = Math.max(1, Number(t.w || 1));
    var h = Math.max(1, Number(t.h || 1));
    var rot = (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) * Math.PI / 180;
    var cx = x + w * 0.5;
    var cy = y + h * 0.5;
    var dx = Number(pt.x || 0) - cx;
    var dy = Number(pt.y || 0) - cy;
    if (rot) {
      var c = Math.cos(-rot);
      var sn = Math.sin(-rot);
      var rx = dx * c - dy * sn;
      var ry = dx * sn + dy * c;
      dx = rx;
      dy = ry;
    }
    var localX = cx + dx;
    var localY = cy + dy;
    return localX >= x && localX <= x + w && localY >= y && localY <= y + h;
  }

  function mcBeginPartDrag(local, evt){ // FIX v_016
    var p = mcSelectedPart();
    if (!p || !p.state) return false;
    p = mcNormalizePartMode(p);
    if (p.mode !== 'assemble') return false;
    var t = p.transform || mcReadTransform();
    if (!mcPointInsideTransform(local, t)) return false;
    App.interaction.dragging = true;
    App.interaction.dragType = 'mcPartMove';
    App.interaction.startLocal = { x:Number(local && local.x || 0), y:Number(local && local.y || 0) };
    App.interaction.startTransform = mcSafeClone(t);
    App.interaction.startClient = evt ? { x:Number(evt.clientX || 0), y:Number(evt.clientY || 0) } : null;
    App.interaction.startOverlayRect = App.overlay && App.overlay.root ? App.overlay.root.getBoundingClientRect() : null;
    try { if (App.overlay && App.overlay.canvas) App.overlay.canvas.style.cursor = 'move'; } catch(e){}
    return true;
  }

  function mcUpdatePartDrag(local, shiftKey, evt){ // FIX v_016
    var p = mcSelectedPart();
    var base = App.interaction.startTransform;
    if (!p || !base) return;
    var dx = 0;
    var dy = 0;
    if (App.interaction.startLocal && local) { // FIX v_028: local is already a Wick stage point.
      dx = Number(local.x || 0) - Number(App.interaction.startLocal.x || 0);
      dy = Number(local.y || 0) - Number(App.interaction.startLocal.y || 0);
    }
    if (shiftKey) {
      if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) dy = 0;
      else dx = 0;
    }
    var t = {
      x: Number(base.x || 0) + dx,
      y: Number(base.y || 0) + dy,
      w: Math.max(1, Number(base.w || 1)),
      h: Math.max(1, Number(base.h || 1)),
      rotation: Number(base.rotation || 0) || 0
    };
    var oldT = mcSafeClone(p.transform || base);
    p.transform = t;
    mcApplyPinnedChildren(p.id, oldT, t);
    mcApplyTransformToApp(t);
    mcRenderPanel();
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
  }

  function mcSelectedPart(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) if (mc.parts[i].id === mc.selectedId) return mc.parts[i];
    return null;
  }

  function mcFindPart(id){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    id = Number(id);
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) if (Number(mc.parts[i].id) === id) return mc.parts[i];
    return null;
  }

  function mcCaptureActivePart(){
    var p = mcSelectedPart();
    if (!p || App.myCharacter.loading || !p.state) return;
    try {
      p.state = buildRigProjectState();
      p.transform = mcReadTransform();
      if (App.source && App.source.fileName) p.name = p.name || App.source.fileName;
    } catch(e) { mcLog('Could not capture active part: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); }
  }

  function mcPersistActivePartKeys(){ // FIX v_067: Wick proxy key dragging must update the selected MyCharacter part state.
    var p = mcSelectedPart();
    if (!p || !p.state || App.myCharacter.loading) return;
    try {
      var keepTransform = mcSafeClone(p.transform || mcReadTransform());
      p.state = buildRigProjectState();
      p.transform = keepTransform;
    } catch(e) {
      try { mcLog('Could not store moved key on part: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); } catch(ignore){}
    }
  }

  function mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(){ // FIX v_067: use the existing RotoBones Wick proxy key rows for the selected part.
    var p = mcSelectedPart();
    if (!p || !p.state) return;
    try {
      syncProxyLayersToBones(true);
      ensureProxyOverlayCanvasForTimeline();
      App.proxy.active = true;
      scheduleProxyFrame();
      try { renderProxyFrame(); } catch(eRenderProxy){}
    } catch(e) {
      try { mcLog('Key rows unavailable: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); } catch(ignore){}
    }
  }

  async function mcActivatePart(id){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    id = Number(id);
    var target = mcFindPart(id);
    if (!target) return;
    if (mc.selectedId !== id) mcCaptureActivePart();
    mc.selectedId = id;
    mc.loading = true;
    try {
      target = mcNormalizePartMode(target);
      if (target.state) {
        await loadRigProjectState(mcSafeClone(target.state));
        mcApplyTransformToApp(target.transform || {});
        if (el('inpClipName') && target.name) el('inpClipName').value = String(target.name);
        updateUI();
        renderOverlay();
      }
    } catch(e) { mcLog('Part activation failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); }
    mc.loading = false;
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function htmlEscape(value){ // FIX v_018
    return String(value == null ? '' : value)
      .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
      .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
      .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
      .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')
      .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
  }

  function mcButton(text, cls, action, id){
    return '<button type="button" class="mcBigBtn ' + (cls || '') + '" data-action="' + action + '" data-id="' + id + '">' + text + '</button>';
  }

  function mcRenderPanel(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var host = el('mcCards');
    if (host) {
      if (!mc.parts.length) {
        host.innerHTML = '<div class="small">No parts. Click Add Part.</div>';
      } else {
        host.innerHTML = mc.parts.map(function(raw, idx){
          var p = mcNormalizePartMode(raw);
          var active = p.id === mc.selectedId ? ' active' : '';
          var assemble = p.mode === 'assemble' ? 'active' : '';
          var animate = p.mode === 'animate' ? 'active' : '';
          var bone = p.mode === 'animate' && p.editTarget !== 'node' ? 'active' : '';
          var node = p.mode === 'animate' && p.editTarget === 'node' ? 'active' : '';
          var pin = mc.pinPickSourceId === p.id ? ' active' : '';
          var t = p.transform || {x:50,y:50,w:300,h:200,rotation:0};
          var loaded = p.state ? 'Loaded RotoBones JSON' : 'No RotoBones JSON loaded';
          if (p.parentPin) loaded += '  pinned';
          return '' +
            '<div class="mcPartCard' + active + '" data-id="' + p.id + '">' +
              '<div class="mcTitleRow">' +
                '<button type="button" class="mcPinBtn' + pin + '" data-action="pin" data-id="' + p.id + '" title="Pin this part"></button>' +
                '<label class="mcLabel">Part Name:</label>' +
                '<input class="mcNameInput" data-action="name" data-id="' + p.id + '" type="text" value="' + htmlEscape(String(p.name || ('Part ' + p.id))) + '">' +
                '<button type="button" class="mcDeleteTop" data-action="remove" data-id="' + p.id + '" title="Delete this item">×</button>' +
              '</div>' +
              mcButton('Assemble', assemble, 'assemble', p.id) +
              mcButton('Animate', animate, 'animate', p.id) +
              mcButton('Load Bone Json', '', 'loadPart', p.id) +
              mcButton('Bone Mode', bone, 'bone', p.id) +
              '<div class="mcArrowBox" data-action="arrow" data-id="' + p.id + '" title="Move item up or down in the stack and z order">' +
                '<div class="mcArrowHalf mcArrowUp" data-action="up" data-id="' + p.id + '"></div>' +
                '<div class="mcArrowHalf mcArrowDown" data-action="down" data-id="' + p.id + '"></div>' +
              '</div>' +
              mcButton('Node Mode', node, 'node', p.id) +
              mcButton('Delete key', '', 'deleteKey', p.id) +
              mcButton('Clear All', '', 'clearKeys', p.id) +
              '<div class="mcLoadedTag">' + htmlEscape(loaded) + '</div>' +
              '<div class="mcPinInfo"><span class="mcPinText">' + htmlEscape(mcPinNameFor(p)) + '</span><button type="button" class="mcBigBtn mcUnpinBtn" data-action="unpin" data-id="' + p.id + '">Unpin</button></div>' +
              '<div class="mcTransformRow">' +
                '<input data-action="x" data-id="' + p.id + '" type="number" step="1" title="X" value="' + Math.round(Number(t.x || 0)) + '">' +
                '<input data-action="y" data-id="' + p.id + '" type="number" step="1" title="Y" value="' + Math.round(Number(t.y || 0)) + '">' +
                '<input data-action="w" data-id="' + p.id + '" type="number" step="1" title="Width" value="' + Math.round(Number(t.w || 1)) + '">' +
                '<input data-action="h" data-id="' + p.id + '" type="number" step="1" title="Height" value="' + Math.round(Number(t.h || 1)) + '">' +
                '<input data-action="rot" data-id="' + p.id + '" type="number" step="1" title="Rotation" value="' + Math.round(Number(t.rotation || 0)) + '">' +
                '<button type="button" class="mcBigBtn mcApplyTransform" data-action="applyTransform" data-id="' + p.id + '">Apply</button>' +
              '</div>' +
            '</div>';
        }).join('');
      }
    }
    var p = mcSelectedPart();
    if (el('inpClipName') && p && p.name) el('inpClipName').value = String(p.name);
  }

  function mcAddPart(evt){
    if (evt && evt.preventDefault) evt.preventDefault();
    if (evt && evt.stopPropagation) evt.stopPropagation();
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mcCaptureActivePart();
    var id = mc.nextId++;
    var part = {
      id:id,
      uid:mcNewPartUid(id), // FIX v_024
      name:'Part ' + id,
      state:null,
      transform:{ x:50 + (mc.parts.length * 20), y:50 + (mc.parts.length * 20), w:300, h:200, rotation:0 },
      visible:true,
      parentPin:null,
      mode:'assemble',
      editTarget:'bone'
    };
    mc.parts.push(part);
    mc.selectedId = id;
    mc.pendingLoadPartId = id;
    mcRenderPanel();
    var host = el('mcCards');
    if (host) {
      try {
        var card = host.querySelector('.mcPartCard[data-id="' + id + '"]');
        if (card && card.scrollIntoView) card.scrollIntoView({block:'nearest'});
        var nameInput = card ? card.querySelector('[data-action="name"]') : null;
        if (nameInput && nameInput.focus) nameInput.focus();
      } catch(e){}
    }
    mcLog('Added empty part card.');
    return false;
  }

  async function mcLoadPartFile(file){
    if (!file) return;
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var targetId = Number(mc.pendingLoadPartId || mc.selectedId || 0);
    var target = mcFindPart(targetId);
    if (!target) {
      mcAddPart();
      target = mcSelectedPart();
      targetId = target ? target.id : 0;
    }
    if (!target) return;
    mcCaptureActivePart();
    try {
      var raw = await readFileAsText(file);
      var data = mcSafeClone(JSON.parse(raw)); // FIX v_031: every card gets its own JSON instance, even when the same file is loaded twice.
      var existingTransform = mcSafeClone(target.transform || { x:50 + (mc.parts.indexOf(target) * 20), y:50 + (mc.parts.indexOf(target) * 20), w:300, h:200, rotation:0 }); // FIX v_031
      mc.loading = true;
      await loadRigProjectState(mcSafeClone(data)); // FIX v_031: never load the original parsed object directly.
      var state = buildRigProjectState();
      var loadedTransform = mcReadTransform(); // FIX v_031: use loaded width and height only, not shared placement.
      var name = (file.name || ('Part ' + targetId)).replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
      target.name = target.name && target.name !== ('Part ' + target.id) ? target.name : (name || target.name || 'Body');
      target.state = mcMakeIndependentRigState(state, target); // FIX v_031
      target.transform = { // FIX v_031: the part card owns its own assemble position. Same JSON can be used for left eye and right eye independently.
        x:Number(existingTransform.x || 0),
        y:Number(existingTransform.y || 0),
        w:Math.max(1, Number(loadedTransform.w || existingTransform.w || 300)),
        h:Math.max(1, Number(loadedTransform.h || existingTransform.h || 200)),
        rotation:Number(existingTransform.rotation || 0) || 0
      };
      mcApplyTransformToApp(target.transform); // FIX v_031
      target.state = mcMakeIndependentRigState(buildRigProjectState(), target); // FIX v_031: store the independent part state after its own card transform is applied.
      target.mode = 'assemble';
      target.editTarget = 'bone';
      mc.selectedId = target.id;
      if (el('inpClipName')) el('inpClipName').value = target.name;
      mc.loading = false;
      mc.pendingLoadPartId = null;
      mcRenderPanel();
      renderOverlay();
      mcLog('Loaded independent Bone Json into ' + target.name + '.');
    } catch(e) {
      mc.loading = false;
      mc.pendingLoadPartId = null;
      mcLog('Load failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e));
    }
  }

  function mcRemovePart(id){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    id = Number(id || mc.selectedId);
    if (!id) { mcLog('No part selected.'); return; }
    var deleteTarget = mcFindPart(id);
    var deleteName = deleteTarget && deleteTarget.name ? String(deleteTarget.name) : 'this part';
    try {
      if (!window.confirm('Delete layer "' + deleteName.replace(/"/g, '\"') + '"? This removes the part and its loaded rig from MyCharacter.')) return;
    } catch(confirmError) {
      return;
    }
    var next = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) if (Number(mc.parts[i].id) !== id) next.push(mc.parts[i]);
    mc.parts = next;
    mc.selectedId = mc.parts.length ? mc.parts[Math.max(0, Math.min(mc.parts.length - 1, 0))].id : null;
    if (mc.selectedId) mcActivatePart(mc.selectedId);
    else { mcRenderPanel(); renderOverlay(); }
    mcLog('Removed part.');
  }

  function mcMoveLayerFor(id, dir){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    id = Number(id || mc.selectedId);
    var p = mcFindPart(id);
    if (!p) return;
    var i = mc.parts.indexOf(p);
    var j = i + dir;
    if (j < 0 || j >= mc.parts.length) return;
    var tmp = mc.parts[i]; mc.parts[i] = mc.parts[j]; mc.parts[j] = tmp;
    mc.selectedId = id;
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function mcApplyFieldsFor(id, card){
    var p = mcFindPart(id || (card && card.getAttribute('data-id')));
    if (!p) { mcLog('No part selected.'); return; }
    function getVal(action, fallback){
      var n = card ? card.querySelector('[data-action="' + action + '"]') : null;
      return Number(n && n.value !== '' ? n.value : fallback);
    }
    var base = p.transform || mcReadTransform();
    var t = {
      x:getVal('x', base.x || 0),
      y:getVal('y', base.y || 0),
      w:Math.max(1, getVal('w', base.w || 1)),
      h:Math.max(1, getVal('h', base.h || 1)),
      rotation:getVal('rot', base.rotation || 0)
    };
    var oldT = mcSafeClone(p.transform || base);
    p.transform = t;
    mcApplyPinnedChildren(p.id, oldT, t);
    if (p.id === mcEnsure().selectedId && p.state) {
      mcApplyTransformToApp(t);
      p.state = buildRigProjectState();
      updateUI();
      renderOverlay();
    }
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function mcApplyNameFor(id, value){
    var p = mcFindPart(id);
    if (!p) return;
    p.name = String(value || p.name || ('Part ' + p.id));
    if (p.id === mcEnsure().selectedId) {
      if (el('inpClipName')) el('inpClipName').value = p.name;
      if (App.source) App.source.fileName = p.name;
      if (p.state) p.state = buildRigProjectState();
    }
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function mcShowCharacterPanelWhileRuntimeMode(runtimeTab){ // FIX v_016
    App.activeTab = runtimeTab || 'character';
    App.interaction.addBoneMode = false;
    App.frameBonePinMode = false;
    App.paint.enabled = false;
    if (App.activeTab === 'animate' || App.activeTab === 'animatepoints') ensureFirstFrameKeysAlways();
    qa('.tabBtn').forEach(function(btn){ btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-tab') === 'character'); });
    qa('.panelPage').forEach(function(page){ page.classList.toggle('active', page.getAttribute('data-page') === 'character'); });
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
  }

  async function mcSetAssembleModeFor(id){
    await mcActivatePart(id);
    var p = mcFindPart(id);
    if (p) { p.mode = 'assemble'; p.editTarget = p.editTarget || 'bone'; if (p.state) p.state = buildRigProjectState(); }
    mcShowCharacterPanelWhileRuntimeMode('character');
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  async function mcSetAnimateModeFor(id){
    await mcActivatePart(id);
    var p = mcFindPart(id);
    if (p) { p.mode = 'animate'; p.editTarget = p.editTarget || 'bone'; if (p.state) p.state = buildRigProjectState(); }
    mcShowCharacterPanelWhileRuntimeMode(p && p.editTarget === 'node' ? 'animatepoints' : 'animate');
    mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(); // FIX v_067
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  async function mcSetBoneModeFor(id){
    await mcActivatePart(id);
    var p = mcFindPart(id);
    if (p) { p.mode = 'animate'; p.editTarget = 'bone'; if (p.state) p.state = buildRigProjectState(); }
    mcShowCharacterPanelWhileRuntimeMode('animate');
    mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(); // FIX v_067
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  async function mcSetNodeModeFor(id){
    await mcActivatePart(id);
    var p = mcFindPart(id);
    if (p) { p.mode = 'animate'; p.editTarget = 'node'; if (p.state) p.state = buildRigProjectState(); }
    mcShowCharacterPanelWhileRuntimeMode('animatepoints');
    mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(); // FIX v_067
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function mcDeleteCurrentItemKeyFor(id){
    var p = mcFindPart(id || mcEnsure().selectedId);
    if (!p || !p.state) { mcLog('No loaded part selected.'); return; }
    mcActivatePart(p.id).then(function(){
      syncFrameFromWick();
      var fr = String(App.currentFrame || 1);
      var removed = false;
      p = mcNormalizePartMode(p);
      if (p.editTarget === 'node') {
        if (App.pointKeys && App.pointKeys[fr]) { delete App.pointKeys[fr]; removed = true; }
      } else {
        if (App.keyframes && App.keyframes[fr]) { delete App.keyframes[fr]; removed = true; }
        if (App.frameBoneKeys && App.frameBoneKeys[fr]) { delete App.frameBoneKeys[fr]; removed = true; }
        if (App.expressionKeys && App.expressionKeys[fr]) { delete App.expressionKeys[fr]; removed = true; }
      }
      p.state = buildRigProjectState();
      updateUI(); renderOverlay(); mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(); mcRenderPanel();
      mcLog(removed ? 'Deleted key on frame ' + fr + '.' : 'No key on frame ' + fr + '.');
    });
  }

  function mcClearSelectedItemAnimationFor(id){
    var p = mcFindPart(id || mcEnsure().selectedId);
    if (!p || !p.state) { mcLog('No loaded part selected.'); return; }
    mcActivatePart(p.id).then(function(){
      App.keyframes = {};
      App.pointKeys = {};
      App.frameBoneKeys = {};
      App.expressionKeys = {};
      p.state = buildRigProjectState();
      updateUI(); renderOverlay(); mcShowSelectedPartKeyRows(); mcRenderPanel();
      mcLog('Cleared all animation for selected item.');
    });
  }

  function mcStartPinPickFor(id){ // FIX v_022
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var p = mcFindPart(id || mc.selectedId);
    if (!p) { mcLog('No part selected.'); return; }
    if (!p.state) { mcLog('Load Bone Json into this part before pinning it.'); return; }
    mc.pinPickSourceId = p.id;
    mcInstallPinCursorFollower();
    mcInstallParentStagePinPicker(); // FIX v_034
    mcSetPinCursor(true);
    try { ensureOverlay(); updateOverlayClipHost(); } catch(ePinOverlay){} // FIX v_034
    try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(ePinRender){} // FIX v_034
    mcLog('Pin mode: click a visible bone on the stage.');
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function mcBuildCharacterState(){
    mcCaptureActivePart();
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    return { app:'MyCharacter', version:'v_052', savedAt:new Date().toISOString(), nextId:mc.nextId, selectedId:mc.selectedId, parts:mcSafeClone(mc.parts) };
  }

  function mcSaveCharacter(){
    var data = mcBuildCharacterState();
    downloadTextFile('MyCharacter_v_049.json', JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), 'application/json');
    mcLog('Saved character.');
  }

  async function mcLoadCharacterFile(file){
    if (!file) return;
    try {
      var raw = await readFileAsText(file);
      var data = JSON.parse(raw);
      if (!data || data.app !== 'MyCharacter' || !Array.isArray(data.parts)) throw new Error('Not a MyCharacter file.');
      var mc = mcEnsure();
      mc.parts = mcSafeClone(data.parts);
      mc.parts.forEach(function(p){ mcNormalizePartMode(p); if (!p.uid) p.uid = mcNewPartUid(p.id); if (p.state) p.state = mcMakeIndependentRigState(p.state, p); }); // FIX v_024
      mc.nextId = Number(data.nextId || (mc.parts.length + 1)) || 1;
      mc.selectedId = data.selectedId || (mc.parts[0] ? mc.parts[0].id : null);
      if (mc.selectedId) await mcActivatePart(mc.selectedId);
      mcRenderPanel();
      mcLog('Loaded character.');
    } catch(e) { mcLog('Character load failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); }
  }

  function mcOpenTab(name){
    App.activeTab = name;
    qa('.tabBtn').forEach(function(btn){ btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.getAttribute('data-tab') === name); });
    qa('.panelPage').forEach(function(page){ page.classList.toggle('active', page.getAttribute('data-page') === name); });
    updateUI();
    renderOverlay();
  }

  function mcHandleCardAction(action, id, target, evt){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    id = Number(id || 0);
    var card = target && target.closest ? target.closest('.mcPartCard') : null;
    if (action !== 'name' && action !== 'x' && action !== 'y' && action !== 'w' && action !== 'h' && action !== 'rot') {
      if (id) mc.selectedId = id;
    }
    if (mc.pinPickSourceId && action !== 'pin' && id && id !== mc.pinPickSourceId) { // FIX v_022
      mcActivatePart(id).then(function(){
        mcSetPinCursor(true);
        mcLog('Now click a visible bone on ' + ((mcFindPart(id) && mcFindPart(id).name) || 'the parent part') + '.');
      });
      return;
    }
    if (action === 'loadPart') {
      mc.pendingLoadPartId = id;
      var i = el('mcPartFile');
      if (i) { try { i.value = ''; } catch(e){} i.click(); }
    } else if (action === 'remove') {
      mcRemovePart(id);
    } else if (action === 'up') {
      mcMoveLayerFor(id, -1);
    } else if (action === 'down') {
      mcMoveLayerFor(id, 1);
    } else if (action === 'arrow') {
      if (target && target.getAttribute && (target.getAttribute('data-action') === 'up' || target.getAttribute('data-action') === 'down')) return;
      var rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
      mcMoveLayerFor(id, (evt && evt.clientY ? evt.clientY : rect.top) < rect.top + rect.height * 0.5 ? -1 : 1);
    } else if (action === 'assemble') {
      mcSetAssembleModeFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'animate') {
      mcSetAnimateModeFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'bone') {
      mcSetBoneModeFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'node') {
      mcSetNodeModeFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'deleteKey') {
      mcDeleteCurrentItemKeyFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'clearKeys') {
      mcClearSelectedItemAnimationFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'unpin') {
      var up = mcFindPart(id);
      if (up) { up.parentPin = null; mc.pinPickSourceId = null; mcSetPinCursor(false); mcLog('Unpinned ' + (up.name || 'part') + '.'); mcRenderPanel(); }
    } else if (action === 'pin') {
      mcStartPinPickFor(id);
    } else if (action === 'applyTransform') {
      mcApplyFieldsFor(id, card);
    }
  }

  function mcInstallGlobalClickFallback(){ // FIX v_016
    if (document.__mcGlobalClickFallbackInstalled) return;
    document.__mcGlobalClickFallbackInstalled = true;
    document.addEventListener('click', function(e){
      var t = e && e.target;
      if (!t || !t.closest) return;
      var topActionNode = t.closest('[data-mc-top-action]');
      if (topActionNode) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();
        var topAction = topActionNode.getAttribute('data-mc-top-action');
        if (topAction === 'add') mcAddPart();
        else if (topAction === 'save') mcSaveCharacter();
        else if (topAction === 'load') { var loadInput = el('mcCharacterFile'); if (loadInput) { try { loadInput.value = ''; } catch(e1){} loadInput.click(); } }
        return;
      }
      var actionNode = t.closest('#myCharacterPanel [data-action]');
      if (!actionNode) return;
      var action = actionNode.getAttribute('data-action');
      if (action === 'name' || action === 'x' || action === 'y' || action === 'w' || action === 'h' || action === 'rot') return;
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();
      mcHandleCardAction(action, actionNode.getAttribute('data-id'), actionNode, e);
    }, true);
    document.addEventListener('change', function(e){
      var t = e && e.target;
      if (!t || !t.closest || !t.closest('#myCharacterPanel')) return;
      var action = t.getAttribute && t.getAttribute('data-action');
      if (!action) return;
      var id = Number(t.getAttribute('data-id') || 0);
      var card = t.closest('.mcPartCard');
      if (action === 'name') mcApplyNameFor(id, t.value);
      else if (action === 'x' || action === 'y' || action === 'w' || action === 'h' || action === 'rot') mcApplyFieldsFor(id, card);
    }, true);
  }



  // FIX v_039: Real stage pin picker. Pinning uses a parent document stage overlay, not the LukeTool panel.
  var mcRenderStageParts_Base_v039 = mcRenderStageParts;

  function mcPinParentDocument_v039(){
    try { return window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : document; } catch(e) { return document; }
  }

  function mcRemovePinPickLayer_v039(){
    try {
      var pdoc = mcPinParentDocument_v039();
      var old = pdoc.getElementById ? pdoc.getElementById('mcPinPickLayer_v039') : null;
      if (old && old.parentNode) old.parentNode.removeChild(old);
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function mcPinBoneClientPoints_v039(part, bone, frame){
    if (!part || !bone) return null;
    var h = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'head');
    var t = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'tail');
    if (!h || !t) return null;
    var hv = null;
    var tv = null;
    try {
      hv = stageBoundsToViewportRect({ x:Number(h.x || 0), y:Number(h.y || 0), w:1, h:1 });
      tv = stageBoundsToViewportRect({ x:Number(t.x || 0), y:Number(t.y || 0), w:1, h:1 });
      if (hv && tv) return { hx:Number(hv.x || 0), hy:Number(hv.y || 0), tx:Number(tv.x || 0), ty:Number(tv.y || 0) };
    } catch(e0){}
    try {
      var fit = getFittedStageRect();
      hv = stageToVp(Number(h.x || 0), Number(h.y || 0), fit);
      tv = stageToVp(Number(t.x || 0), Number(t.y || 0), fit);
      if (hv && tv) return { hx:Number(hv.x || 0), hy:Number(hv.y || 0), tx:Number(tv.x || 0), ty:Number(tv.y || 0) };
    } catch(e1){}
    return null;
  }

  function mcHitTestPinBonesByClient_v039(clientPt, sourcePartId){
    if (!clientPt) return null;
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    var frame = App.currentFrame || 1;
    var best = null;
    var bestDist = Infinity;
    mc.parts.forEach(function(part){
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) return;
      if (Number(part.id) === Number(sourcePartId || 0)) return;
      var bones = Array.isArray(part.state.bones) ? part.state.bones : [];
      bones.forEach(function(bone){
        var pts = mcPinBoneClientPoints_v039(part, bone, frame);
        if (!pts) return;
        var head = { x:pts.hx, y:pts.hy };
        var tail = { x:pts.tx, y:pts.ty };
        var click = { x:Number(clientPt.x || 0), y:Number(clientPt.y || 0) };
        var dHead = dist(click, head);
        var dTail = dist(click, tail);
        var dBody = mcDistPointToSegment(click, head, tail);
        var d = Math.min(dHead, dTail, dBody);
        if (d < bestDist) {
          bestDist = d;
          best = { part:part, bone:bone, distance:d, attachPoint:(dTail < dHead && dTail <= dBody ? 'tail' : 'head') };
        }
      });
    });
    return best && bestDist <= 42 ? best : null;
  }

  function mcRenderPinPickLayer_v039(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mcRemovePinPickLayer_v039();
    if (!mc.pinPickSourceId) return;
    var pdoc = mcPinParentDocument_v039();
    if (!pdoc || !pdoc.body) return;
    var stageRect = getWickStageClipRect();
    var layer = pdoc.createElement('div');
    layer.id = 'mcPinPickLayer_v039';
    layer.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-overlay', App.interaction.overlayOwnerId || 'mc');
    layer.setAttribute('data-luketools-bonewarp-kind', 'mc-pin-pick-stage');
    layer.style.cssText = [
      'position:fixed',
      'left:' + Math.round(Number(stageRect.left || 0)) + 'px',
      'top:' + Math.round(Number(stageRect.top || 0)) + 'px',
      'width:' + Math.max(20, Math.round(Number(stageRect.width || 0))) + 'px',
      'height:' + Math.max(20, Math.round(Number(stageRect.height || 0))) + 'px',
      'z-index:2147483000',
      'pointer-events:auto',
      'background:transparent',
      'overflow:hidden',
      'cursor:copy',
      'user-select:none'
    ].join(';');
    var svg = pdoc.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'svg');
    svg.setAttribute('xmlns','http://www.w3.org/2000/svg');
    svg.setAttribute('width','100%');
    svg.setAttribute('height','100%');
    svg.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;pointer-events:auto;cursor:copy;background:transparent;';
    var frame = App.currentFrame || 1;
    var any = false;
    mc.parts.forEach(function(part){
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) return;
      if (Number(part.id) === Number(mc.pinPickSourceId || 0)) return;
      var bones = Array.isArray(part.state.bones) ? part.state.bones : [];
      bones.forEach(function(bone){
        var pts = mcPinBoneClientPoints_v039(part, bone, frame);
        if (!pts) return;
        any = true;
        var x1 = Number(pts.hx || 0) - Number(stageRect.left || 0);
        var y1 = Number(pts.hy || 0) - Number(stageRect.top || 0);
        var x2 = Number(pts.tx || 0) - Number(stageRect.left || 0);
        var y2 = Number(pts.ty || 0) - Number(stageRect.top || 0);
        function makeSvg(tag, attrs){
          var n = pdoc.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', tag);
          Object.keys(attrs).forEach(function(k){ n.setAttribute(k, String(attrs[k])); });
          n.setAttribute('data-mc-pin-part-id', String(part.id));
          n.setAttribute('data-mc-pin-bone-id', String(bone.id));
          return n;
        }
        svg.appendChild(makeSvg('line', { x1:x1, y1:y1, x2:x2, y2:y2, stroke:'#ffd84a', 'stroke-width':22, 'stroke-opacity':0.18, 'stroke-linecap':'round', 'pointer-events':'stroke', 'data-mc-pin-attach':'head' }));
        svg.appendChild(makeSvg('line', { x1:x1, y1:y1, x2:x2, y2:y2, stroke:'#ffd84a', 'stroke-width':3, 'stroke-opacity':1, 'stroke-linecap':'round', 'pointer-events':'none' }));
        svg.appendChild(makeSvg('circle', { cx:x1, cy:y1, r:13, fill:'#1ee29a', stroke:'#061', 'stroke-width':2, 'fill-opacity':0.8, 'pointer-events':'all', 'data-mc-pin-attach':'head' }));
        svg.appendChild(makeSvg('circle', { cx:x2, cy:y2, r:11, fill:'#ffd84a', stroke:'#604800', 'stroke-width':2, 'fill-opacity':0.8, 'pointer-events':'all', 'data-mc-pin-attach':'tail' }));
        var tx = (x1 + x2) * 0.5 + 7;
        var ty = (y1 + y2) * 0.5 - 7;
        var text = pdoc.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg', 'text');
        text.setAttribute('x', String(tx));
        text.setAttribute('y', String(ty));
        text.setAttribute('fill', '#ffffff');
        text.setAttribute('stroke', '#000000');
        text.setAttribute('stroke-width', '3');
        text.setAttribute('paint-order', 'stroke');
        text.setAttribute('font-family', 'Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif');
        text.setAttribute('font-size', '12');
        text.setAttribute('pointer-events','none');
        text.textContent = (part.name || ('Part ' + part.id)) + ' / ' + (bone.name || ('Bone ' + bone.id));
        svg.appendChild(text);
      });
    });
    layer.appendChild(svg);
    layer.addEventListener('mousedown', mcParentStagePinMouseDown, true);
    layer.addEventListener('pointerdown', mcParentStagePinMouseDown, true);
    layer.addEventListener('click', mcParentStagePinMouseDown, true);
    pdoc.body.appendChild(layer);
    if (!any) mcLog('Pin mode: no target bones are visible. Load another part with bones first.');
  }

  function mcCompletePinToBone(source, target, bone, evt){ // FIX v_049
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!source || !target || !bone) { mcLog('Click a visible bone on the part you want to pin to.'); return true; }
    var childRoot = mcRootBoneInState(source.state);
    if (!childRoot || !childRoot.head) { mcLog('Pin failed. The part being pinned has no root bone.'); return true; }
    var attachPoint = 'head';
    try {
      var node = evt && evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('[data-mc-pin-attach]') : null;
      if (node && node.getAttribute('data-mc-pin-attach') === 'tail') attachPoint = 'tail';
    } catch(eAttach){}
    if (bone && bone._mcPinAttachPoint) attachPoint = bone._mcPinAttachPoint;
    var pinProbe = { targetPartId:target.id, boneId:bone.id, attachPoint:attachPoint };
    var anchor = mcPinnedAnchorForPart(target, pinProbe, App.currentFrame || 1);
    if (!anchor) { mcLog('Pin failed. Target bone position is missing.'); return true; }
    var oldT = mcSafeClone(source.transform || {x:0,y:0,w:1,h:1,rotation:0});
    var worldOffset = { x:Number(oldT.x || 0) - Number(anchor.x || 0), y:Number(oldT.y || 0) - Number(anchor.y || 0) };
    var offsetLocal = mcUnrotateVectorDegrees(worldOffset, anchor.angle);
    source.parentPin = {
      targetPartId:target.id,
      boneId:bone.id,
      attachPoint:attachPoint,
      childRootBoneId:childRoot.id,
      offsetLocal:{ x:Number(offsetLocal.x || 0), y:Number(offsetLocal.y || 0) },
      rotationOffset:Number(oldT.rotation || 0) - Number(anchor.angle || 0),
      offset:{ x:Number(offsetLocal.x || 0), y:Number(offsetLocal.y || 0), rotation:Number(oldT.rotation || 0) - Number(anchor.angle || 0) }
    };
    source.transform = oldT;
    mc.selectedId = source.id;
    mc.pinPickSourceId = null;
    mcSetPinCursor(false);
    mcActivatePart(source.id);
    mcRenderPanel();
    try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(eMcParts){}
    renderOverlay();
    mcLog('Pinned ' + (source.name || 'part') + ' to ' + (target.name || 'part') + ' / ' + (bone.name || ('Bone ' + bone.id)) + '.');
    try { if (evt) { evt.preventDefault(); evt.stopPropagation(); if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); } } catch(eStop){}
    return true;
  }

  function mcHandleStagePinBoneClick(local, evt){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!mc.pinPickSourceId) return false;
    var source = mcFindPart(mc.pinPickSourceId);
    if (!source) { mc.pinPickSourceId = null; mcSetPinCursor(false); mcRenderPanel(); return false; }
    syncFrameFromWick();
    var parentClient = evt ? mcEventClientInParent(evt) : null;
    var direct = null;
    try {
      var node = evt && evt.target && evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('[data-mc-pin-part-id][data-mc-pin-bone-id]') : null;
      if (node) {
        var targetDirect = mcFindPart(Number(node.getAttribute('data-mc-pin-part-id') || 0));
        var boneDirect = targetDirect && targetDirect.state ? mcBoneByIdInState(targetDirect.state, Number(node.getAttribute('data-mc-pin-bone-id') || 0)) : null;
        if (targetDirect && boneDirect && Number(targetDirect.id) !== Number(source.id)) {
          if (node.getAttribute('data-mc-pin-attach') === 'tail') boneDirect._mcPinAttachPoint = 'tail';
          else boneDirect._mcPinAttachPoint = 'head';
          direct = { part:targetDirect, bone:boneDirect };
        }
      }
    } catch(eDirect){}
    if (direct) return mcCompletePinToBone(source, direct.part, direct.bone, evt);
    var hit = parentClient ? mcHitTestPinBonesByClient_v039(parentClient, source.id) : null;
    if (hit && hit.part && hit.bone) {
      hit.bone._mcPinAttachPoint = hit.attachPoint || 'head';
      return mcCompletePinToBone(source, hit.part, hit.bone, evt);
    }
    mcLog('Pin failed. Click one of the green or yellow bone nodes shown on the stage.');
    try { mcRenderPinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(eRefresh){}
    return true;
  }

  function mcParentStagePinMouseDown(evt){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    if (!mc || !mc.pinPickSourceId) return;
    try { syncFrameFromWick(); } catch(e1){}
    var handled = false;
    try { handled = mcHandleStagePinBoneClick(null, evt); } catch(e2) { mcLog('Pin failed: ' + (e2 && e2.message ? e2.message : e2)); handled = true; }
    if (handled) {
      try { evt.preventDefault(); evt.stopPropagation(); if (evt.stopImmediatePropagation) evt.stopImmediatePropagation(); } catch(e3){}
    }
  }

  function mcSetPinCursor(active){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mc.pinCursorActive = !!active;
    var docs = [];
    try { docs.push(document); } catch(e0){}
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent.document && window.parent.document !== document) docs.push(window.parent.document); } catch(e1){}
    docs.forEach(function(doc){
      if (!doc || !doc.documentElement) return;
      try { doc.documentElement.classList.toggle('mcPinPickingActive', !!active); } catch(e2){}
      var node = doc.getElementById ? doc.getElementById('mcPinCursorIcon') : null;
      if (active) {
        if (!node) {
          node = doc.createElement('div');
          node.id = 'mcPinCursorIcon';

  function mcBindEvents(){

    if (el('mcAddPart')) el('mcAddPart').addEventListener('click', function(e){ mcAddPart(e); });
    if (el('mcPartFile')) el('mcPartFile').addEventListener('change', function(){ mcLoadPartFile(this.files && this.files[0]); });
    if (el('mcSaveCharacter')) el('mcSaveCharacter').addEventListener('click', mcSaveCharacter);
    if (el('mcLoadCharacter')) el('mcLoadCharacter').addEventListener('click', function(){ var i = el('mcCharacterFile'); if (i) { try { i.value = ''; } catch(e){} i.click(); } });
    if (el('mcCharacterFile')) el('mcCharacterFile').addEventListener('change', function(){ mcLoadCharacterFile(this.files && this.files[0]); });
    var cards = el('mcCards');
    if (cards) {
      cards.addEventListener('click', function(e){
        var t = e.target;
        var card = t && t.closest ? t.closest('.mcPartCard') : null;
        if (card && card.getAttribute('data-id')) {
          var id = Number(card.getAttribute('data-id'));
          if (mcEnsure().selectedId !== id && !(t && t.getAttribute && t.getAttribute('data-action'))) mcActivatePart(id);
        }
        var actionNode = t && t.closest ? t.closest('[data-action]') : null;
        if (!actionNode) return;
        var action = actionNode.getAttribute('data-action');
        if (action === 'name' || action === 'x' || action === 'y' || action === 'w' || action === 'h' || action === 'rot') return;
        e.preventDefault();
        mcHandleCardAction(action, actionNode.getAttribute('data-id'), actionNode, e);
      });
      cards.addEventListener('change', function(e){
        var t = e.target;
        if (!t || !t.getAttribute) return;
        var action = t.getAttribute('data-action');
        var id = Number(t.getAttribute('data-id') || 0);
        var card = t.closest ? t.closest('.mcPartCard') : null;
        if (action === 'name') mcApplyNameFor(id, t.value);
        if (action === 'x' || action === 'y' || action === 'w' || action === 'h' || action === 'rot') mcApplyFieldsFor(id, card);
      });
    }
    mcRenderPanel();
  }

  function mcRenderStageParts_v040(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mcHideOldStagePartsHost_v040();
    var host = mcEnsureStagePartsHost_v040();
    if (!host) return;
    var stageRect = mcStageRect_v040();
    var selectedId = Number(mc.selectedId || 0);
    var html = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) {
      var part = mcNormalizePartMode(mc.parts[i]);
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) continue;
      if (Number(part.id) === selectedId) continue;
      var rect = mcPartClientRect_v040(part);
      if (!rect) continue;
      var markup = mcSourceMarkupForStagePart(part);
      if (!markup) continue;
      var t = part.transform || { rotation:0 };
      var left = Math.round(Number(rect.x || 0) - Number(stageRect.left || 0));
      var top = Math.round(Number(rect.y || 0) - Number(stageRect.top || 0));
      var width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.width || 1))));
      var height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.height || 1))));
      html += '<div data-mc-stage-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" style="position:absolute;left:' + left + 'px;top:' + top + 'px;width:' + width + 'px;height:' + height + 'px;z-index:' + (20 + i) + ';pointer-events:none;transform-origin:50% 50%;transform:rotate(' + (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) + 'deg);overflow:visible;">' + markup + '</div>';

      if (boneKeys[i] <= frame) prev = boneKeys[i];
      if (boneKeys[i] >= frame) { next = boneKeys[i]; break; }

      if (exact) return mcCloneBonePoseItem_v049(exact, b);
    }
    if (prev !== null && next !== null && prev !== next) {
      var a = mcStateBoneKeyAtFrame_v049(state, b.id, prev);
      var c = mcStateBoneKeyAtFrame_v049(state, b.id, next);
      if (a && c) return mcInterpolateBonePoseItem_v049(b, a, c, (frame - prev) / (next - prev));
    }
    if (prev !== null) {
      var holdPrev = mcStateBoneKeyAtFrame_v049(state, b.id, prev);
      if (holdPrev) return mcCloneBonePoseItem_v049(holdPrev, b);
    }
    if (next !== null) {
      var useNext = mcStateBoneKeyAtFrame_v049(state, b.id, next);
      if (useNext) return mcCloneBonePoseItem_v049(useNext, b);

  function mcResolvedPartsForCommitFrame_v049(parts, frame){
