  mcResolvedPartsForCommitFrame = mcResolvedPartsForCommitFrame_v049;



  // FIX v_050: In Build Character, fade non selected stage parts while the selected part is being animated.
  function mcShouldFadeInactiveParts_v050(){
    try {
      var mc = mcEnsure();
      var selected = mcFindPart(mc.selectedId);
      if (!selected) return false;
      selected = mcNormalizePartMode(selected);
      var mode = String(selected.mode || '').toLowerCase();
      var edit = String(selected.editMode || '').toLowerCase();
      if (mode === 'animate') return true;
      if (edit === 'bone' || edit === 'node') return true;
      if (App.interaction && App.interaction.dragging) return true;
    } catch(e){}
    return false;
  }

  function mcRenderStageParts_v050(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    mcHideOldStagePartsHost_v040();
    var host = mcEnsureStagePartsHost_v040();
    if (!host) return;
    var stageRect = mcStageRect_v040();
    var selectedId = Number(mc.selectedId || 0);
    var fadeInactive = mcShouldFadeInactiveParts_v050();
    try { host.style.zIndex = '2147481000'; } catch(eZ){}
    var html = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) {
      var part = mcNormalizePartMode(mc.parts[i]);
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) continue;
      if (Number(part.id) === selectedId) continue;
      var rect = mcPartClientRect_v040(part);
      if (!rect) continue;
      var markup = mcSourceMarkupForStagePart(part);
      if (!markup) continue;
      var t = part.transform || { rotation:0 };
      var left = Math.round(Number(rect.x || 0) - Number(stageRect.left || 0));
      var top = Math.round(Number(rect.y || 0) - Number(stageRect.top || 0));
      var width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.width || 1))));
      var height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.height || 1))));
      var opacity = fadeInactive ? 0.34 : 1;
      html += '<div data-mc-stage-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" style="position:absolute;left:' + left + 'px;top:' + top + 'px;width:' + width + 'px;height:' + height + 'px;z-index:' + (20 + i) + ';pointer-events:none;opacity:' + opacity + ';transform-origin:50% 50%;transform:rotate(' + (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) + 'deg);overflow:visible;">' + markup + '</div>';
    }
    host.innerHTML = html;
    if (mc.pinPickSourceId) {
      try { mcRenderPinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(ePin){}
    } else {
      try { mcRemovePinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(eRemove){}
    }
  }

  mcRenderStageParts = function(){
    try { mcRenderStageParts_v050(); } catch(e) { mcLog('Stage part render failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); }
  };

  // FIX v_050: Commit creates one parent clip containing per frame child clips for each part.
  // Each child clip keeps that part's deformed native curves local to the part, while the child clip transform records
  // the part placement for that frame, including inherited pin translation and rotation.
  function mcApplyResolvedPartTransformToChildClip_v050(partClip, part, exportBounds, parentBounds){
    if (!partClip || !part) return;
    var t = part.transform || { x:0, y:0, w:1, h:1, rotation:0 };
    var src = part.state && part.state.source ? part.state.source : (App.source || {});
    var srcW = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || App.source.width || t.w || 1));
    var srcH = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || App.source.height || t.h || 1));
    var sx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.w || srcW) / srcW);
    var sy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.h || srcH) / srcH);
    var nativeOriginSourceX = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0) - Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetX || 0);
    var nativeOriginSourceY = Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0) - Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.offsetY || 0);
    try {
      if (!partClip.transformation) partClip.transformation = {};
      partClip.transformation.x = mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(t.x || 0) - Number(parentBounds && parentBounds.x || 0) + nativeOriginSourceX * sx);
      partClip.transformation.y = mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(t.y || 0) - Number(parentBounds && parentBounds.y || 0) + nativeOriginSourceY * sy);
      partClip.transformation.scaleX = sx;
      partClip.transformation.scaleY = sy;
      partClip.transformation.rotation = Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0;
    } catch(e){}
  }

  function mcCreatePartFrameChildClip_v050(partName, part, frameNumber, exportBounds, parentBounds){
    var childIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(partName + '_f_' + frameNumber + '_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000), 'MyCharacterPartFrame');
    var childClip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: childIdentifier });
    try { childClip.name = partName + '_frame_' + frameNumber; } catch(eName){}
    try { childClip.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.width || App.source.width || 1))); } catch(eW){}
    try { childClip.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.height || App.source.height || 1))); } catch(eH){}
    try { childClip.bounds = { x:0, y:0, width:childClip.width || 1, height:childClip.height || 1 }; } catch(eB){}
    var safeN = 50;
    try { while (childClip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) childClip.timeline.removeLayer(childClip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(eClear){}
    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
    try { layer.name = partName + ' native curves'; } catch(eLayerName){}
    childClip.timeline.addLayer(layer);
    var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:1, end:1 });
    try { frame.identifier = makeValidIdentifier(partName + '_child_frame_' + frameNumber, 'child_frame_' + frameNumber); } catch(eFrameId){}
    layer.addFrame(frame);
    var count = 0;
    var records = nativeShapePathRecordsFromFrame(frameNumber, exportBounds);
    for (var si = 0; si < records.length; si += 1) {
      var path = createNativeWickPathFromRecord(records[si], frameNumber, si + 1);
      try { path.name = partName + '_Curve_' + frameNumber + '_' + (si + 1); } catch(ePathName){}
      mcResetPathTransformAfterBake(path);
      addToFrame(frame, path);
      count += 1;
    }
    mcApplyResolvedPartTransformToChildClip_v050(childClip, part, exportBounds, parentBounds);
    try {
      childClip.__myCharacterPartName = partName;
      childClip.__myCharacterSourcePartId = part.id;
      childClip.__myCharacterFrame = frameNumber;
      childClip.__myCharacterTransform = mcSafeClone(part.transform || {});
      childClip.__myCharacterParentPin = mcSafeClone(part.parentPin || null);
    } catch(eMeta){}
    return count ? childClip : null;
  }

  mcCommitCharacterNativeClip = async function(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    try { mcCaptureActivePart(); } catch(eCapture){}
    if (!refreshBridgeRefs()) { mcLog('Bridge/editor not available.'); return; }
    var loadedParts = (mc.parts || []).filter(function(p){ return p && p.state && p.visible !== false; });
    if (!loadedParts.length) { mcLog('No loaded character parts to commit.'); return; }
    syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline();
    stop();
    var savedState = null;
    var savedSelected = mc.selectedId;
    try { savedState = buildRigProjectState(); } catch(eSave){}
    var parentName = (el('inpClipName') && el('inpClipName').value ? String(el('inpClipName').value).trim() : '') || 'MyCharacter';
    if (loadedParts.length > 1 && parentName === 'BoneWarpClip') parentName = 'MyCharacter';
    var parentIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(parentName + '_' + Date.now(), 'MyCharacterClip');
    var parentClip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: parentIdentifier });
    try { parentClip.name = parentName; } catch(eName){}
    var safeN = 50;
    try { while (parentClip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) parentClip.timeline.removeLayer(parentClip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(eClear){}
    var frameTotal = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(App.frameCount || 1)));
    var parentBounds = mcPartUnionBoundsForCommitFrames(loadedParts, frameTotal);
    try { parentClip.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(parentBounds.w)); parentClip.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(parentBounds.h)); } catch(eSize){}
    try { parentClip.bounds = { x:0, y:0, width:parentClip.width || parentBounds.w, height:parentClip.height || parentBounds.h }; } catch(eBounds){}
    var partExportBounds = {};
    var madeChildren = 0;
    for (var setupIndex = 0; setupIndex < loadedParts.length; setupIndex += 1) {
      var setupPart = loadedParts[setupIndex];
      try {
        mc.loading = true;
        await loadRigProjectState(mcSafeClone(setupPart.state));
        mc.loading = false;
        syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline();
        ensureFirstFrameKeysAlways();
        partExportBounds[setupPart.id] = computeAnimationExportBounds();
      } catch(partSetupErr) {
        mc.loading = false;
        mcLog('Commit setup skipped ' + (setupPart.name || ('Part ' + setupPart.id)) + ': ' + (partSetupErr && partSetupErr.message ? partSetupErr.message : partSetupErr));
      }
    }
    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
    try { layer.name = 'assembled character parts'; } catch(eLayerName){}
    parentClip.timeline.addLayer(layer);
    for (var fi = 1; fi <= frameTotal; fi += 1) {
      var parentFrame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:fi, end:fi });
      try { parentFrame.identifier = makeValidIdentifier('character_frame_' + fi, 'character_frame_' + fi); } catch(eParentFrameId){}
      layer.addFrame(parentFrame);

        var partName = String(basePart.name || ('Part ' + basePart.id));
        var exportBounds = partExportBounds[basePart.id];
        if (!exportBounds) continue;
        try {
          mc.loading = true;
          await loadRigProjectState(mcSafeClone(basePart.state));
          mc.loading = false;
          App.frameCount = frameTotal;
          var childClip = mcCreatePartFrameChildClip_v050(partName, resolvedPart, fi, exportBounds, parentBounds);

      parentClip.transformation.x = Number(parentBounds.x || 0);
      parentClip.transformation.y = Number(parentBounds.y || 0);
      parentClip.transformation.scaleX = 1;
      parentClip.transformation.scaleY = 1;
      parentClip.transformation.rotation = 0;
      parentClip.animationType = 'loop';
      parentClip.__myCharacterParentBounds = mcSafeClone(parentBounds);
      parentClip.__myCharacterCommittedAs = 'part child clips with per frame transforms';
    } catch(eParentT){}
    try { addClipToWickProject(parentClip); } catch(addErr) { mcLog('Character commit failed: ' + (addErr && addErr.message ? addErr.message : addErr)); return; }
    try {
      if (!App.committedClipIdentifiers) App.committedClipIdentifiers = [];

    mc.selectedId = savedSelected;

    try { var host = (window.parent && window.parent.document ? window.parent.document : document).getElementById('mcStagePartsHost_v040'); if (host && host.parentNode) host.parentNode.removeChild(host); } catch(eHostRemove){}
    try { markDirty(); } catch(eDirty){}
    mcRenderPanel();
    mcLog('Committed assembled character into one native Wick clip. Each part is a child clip with baked deformation and recorded per frame placement, including inherited pin motion.');
  };



  // FIX v_051: Commit pinned parts around their own orientation point.
  // Pinned child parts use their child root bone as the clip pivot. The child clip is placed at that pivot
  // and the native curve points are shifted inside the child clip so rotation happens around the same point
  // the user pinned on stage, instead of around the rectangle centre or the JSON source origin.
  function mcCommitPivotLocalForPart_v051(part){
    part = mcNormalizePartMode(part || {});
    var src = part && part.state && part.state.source ? part.state.source : {};
    var sw = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || (part.transform && part.transform.w) || App.source.width || 1));
    var sh = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || (part.transform && part.transform.h) || App.source.height || 1));
    if (part && part.parentPin && part.parentPin.childRootBoneId && part.state) {
      var root = mcBoneByIdInState(part.state, part.parentPin.childRootBoneId) || mcRootBoneInState(part.state);
      if (root && root.head) return { x:Number(root.head.x || 0), y:Number(root.head.y || 0), kind:'pinnedRootBone' };
    }
    return { x:sw * 0.5, y:sh * 0.5, kind:'partCentre' };
  }

  function mcCommitPivotRecordOffset_v051(pivotLocal, exportBounds){
    pivotLocal = pivotLocal || { x:0, y:0 };
    exportBounds = exportBounds || {};
    return {
      x:Number(pivotLocal.x || 0) + Number(exportBounds.offsetX || 0) - Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginX || 0),
      y:Number(pivotLocal.y || 0) + Number(exportBounds.offsetY || 0) - Number(exportBounds.nativeOriginY || 0)
    };
  }

  function mcShiftRecordToPivotLocal_v051(record, pivotLocal, exportBounds){
    var out = mcSafeClone(record || {});
    var json = out && out.paperJson ? mcSafeClone(out.paperJson) : null;
    var data = Array.isArray(json) ? json[1] : null;
    var pivot = mcCommitPivotRecordOffset_v051(pivotLocal, exportBounds);
    if (data && Array.isArray(data.segments)) {
      data.applyMatrix = true;
      data.segments = data.segments.map(function(seg){
        seg = seg || [];
        var p = seg[0] || [0, 0];
        var hIn = seg[1] || [0, 0];
        var hOut = seg[2] || [0, 0];
        return [
          [mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(p[0] || 0) - Number(pivot.x || 0)), mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(p[1] || 0) - Number(pivot.y || 0))],
          [mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(hIn[0] || 0)), mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(hIn[1] || 0))],
          [mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(hOut[0] || 0)), mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(hOut[1] || 0))]
        ];
      });
      out.paperJson = json;
      out.d = mcPaperJsonToPathData(json);
      return out;
    }
    return out;
  }

  function mcResolvedPivotWorldForPart_v051(part, pivotLocal){
    var pt = mcLocalPointToPartStage(part, { x:Number(pivotLocal && pivotLocal.x || 0), y:Number(pivotLocal && pivotLocal.y || 0) });
    if (pt) return pt;
    var t = part && part.transform ? part.transform : { x:0, y:0, w:1, h:1 };
    return { x:Number(t.x || 0) + Number(t.w || 0) * 0.5, y:Number(t.y || 0) + Number(t.h || 0) * 0.5 };
  }

  function mcApplyPivotedResolvedPartTransformToChildClip_v051(partClip, part, exportBounds, parentBounds, pivotLocal){
    if (!partClip || !part) return;
    var t = part.transform || { x:0, y:0, w:1, h:1, rotation:0 };
    var src = part.state && part.state.source ? part.state.source : (App.source || {});
    var srcW = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || App.source.width || t.w || 1));
    var srcH = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || App.source.height || t.h || 1));
    var sx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.w || srcW) / srcW);
    var sy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.h || srcH) / srcH);

    try {

      partClip.transformation.x = mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(pivotWorld.x || 0) - Number(parentBounds && parentBounds.x || 0));
      partClip.transformation.y = mcRoundCoordForCommit(Number(pivotWorld.y || 0) - Number(parentBounds && parentBounds.y || 0));
      partClip.transformation.scaleX = sx;
      partClip.transformation.scaleY = sy;
      partClip.transformation.rotation = Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0;

  mcCreatePartFrameChildClip_v050 = function(partName, part, frameNumber, exportBounds, parentBounds){
    var pivotLocal = mcCommitPivotLocalForPart_v051(part);
    var pivotOffset = mcCommitPivotRecordOffset_v051(pivotLocal, exportBounds);
    var childIdentifier = makeValidIdentifier(partName + '_f_' + frameNumber + '_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 100000), 'MyCharacterPartFrame');
    var childClip = new App.Wick.Clip({ identifier: childIdentifier });
    try { childClip.name = partName + '_frame_' + frameNumber; } catch(eName){}
    try { childClip.width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.width || App.source.width || 1))); } catch(eW){}
    try { childClip.height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.height || App.source.height || 1))); } catch(eH){}
    try {
      childClip.bounds = {
        x:mcRoundCoordForCommit(-Math.max(0, Number(pivotOffset.x || 0))),
        y:mcRoundCoordForCommit(-Math.max(0, Number(pivotOffset.y || 0))),
        width:Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.width || App.source.width || 1) + Math.abs(Number(pivotOffset.x || 0)))),
        height:Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(exportBounds && exportBounds.height || App.source.height || 1) + Math.abs(Number(pivotOffset.y || 0))))
      };
    } catch(eB){}
    var safeN = 50;
    try { while (childClip.timeline.layers.length && safeN-- > 0) childClip.timeline.removeLayer(childClip.timeline.layers[0]); } catch(eClear){}
    var layer = new App.Wick.Layer();
    try { layer.name = partName + ' native curves'; } catch(eLayerName){}
    childClip.timeline.addLayer(layer);
    var frame = new App.Wick.Frame({ start:1, end:1 });
    try { frame.identifier = makeValidIdentifier(partName + '_child_frame_' + frameNumber, 'child_frame_' + frameNumber); } catch(eFrameId){}
    layer.addFrame(frame);
    var count = 0;
    var records = nativeShapePathRecordsFromFrame(frameNumber, exportBounds);
    for (var si = 0; si < records.length; si += 1) {
      var shiftedRecord = mcShiftRecordToPivotLocal_v051(records[si], pivotLocal, exportBounds);
      var path = createNativeWickPathFromRecord(shiftedRecord, frameNumber, si + 1);
      try { path.name = partName + '_Curve_' + frameNumber + '_' + (si + 1); } catch(ePathName){}
      mcResetPathTransformAfterBake(path);
      addToFrame(frame, path);
      count += 1;
    }
    mcApplyPivotedResolvedPartTransformToChildClip_v051(childClip, part, exportBounds, parentBounds, pivotLocal);
    try {
      childClip.__myCharacterPartName = partName;
      childClip.__myCharacterSourcePartId = part.id;
      childClip.__myCharacterFrame = frameNumber;
      childClip.__myCharacterTransform = mcSafeClone(part.transform || {});
      childClip.__myCharacterParentPin = mcSafeClone(part.parentPin || null);
      childClip.__myCharacterOrientationPoint = mcSafeClone(pivotLocal || {});
      childClip.__myCharacterCommitPivot = 'v_051 orientation point';
    } catch(eMeta){}
    return count ? childClip : null;
  };




  // FIX v_053: unselected MyCharacter parts should preview their evaluated deformed curves, not the raw source SVG.
  // This lets secondary parts show their own curve deformation while another selected part is being animated.
  var mcSourceMarkupForStagePart_Base_v053 = mcSourceMarkupForStagePart;

  function mcWithPartStateForPreview_v053(part, frame, callback){
    if (!part || !part.state || !callback) return null;
    var saved = {
      source:App.source,
      bones:App.bones,
      keyframes:App.keyframes,
      pointKeys:App.pointKeys,
      frameBones:App.frameBones,
      frameBoneKeys:App.frameBoneKeys,
      currentFrame:App.currentFrame,
      frameCount:App.frameCount,
      selectedBoneId:App.selectedBoneId,
      pointAnimation:App.pointAnimation
    };
    try {
      App.source = part.state.source || {};
      App.bones = Array.isArray(part.state.bones) ? part.state.bones : [];
      App.keyframes = part.state.keyframes || {};
      App.pointKeys = part.state.pointKeys || {};
      App.frameBones = Array.isArray(part.state.frameBones) ? part.state.frameBones : [];
      App.frameBoneKeys = part.state.frameBoneKeys || {};
      App.currentFrame = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || saved.currentFrame || 1) || 1));
      App.frameCount = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(part.state.frameCount || saved.frameCount || 1) || 1));
      App.selectedBoneId = null;
      App.pointAnimation = part.state.pointAnimation || saved.pointAnimation || {};
      return callback();
    } catch(e) {
      try { console.error('[MyCharacter] deformed secondary preview failed', e); } catch(eLog){}
      return null;
    } finally {
      App.source = saved.source;
      App.bones = saved.bones;
      App.keyframes = saved.keyframes;
      App.pointKeys = saved.pointKeys;
      App.frameBones = saved.frameBones;
      App.frameBoneKeys = saved.frameBoneKeys;
      App.currentFrame = saved.currentFrame;
      App.frameCount = saved.frameCount;
      App.selectedBoneId = saved.selectedBoneId;
      App.pointAnimation = saved.pointAnimation;
    }
  }

  function mcDeformedMarkupForStagePart_v053(part, frame){
    if (!part || !part.state || !part.state.source) return '';
    var src = part.state.source || {};
    var w = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || 300));
    var h = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || 200));
    var records = mcWithPartStateForPreview_v053(part, frame || App.currentFrame || 1, function(){
      var bounds = { width:w, height:h, offsetX:0, offsetY:0, nativeOriginX:0, nativeOriginY:0 };
      return nativeShapePathRecordsFromFrame(App.currentFrame || 1, bounds);
    });
    if (!records || !records.length) return '';
    var body = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < records.length; i += 1) {
      var rec = records[i] || {};
      if (!String(rec.d || '').trim()) continue;
      body += '<path d="' + escapeXmlAttr(String(rec.d).trim()) + '"' + styleMapToAttrs(rec.style || {}) + ' />';
    }
    if (!body) return '';
    return '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 ' + w + ' ' + h + '" preserveAspectRatio="none" style="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;pointer-events:none;">' + body + '</svg>';
  }

  mcSourceMarkupForStagePart = function(part){

  // FIX v_052: While animating one part, keep secondary pinned parts visible and moving, but faded behind the selected RotoBones overlay.

    opacity = opacity == null ? 0.42 : Number(opacity || 0.42);
    part.state.bones.forEach(function(bone){
      if (!bone) return;
      var h = mcPartStagePointForBone(part, bone.id, frame, 'head');

      if (!h || !t) return;
      var hv = stageBoundsToViewportRect({x:h.x, y:h.y, w:1, h:1});

      var y1 = Number(hv.y || 0) - Number(hostRect.top || 0);
      var x2 = Number(tv.x || 0) - Number(hostRect.left || 0);
      var y2 = Number(tv.y || 0) - Number(hostRect.top || 0);
      out += '<line x1="' + x1 + '" y1="' + y1 + '" x2="' + x2 + '" y2="' + y2 + '" stroke="#b36cff" stroke-width="3" stroke-opacity="' + opacity + '" pointer-events="none" />';
      out += '<circle cx="' + x1 + '" cy="' + y1 + '" r="5" fill="#1ee29a" fill-opacity="' + Math.min(0.9, opacity + 0.18) + '" stroke="#062" stroke-width="1.5" pointer-events="none" />';

  function mcRenderStageParts_v052(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();

    try { mcHideOldStagePartsHost_v040(); } catch(eHide){}
    var host = mcEnsureStagePartsHost_v040 ? mcEnsureStagePartsHost_v040() : mcEnsureStagePartsHost();
    if (!host) return;
    var stageRect = mcStageRect_v040 ? mcStageRect_v040() : (updateOverlayClipHost() || {left:0,top:0});
    var selectedId = Number(mc.selectedId || 0);
    var fadeInactive = mcShouldFadeInactiveParts_v050 ? mcShouldFadeInactiveParts_v050() : false;
    try { host.style.pointerEvents = mc.pinPickSourceId ? 'auto' : 'none'; } catch(eHostPointer){}
    try { host.style.zIndex = fadeInactive ? '1' : '0'; } catch(eZ){}
    try { if (App.overlay && App.overlay.root) App.overlay.root.style.zIndex = fadeInactive ? '2147481200' : '100'; } catch(eOverlayZ){}
    var html = '';
    var boneOverlay = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) {
      var part = mcNormalizePartMode(mc.parts[i]);
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) continue;
      if (Number(part.id) === selectedId) continue;
      var rect = mcPartClientRect_v040 ? mcPartClientRect_v040(part) : null;
      if (!rect) {
        var tFallback = part.transform || { x:50, y:50, w:300, h:200, rotation:0 };
        rect = stageBoundsToViewportRect({ x:Number(tFallback.x || 0), y:Number(tFallback.y || 0), w:Math.max(1, Number(tFallback.w || 1)), h:Math.max(1, Number(tFallback.h || 1)) });
      }

      var markup = mcSourceMarkupForStagePart(part);
      if (!markup) continue;
      var t = part.transform || { rotation:0 };
      var left = Math.round(Number(rect.x || 0) - Number(stageRect.left || 0));
      var top = Math.round(Number(rect.y || 0) - Number(stageRect.top || 0));
      var width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.width || 1))));
      var height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.height || 1))));
      var opacity = fadeInactive ? 0.32 : 1;
      html += '<div data-mc-stage-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" style="position:absolute;left:' + left + 'px;top:' + top + 'px;width:' + width + 'px;height:' + height + 'px;z-index:' + (20 + i) + ';pointer-events:none;opacity:' + opacity + ';transform-origin:50% 50%;transform:rotate(' + (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) + 'deg);overflow:visible;">' + markup + '</div>';

    }

    }
    host.innerHTML = html;
    if (mc.pinPickSourceId) {
      try { mcRenderPinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(ePin){}
      try { mcBindStagePinLayerEvents(host); } catch(eBind){}
    } else {
      try { mcRemovePinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(eRemove){}
    }
  }

  mcCompletePinToBone = function(source, target, bone, evt){

      y:Number(childRootStage.y || 0) - Number(targetStage.y || 0)
    };

    source.parentPin = {
      targetPartId:target.id,
      boneId:String(bone.id == null ? '' : bone.id),
      attachPoint:attachPoint,
      childRootBoneId:String(childRoot.id == null ? '' : childRoot.id),
      offset:{

        y:Number(localOffset.y || 0),

    return true;
  };

  mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v054 = function(child, parts, frame){

      var pose = App.keyframes[frame] || null;
      if (!pose) return false;
      var key = pose[rootBone.id] || pose[String(rootBone.id)] || null;
      if (!key || !key.head || !key.tail) return false;
      var restHead = { x:Number(rootBone.head.x || 0), y:Number(rootBone.head.y || 0) };
      var dx = Number(key.head.x || 0) - restHead.x;
      var dy = Number(key.head.y || 0) - restHead.y;
      if (Math.abs(dx) < 0.0001 && Math.abs(dy) < 0.0001) return false;
      key.head.x = restHead.x;
      key.head.y = restHead.y;
      key.tail.x = Number(key.tail.x || 0) - dx;
      key.tail.y = Number(key.tail.y || 0) - dy;
      try { key.angle = Math.atan2(Number(key.tail.y || 0) - Number(key.head.y || 0), Number(key.tail.x || 0) - Number(key.head.x || 0)); } catch(eAngle){}
      try { copyEnvAndAngleFallback(key, rootBone); } catch(eCopy){}
      try { writeLocalAngleForBoneItem(rootBone, key, getPoseForFrame(frame)); } catch(eWrite){}
      try { enforceAllPoseChains(pose); } catch(eChains){}
      return true;
    } catch(eLockPinnedRoot) { return false; }
  }

  function mcAfterPinnedChildAnimationChange_v065(){
    try {
      var part = mcSelectedPinnedPart_v065();
      if (!part) return;
      try { part.state = buildRigProjectState(); } catch(eState){}
      try { part.transform = mcReadTransform(); } catch(eTransform){}
      try { mcRefreshPinnedChildren(); } catch(eRefresh){}
      try { if (part.transform) mcApplyTransformToApp(part.transform); } catch(eApply){}
      try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(eStage){}
    } catch(eAfterPinned){}
  }

  var onOverlayMouseMove_Base_v065 = onOverlayMouseMove;
  onOverlayMouseMove = function(e){
    var result = onOverlayMouseMove_Base_v065.apply(this, arguments);
    try {
      if (App && App.interaction && App.interaction.dragging && isAnimateKeyContext && isAnimateKeyContext() && mcSelectedPinnedPart_v065()) {
        var changed = mcLockSelectedPinnedRootKey_v065();
        if (changed) {
          mcAfterPinnedChildAnimationChange_v065();
          try { renderOverlay(); } catch(eRender){}
        }
      }
    } catch(ePinnedMove){}
    return result;
  };

  var onOverlayMouseUp_Base_v065 = onOverlayMouseUp;
  onOverlayMouseUp = function(e){
    try {
      if (App && App.interaction && App.interaction.dragging && isAnimateKeyContext && isAnimateKeyContext() && mcSelectedPinnedPart_v065()) {
        mcLockSelectedPinnedRootKey_v065();
      }
    } catch(ePreUp){}
    var result = onOverlayMouseUp_Base_v065.apply(this, arguments);
    try {
      if (mcSelectedPinnedPart_v065()) {
        mcAfterPinnedChildAnimationChange_v065();
        try { renderOverlay(); } catch(eRender){}
      }
    } catch(ePostUp){}
    return result;
  };

  // FIX v_065: The selected pinned child should keep the parent's animated arc while its own
  // bones are edited. The parent pin resolves the child root; child root head keys are clamped.
  try { log('MyCharacter v_065 pinned child root lock active.'); } catch(e){}




  // FIX v_067: Pinned child parts must use one transform model everywhere.
  // The parent bone supplies the world anchor and rotation. The child root bone is the
  // transform origin. The child part's own keys deform inside that inherited transform.
  function mcPinnedRootBoneForPart_v066(part){
    try {
      if (!part || !part.state) return null;
      var pin = part.parentPin || {};
      if (pin.childRootBoneId != null && pin.childRootBoneId !== '') {
        var b = mcBoneByIdInState(part.state, pin.childRootBoneId);
        if (b && b.head) return b;
      }
      var r = mcRootBoneInState(part.state);
      if (r && r.head) return r;
    } catch(e){}
    return null;
  }

  function mcPinnedOrientationOffset_v066(pin){
    pin = pin || {};
    var off = pin.offset || {};
    if (off.rotation != null) return Number(off.rotation || 0);
    if (pin.rotationOffset != null) return Number(pin.rotationOffset || 0);
    if (pin.rootOrientationOffset != null && pin.childRootLocalAngleAtPin != null) {
      return Number(pin.rootOrientationOffset || 0) - Number(pin.childRootLocalAngleAtPin || 0);
    }
    return 0;
  }

  function mcPinnedRootTransformForStage_v066(part, rootLocal, desiredRootStage, rotationDeg, baseTransform){
    var src = part && part.state && part.state.source ? part.state.source : {};
    var t = mcSafeClone(baseTransform || (part && part.transform) || { x:0, y:0, w:Number(src.width || 1), h:Number(src.height || 1), rotation:0 });
    var sw = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || t.w || 1));
    var sh = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || t.h || 1));
    t.w = Math.max(1, Number(t.w || sw));
    t.h = Math.max(1, Number(t.h || sh));
    var sx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.w || sw) / sw);
    var sy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.h || sh) / sh);
    var rx = Number(rootLocal && rootLocal.x || 0);
    var ry = Number(rootLocal && rootLocal.y || 0);
    t.rotation = Number(rotationDeg || 0);
    t.x = Number(desiredRootStage && desiredRootStage.x || 0) - rx * sx;
    t.y = Number(desiredRootStage && desiredRootStage.y || 0) - ry * sy;
    t.mcPinnedRootOriginX = rx;
    t.mcPinnedRootOriginY = ry;
    t.mcPinnedTransformOrigin = 'root';
    return t;
  }

  function mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(child, parts, frame){
    child = mcNormalizePartMode(child || {});
    if (!child || !child.parentPin || !child.parentPin.boneId || !child.state) return null;
    var parent = mcFindPartInList(parts || mcEnsure().parts || [], child.parentPin.targetPartId);
    if (!parent || !parent.state) return null;
    var pin = child.parentPin || {};
    var childRoot = mcPinnedRootBoneForPart_v066(child);
    if (!childRoot || !childRoot.head) return null;
    frame = Math.max(1, Math.round(Number(frame || App.currentFrame || 1) || 1));
    var targetStage = mcPartStagePointForBone(parent, pin.boneId, frame, pin.attachPoint || 'head');
    if (!targetStage) return null;
    var targetBoneAngle = 0;
    try { targetBoneAngle = mcPinBoneStageAngleDegForCommit_v047 ? mcPinBoneStageAngleDegForCommit_v047(parent, pin.boneId, frame) : mcPinBoneStageAngleDeg_v042(parent, pin.boneId, frame); } catch(eAngle) { targetBoneAngle = 0; }
    var off = pin.offset || { x:0, y:0, rotation:0 };
    var localOff = pin.offsetLocal ? { x:Number(pin.offsetLocal.x || 0), y:Number(pin.offsetLocal.y || 0) } : { x:Number(off.x || 0), y:Number(off.y || 0) };
    var rotatedOffset = (off.mode === 'boneLocal' || pin.offsetLocal) ? mcRotatePoint_v042(localOff, Number(targetBoneAngle || 0)) : localOff;
    var desiredRootStage = {
      x:Number(targetStage.x || 0) + Number(rotatedOffset.x || 0),
      y:Number(targetStage.y || 0) + Number(rotatedOffset.y || 0)
    };
    var finalRotation = Number(targetBoneAngle || 0) + mcPinnedOrientationOffset_v066(pin);
    return mcPinnedRootTransformForStage_v066(child, childRoot.head, desiredRootStage, finalRotation, child.transform);
  }

  var mcLocalPointToPartStage_Base_v066 = mcLocalPointToPartStage;
  mcLocalPointToPartStage = function(part, pt){
    try {
      if (part && part.parentPin && part.transform && part.state && part.state.source && pt) {
        var t = part.transform || {};
        var src = part.state.source || {};
        var root = mcPinnedRootBoneForPart_v066(part);
        if (root && root.head) {
          var sw = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || t.w || 1));
          var sh = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || t.h || 1));
          var sx = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.w || sw) / sw);
          var sy = Math.max(0.0001, Number(t.h || sh) / sh);
          var x = Number(t.x || 0) + Number(pt.x || 0) * sx;
          var y = Number(t.y || 0) + Number(pt.y || 0) * sy;
          var ox = Number(t.x || 0) + Number(root.head.x || 0) * sx;
          var oy = Number(t.y || 0) + Number(root.head.y || 0) * sy;
          var a = Number(t.rotation || 0) * Math.PI / 180;
          if (a) {
            var c = Math.cos(a);
            var s = Math.sin(a);
            var dx = x - ox;
            var dy = y - oy;
            x = ox + dx * c - dy * s;
            y = oy + dx * s + dy * c;
          }
          return { x:x, y:y };
        }
      }
    } catch(ePinnedLocalMap){}
    return mcLocalPointToPartStage_Base_v066(part, pt);
  };

  mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v054 = function(child, parts, frame){ return mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(child, parts, frame); };
  mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v059 = function(child, parts, frame){ return mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(child, parts, frame); };
  mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v063 = function(child, parts, frame){ return mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(child, parts, frame); };

  mcUpdatePinnedChildFromParentBoneForFrame = function(child, parts, frame){
    var resolved = mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(child, parts || mcEnsure().parts || [], frame || App.currentFrame || 1);
    if (!resolved) return false;
    var before = child && child.transform ? child.transform : {};
    var changed = Math.abs(Number(before.x || 0) - Number(resolved.x || 0)) > 0.001 ||
      Math.abs(Number(before.y || 0) - Number(resolved.y || 0)) > 0.001 ||
      Math.abs(Number(before.rotation || 0) - Number(resolved.rotation || 0)) > 0.001;
    child.transform = resolved;
    if (child && Number(child.id || 0) === Number(mcEnsure().selectedId || 0) && child.state) mcApplyTransformToApp(child.transform);
    return changed;
  };

  mcResolveSelectedPinnedPartBeforeOverlay_v058 = function(){
    try {
      var mc = mcEnsure();
      if (!mc || mc.loading) return false;
      var selected = mcSelectedPart ? mcSelectedPart() : null;
      if (!selected || !selected.state || !selected.parentPin || !selected.parentPin.boneId) return false;
      var resolved = mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(selected, mc.parts || [], App.currentFrame || 1);
      if (!resolved) return false;
      selected.transform = resolved;
      mcApplyTransformToApp(selected.transform);
      return true;
    } catch(eResolvePinned_v066) { return false; }
  };

  function mcPinnedCssOriginForPart_v066(part){
    try {
      var root = mcPinnedRootBoneForPart_v066(part);
      var src = part && part.state && part.state.source ? part.state.source : {};
      if (!root || !root.head || !src) return '50% 50%';
      var sw = Math.max(1, Number(src.width || (part.transform && part.transform.w) || 1));
      var sh = Math.max(1, Number(src.height || (part.transform && part.transform.h) || 1));
      return (Number(root.head.x || 0) / sw * 100) + '% ' + (Number(root.head.y || 0) / sh * 100) + '%';
    } catch(eOrigin) { return '50% 50%'; }
  }

  function mcRenderStageParts_v066(){
    var mc = mcEnsure();
    try { mcRefreshPinnedChildren(); } catch(eRefresh){}
    try { mcHideOldStagePartsHost_v040(); } catch(eHide){}
    var host = mcEnsureStagePartsHost_v040 ? mcEnsureStagePartsHost_v040() : mcEnsureStagePartsHost();
    if (!host) return;
    var stageRect = mcStageRect_v040 ? mcStageRect_v040() : (updateOverlayClipHost() || {left:0,top:0});
    var selectedId = Number(mc.selectedId || 0);
    var fadeInactive = mcShouldFadeInactiveParts_v050 ? mcShouldFadeInactiveParts_v050() : false;
    try { host.style.pointerEvents = mc.pinPickSourceId ? 'auto' : 'none'; } catch(eHostPointer){}
    try { host.style.zIndex = fadeInactive ? '1' : '0'; } catch(eZ){}
    try { if (App.overlay && App.overlay.root) App.overlay.root.style.zIndex = fadeInactive ? '2147481200' : '100'; } catch(eOverlayZ){}
    var html = '';
    var boneOverlay = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < mc.parts.length; i += 1) {
      var part = mcNormalizePartMode(mc.parts[i]);
      if (!part || !part.state || part.visible === false) continue;
      if (Number(part.id) === selectedId) continue;
      var rect = mcPartClientRect_v040 ? mcPartClientRect_v040(part) : null;
      if (!rect) {
        var tFallback = part.transform || { x:50, y:50, w:300, h:200, rotation:0 };
        rect = stageBoundsToViewportRect({ x:Number(tFallback.x || 0), y:Number(tFallback.y || 0), w:Math.max(1, Number(tFallback.w || 1)), h:Math.max(1, Number(tFallback.h || 1)) });
      }
      if (!rect) continue;
      var markup = mcSourceMarkupForStagePart(part);
      if (!markup) continue;
      var t = part.transform || { rotation:0 };
      var left = Math.round(Number(rect.x || 0) - Number(stageRect.left || 0));
      var top = Math.round(Number(rect.y || 0) - Number(stageRect.top || 0));
      var width = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.width || 1))));
      var height = Math.max(1, Math.round(Math.abs(Number(rect.height || 1))));
      var opacity = fadeInactive ? 0.32 : 1;
      var origin = part.parentPin ? mcPinnedCssOriginForPart_v066(part) : '50% 50%';
      html += '<div data-mc-stage-part-id="' + Number(part.id) + '" style="position:absolute;left:' + left + 'px;top:' + top + 'px;width:' + width + 'px;height:' + height + 'px;z-index:' + (20 + i) + ';pointer-events:none;opacity:' + opacity + ';transform-origin:' + origin + ';transform:rotate(' + (Number(t.rotation || 0) || 0) + 'deg);overflow:visible;">' + markup + '</div>';
      if (fadeInactive) boneOverlay += mcPartBoneMarkupForStage_v052(part, stageRect, 0.45);
    }
    if (boneOverlay) {
      html += '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible;z-index:2147481300;pointer-events:none;">' + boneOverlay + '</svg>';
    }
    host.innerHTML = html;
    if (mc.pinPickSourceId) {
      try { mcRenderPinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(ePin){}
      try { mcBindStagePinLayerEvents(host); } catch(eBind){}
    } else {
      try { mcRemovePinPickLayer_v039(); } catch(eRemove){}
    }
  }

  mcRenderStageParts = function(){
    try { mcRenderStageParts_v066(); } catch(e) { mcLog('Stage part render failed: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : e)); }
  };

  mcAfterPinnedChildAnimationChange_v065 = function(){
    try {
      var part = mcSelectedPinnedPart_v065 ? mcSelectedPinnedPart_v065() : null;
      if (!part) return;
      try { part.state = buildRigProjectState(); } catch(eState){}
      try {
        var mc = mcEnsure();
        var resolved = mcPinnedTransformForFrame_v066(part, mc.parts || [], App.currentFrame || 1);
        if (resolved) part.transform = resolved;
      } catch(eResolved){}
      try { if (part.transform) mcApplyTransformToApp(part.transform); } catch(eApply){}
      try { mcRefreshPinnedChildren(); } catch(eRefresh){}
      try { mcRenderStageParts(); } catch(eStage){}
    } catch(eAfterPinned_v066){}
  };

  try { log('MyCharacter v_067 pinned child root origin transform active.'); } catch(e){}

  function init(){
    try { forceToolPanelFill(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] forceToolPanelFill failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { refreshBridgeRefs(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] refreshBridgeRefs failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { bindEvents(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] RotoBones bindEvents failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { mcBindEvents(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] MyCharacter bind failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { purgeStaleOwnedOverlays(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] purge overlays failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { startFollowWick(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] startFollowWick failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { startCloseWatcher(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] close watcher failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { startCloseObserver(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] close observer failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { installParentCloseCleanup(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] parent close cleanup failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { window.addEventListener('resize', forceToolPanelFill); } catch(e){} // FIX v7.6
    try { window.parent && window.parent.addEventListener && window.parent.addEventListener('resize', forceToolPanelFill); } catch(e){} // FIX v7.6
    try { window.addEventListener('message', function(e){ if (e && e.data && (e.data.type === 'LukeToolsClose' || e.data.type === 'LukeToolsToolClosed')) cleanupToolOverlays(); }); } catch(e){}
    try { syncFrameCountFromWickTimeline(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] sync frame count failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { updateUI(); } catch(e){ console.error('[MyCharacter] updateUI failed', e); } // FIX v_018
    try { log('MyCharacter v_067 ready. Pinned child root origin transform active.'); } catch(e){} // FIX v_018
    try { if (!App.B) log('Warning: LukeToolsBridge not found yet. The tool will still retry when you capture selection.'); } catch(e){}
  }

  init();
})();


  // FIX v_027: MyCharacter cards are the only scrolling region in Build Character.
  (function mcLockCharacterChrome(){
    function isCharacterActive(){
      var page = document.querySelector('.panelPage[data-page="character"]');
      return !!(page && page.classList.contains('active'));
    }
    function resetPanelScroll(){
      var p = document.getElementById('panel');
      if (p && isCharacterActive() && p.scrollTop !== 0) p.scrollTop = 0;
    }
    document.addEventListener('wheel', function(ev){
      if (!isCharacterActive()) return;
      var cards = document.getElementById('mcCards');
      if (!cards) return;
      if (!cards.contains(ev.target)) {
        resetPanelScroll();
        ev.preventDefault();
      }
    }, { passive:false, capture:true });
    document.addEventListener('scroll', resetPanelScroll, true);
    setInterval(resetPanelScroll, 250);
  })();
</script>
